authors_text: Ye Liu,Yaya Cheng,Lianli Gao,Xianglong Liu,Qilong Zhang,Jingkuan Song
title: Practical Evaluation of Adversarial Robustness via Adaptive Auto Attack
title_zh: 通过自适应自动攻击对对抗鲁棒性进行实际评估
abstract: Defense models against adversarial attacks have grown significantly, but the lack of practical evaluation methods has hindered progress. Evaluation can be defined as looking for defense models' lower bound of robustness given a budget number of iterations and a test dataset. A practical evaluation method should be convenient (i.e., parameter-free), efficient (i.e., fewer iterations) and reliable (i.e., approaching the lower bound of robustness). Towards this target, we propose a parameter-free Adaptive Auto Attack (A$^3$) evaluation method which addresses the efficiency and reliability in a test-time-training fashion. Specifically, by observing that adversarial examples to a specific defense model follow some regularities in their starting points, we design an Adaptive Direction Initialization strategy to speed up the evaluation. Furthermore, to approach the lower bound of robustness under the budget number of iterations, we propose an online statistics-based discarding strategy that automatically identifies and abandons hard-to-attack images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our A$^3$. Particularly, we apply A$^3$ to nearly 50 widely-used defense models. By consuming much fewer iterations than existing methods, i.e., $1/10$ on average (10$\times$ speed up), we achieve lower robust accuracy in all cases. Notably, we won $\textbf{first place}$ out of 1681 teams in CVPR 2021 White-box Adversarial Attacks on Defense Models competitions with this method. Code is available at: $\href{https://github.com/liuye6666/adaptive_auto_attack}{https://github.com/liuye6666/adaptive\_auto\_attack}$

abstract_zh: 针对对抗性攻击的防御模型已显着增长，但缺乏实用的评估方法阻碍了进展。评估可以定义为在给定预算迭代次数和测试数据集的情况下寻找防御模型稳健性的下限。实用的评估方法应该是方便的（即无参数）、高效的（即更少的迭代）和可靠的（即接近鲁棒性的下限）。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种无参数自适应自动攻击（A$^3$）评估方法，该方法以测试时训练的方式解决效率和可靠性问题。具体来说，通过观察特定防御模型的对抗性示例在起点上遵循一些规律，我们设计了自适应方向初始化策略来加速评估。此外，为了接近预算迭代次数下的鲁棒性下限，我们提出了一种基于在线统计的丢弃策略，该策略自动识别并丢弃难以攻击的图像。大量的实验证明了我们的 A$^3$ 的有效性。特别是，我们将 A$^3$ 应用于近 50 个广泛使用的防御模型。通过比现有方法消耗更少的迭代次数，即平均 1/10$（加速 10$\times$），我们在所有情况下都实现了较低的鲁棒精度。值得注意的是，我们使用这种方法在 CVPR 2021 白盒对抗性攻击防御模型竞赛中从 1681 个团队中赢得了$\textbf{第一名}$。代码位于：$\href{https://github.com/liuye6666/adaptive_auto_attack}{https://github.com/liuye6666/adaptive\_auto\_attack}$

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为A³的参数-free对抗鲁棒性评估方法，旨在提高评估防御模型的效率和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击评估方法存在效率低、可靠性不足的问题，缺乏实用的评估手段阻碍了防御模型的发展。
AI.method: 通过观察对抗样本的起始点规律，设计自适应方向初始化策略加速评估；结合在线统计弃选策略，自动剔除难以攻击的样本以逼近鲁棒性下界。
AI.result: 在近50种防御模型上实现10倍加速，所有案例中均取得更低的鲁棒准确率，并在CVPR 2021白盒攻击竞赛中获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: A³方法在效率与可靠性上优于现有技术，为对抗鲁棒性评估提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Cheng Luo,Qinliang Lin,Weicheng Xie,Bizhu Wu,Jinheng Xie,Linlin Shen
title: Frequency-driven Imperceptible Adversarial Attack on Semantic Similarity
title_zh: 对语义相似性的频率驱动的难以察觉的对抗性攻击
abstract: Current adversarial attack research reveals the vulnerability of learning-based classifiers against carefully crafted perturbations. However, most existing attack methods have inherent limitations in cross-dataset generalization as they rely on a classification layer with a closed set of categories. Furthermore, the perturbations generated by these methods may appear in regions easily perceptible to the human visual system (HVS). To circumvent the former problem, we propose a novel algorithm that attacks semantic similarity on feature representations. In this way, we are able to fool classifiers without limiting attacks to a specific dataset. For imperceptibility, we introduce the low-frequency constraint to limit perturbations within high-frequency components, ensuring perceptual similarity between adversarial examples and originals. Extensive experiments on three datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K) and three public online platforms indicate that our attack can yield misleading and transferable adversarial examples across architectures and datasets. Additionally, visualization results and quantitative performance (in terms of four different metrics) show that the proposed algorithm generates more imperceptible perturbations than the state-of-the-art methods. Code is made available at.
summary: Current adversarial attack research reveals the vulnerability of learning-based classifiers against carefully crafted perturbations. However, most existing attack methods have inherent limitations in cross-dataset generalization as they rely on a classification layer with a closed set of categories. Furthermore, the perturbations generated by these methods may appear in regions easily perceptible to the human visual system (HVS). To circumvent the former problem, we propose a novel algorithm that attacks semantic similarity on feature representations. In this way, we are able to fool classifiers without limiting attacks to a specific dataset. For imperceptibility, we introduce the low-frequency constraint to limit perturbations within high-frequency components, ensuring perceptual similarity between adversarial examples and originals. Extensive experiments on three datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K) and three public online platforms indicate that our attack can yield misleading and transferable adversarial examples across architectures and datasets. Additionally, visualization results and quantitative performance (in terms of four different metrics) show that the proposed algorithm generates more imperceptible perturbations than the state-of-the-art methods. Code is made available at.
abstract_zh: 当前的对抗性攻击研究揭示了基于学习的分类器对于精心设计的扰动的脆弱性。然而，大多数现有的攻击方法在跨数据集泛化方面具有固有的局限性，因为它们依赖于具有封闭类别集的分类层。此外，这些方法产生的扰动可能出现在人类视觉系统（HVS）容易感知的区域。为了解决前一个问题，我们提出了一种新的算法来攻击特征表示的语义相似性。通过这种方式，我们能够欺骗分类器，而无需将攻击限制在特定数据集上。为了难以察觉，我们引入低频约束来限制高频分量内的扰动，确保对抗性示例和原始示例之间的感知相似性。对三个数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet-1K）和三个公共在线平台的广泛实验表明，我们的攻击可能会产生跨架构和数据集的误导性且可转移的对抗性示例。此外，可视化结果和定量性能（根据四种不同的指标）表明，所提出的算法比最先进的方法产生更多难以察觉的扰动。代码可在以下位置获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率驱动的不可感知对抗攻击方法，通过攻击语义相似性实现跨数据集的可迁移对抗样本生成。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法存在跨数据集泛化能力差和扰动感知度高的问题，需设计不依赖特定分类层且更隐蔽的攻击方案。
AI.method: 在特征表示层面攻击语义相似性，结合低频约束限制扰动至高频成分，确保对抗样本与原始样本感知相似性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet-1K及三个在线平台实验中，攻击方法实现跨架构数据集的可迁移性，且扰动不可感知性优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过语义相似性攻击与频率约束有效解决了对抗样本的泛化性和隐蔽性问题，为跨域攻击提供新思路。

authors_text: Chuyu Zhang,Chuanyang Hu,Hui Ren,Yongfei Liu,Xuming He
title: Cascaded Sparse Feature Propagation Network for Interactive Segmentation
title_zh: 用于交互式分割的级联稀疏特征传播网络
comment: The first two authors contribute equally. Accepted by BMVC 2023
comments: The first two authors contribute equally. Accepted by BMVC 2023
abstract: We aim to tackle the problem of point-based interactive segmentation, in which the key challenge is to propagate the user-provided annotations to unlabeled regions efficiently. Existing methods tackle this challenge by utilizing computationally expensive fully connected graphs or transformer architectures that sacrifice important fine-grained information required for accurate segmentation. To overcome these limitations, we propose a cascade sparse feature propagation network that learns a click-augmented feature representation for propagating user-provided information to unlabeled regions. The sparse design of our network enables efficient information propagation on high-resolution features, resulting in more detailed object segmentation. We validate the effectiveness of our method through comprehensive experiments on various benchmarks, and the results demonstrate the superior performance of our approach. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}.
summary: We aim to tackle the problem of point-based interactive segmentation, in which the key challenge is to propagate the user-provided annotations to unlabeled regions efficiently. Existing methods tackle this challenge by utilizing computationally expensive fully connected graphs or transformer architectures that sacrifice important fine-grained information required for accurate segmentation. To overcome these limitations, we propose a cascade sparse feature propagation network that learns a click-augmented feature representation for propagating user-provided information to unlabeled regions. The sparse design of our network enables efficient information propagation on high-resolution features, resulting in more detailed object segmentation. We validate the effectiveness of our method through comprehensive experiments on various benchmarks, and the results demonstrate the superior performance of our approach. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是解决基于点的交互式分割问题，其中的关键挑战是将用户提供的注释有效地传播到未标记的区域。现有方法通过利用计算成本昂贵的全连接图或变压器架构来解决这一挑战，这些架构牺牲了精确分割所需的重要细粒度信息。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一个级联稀疏特征传播网络，该网络学习点击增强特征表示，以将用户提供的信息传播到未标记区域。我们网络的稀疏设计能够在高分辨率特征上进行有效的信息传播，从而产生更详细的对象分割。我们通过对各种基准的综合实验验证了我们方法的有效性，结果证明了我们方法的优越性能。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种级联稀疏特征传播网络（CSFPN），用于解决基于点的交互式分割问题，旨在高效传播用户提供的标注信息以实现精确分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过全连接图或Transformer架构处理交互式分割，但计算成本高且丢失细粒度信息，需更高效且保留细节的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计级联稀疏特征传播网络，通过稀疏特征表示和点击增强机制，在高分辨率特征上实现高效信息传播，提升分割细节准确性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在分割精度和效率上优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CSFPN通过稀疏特征传播有效解决了交互式分割中的计算与细节保留问题，验证了其在高分辨率场景下的优越性。

search_text: Cascaded Sparse Feature Propagation Network for Interactive Segmentation 用于交互式分割的级联稀疏特征传播网络 We aim to tackle the problem of point-based interactive segmentation, in which the key challenge is to propagate the user-provided annotations to unlabeled regions efficiently. Existing methods tackle this challenge by utilizing computationally expensive fully connected graphs or transformer architectures that sacrifice important fine-grained information required for accurate segmentation. To overcome these limitations, we propose a cascade sparse feature propagation network that learns a click-augmented feature representation for propagating user-provided information to unlabeled regions. The sparse design of our network enables efficient information propagation on high-resolution features, resulting in more detailed object segmentation. We validate the effectiveness of our method through comprehensive experiments on various benchmarks, and the results demonstrate the superior performance of our approach. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}. 我们的目标是解决基于点的交互式分割问题，其中的关键挑战是将用户提供的注释有效地传播到未标记的区域。现有方法通过利用计算成本昂贵的全连接图或变压器架构来解决这一挑战，这些架构牺牲了精确分割所需的重要细粒度信息。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一个级联稀疏特征传播网络，该网络学习点击增强特征表示，以将用户提供的信息传播到未标记区域。我们网络的稀疏设计能够在高分辨率特征上进行有效的信息传播，从而产生更详细的对象分割。我们通过对各种基准的综合实验验证了我们方法的有效性，结果证明了我们方法的优越性能。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN}{https://github.com/kleinzcy/CSFPN} 获取。 本文提出了一种级联稀疏特征传播网络（CSFPN），用于解决基于点的交互式分割问题，旨在高效传播用户提供的标注信息以实现精确分割。 Chuyu Zhang,Chuanyang Hu,Hui Ren,Yongfei Liu,Xuming He cs.CV

authors_text: Georgios Georgakis,Karl Schmeckpeper,Karan Wanchoo,Soham Dan,Eleni Miltsakaki,Dan Roth,Kostas Daniilidis
title: Cross-modal Map Learning for Vision and Language Navigation
title_zh: 用于视觉和语言导航的跨模态地图学习
abstract: We consider the problem of Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). The majority of current methods for VLN are trained end-to-end using either unstructured memory such as LSTM, or using cross-modal attention over the egocentric observations of the agent. In contrast to other works, our key insight is that the association between language and vision is stronger when it occurs in explicit spatial representations. In this work, we propose a cross-modal map learning model for vision-and-language navigation that first learns to predict the top-down semantics on an egocentric map for both observed and unobserved regions, and then predicts a path towards the goal as a set of waypoints. In both cases, the prediction is informed by the language through cross-modal attention mechanisms. We experimentally test the basic hypothesis that language-driven navigation can be solved given a map, and then show competitive results on the full VLN-CE benchmark.
summary: We consider the problem of Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). The majority of current methods for VLN are trained end-to-end using either unstructured memory such as LSTM, or using cross-modal attention over the egocentric observations of the agent. In contrast to other works, our key insight is that the association between language and vision is stronger when it occurs in explicit spatial representations. In this work, we propose a cross-modal map learning model for vision-and-language navigation that first learns to predict the top-down semantics on an egocentric map for both observed and unobserved regions, and then predicts a path towards the goal as a set of waypoints. In both cases, the prediction is informed by the language through cross-modal attention mechanisms. We experimentally test the basic hypothesis that language-driven navigation can be solved given a map, and then show competitive results on the full VLN-CE benchmark.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑视觉和语言导航（VLN）的问题。当前大多数 VLN 方法都是使用非结构化记忆（例如 LSTM）或对智能体的自我中心观察使用跨模式注意力进行端到端训练。与其他作品相比，我们的主要见解是，当语言和视觉之间的关联出现在明确的空间表征中时，这种关联会更强。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于视觉和语言导航的跨模式地图学习模型，该模型首先学习在以自我为中心的地图上预测观察和未观察区域的自上而下语义，然后将通往目标的路径预测为一组路点。在这两种情况下，预测都是通过跨模式注意机制由语言通知的。我们通过实验测试了语言驱动导航可以在给定地图的情况下解决的基本假设，然后在完整的 VLN-CE 基准测试中展示具有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态地图学习模型，通过预测俯视图语义和路径航路点，解决视觉与语言导航问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖LSTM或跨模态注意力，但语言与视觉的关联在显式空间表示中更强，需利用地图结构增强关联性。
AI.method: 模型分两阶段：1) 预测包含可见与不可见区域的俯视图语义；2) 基于语言指令通过跨模态注意力生成导航路径的航路点。
AI.result: 实验验证了地图辅助下语言驱动导航的可行性，在VLN-CE基准测试中取得具有竞争力的导航成功率。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态地图学习能有效结合语言与视觉信息，未来可探索更复杂的空间表征与交互机制。

authors_text: Tatsuya Yokota,Hidekata Hontani
title: Manifold Modeling in Quotient Space: Learning An Invariant Mapping with Decodability of Image Patches
title_zh: 商空间中的流形建模：学习具有图像块可解码性的不变映射
abstract: This study proposes a framework for manifold learning of image patches using the concept of equivalence classes: manifold modeling in quotient space (MMQS). In MMQS, we do not consider a set of local patches of the image as it is, but rather the set of their canonical patches obtained by introducing the concept of equivalence classes and performing manifold learning on their canonical patches. Canonical patches represent equivalence classes, and their auto-encoder constructs a manifold in the quotient space. Based on this framework, we produce a novel manifold-based image model by introducing rotation-flip-equivalence relations. In addition, we formulate an image reconstruction problem by fitting the proposed image model to a corrupted observed image and derive an algorithm to solve it. Our experiments show that the proposed image model is effective for various self-supervised image reconstruction tasks, such as image inpainting, deblurring, super-resolution, and denoising.
summary: This study proposes a framework for manifold learning of image patches using the concept of equivalence classes: manifold modeling in quotient space (MMQS). In MMQS, we do not consider a set of local patches of the image as it is, but rather the set of their canonical patches obtained by introducing the concept of equivalence classes and performing manifold learning on their canonical patches. Canonical patches represent equivalence classes, and their auto-encoder constructs a manifold in the quotient space. Based on this framework, we produce a novel manifold-based image model by introducing rotation-flip-equivalence relations. In addition, we formulate an image reconstruction problem by fitting the proposed image model to a corrupted observed image and derive an algorithm to solve it. Our experiments show that the proposed image model is effective for various self-supervised image reconstruction tasks, such as image inpainting, deblurring, super-resolution, and denoising.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一个使用等价类概念的图像块流形学习框架：商空间流形建模（MMQS）。在MMQS中，​​我们不考虑图像本身的一组局部补丁，而是通过引入等价类的概念并对它们的规范补丁进行流形学习而获得的规范补丁集。规范补丁代表等价类，它们的自动编码器在商空间中构造一个流形。基于这个框架，我们通过引入旋转翻转等价关系产生了一种新颖的基于流形的图像模型。此外，我们通过将所提出的图像模型拟合到损坏的观察图像来制定图像重建问题，并推导出解决该问题的算法。我们的实验表明，所提出的图像模型对于各种自监督图像重建任务是有效的，例如图像修复、去模糊、超分辨率和去噪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于商空间的流形建模框架（MMQS），通过引入等价类概念学习图像块的不变映射，并实现图像重建任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图像建模方法难以有效捕捉图像块的不变特征，而通过等价类划分和商空间流形学习可提升对旋转、翻转等变换的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过定义旋转-翻转等价关系生成规范图像块，利用自编码器在商空间中构建流形模型，并基于该模型设计图像重建算法。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在图像修复、去模糊、超分辨率和去噪等自监督任务中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 商空间流形建模框架通过引入等价类约束，有效提升了图像重建任务中对图像不变特征的学习能力。

search_text: Manifold Modeling in Quotient Space: Learning An Invariant Mapping with Decodability of Image Patches 商空间中的流形建模：学习具有图像块可解码性的不变映射 This study proposes a framework for manifold learning of image patches using the concept of equivalence classes: manifold modeling in quotient space (MMQS). In MMQS, we do not consider a set of local patches of the image as it is, but rather the set of their canonical patches obtained by introducing the concept of equivalence classes and performing manifold learning on their canonical patches. Canonical patches represent equivalence classes, and their auto-encoder constructs a manifold in the quotient space. Based on this framework, we produce a novel manifold-based image model by introducing rotation-flip-equivalence relations. In addition, we formulate an image reconstruction problem by fitting the proposed image model to a corrupted observed image and derive an algorithm to solve it. Our experiments show that the proposed image model is effective for various self-supervised image reconstruction tasks, such as image inpainting, deblurring, super-resolution, and denoising. 本研究提出了一个使用等价类概念的图像块流形学习框架：商空间流形建模（MMQS）。在MMQS中，​​我们不考虑图像本身的一组局部补丁，而是通过引入等价类的概念并对它们的规范补丁进行流形学习而获得的规范补丁集。规范补丁代表等价类，它们的自动编码器在商空间中构造一个流形。基于这个框架，我们通过引入旋转翻转等价关系产生了一种新颖的基于流形的图像模型。此外，我们通过将所提出的图像模型拟合到损坏的观察图像来制定图像重建问题，并推导出解决该问题的算法。我们的实验表明，所提出的图像模型对于各种自监督图像重建任务是有效的，例如图像修复、去模糊、超分辨率和去噪。 本文提出了一种基于商空间的流形建模框架（MMQS），通过引入等价类概念学习图像块的不变映射，并实现图像重建任务。 Tatsuya Yokota,Hidekata Hontani cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xin Wang,Yasheng Wang,Yao Wan,Fei Mi,Yitong Li,Pingyi Zhou,Jin Liu,Hao Wu,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu
title: Compilable Neural Code Generation with Compiler Feedback
title_zh: 具有编译器反馈的可编译神经代码生成
abstract: Automatically generating compilable programs with (or without) natural language descriptions has always been a touchstone problem for computational linguistics and automated software engineering. Existing deep-learning approaches model code generation as text generation, either constrained by grammar structures in decoder, or driven by pre-trained language models on large-scale code corpus (e.g., CodeGPT, PLBART, and CodeT5). However, few of them account for compilability of the generated programs. To improve compilability of the generated programs, this paper proposes COMPCODER, a three-stage pipeline utilizing compiler feedback for compilable code generation, including language model fine-tuning, compilability reinforcement, and compilability discrimination. Comprehensive experiments on two code generation tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach, improving the success rate of compilation from 44.18 to 89.18 in code completion on average and from 70.3 to 96.2 in text-to-code generation, respectively, when comparing with the state-of-the-art CodeGPT.
summary: Automatically generating compilable programs with (or without) natural language descriptions has always been a touchstone problem for computational linguistics and automated software engineering. Existing deep-learning approaches model code generation as text generation, either constrained by grammar structures in decoder, or driven by pre-trained language models on large-scale code corpus (e.g., CodeGPT, PLBART, and CodeT5). However, few of them account for compilability of the generated programs. To improve compilability of the generated programs, this paper proposes COMPCODER, a three-stage pipeline utilizing compiler feedback for compilable code generation, including language model fine-tuning, compilability reinforcement, and compilability discrimination. Comprehensive experiments on two code generation tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach, improving the success rate of compilation from 44.18 to 89.18 in code completion on average and from 70.3 to 96.2 in text-to-code generation, respectively, when comparing with the state-of-the-art CodeGPT.
abstract_zh: 自动生成带有（或不带有）自然语言描述的可编译程序一直是计算语言学和自动化软件工程的试金石问题。现有的深度学习方法将代码生成建模为文本生成，要么受到解码器中语法结构的约束，要么由大规模代码语料库（例如 CodeGPT、PLBART 和 CodeT5）上预先训练的语言模型驱动。然而，其中很少考虑生成的程序的可编译性。为了提高生成程序的可编译性，本文提出了 COMPCODER，这是一种利用编译器反馈来生成可编译代码的三阶段管道，包括语言模型微调、可编译性增强和可编译性判别。对两个代码生成任务的综合实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，与最先进的 CodeGPT 相比，代码完成的平均编译成功率从 44.18 提高到 89.18，文本到代码生成的平均编译成功率从 70.3 提高到 96.2。

AI.tldr: 提出COMPCODER方法，利用编译器反馈生成可编译的代码。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的代码编译成功率低，需提高生成代码的可编译性。
AI.method: 三阶段流水线：模型微调、可编译性强化和可编译性判别。
AI.result: 代码补全和文本到代码生成的编译成功率分别提升至89.18%和96.2%。
AI.conclusion: COMPCODER有效提升生成代码的可编译性，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Tobias Liaudat,Jean-Luc Starck,Martin Kilbinger,Pierre-Antoine Frugier
title: Rethinking data-driven point spread function modeling with a differentiable optical model
title_zh: 使用可微光学模型重新思考数据驱动的点扩散函数建模
comment: Submitted. Without appendix: 42 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables
comments: Submitted. Without appendix: 42 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables
abstract: In astronomy, upcoming space telescopes with wide-field optical instruments have a spatially varying point spread function (PSF). Specific scientific goals require a high-fidelity estimation of the PSF at target positions where no direct measurement of the PSF is provided. Even though observations of the PSF are available at some positions of the field of view (FOV), they are undersampled, noisy, and integrated into wavelength in the instrument's passband. PSF modeling represents a challenging ill-posed problem, as it requires building a model from degraded observations that can infer a super-resolved PSF at any wavelength and position in the FOV. Our model, coined WaveDiff, proposes a paradigm shift in the data-driven modeling of the point spread function field of telescopes. We change the data-driven modeling space from the pixels to the wavefront by adding a differentiable optical forward model into the modeling framework. This change allows the transfer of complexity from the instrumental response into the forward model. The proposed model relies on stochastic gradient descent to estimate its parameters. Our framework paves the way to building powerful, physically motivated models that do not require special calibration data. This paper demonstrates the WaveDiff model in a simplified setting of a space telescope. The proposed framework represents a performance breakthrough with respect to the existing state-of-the-art data-driven approach. The pixel reconstruction errors decrease 6-fold at observation resolution and 44-fold for a 3x super-resolution. The ellipticity errors are reduced at least 20 times, and the size error is reduced more than 250 times. By only using noisy broad-band in-focus observations, we successfully capture the PSF chromatic variations due to diffraction. Code available at https://github.com/tobias-liaudat/wf-psf.
summary: In astronomy, upcoming space telescopes with wide-field optical instruments have a spatially varying point spread function (PSF). Specific scientific goals require a high-fidelity estimation of the PSF at target positions where no direct measurement of the PSF is provided. Even though observations of the PSF are available at some positions of the field of view (FOV), they are undersampled, noisy, and integrated into wavelength in the instrument's passband. PSF modeling represents a challenging ill-posed problem, as it requires building a model from degraded observations that can infer a super-resolved PSF at any wavelength and position in the FOV. Our model, coined WaveDiff, proposes a paradigm shift in the data-driven modeling of the point spread function field of telescopes. We change the data-driven modeling space from the pixels to the wavefront by adding a differentiable optical forward model into the modeling framework. This change allows the transfer of complexity from the instrumental response into the forward model. The proposed model relies on stochastic gradient descent to estimate its parameters. Our framework paves the way to building powerful, physically motivated models that do not require special calibration data. This paper demonstrates the WaveDiff model in a simplified setting of a space telescope. The proposed framework represents a performance breakthrough with respect to the existing state-of-the-art data-driven approach. The pixel reconstruction errors decrease 6-fold at observation resolution and 44-fold for a 3x super-resolution. The ellipticity errors are reduced at least 20 times, and the size error is reduced more than 250 times. By only using noisy broad-band in-focus observations, we successfully capture the PSF chromatic variations due to diffraction. Code available at https://github.com/tobias-liaudat/wf-psf.
abstract_zh: 在天文学中，即将推出的配备宽视场光学仪器的太空望远镜具有空间变化的点扩散函数（PSF）。具体的科学目标需要对无法直接测量 PSF 的目标位置的 PSF 进行高保真度估计。尽管可以在视场 (FOV) 的某些位置进行 PSF 观测，但它们采样不足、存在噪声，并且集成到仪器通带中的波长中。 PSF 建模是一个具有挑战性的不适定问题，因为它需要根据退化的观测结果构建一个模型，该模型可以推断出视场中任何波长和位置的超分辨率 PSF。我们的模型被称为 WaveDiff，提出了望远镜点扩散函数场的数据驱动建模的范式转变。我们通过在建模框架中添加可微分光学正向模型，将数据驱动的建模空间从像素更改为波前。这一变化允许将复杂性从仪器响应转移到正演模型中。所提出的模型依靠随机梯度下降来估计其参数。我们的框架为构建强大的、物理驱动的模型铺平了道路，这些模型不需要特殊的校准数据。本文在太空望远镜的简化设置中演示了 WaveDiff 模型。所提出的框架代表了现有最先进的数据驱动方法的性能突破。像素重建误差在观察分辨率下减少了 6 倍，在 3 倍超分辨率下减少了 44 倍。椭圆度误差减少至少20倍，尺寸误差减少250倍以上。通过仅使用嘈杂的宽带聚焦观测，我们成功捕获了由于衍射引起的 PSF 色度变化。代码可在 https://github.com/tobias-liaudat/wf-psf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微光学模型的新型数据驱动点扩散函数（PSF）建模方法WaveDiff，用于解决天文望远镜宽视场仪器中空间变化PSF的高保真估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PSF建模方法面临观测数据欠采样、噪声大且缺乏波长分辨力的挑战，传统方法难以从退化观测中推断出高分辨率PSF，且依赖特殊校准数据。
AI.method: 通过将建模空间从像素转向波前，引入可微光学前向模型，利用随机梯度下降算法估计参数，无需特殊校准数据即可从噪声宽带观测中学习PSF的色差特性。
AI.result: 在观测分辨率下像素重建误差降低6倍，3倍超分辨率下降低44倍；椭圆率误差减少至少20倍，尺寸误差减少超250倍，成功捕捉了衍射导致的PSF色差变化。
AI.conclusion: WaveDiff框架通过物理驱动的建模范式转变，在PSF重建精度上实现突破，为无需特殊校准数据的高保真天文成像提供了新方法。

authors_text: Soon Yau Cheong,Armin Mustafa,Andrew Gilbert
title: KPE: Keypoint Pose Encoding for Transformer-based Image Generation
title_zh: KPE：基于 Transformer 的图像生成的关键点姿势编码
abstract: Transformers have recently been shown to generate high quality images from text input. However, the existing method of pose conditioning using skeleton image tokens is computationally inefficient and generate low quality images. Therefore we propose a new method; Keypoint Pose Encoding (KPE); KPE is 10 times more memory efficient and over 73% faster at generating high quality images from text input conditioned on the pose. The pose constraint improves the image quality and reduces errors on body extremities such as arms and legs. The additional benefits include invariance to changes in the target image domain and image resolution, making it easily scalable to higher resolution images. We demonstrate the versatility of KPE by generating photorealistic multiperson images derived from the DeepFashion dataset. We also introduce a evaluation method People Count Error (PCE) that is effective in detecting error in generated human images.
summary: Transformers have recently been shown to generate high quality images from text input. However, the existing method of pose conditioning using skeleton image tokens is computationally inefficient and generate low quality images. Therefore we propose a new method; Keypoint Pose Encoding (KPE); KPE is 10 times more memory efficient and over 73% faster at generating high quality images from text input conditioned on the pose. The pose constraint improves the image quality and reduces errors on body extremities such as arms and legs. The additional benefits include invariance to changes in the target image domain and image resolution, making it easily scalable to higher resolution images. We demonstrate the versatility of KPE by generating photorealistic multiperson images derived from the DeepFashion dataset. We also introduce a evaluation method People Count Error (PCE) that is effective in detecting error in generated human images.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformer 被证明可以根据文本输入生成高质量的图像。然而，现有的使用骨架图像标记进行姿态调节的方法计算效率低下并且生成低质量的图像。因此我们提出了一种新方法；关键点姿势编码（KPE）； KPE 的内存效率提高了 10 倍，从基于姿势的文本输入生成高质量图像的速度提高了 73% 以上。姿势约束提高了图像质量并减少了手臂和腿等身体四肢的错误。额外的好处包括对目标图像域和图像分辨率变化的不变性，使其可以轻松扩展到更高分辨率的图像。我们通过生成源自 DeepFashion 数据集的逼真多人图像来展示 KPE 的多功能性。我们还介绍了一种评估方法人计数误差（PCE），它可以有效地检测生成的人体图像中的错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键点姿态编码（KPE）的方法，用于改进Transformer模型在文本条件下的图像生成效率与质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于骨架图像标记的姿态条件方法存在计算效率低、生成图像质量差的问题，尤其在身体四肢等细节部位容易出错。
AI.method: 通过关键点姿态编码（KPE）替代传统骨架图像标记，实现更高效的姿态条件建模，提升生成速度与内存利用率，并增强对图像分辨率和领域变化的适应性。
AI.result: KPE方法在内存效率上提升10倍，生成速度加快73%，显著改善图像质量；成功生成高分辨率多人物图像，并引入People Count Error（PCE）评估方法。
AI.conclusion: KPE方法有效解决了姿态条件图像生成中的效率与质量矛盾，具备良好的可扩展性和实际应用价值。

search_text: KPE: Keypoint Pose Encoding for Transformer-based Image Generation KPE：基于 Transformer 的图像生成的关键点姿势编码 Transformers have recently been shown to generate high quality images from text input. However, the existing method of pose conditioning using skeleton image tokens is computationally inefficient and generate low quality images. Therefore we propose a new method; Keypoint Pose Encoding (KPE); KPE is 10 times more memory efficient and over 73% faster at generating high quality images from text input conditioned on the pose. The pose constraint improves the image quality and reduces errors on body extremities such as arms and legs. The additional benefits include invariance to changes in the target image domain and image resolution, making it easily scalable to higher resolution images. We demonstrate the versatility of KPE by generating photorealistic multiperson images derived from the DeepFashion dataset. We also introduce a evaluation method People Count Error (PCE) that is effective in detecting error in generated human images. 最近，Transformer 被证明可以根据文本输入生成高质量的图像。然而，现有的使用骨架图像标记进行姿态调节的方法计算效率低下并且生成低质量的图像。因此我们提出了一种新方法；关键点姿势编码（KPE）； KPE 的内存效率提高了 10 倍，从基于姿势的文本输入生成高质量图像的速度提高了 73% 以上。姿势约束提高了图像质量并减少了手臂和腿等身体四肢的错误。额外的好处包括对目标图像域和图像分辨率变化的不变性，使其可以轻松扩展到更高分辨率的图像。我们通过生成源自 DeepFashion 数据集的逼真多人图像来展示 KPE 的多功能性。我们还介绍了一种评估方法人计数误差（PCE），它可以有效地检测生成的人体图像中的错误。 本文提出了一种基于关键点姿态编码（KPE）的方法，用于改进Transformer模型在文本条件下的图像生成效率与质量。 Soon Yau Cheong,Armin Mustafa,Andrew Gilbert cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Ning Gao,Hanna Ziesche,Ngo Anh Vien,Michael Volpp,Gerhard Neumann
title: What Matters For Meta-Learning Vision Regression Tasks?
title_zh: 对于元学习视觉回归任务来说什么重要？
abstract: Meta-learning is widely used in few-shot classification and function regression due to its ability to quickly adapt to unseen tasks. However, it has not yet been well explored on regression tasks with high dimensional inputs such as images. This paper makes two main contributions that help understand this barely explored area. \emph{First}, we design two new types of cross-category level vision regression tasks, namely object discovery and pose estimation of unprecedented complexity in the meta-learning domain for computer vision. To this end, we (i) exhaustively evaluate common meta-learning techniques on these tasks, and (ii) quantitatively analyze the effect of various deep learning techniques commonly used in recent meta-learning algorithms in order to strengthen the generalization capability: data augmentation, domain randomization, task augmentation and meta-regularization. Finally, we (iii) provide some insights and practical recommendations for training meta-learning algorithms on vision regression tasks. \emph{Second}, we propose the addition of functional contrastive learning (FCL) over the task representations in Conditional Neural Processes (CNPs) and train in an end-to-end fashion. The experimental results show that the results of prior work are misleading as a consequence of a poor choice of the loss function as well as too small meta-training sets. Specifically, we find that CNPs outperform MAML on most tasks without fine-tuning. Furthermore, we observe that naive task augmentation without a tailored design results in underfitting.
summary: Meta-learning is widely used in few-shot classification and function regression due to its ability to quickly adapt to unseen tasks. However, it has not yet been well explored on regression tasks with high dimensional inputs such as images. This paper makes two main contributions that help understand this barely explored area. \emph{First}, we design two new types of cross-category level vision regression tasks, namely object discovery and pose estimation of unprecedented complexity in the meta-learning domain for computer vision. To this end, we (i) exhaustively evaluate common meta-learning techniques on these tasks, and (ii) quantitatively analyze the effect of various deep learning techniques commonly used in recent meta-learning algorithms in order to strengthen the generalization capability: data augmentation, domain randomization, task augmentation and meta-regularization. Finally, we (iii) provide some insights and practical recommendations for training meta-learning algorithms on vision regression tasks. \emph{Second}, we propose the addition of functional contrastive learning (FCL) over the task representations in Conditional Neural Processes (CNPs) and train in an end-to-end fashion. The experimental results show that the results of prior work are misleading as a consequence of a poor choice of the loss function as well as too small meta-training sets. Specifically, we find that CNPs outperform MAML on most tasks without fine-tuning. Furthermore, we observe that naive task augmentation without a tailored design results in underfitting.
abstract_zh: 元学习由于其能够快速适应未见过的任务而被广泛应用于小样本分类和函数回归。然而，在具有高维输入（例如图像）的回归任务上尚未得到很好的探索。本文做出了两个主要贡献，有助于理解这个鲜为人知的领域。首先，我们设计了两种新型的跨类别视觉回归任务，即计算机视觉元学习领域中前所未有的复杂性的对象发现和姿势估计。为此，我们（i）详尽地评估了这些任务上常见的元学习技术，（ii）定量分析了最近元学习算法中常用的各种深度学习技术的效果，以增强泛化能力：数据增强、领域随机化、任务增强和元正则化。最后，我们（iii）提供了一些关于训练视觉回归任务元学习算法的见解和实用建议。 \emph{第二}，我们建议在条件神经过程（CNP）中的任务表示上添加功能对比学习（FCL），并以端到端的方式进行训练。实验结果表明，由于损失函数选择不当以及元训练集太小，先前的工作结果具有误导性。具体来说，我们发现 CNP 在大多数任务上都优于 MAML，无需进行微调。此外，我们观察到，没有定制设计的简单任务增强会导致欠拟合。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了元学习在视觉回归任务中的关键因素，设计了新的任务并提出功能对比学习方法以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 元学习在分类和函数回归中广泛应用，但针对高维输入（如图像）的视觉回归任务研究不足，且现有方法存在损失函数选择不当和元训练集过小的问题。
AI.method: 设计了两种新型跨类别视觉回归任务（目标发现和姿态估计），评估常见元学习技术并分析数据增强等方法；提出在条件神经过程（CNP）中加入功能对比学习（FCL）并端到端训练。
AI.result: CNP在多数任务上优于MAML且无需微调，发现朴素任务增强会导致欠拟合，此前研究结果因损失函数和数据集问题存在偏差。
AI.conclusion: 元学习视觉回归需关注损失函数设计、元训练集规模及任务增强的定制化，FCL有效提升了CNP的性能。

Furthermore, we observe that naive task augmentation without a tailored design results in underfitting. 元学习由于其能够快速适应未见过的任务而被广泛应用于小样本分类和函数回归。然而，在具有高维输入（例如图像）的回归任务上尚未得到很好的探索。本文做出了两个主要贡献，有助于理解这个鲜为人知的领域。首先，我们设计了两种新型的跨类别视觉回归任务，即计算机视觉元学习领域中前所未有的复杂性的对象发现和姿势估计。为此，我们（i）详尽地评估了这些任务上常见的元学习技术，（ii）定量分析了最近元学习算法中常用的各种深度学习技术的效果，以增强泛化能力：数据增强、领域随机化、任务增强和元正则化。最后，我们（iii）提供了一些关于训练视觉回归任务元学习算法的见解和实用建议。 \emph{第二}，我们建议在条件神经过程（CNP）中的任务表示上添加功能对比学习（FCL），并以端到端的方式进行训练。实验结果表明，由于损失函数选择不当以及元训练集太小，先前的工作结果具有误导性。具体来说，我们发现 CNP 在大多数任务上都优于 MAML，无需进行微调。此外，我们观察到，没有定制设计的简单任务增强会导致欠拟合。 本文探讨了元学习在视觉回归任务中的关键因素，设计了新的任务并提出功能对比学习方法以提升性能。 Ning Gao,Hanna Ziesche,Ngo Anh Vien,Michael Volpp,Gerhard Neumann cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhenhailong Wang,Hang Yu,Manling Li,Han Zhao,Heng Ji
title: Rethinking Task Sampling for Few-shot Vision-Language Transfer Learning
title_zh: 重新思考小样本视觉语言迁移学习的任务采样
abstract: Despite achieving state-of-the-art zero-shot performance, existing vision-language models still fall short of few-shot transfer ability on domain-specific problems. Classical fine-tuning often fails to prevent highly expressive models from exploiting spurious correlations. Although model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) presents as a natural alternative for few-shot transfer learning, the expensive computation due to implicit second-order optimization limits its use on large-scale vision-language models such as CLIP. While much literature has been devoted to exploring alternative optimization strategies, we identify another essential aspect towards effective few-shot transfer learning, task sampling, which is previously only be viewed as part of data pre-processing in MAML. To show the impact of task sampling, we propose a simple algorithm, Model-Agnostic Multitask Fine-tuning (MAMF), which differentiates classical fine-tuning only on uniformly sampling multiple tasks. Despite its simplicity, we show that MAMF consistently outperforms classical fine-tuning on five few-shot vision-language classification tasks. We further show that the effectiveness of the bi-level optimization in MAML is highly sensitive to the zero-shot performance of a task in the context of few-shot vision-language classification. The goal of this paper is to provide new insights on what makes few-shot learning work, and encourage more research into investigating better task sampling strategies.
summary: Despite achieving state-of-the-art zero-shot performance, existing vision-language models still fall short of few-shot transfer ability on domain-specific problems. Classical fine-tuning often fails to prevent highly expressive models from exploiting spurious correlations. Although model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) presents as a natural alternative for few-shot transfer learning, the expensive computation due to implicit second-order optimization limits its use on large-scale vision-language models such as CLIP. While much literature has been devoted to exploring alternative optimization strategies, we identify another essential aspect towards effective few-shot transfer learning, task sampling, which is previously only be viewed as part of data pre-processing in MAML. To show the impact of task sampling, we propose a simple algorithm, Model-Agnostic Multitask Fine-tuning (MAMF), which differentiates classical fine-tuning only on uniformly sampling multiple tasks. Despite its simplicity, we show that MAMF consistently outperforms classical fine-tuning on five few-shot vision-language classification tasks. We further show that the effectiveness of the bi-level optimization in MAML is highly sensitive to the zero-shot performance of a task in the context of few-shot vision-language classification. The goal of this paper is to provide new insights on what makes few-shot learning work, and encourage more research into investigating better task sampling strategies.
abstract_zh: 尽管实现了最先进的零样本性能，但现有的视觉语言模型仍然缺乏针对特定领域问题的少样本迁移能力。经典的微调通常无法防止高表达模型利用虚假相关性。尽管与模型无关的元学习 (MAML) 是小样本迁移学习的自然替代方案，但由于隐式二阶优化而导致的昂贵计算限制了其在 CLIP 等大规模视觉语言模型上的使用。虽然许多文献致力于探索替代优化策略，但我们确定了有效的少样本迁移学习的另一个重要方面，即任务采样，以前仅将其视为 MAML 中数据预处理的一部分。为了显示任务采样的影响，我们提出了一种简单的算法，即模型无关的多任务微调（MAMF），该算法仅在均匀采样多个任务时区分经典微调。尽管它很简单，但我们表明 MAMF 在五个少量视觉语言分类任务上始终优于经典微调。我们进一步表明，MAML 中双层优化的有效性对少镜头视觉语言分类背景下任务的零镜头性能高度敏感。本文的目标是提供有关小样本学习工作原理的新见解，并鼓励更多研究调查更好的任务采样策略。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过重新思考任务采样策略，提升视觉-语言模型在小样本迁移学习中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在零样本任务上表现优异，但在小样本领域迁移任务中效果不佳，传统微调易受伪相关影响，而MAML因计算成本高难以应用。
AI.method: 提出简单算法MAMF（Model-Agnostic Multitask Fine-tuning），通过改变多任务采样方式（非均匀采样）替代传统微调方法。
AI.result: MAMF在五个小样本视觉-语言分类任务中持续优于传统微调方法，且发现MAML的双层优化效果高度依赖任务的零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 任务采样是小样本迁移学习的关键因素，需进一步研究更优的采样策略以提升模型迁移能力。

search_text: Rethinking Task Sampling for Few-shot Vision-Language Transfer Learning 重新思考小样本视觉语言迁移学习的任务采样 Despite achieving state-of-the-art zero-shot performance, existing vision-language models still fall short of few-shot transfer ability on domain-specific problems. Classical fine-tuning often fails to prevent highly expressive models from exploiting spurious correlations. Although model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) presents as a natural alternative for few-shot transfer learning, the expensive computation due to implicit second-order optimization limits its use on large-scale vision-language models such as CLIP. While much literature has been devoted to exploring alternative optimization strategies, we identify another essential aspect towards effective few-shot transfer learning, task sampling, which is previously only be viewed as part of data pre-processing in MAML. To show the impact of task sampling, we propose a simple algorithm, Model-Agnostic Multitask Fine-tuning (MAMF), which differentiates classical fine-tuning only on uniformly sampling multiple tasks. Despite its simplicity, we show that MAMF consistently outperforms classical fine-tuning on five few-shot vision-language classification tasks. We further show that the effectiveness of the bi-level optimization in MAML is highly sensitive to the zero-shot performance of a task in the context of few-shot vision-language classification. The goal of this paper is to provide new insights on what makes few-shot learning work, and encourage more research into investigating better task sampling strategies. 尽管实现了最先进的零样本性能，但现有的视觉语言模型仍然缺乏针对特定领域问题的少样本迁移能力。经典的微调通常无法防止高表达模型利用虚假相关性。尽管与模型无关的元学习 (MAML) 是小样本迁移学习的自然替代方案，但由于隐式二阶优化而导致的昂贵计算限制了其在 CLIP 等大规模视觉语言模型上的使用。虽然许多文献致力于探索替代优化策略，但我们确定了有效的少样本迁移学习的另一个重要方面，即任务采样，以前仅将其视为 MAML 中数据预处理的一部分。为了显示任务采样的影响，我们提出了一种简单的算法，即模型无关的多任务微调（MAMF），该算法仅在均匀采样多个任务时区分经典微调。尽管它很简单，但我们表明 MAMF 在五个少量视觉语言分类任务上始终优于经典微调。我们进一步表明，MAML 中双层优化的有效性对少镜头视觉语言分类背景下任务的零镜头性能高度敏感。本文的目标是提供有关小样本学习工作原理的新见解，并鼓励更多研究调查更好的任务采样策略。 本文旨在通过重新思考任务采样策略，提升视觉-语言模型在小样本迁移学习中的性能。 Zhenhailong Wang,Hang Yu,Manling Li,Han Zhao,Heng Ji cs.MM,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoqi Zhao,Youwei Pang,Lihe Zhang,Huchuan Lu
title: Joint Learning of Salient Object Detection, Depth Estimation and Contour Extraction
title_zh: 显着目标检测、深度估计和轮廓提取的联合学习
abstract: Benefiting from color independence, illumination invariance and location discrimination attributed by the depth map, it can provide important supplemental information for extracting salient objects in complex environments. However, high-quality depth sensors are expensive and can not be widely applied. While general depth sensors produce the noisy and sparse depth information, which brings the depth-based networks with irreversible interference. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-task and multi-modal filtered transformer (MMFT) network for RGB-D salient object detection (SOD). Specifically, we unify three complementary tasks: depth estimation, salient object detection and contour estimation. The multi-task mechanism promotes the model to learn the task-aware features from the auxiliary tasks. In this way, the depth information can be completed and purified. Moreover, we introduce a multi-modal filtered transformer (MFT) module, which equips with three modality-specific filters to generate the transformer-enhanced feature for each modality. The proposed model works in a depth-free style during the testing phase. Experiments show that it not only significantly surpasses the depth-based RGB-D SOD methods on multiple datasets, but also precisely predicts a high-quality depth map and salient contour at the same time. And, the resulted depth map can help existing RGB-D SOD methods obtain significant performance gain. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MMFT.
summary: Benefiting from color independence, illumination invariance and location discrimination attributed by the depth map, it can provide important supplemental information for extracting salient objects in complex environments. However, high-quality depth sensors are expensive and can not be widely applied. While general depth sensors produce the noisy and sparse depth information, which brings the depth-based networks with irreversible interference. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-task and multi-modal filtered transformer (MMFT) network for RGB-D salient object detection (SOD). Specifically, we unify three complementary tasks: depth estimation, salient object detection and contour estimation. The multi-task mechanism promotes the model to learn the task-aware features from the auxiliary tasks. In this way, the depth information can be completed and purified. Moreover, we introduce a multi-modal filtered transformer (MFT) module, which equips with three modality-specific filters to generate the transformer-enhanced feature for each modality. The proposed model works in a depth-free style during the testing phase. Experiments show that it not only significantly surpasses the depth-based RGB-D SOD methods on multiple datasets, but also precisely predicts a high-quality depth map and salient contour at the same time. And, the resulted depth map can help existing RGB-D SOD methods obtain significant performance gain. The source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MMFT.
abstract_zh: 受益于深度图所具有的颜色独立性、光照不变性和位置辨别性，它可以为复杂环境中提取显着物体提供重要的补充信息。然而，高质量的深度传感器价格昂贵，无法广泛应用。而一般的深度传感器会产生噪声和稀疏的深度信息，这给基于深度的网络带来了不可逆的干扰。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）的新型多任务和多模态滤波变换器（MMFT）网络。具体来说，我们统一了三个互补的任务：深度估计、显着目标检测和轮廓估计。多任务机制促进模型从辅助任务中学习任务感知特征。这样就可以完成并纯化深度信息。此外，我们引入了多模态滤波变压器（MFT）模块，该模块配备了三个特定于模态的滤波器来为每种模态生成变压器增强的特征。所提出的模型在测试阶段以无深度的方式工作。实验表明，它不仅在多个数据集上显着超越了基于深度的RGB-D SOD方法，而且可以同时精确预测高质量的深度图和显着轮廓。并且，生成的深度图可以帮助现有的 RGB-D SOD 方法获得显着的性能增益。源代码将在 https://github.com/Xiaoqi-Zhao-DLUT/MMFT 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务多模态滤波变换器（MMFT）网络，用于在无需深度信息的情况下联合学习显著物体检测、深度估计和轮廓提取。
AI.motivation: 高质量深度传感器成本高昂且难以普及，而普通传感器提供的深度信息存在噪声和稀疏性问题，导致基于深度的RGB-D显著物体检测方法效果受限。
AI.method: 设计多任务机制统一深度估计、显著物体检测和轮廓提取三个互补任务，引入多模态滤波变换器模块（MFT），通过三类模态特定滤波器生成增强特征，实现深度无关的测试阶段推理。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于基于深度的RGB-D SOD方法，同时精准预测高质量深度图与显著轮廓，生成的深度图可提升现有方法性能。
AI.conclusion: MMFT网络通过多任务协同与模态特征增强，有效解决了深度信息缺失与噪声问题，为RGB-D显著物体检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sumit Shekhar,Max Reimann,Amir Semmo,Sebastian Pasewaldt,Jürgen Döllner,Matthias Trapp
title: Low-light Image and Video Enhancement via Selective Manipulation of Chromaticity
title_zh: 通过选择性操纵色度来增强低光图像和视频
abstract: Image acquisition in low-light conditions suffers from poor quality and significant degradation in visual aesthetics. This affects the visual perception of the acquired image and the performance of various computer vision and image processing algorithms applied after acquisition. Especially for videos, the additional temporal domain makes it more challenging, wherein we need to preserve quality in a temporally coherent manner. We present a simple yet effective approach for low-light image and video enhancement. To this end, we introduce "Adaptive Chromaticity", which refers to an adaptive computation of image chromaticity. The above adaptivity allows us to avoid the costly step of low-light image decomposition into illumination and reflectance, employed by many existing techniques. All stages in our method consist of only point-based operations and high-pass or low-pass filtering, thereby ensuring that the amount of temporal incoherence is negligible when applied on a per-frame basis for videos. Our results on standard lowlight image datasets show the efficacy of our algorithm and its qualitative and quantitative superiority over several state-of-the-art techniques. For videos captured in the wild, we perform a user study to demonstrate the preference for our method in comparison to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Image acquisition in low-light conditions suffers from poor quality and significant degradation in visual aesthetics. This affects the visual perception of the acquired image and the performance of various computer vision and image processing algorithms applied after acquisition. Especially for videos, the additional temporal domain makes it more challenging, wherein we need to preserve quality in a temporally coherent manner. We present a simple yet effective approach for low-light image and video enhancement. To this end, we introduce "Adaptive Chromaticity", which refers to an adaptive computation of image chromaticity. The above adaptivity allows us to avoid the costly step of low-light image decomposition into illumination and reflectance, employed by many existing techniques. All stages in our method consist of only point-based operations and high-pass or low-pass filtering, thereby ensuring that the amount of temporal incoherence is negligible when applied on a per-frame basis for videos. Our results on standard lowlight image datasets show the efficacy of our algorithm and its qualitative and quantitative superiority over several state-of-the-art techniques. For videos captured in the wild, we perform a user study to demonstrate the preference for our method in comparison to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 弱光条件下的图像采集质量较差，视觉美观度显着下降。这会影响所采集图像的视觉感知以及采集后应用的各种计算机视觉和图像处理算法的性能。特别是对于视频，额外的时域使其更具挑战性，其中我们需要以时间相干的方式保持质量。我们提出了一种简单而有效的低光图像和视频增强方法。为此，我们引入“自适应色度”，它是指图像色度的自适应计算。上述适应性使我们能够避免许多现有技术所采用的将低光图像分解为照明和反射率的昂贵步骤。我们方法中的所有阶段仅包含基于点的操作和高通或低通滤波，从而确保在视频的每帧基础上应用时时间不相干的量可以忽略不计。我们在标准低光图像数据集上的结果表明了我们算法的有效性及其相对于几种最先进技术的定性和定量优势。对于在野外拍摄的视频，我们进行了一项用户研究，以证明我们的方法与最先进的方法相比的偏好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过自适应色度调整来增强低光图像和视频质量的方法。
AI.motivation: 低光环境下获取的图像存在质量差和视觉美感下降的问题，传统方法在分解光照与反射分量时计算成本高且难以保持视频的时序一致性。
AI.method: 引入自适应色度（Adaptive Chromaticity）技术，通过点运算和高低通滤波实现无需分解光照与反射分量的增强，确保视频帧间时序一致性。
AI.result: 在标准低光数据集上优于现有算法，用户研究显示其在真实场景视频增强中更受青睐。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以较低计算成本实现了低光图像视频的高质量增强，且有效保持了时序一致性。

search_text: Low-light Image and Video Enhancement via Selective Manipulation of Chromaticity 通过选择性操纵色度来增强低光图像和视频 Image acquisition in low-light conditions suffers from poor quality and significant degradation in visual aesthetics. This affects the visual perception of the acquired image and the performance of various computer vision and image processing algorithms applied after acquisition. Especially for videos, the additional temporal domain makes it more challenging, wherein we need to preserve quality in a temporally coherent manner. We present a simple yet effective approach for low-light image and video enhancement. To this end, we introduce "Adaptive Chromaticity", which refers to an adaptive computation of image chromaticity. The above adaptivity allows us to avoid the costly step of low-light image decomposition into illumination and reflectance, employed by many existing techniques. All stages in our method consist of only point-based operations and high-pass or low-pass filtering, thereby ensuring that the amount of temporal incoherence is negligible when applied on a per-frame basis for videos. Our results on standard lowlight image datasets show the efficacy of our algorithm and its qualitative and quantitative superiority over several state-of-the-art techniques. For videos captured in the wild, we perform a user study to demonstrate the preference for our method in comparison to state-of-the-art approaches. 弱光条件下的图像采集质量较差，视觉美观度显着下降。这会影响所采集图像的视觉感知以及采集后应用的各种计算机视觉和图像处理算法的性能。特别是对于视频，额外的时域使其更具挑战性，其中我们需要以时间相干的方式保持质量。我们提出了一种简单而有效的低光图像和视频增强方法。为此，我们引入“自适应色度”，它是指图像色度的自适应计算。上述适应性使我们能够避免许多现有技术所采用的将低光图像分解为照明和反射率的昂贵步骤。我们方法中的所有阶段仅包含基于点的操作和高通或低通滤波，从而确保在视频的每帧基础上应用时时间不相干的量可以忽略不计。我们在标准低光图像数据集上的结果表明了我们算法的有效性及其相对于几种最先进技术的定性和定量优势。对于在野外拍摄的视频，我们进行了一项用户研究，以证明我们的方法与最先进的方法相比的偏好。 本文提出一种通过自适应色度调整来增强低光图像和视频质量的方法。 Sumit Shekhar,Max Reimann,Amir Semmo,Sebastian Pasewaldt,Jürgen Döllner,Matthias Trapp cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Sagar M. Waghmare,Hang Qi,Huizhong Chen,Mikhail Sirotenko,Tomer Meron
title: Efficient Image Representation Learning with Federated Sampled Softmax
title_zh: 使用联邦采样 Softmax 进行高效图像表示学习
abstract: Learning image representations on decentralized data can bring many benefits in cases where data cannot be aggregated across data silos. Softmax cross entropy loss is highly effective and commonly used for learning image representations. Using a large number of classes has proven to be particularly beneficial for the descriptive power of such representations in centralized learning. However, doing so on decentralized data with Federated Learning is not straightforward as the demand on FL clients' computation and communication increases proportionally to the number of classes. In this work we introduce federated sampled softmax (FedSS), a resource-efficient approach for learning image representation with Federated Learning. Specifically, the FL clients sample a set of classes and optimize only the corresponding model parameters with respect to a sampled softmax objective that approximates the global full softmax objective. We examine the loss formulation and empirically show that our method significantly reduces the number of parameters transferred to and optimized by the client devices, while performing on par with the standard full softmax method. This work creates a possibility for efficiently learning image representations on decentralized data with a large number of classes under the federated setting.
summary: Learning image representations on decentralized data can bring many benefits in cases where data cannot be aggregated across data silos. Softmax cross entropy loss is highly effective and commonly used for learning image representations. Using a large number of classes has proven to be particularly beneficial for the descriptive power of such representations in centralized learning. However, doing so on decentralized data with Federated Learning is not straightforward as the demand on FL clients' computation and communication increases proportionally to the number of classes. In this work we introduce federated sampled softmax (FedSS), a resource-efficient approach for learning image representation with Federated Learning. Specifically, the FL clients sample a set of classes and optimize only the corresponding model parameters with respect to a sampled softmax objective that approximates the global full softmax objective. We examine the loss formulation and empirically show that our method significantly reduces the number of parameters transferred to and optimized by the client devices, while performing on par with the standard full softmax method. This work creates a possibility for efficiently learning image representations on decentralized data with a large number of classes under the federated setting.
abstract_zh: 在数据无法跨数据孤岛聚合的情况下，学习分散数据的图像表示可以带来许多好处。 Softmax 交叉熵损失非常有效，通常用于学习图像表示。事实证明，使用大量的类对于集中学习中此类表示的描述能力特别有益。然而，通过联邦学习对去中心化数据进行处理并不简单，因为对 FL 客户端计算和通信的需求与类别数量成比例增加。在这项工作中，我们引入了联邦采样 softmax (FedSS)，这是一种利用联邦学习学习图像表示的资源高效方法。具体来说，FL 客户端对一组类进行采样，并仅针对近似于全局完整 softmax 目标的采样 softmax 目标优化相应的模型参数。我们检查了损失公式，并根据经验表明，我们的方法显着减少了传输到客户端设备并由客户端设备优化的参数数量，同时与标准的完整 softmax 方法相当。这项工作为在联邦设置下有效学习具有大量类的分散数据的图像表示提供了可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FedSS的联邦学习方法，通过采样softmax来高效学习图像表示，解决去中心化数据中类数较多时的计算和通信瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 在联邦学习中，使用大量类别的全softmax损失会导致客户端计算和通信开销剧增，而集中式学习中类别数多能提升表示能力，因此需要一种资源高效的解决方案。
AI.method: FedSS方法让每个联邦客户端仅采样部分类别，并针对这些类别优化对应的模型参数，通过近似全局softmax目标来减少参数传输和计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明，FedSS显著降低了客户端需传输和优化的参数数量，同时保持与全softmax方法相当的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: FedSS为在联邦学习框架下处理大规模类别图像表示学习提供了可行的高效方案，平衡了去中心化数据的计算通信开销与模型性能。

authors_text: Desmond Caulley
title: An Environmental Feature Representation in I-vector Space for Room Verification and Metadata Estimation
title_zh: 用于房间验证和元数据估计的 I 向量空间环境特征表示
abstract: This paper investigates the application of environmental feature representations for room verification tasks and acoustic meta-data estimation. Audio recordings contain both speaker and non-speaker information. We refer to the non-speaker-related information, including channel and other environmental factors, as e-vectors. I-vectors, commonly used in speaker identification, are extracted in the total variability space and capture both speaker and channel-environment information without discrimination. Accordingly, e-vectors can be extracted from i-vectors using methods such as linear discriminant analysis. In this paper, we first demonstrate that e-vectors can be successfully applied to room verification tasks with a low equal error rate. Second, we propose two methods for estimating metadata information -- signal-to-noise (SNR) and reverberation (T60) -- from these e-vectors. When comparing our system to contemporary global SNR estimation methods, in terms of accuracy, we perform favorably even with low dimensional i-vectors. Lastly, we show that room verification tasks can be improved if e-vectors are augmented with the extracted metadata information.
summary: This paper investigates the application of environmental feature representations for room verification tasks and acoustic meta-data estimation. Audio recordings contain both speaker and non-speaker information. We refer to the non-speaker-related information, including channel and other environmental factors, as e-vectors. I-vectors, commonly used in speaker identification, are extracted in the total variability space and capture both speaker and channel-environment information without discrimination. Accordingly, e-vectors can be extracted from i-vectors using methods such as linear discriminant analysis. In this paper, we first demonstrate that e-vectors can be successfully applied to room verification tasks with a low equal error rate. Second, we propose two methods for estimating metadata information -- signal-to-noise (SNR) and reverberation (T60) -- from these e-vectors. When comparing our system to contemporary global SNR estimation methods, in terms of accuracy, we perform favorably even with low dimensional i-vectors. Lastly, we show that room verification tasks can be improved if e-vectors are augmented with the extracted metadata information.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了环境特征表示在房间验证任务和声学元数据估计中的应用。录音包含说话者和非说话者信息。我们将非说话者相关信息（包括频道和其他环境因素）称为 e 向量。 I 向量常用于说话人识别，在总变异性空间中提取，并无差别地捕获说话人和通道环境信息。因此，可以使用诸如线性判别分析的方法从i向量中提取e向量。在本文中，我们首先证明电子向量可以成功应用于房间验证任务，并且具有较低的等错误率。其次，我们提出了两种从这些 e 向量估计元数据信息的方法——信噪比 (SNR) 和混响 (T60)。将我们的系统与当代全球 SNR 估计方法进行比较时，就准确性而言，即使使用低维 i 向量，我们也能表现良好。最后，我们表明，如果使用提取的元数据信息来增强电子向量，则可以改进房间验证任务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在i向量空间中利用环境特征表示进行房间验证和声学元数据估计的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统i向量同时包含说话人和环境信息，难以分离。本文提出通过提取环境向量（e向量）来解决房间验证和元数据估计问题。
AI.method: 使用线性判别分析从i向量中提取e向量，并提出两种基于e向量估计信噪比（SNR）和混响时间（T60）的方法。
AI.result: 房间验证误识率低，元数据估计准确率优于现有全局方法，且在低维i向量下表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 将元数据信息增强到e向量中可提升房间验证性能，环境特征分离方法有效。

motivation: 传统i向量同时包含说话人和环境信息，难以分离。本文提出通过提取环境向量（e向量）来解决房间验证和元数据估计问题。
method: 使用线性判别分析从i向量中提取e向量，并提出两种基于e向量估计信噪比（SNR）和混响时间（T60）的方法。
result: 房间验证误识率低，元数据估计准确率优于现有全局方法，且在低维i向量下表现良好。
conclusion: 将元数据信息增强到e向量中可提升房间验证性能，环境特征分离方法有效。
search_text: An Environmental Feature Representation in I-vector Space for Room Verification and Metadata Estimation 用于房间验证和元数据估计的 I 向量空间环境特征表示 This paper investigates the application of environmental feature representations for room verification tasks and acoustic meta-data estimation. Audio recordings contain both speaker and non-speaker information. We refer to the non-speaker-related information, including channel and other environmental factors, as e-vectors. I-vectors, commonly used in speaker identification, are extracted in the total variability space and capture both speaker and channel-environment information without discrimination. Accordingly, e-vectors can be extracted from i-vectors using methods such as linear discriminant analysis. In this paper, we first demonstrate that e-vectors can be successfully applied to room verification tasks with a low equal error rate. Second, we propose two methods for estimating metadata information -- signal-to-noise (SNR) and reverberation (T60) -- from these e-vectors. When comparing our system to contemporary global SNR estimation methods, in terms of accuracy, we perform favorably even with low dimensional i-vectors. Lastly, we show that room verification tasks can be improved if e-vectors are augmented with the extracted metadata information. 本文研究了环境特征表示在房间验证任务和声学元数据估计中的应用。录音包含说话者和非说话者信息。我们将非说话者相关信息（包括频道和其他环境因素）称为 e 向量。 I 向量常用于说话人识别，在总变异性空间中提取，并无差别地捕获说话人和通道环境信息。因此，可以使用诸如线性判别分析的方法从i向量中提取e向量。在本文中，我们首先证明电子向量可以成功应用于房间验证任务，并且具有较低的等错误率。其次，我们提出了两种从这些 e 向量估计元数据信息的方法——信噪比 (SNR) 和混响 (T60)。将我们的系统与当代全球 SNR 估计方法进行比较时，就准确性而言，即使使用低维 i 向量，我们也能表现良好。最后，我们表明，如果使用提取的元数据信息来增强电子向量，则可以改进房间验证任务。 本文研究在i向量空间中利用环境特征表示进行房间验证和声学元数据估计的方法。 Desmond Caulley cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: A. Konrad,J. McDonald,R. Villing
title: VGQ-CNN: Moving Beyond Fixed Cameras and Top-Grasps for Grasp Quality Prediction
title_zh: VGQ-CNN：超越固定相机和顶级抓取，实现抓取质量预测
comment: Accepted for International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: Accepted for International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: We present the Versatile Grasp Quality Convolutional Neural Network (VGQ-CNN), a grasp quality prediction network for 6-DOF grasps. VGQ-CNN can be used when evaluating grasps for objects seen from a wide range of camera poses or mobile robots without the need to retrain the network. By defining the grasp orientation explicitly as an input to the network, VGQ-CNN can evaluate 6-DOF grasp poses, moving beyond the 4-DOF grasps used in most image-based grasp evaluation methods like GQ-CNN. To train VGQ-CNN, we generate the new Versatile Grasp dataset (VG-dset) containing 6-DOF grasps observed from a wide range of camera poses. VGQ-CNN achieves a balanced accuracy of 82.1% on our test-split while generalising to a variety of camera poses. Meanwhile, it achieves competitive performance for overhead cameras and top-grasps with a balanced accuracy of 74.2% compared to GQ-CNN's 76.6%. We also propose a modified network architecture, FAST-VGQ-CNN, that speeds up inference using a shared encoder architecture and can make 128 grasp quality predictions in 12ms on a CPU. Code and data are available at https://aucoroboticsmu.github.io/vgq-cnn/.
summary: We present the Versatile Grasp Quality Convolutional Neural Network (VGQ-CNN), a grasp quality prediction network for 6-DOF grasps. VGQ-CNN can be used when evaluating grasps for objects seen from a wide range of camera poses or mobile robots without the need to retrain the network. By defining the grasp orientation explicitly as an input to the network, VGQ-CNN can evaluate 6-DOF grasp poses, moving beyond the 4-DOF grasps used in most image-based grasp evaluation methods like GQ-CNN. To train VGQ-CNN, we generate the new Versatile Grasp dataset (VG-dset) containing 6-DOF grasps observed from a wide range of camera poses. VGQ-CNN achieves a balanced accuracy of 82.1% on our test-split while generalising to a variety of camera poses. Meanwhile, it achieves competitive performance for overhead cameras and top-grasps with a balanced accuracy of 74.2% compared to GQ-CNN's 76.6%. We also propose a modified network architecture, FAST-VGQ-CNN, that speeds up inference using a shared encoder architecture and can make 128 grasp quality predictions in 12ms on a CPU. Code and data are available at https://aucoroboticsmu.github.io/vgq-cnn/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了多功能抓取质量卷积神经网络 (VGQ-CNN)，这是一种用于 6-DOF 抓取的抓取质量预测网络。 VGQ-CNN 可用于评估从各种相机姿势或移动机器人看到的物体的抓取情况，而无需重新训练网络。通过将抓取方向明确定义为网络的输入，VGQ-CNN 可以评估 6-DOF 抓取姿势，超越了大多数基于图像的抓取评估方法（如 GQ-CNN）中使用的 4-DOF 抓取。为了训练 VGQ-CNN，我们生成了新的 Versatile Grasp 数据集 (VG-dset)，其中包含从各种相机姿势观察到的 6-DOF 抓取。 VGQ-CNN 在我们的测试分割上实现了 82.1% 的平衡准确率，同时推广到各种相机姿势。同时，它在俯视摄像头和顶部抓斗方面实现了具有竞争力的性能，平衡精度为 74.2%，而 GQ-CNN 为 76.6%。我们还提出了一种改进的网络架构 FAST-VGQ-CNN，它使用共享编码器架构加速推理，并且可以在 CPU 上在 12 毫秒内进行 128 个抓取质量预测。代码和数据可在 https://aucoroboticsmu.github.io/vgq-cnn/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VGQ-CNN的卷积神经网络，用于预测6自由度抓取的质量，能够适应多种相机姿态和移动机器人场景，无需重新训练网络。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像的抓取评估方法（如GQ-CNN）通常局限于4自由度抓取和固定相机视角，难以满足移动机器人和多视角抓取的需求。
AI.method: 通过将抓取方向显式输入网络，设计支持6自由度抓取评估的VGQ-CNN架构，并构建包含多视角6自由度抓取数据的Versatile Grasp数据集（VG-dset）。同时提出FAST-VGQ-CNN优化架构以加速推理。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到82.1%的平衡准确率，对俯视相机和顶部抓取的准确率为74.2%（对比GQ-CNN的76.6%）。FAST-VGQ-CNN可在CPU上12ms内完成128次抓取质量预测。
AI.conclusion: VGQ-CNN在多视角抓取质量预测任务中表现出色，FAST-VGQ-CNN实现了高效的推理速度，为实际机器人应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: VGQ-CNN: Moving Beyond Fixed Cameras and Top-Grasps for Grasp Quality Prediction VGQ-CNN：超越固定相机和顶级抓取，实现抓取质量预测 We present the Versatile Grasp Quality Convolutional Neural Network (VGQ-CNN), a grasp quality prediction network for 6-DOF grasps. VGQ-CNN can be used when evaluating grasps for objects seen from a wide range of camera poses or mobile robots without the need to retrain the network. By defining the grasp orientation explicitly as an input to the network, VGQ-CNN can evaluate 6-DOF grasp poses, moving beyond the 4-DOF grasps used in most image-based grasp evaluation methods like GQ-CNN. To train VGQ-CNN, we generate the new Versatile Grasp dataset (VG-dset) containing 6-DOF grasps observed from a wide range of camera poses. VGQ-CNN achieves a balanced accuracy of 82.1% on our test-split while generalising to a variety of camera poses. Meanwhile, it achieves competitive performance for overhead cameras and top-grasps with a balanced accuracy of 74.2% compared to GQ-CNN's 76.6%. We also propose a modified network architecture, FAST-VGQ-CNN, that speeds up inference using a shared encoder architecture and can make 128 grasp quality predictions in 12ms on a CPU. Konrad,J. McDonald,R. Villing cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Nicholas Soucy,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh
title: CEU-Net: Ensemble Semantic Segmentation of Hyperspectral Images Using Clustering
title_zh: CEU-Net：使用聚类对高光谱图像进行整体语义分割
abstract: Most semantic segmentation approaches of Hyperspectral images (HSIs) use and require preprocessing steps in the form of patching to accurately classify diversified land cover in remotely sensed images. These approaches use patching to incorporate the rich neighborhood information in images and exploit the simplicity and segmentability of the most common HSI datasets. In contrast, most landmasses in the world consist of overlapping and diffused classes, making neighborhood information weaker than what is seen in common HSI datasets. To combat this issue and generalize the segmentation models to more complex and diverse HSI datasets, in this work, we propose our novel flagship model: Clustering Ensemble U-Net (CEU-Net). CEU-Net uses the ensemble method to combine spectral information extracted from convolutional neural network (CNN) training on a cluster of landscape pixels. Our CEU-Net model outperforms existing state-of-the-art HSI semantic segmentation methods and gets competitive performance with and without patching when compared to baseline models. We highlight CEU-Net's high performance across Botswana, KSC, and Salinas datasets compared to HybridSN and AeroRIT methods.
summary: Most semantic segmentation approaches of Hyperspectral images (HSIs) use and require preprocessing steps in the form of patching to accurately classify diversified land cover in remotely sensed images. These approaches use patching to incorporate the rich neighborhood information in images and exploit the simplicity and segmentability of the most common HSI datasets. In contrast, most landmasses in the world consist of overlapping and diffused classes, making neighborhood information weaker than what is seen in common HSI datasets. To combat this issue and generalize the segmentation models to more complex and diverse HSI datasets, in this work, we propose our novel flagship model: Clustering Ensemble U-Net (CEU-Net). CEU-Net uses the ensemble method to combine spectral information extracted from convolutional neural network (CNN) training on a cluster of landscape pixels. Our CEU-Net model outperforms existing state-of-the-art HSI semantic segmentation methods and gets competitive performance with and without patching when compared to baseline models. We highlight CEU-Net's high performance across Botswana, KSC, and Salinas datasets compared to HybridSN and AeroRIT methods.
abstract_zh: 大多数高光谱图像（HSI）的语义分割方法都使用并需要修补形式的预处理步骤，以对遥感图像中的多样化土地覆盖进行准确分类。这些方法使用修补来合并图像中丰富的邻域信息，并利用最常见的 HSI 数据集的简单性和可分段性。相比之下，世界上大多数陆地都由重叠和分散的类组成，使得邻域信息比常见的 HSI 数据集中的信息弱。为了解决这个问题并将分割模型推广到更复杂和多样化的 HSI 数据集，在这项工作中，我们提出了我们的新旗舰模型：聚类集成 U-Net (CEU-Net)。 CEU-Net 使用集成方法将从卷积神经网络 (CNN) 训练中提取的光谱信息组合到景观像素簇上。我们的 CEU-Net 模型优于现有最先进的 HSI 语义分割方法，与基线模型相比，无论有无修补，都可以获得具有竞争力的性能。我们强调与 HybridSN 和 AeroRIT 方法相比，CEU-Net 在博茨瓦纳、KSC 和萨利纳斯数据集上的高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于聚类的集成U-Net模型（CEU-Net），用于高光谱图像（HSI）的语义分割，无需依赖传统预处理中的图像块划分。
AI.motivation: 现有HSI语义分割方法依赖图像块预处理以增强局部信息，但现实中的地物类别常呈现重叠和扩散特征，导致局部信息不足，限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过聚类方法对景观像素分组，利用卷积神经网络（CNN）提取光谱信息，并采用集成学习融合多簇特征，构建无需图像块划分的CEU-Net模型。
AI.result: CEU-Net在Botswana、KSC和Salinas数据集上优于HybridSN和AeroRIT等现有方法，在有无图像块预处理情况下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: CEU-Net通过聚类与集成学习有效解决了HSI语义分割中局部信息弱的问题，为复杂场景下的地物分类提供了更通用的解决方案。

To combat this issue and generalize the segmentation models to more complex and diverse HSI datasets, in this work, we propose our novel flagship model: Clustering Ensemble U-Net (CEU-Net). CEU-Net uses the ensemble method to combine spectral information extracted from convolutional neural network (CNN) training on a cluster of landscape pixels. Our CEU-Net model outperforms existing state-of-the-art HSI semantic segmentation methods and gets competitive performance with and without patching when compared to baseline models. We highlight CEU-Net's high performance across Botswana, KSC, and Salinas datasets compared to HybridSN and AeroRIT methods. 大多数高光谱图像（HSI）的语义分割方法都使用并需要修补形式的预处理步骤，以对遥感图像中的多样化土地覆盖进行准确分类。这些方法使用修补来合并图像中丰富的邻域信息，并利用最常见的 HSI 数据集的简单性和可分段性。相比之下，世界上大多数陆地都由重叠和分散的类组成，使得邻域信息比常见的 HSI 数据集中的信息弱。为了解决这个问题并将分割模型推广到更复杂和多样化的 HSI 数据集，在这项工作中，我们提出了我们的新旗舰模型：聚类集成 U-Net (CEU-Net)。 CEU-Net 使用集成方法将从卷积神经网络 (CNN) 训练中提取的光谱信息组合到景观像素簇上。我们的 CEU-Net 模型优于现有最先进的 HSI 语义分割方法，与基线模型相比，无论有无修补，都可以获得具有竞争力的性能。我们强调与 HybridSN 和 AeroRIT 方法相比，CEU-Net 在博茨瓦纳、KSC 和萨利纳斯数据集上的高性能。 本文提出了一种基于聚类的集成U-Net模型（CEU-Net），用于高光谱图像（HSI）的语义分割，无需依赖传统预处理中的图像块划分。 Nicholas Soucy,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuanhao Cai,Jing Lin,Xiaowan Hu,Haoqian Wang,Xin Yuan,Yulun Zhang,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Coarse-to-Fine Sparse Transformer for Hyperspectral Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于高光谱图像重建的从粗到细的稀疏变换器
abstract: Many algorithms have been developed to solve the inverse problem of coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI), i.e., recovering the 3D hyperspectral images (HSIs) from a 2D compressive measurement. In recent years, learning-based methods have demonstrated promising performance and dominated the mainstream research direction. However, existing CNN-based methods show limitations in capturing long-range dependencies and non-local self-similarity. Previous Transformer-based methods densely sample tokens, some of which are uninformative, and calculate the multi-head self-attention (MSA) between some tokens that are unrelated in content. This does not fit the spatially sparse nature of HSI signals and limits the model scalability. In this paper, we propose a novel Transformer-based method, coarse-to-fine sparse Transformer (CST), firstly embedding HSI sparsity into deep learning for HSI reconstruction. In particular, CST uses our proposed spectra-aware screening mechanism (SASM) for coarse patch selecting. Then the selected patches are fed into our customized spectra-aggregation hashing multi-head self-attention (SAH-MSA) for fine pixel clustering and self-similarity capturing. Comprehensive experiments show that our CST significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods while requiring cheaper computational costs. The code and models will be released at https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/MST
summary: Many algorithms have been developed to solve the inverse problem of coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI), i.e., recovering the 3D hyperspectral images (HSIs) from a 2D compressive measurement. In recent years, learning-based methods have demonstrated promising performance and dominated the mainstream research direction. However, existing CNN-based methods show limitations in capturing long-range dependencies and non-local self-similarity. Previous Transformer-based methods densely sample tokens, some of which are uninformative, and calculate the multi-head self-attention (MSA) between some tokens that are unrelated in content. This does not fit the spatially sparse nature of HSI signals and limits the model scalability. In this paper, we propose a novel Transformer-based method, coarse-to-fine sparse Transformer (CST), firstly embedding HSI sparsity into deep learning for HSI reconstruction. In particular, CST uses our proposed spectra-aware screening mechanism (SASM) for coarse patch selecting. Then the selected patches are fed into our customized spectra-aggregation hashing multi-head self-attention (SAH-MSA) for fine pixel clustering and self-similarity capturing. Comprehensive experiments show that our CST significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods while requiring cheaper computational costs. The code and models will be released at https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/MST
abstract_zh: 人们已经开发了许多算法来解决编码孔径快照光谱成像 (CASSI) 的逆问题，即从 2D 压缩测量中恢复 3D 高光谱图像 (HSI)。近年来，基于学习的方法表现出了良好的性能并主导了主流研究方向。然而，现有的基于 CNN 的方法在捕获长程依赖性和非局部自相似性方面表现出局限性。之前基于 Transformer 的方法对 token 进行密集采样，其中一些 token 信息不丰富，并计算一些内容不相关的 token 之间的多头自注意力 (MSA)。这不符合 HSI 信号的空间稀疏性质，并限制了模型的可扩展性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于 Transformer 的方法，即粗到细稀疏 Transformer (CST)，首先将 HSI 稀疏性嵌入到深度学习中以进行 HSI 重建。特别是，CST 使用我们提出的光谱感知筛选机制 (SASM) 进行粗略补丁选择。然后将选定的补丁输入到我们定制的频谱聚合散列多头自注意力（SAH-MSA）中，以进行精细像素聚类和自相似性捕获。综合实验表明，我们的 CST 显着优于最先进的方法，同时需要更便宜的计算成本。代码和模型将发布在https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/MST

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粗到细稀疏Transformer（CST）的方法，用于从二维压缩测量中重建高光谱图像（HSI），解决编码孔径快照光谱成像（CASSI）的逆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法在捕捉长程依赖和非局部自相似性方面存在局限，而基于Transformer的方法因密集采样无信息token导致计算效率低下，无法适应HSI的稀疏特性。
AI.method: CST通过光谱感知筛选机制（SASM）进行粗粒度块选择，并采用定制的光谱聚合哈希多头自注意力（SAH-MSA）实现细粒度像素聚类与自相似性建模，嵌入HSI稀疏性以提升重建效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，CST在保持较高重建质量的同时，计算成本显著低于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CST通过稀疏性建模和分层注意力机制，有效解决了HSI重建中的关键挑战，为后续研究提供了高效框架。

authors_text: Jiaming Zhang,Huayao Liu,Kailun Yang,Xinxin Hu,Ruiping Liu,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: CMX: Cross-Modal Fusion for RGB-X Semantic Segmentation with Transformers
title_zh: CMX：使用 Transformer 进行 RGB-X 语义分割的跨模态融合
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS). The source code of CMX is publicly available at https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS). The source code of CMX is publicly available at https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation
abstract: Scene understanding based on image segmentation is a crucial component of autonomous vehicles. Pixel-wise semantic segmentation of RGB images can be advanced by exploiting complementary features from the supplementary modality (X-modality). However, covering a wide variety of sensors with a modality-agnostic model remains an unresolved problem due to variations in sensor characteristics among different modalities. Unlike previous modality-specific methods, in this work, we propose a unified fusion framework, CMX, for RGB-X semantic segmentation. To generalize well across different modalities, that often include supplements as well as uncertainties, a unified cross-modal interaction is crucial for modality fusion. Specifically, we design a Cross-Modal Feature Rectification Module (CM-FRM) to calibrate bi-modal features by leveraging the features from one modality to rectify the features of the other modality. With rectified feature pairs, we deploy a Feature Fusion Module (FFM) to perform sufficient exchange of long-range contexts before mixing. To verify CMX, for the first time, we unify five modalities complementary to RGB, i.e., depth, thermal, polarization, event, and LiDAR. Extensive experiments show that CMX generalizes well to diverse multi-modal fusion, achieving state-of-the-art performances on five RGB-Depth benchmarks, as well as RGB-Thermal, RGB-Polarization, and RGB-LiDAR datasets. Besides, to investigate the generalizability to dense-sparse data fusion, we establish an RGB-Event semantic segmentation benchmark based on the EventScape dataset, on which CMX sets the new state-of-the-art. The source code of CMX is publicly available at https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation.
summary: Scene understanding based on image segmentation is a crucial component of autonomous vehicles. Pixel-wise semantic segmentation of RGB images can be advanced by exploiting complementary features from the supplementary modality (X-modality). However, covering a wide variety of sensors with a modality-agnostic model remains an unresolved problem due to variations in sensor characteristics among different modalities. Unlike previous modality-specific methods, in this work, we propose a unified fusion framework, CMX, for RGB-X semantic segmentation. To generalize well across different modalities, that often include supplements as well as uncertainties, a unified cross-modal interaction is crucial for modality fusion. Specifically, we design a Cross-Modal Feature Rectification Module (CM-FRM) to calibrate bi-modal features by leveraging the features from one modality to rectify the features of the other modality. With rectified feature pairs, we deploy a Feature Fusion Module (FFM) to perform sufficient exchange of long-range contexts before mixing. To verify CMX, for the first time, we unify five modalities complementary to RGB, i.e., depth, thermal, polarization, event, and LiDAR. Extensive experiments show that CMX generalizes well to diverse multi-modal fusion, achieving state-of-the-art performances on five RGB-Depth benchmarks, as well as RGB-Thermal, RGB-Polarization, and RGB-LiDAR datasets. Besides, to investigate the generalizability to dense-sparse data fusion, we establish an RGB-Event semantic segmentation benchmark based on the EventScape dataset, on which CMX sets the new state-of-the-art. The source code of CMX is publicly available at https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 基于图像分割的场景理解是自动驾驶汽车的重要组成部分。 RGB 图像的逐像素语义分割可以通过利用补充模态（X 模态）的互补特征来推进。然而，由于不同模态之间的传感器特性存在差异，用模态不可知模型覆盖各种传感器仍然是一个未解决的问题。与之前的特定于模态的方法不同，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于 RGB-X 语义分割的统一融合框架 CMX。为了很好地概括不同的模态（通常包括补充和不确定性），统一的跨模态交互对于模态融合至关重要。具体来说，我们设计了一个跨模态特征校正模块（CM-FRM），通过利用一种模态的特征来校正另一种模态的特征来校准双模态特征。通过修正后的特征对，我们部署了特征融合模块（FFM），以便在混合之前对远程上下文进行充分的交换。为了验证 CMX，我们首次统一了与 RGB 互补的五种模态，即深度、热、偏振、事件和 LiDAR。大量实验表明，CMX 可以很好地推广到各种多模态融合，在五个 RGB 深度基准以及 RGB 热、RGB 偏振和 RGB-LiDAR 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，为了研究密集稀疏数据融合的通用性，我们建立了基于EventScape数据集的RGB-Event语义分割基准，CMX在该基准上设置了新的最先进技术。 CMX 的源代码可在 https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CMX框架，通过Transformer实现跨模态融合，解决RGB-X语义分割中多传感器模态特征融合的通用性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖特定模态的处理方式，难以适配多种传感器特性差异，而统一的跨模态融合框架可提升多模态信息互补性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计CM-FRM模块通过单模态特征校准另一模态特征，再利用FFM模块进行长距离上下文交换与混合，实现五种模态（深度、热成像、偏振、事件、LiDAR）的统一融合。
AI.result: 在五个RGB-Depth基准及RGB-Thermal等数据集上达到SOTA性能，并基于EventScape建立RGB-Event新基准，CMX同样取得最优结果。
AI.conclusion: CMX通过跨模态特征校准与融合机制，有效提升多模态语义分割的通用性，代码开源促进后续研究。
