With rectified feature pairs, we deploy a Feature Fusion Module (FFM) to perform sufficient exchange of long-range contexts before mixing. To verify CMX, for the first time, we unify five modalities complementary to RGB, i.e., depth, thermal, polarization, event, and LiDAR. Extensive experiments show that CMX generalizes well to diverse multi-modal fusion, achieving state-of-the-art performances on five RGB-Depth benchmarks, as well as RGB-Thermal, RGB-Polarization, and RGB-LiDAR datasets. Besides, to investigate the generalizability to dense-sparse data fusion, we establish an RGB-Event semantic segmentation benchmark based on the EventScape dataset, on which CMX sets the new state-of-the-art. The source code of CMX is publicly available at https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation. 基于图像分割的场景理解是自动驾驶汽车的重要组成部分。 RGB 图像的逐像素语义分割可以通过利用补充模态（X 模态）的互补特征来推进。然而，由于不同模态之间的传感器特性存在差异，用模态不可知模型覆盖各种传感器仍然是一个未解决的问题。与之前的特定于模态的方法不同，在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于 RGB-X 语义分割的统一融合框架 CMX。为了很好地概括不同的模态（通常包括补充和不确定性），统一的跨模态交互对于模态融合至关重要。具体来说，我们设计了一个跨模态特征校正模块（CM-FRM），通过利用一种模态的特征来校正另一种模态的特征来校准双模态特征。通过修正后的特征对，我们部署了特征融合模块（FFM），以便在混合之前对远程上下文进行充分的交换。为了验证 CMX，我们首次统一了与 RGB 互补的五种模态，即深度、热、偏振、事件和 LiDAR。大量实验表明，CMX 可以很好地推广到各种多模态融合，在五个 RGB 深度基准以及 RGB 热、RGB 偏振和 RGB-LiDAR 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。此外，为了研究密集稀疏数据融合的通用性，我们建立了基于EventScape数据集的RGB-Event语义分割基准，CMX在该基准上设置了新的最先进技术。 CMX 的源代码可在 https://github.com/huaaaliu/RGBX_Semantic_Segmentation 公开获取。 本文提出CMX框架，通过Transformer实现跨模态融合，解决RGB-X语义分割中多传感器模态特征融合的通用性问题。 Jiaming Zhang,Huayao Liu,Kailun Yang,Xinxin Hu,Ruiping Liu,Rainer Stiefelhagen cs.CV,cs.RO,eess.IV

authors_text: Krithika Ramesh,Ashiqur R. KhudaBukhsh,Sumeet Kumar
title: 'Beach' to 'Bitch': Inadvertent Unsafe Transcription of Kids' Content on YouTube
title_zh: 从“Beach”到“Bitch”：YouTube 上儿童内容的无意不安全转录
comment: This paper got accepted at AAAI 2022, AI for Social Impact track
comments: This paper got accepted at AAAI 2022, AI for Social Impact track
abstract: Over the last few years, YouTube Kids has emerged as one of the highly competitive alternatives to television for children's entertainment. Consequently, YouTube Kids' content should receive an additional level of scrutiny to ensure children's safety. While research on detecting offensive or inappropriate content for kids is gaining momentum, little or no current work exists that investigates to what extent AI applications can (accidentally) introduce content that is inappropriate for kids. In this paper, we present a novel (and troubling) finding that well-known automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems may produce text content highly inappropriate for kids while transcribing YouTube Kids' videos. We dub this phenomenon as \emph{inappropriate content hallucination}. Our analyses suggest that such hallucinations are far from occasional, and the ASR systems often produce them with high confidence. We release a first-of-its-kind data set of audios for which the existing state-of-the-art ASR systems hallucinate inappropriate content for kids. In addition, we demonstrate that some of these errors can be fixed using language models.
summary: Over the last few years, YouTube Kids has emerged as one of the highly competitive alternatives to television for children's entertainment. Consequently, YouTube Kids' content should receive an additional level of scrutiny to ensure children's safety. While research on detecting offensive or inappropriate content for kids is gaining momentum, little or no current work exists that investigates to what extent AI applications can (accidentally) introduce content that is inappropriate for kids. In this paper, we present a novel (and troubling) finding that well-known automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems may produce text content highly inappropriate for kids while transcribing YouTube Kids' videos. We dub this phenomenon as \emph{inappropriate content hallucination}. Our analyses suggest that such hallucinations are far from occasional, and the ASR systems often produce them with high confidence. We release a first-of-its-kind data set of audios for which the existing state-of-the-art ASR systems hallucinate inappropriate content for kids. In addition, we demonstrate that some of these errors can be fixed using language models.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，YouTube Kids 已成为儿童娱乐领域最具竞争力的电视替代品之一。因此，YouTube Kids 的内容应受到更高级别的审查，以确保儿童的安全。虽然检测针对儿童的攻击性或不适当内容的研究正在蓬勃发展，但目前很少或根本没有研究人工智能应用程序可以（意外地）引入不适合儿童的内容的程度。在本文中，我们提出了一项新颖（且令人不安）的发现，即众所周知的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统在转录 YouTube Kids 视频时可能会生成非常不适合儿童的文本内容。我们将这种现象称为\emph{不适当的内容幻觉}。我们的分析表明，这种幻觉并非偶然，而且 ASR 系统通常会以很高的置信度产生幻觉。我们发布了首个此类音频数据集，其中现有最先进的 ASR 系统会产生不适合儿童的内容。此外，我们还证明其中一些错误可以使用语言模型来修复。

AI.tldr: 研究自动语音识别（ASR）系统在转录YouTube儿童视频时可能产生不当内容的现象，并提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: YouTube Kids作为儿童娱乐平台需额外安全审查，但现有研究缺乏对AI无意引入不当内容的调查，需填补这一空白。
AI.method: 分析ASR系统转录错误，构建首个相关数据集，并测试语言模型对错误的修正能力。
AI.result: ASR系统频繁生成高置信度的不当内容，部分错误可通过语言模型修复。
AI.conclusion: ASR在儿童内容处理中存在风险，需加强审查机制，语言模型可作为辅助修正手段。

authors_text: Konrad Majewski,Tomáš Masařík,Jana Novotná,Karolina Okrasa,Marcin Pilipczuk,Paweł Rzążewski,Marek Sokołowski
title: Max Weight Independent Set in graphs with no long claws: An analog of the Gyárfás' path argument
title_zh: 图中没有长爪的最大权重独立集：Gyárfás 路径论证的类比
abstract: We revisit recent developments for the Maximum Weight Independent Set problem in graphs excluding a subdivided claw $S_{t,t,t}$ as an induced subgraph [Chudnovsky, Pilipczuk, Pilipczuk, Thomassé, SODA 2020] and provide a subexponential-time algorithm with improved running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n}\log n)}$ and a quasipolynomial-time approximation scheme with improved running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-1} \log^{5} n)}$. The Gyárfás' path argument, a powerful tool that is the main building block for many algorithms in $P_t$-free graphs, ensures that given an $n$-vertex $P_t$-free graph, in polynomial time we can find a set $P$ of at most $t-1$ vertices, such that every connected component of $G-N[P]$ has at most $n/2$ vertices. Our main technical contribution is an analog of this result for $S_{t,t,t}$-free graphs: given an $n$-vertex $S_{t,t,t}$-free graph, in polynomial time we can find a set $P$ of $\mathcal{O}(t \log n)$ vertices and an extended strip decomposition (an appropriate analog of the decomposition into connected components) of $G-N[P]$ such that every particle (an appropriate analog of a connected component to recurse on) of the said extended strip decomposition has at most $n/2$ vertices.
summary: We revisit recent developments for the Maximum Weight Independent Set problem in graphs excluding a subdivided claw $S_{t,t,t}$ as an induced subgraph [Chudnovsky, Pilipczuk, Pilipczuk, Thomassé, SODA 2020] and provide a subexponential-time algorithm with improved running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n}\log n)}$ and a quasipolynomial-time approximation scheme with improved running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-1} \log^{5} n)}$. The Gyárfás' path argument, a powerful tool that is the main building block for many algorithms in $P_t$-free graphs, ensures that given an $n$-vertex $P_t$-free graph, in polynomial time we can find a set $P$ of at most $t-1$ vertices, such that every connected component of $G-N[P]$ has at most $n/2$ vertices. Our main technical contribution is an analog of this result for $S_{t,t,t}$-free graphs: given an $n$-vertex $S_{t,t,t}$-free graph, in polynomial time we can find a set $P$ of $\mathcal{O}(t \log n)$ vertices and an extended strip decomposition (an appropriate analog of the decomposition into connected components) of $G-N[P]$ such that every particle (an appropriate analog of a connected component to recurse on) of the said extended strip decomposition has at most $n/2$ vertices.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视了图中最大权独立集问题的最新进展，排除了细分爪 $S_{t,t,t}$ 作为诱导子图 [Chudnovsky, Pilipczuk, Pilipczuk, Thomassé, SODA 2020]，并提供了一种次指数时间算法，其运行时间有所改进 $2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n}\log n)}$ 和具有改进运行时间的拟多项式时间近似方案$2^{\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-1} \log^{5} n)}$。 Gyárfás 的路径参数是一个强大的工具，是 $P_t$-free 图中许多算法的主要构建块，它确保给定 $n$-顶点 $P_t$-free 图，在多项式时间内我们可以找到最多 $t-1$ 个顶点的 $P$ 集合，使得 $G-N[P]$ 的每个连通分量最多有 $n/2$ 个顶点。我们的主要技术贡献是对$S_{t,t,t}$无图的结果的模拟：给定$n$-顶点$S_{t,t,t}$无图，在多项式时间内我们可以找到一组$\mathcal{O}(t \log n)$顶点的$P$和$G-N[P]$的扩展条带分解（分解为连通分量的适当模拟），使得每个粒子（所述扩展条带分解的要递归的连接组件最多具有 $n/2$ 个顶点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无长爪图（不含诱导子图S_{t,t,t}）中求解最大权独立集问题。
AI.motivation: Gyárfás路径论证是P_t-free图中许多算法的核心工具，但该工具尚未推广到更一般的无长爪图类中，因此需要寻找其模拟版本以设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: 提出了Gyárfás路径论证在S_{t,t,t}-free图中的模拟：多项式时间内找到一个大小为O(t log n)的顶点集P，并对G-N[P]进行扩展条带分解，使得每个粒子的顶点数不超过n/2。
AI.result: 得到了改进的亚指数时间算法（2^{O(√n log n)}）和拟多项式时间近似方案（2^{O(ε^{-1} log^5 n)}），分别优于之前的工作。
AI.conclusion: 通过将Gyárfás路径论证推广到无长爪图，成功设计了更快的最大权独立集算法，为该类图上的进一步研究提供了新工具。

authors_text: Marco Roveri,Claudio Di Ciccio,Chiara Di Francescomarino,Chiara Ghidini
title: Computing unsatisfiable cores for LTLf specifications
title_zh: 计算 LTLf 规范无法满足的核心
abstract: Linear-time temporal logic on finite traces (LTLf) is rapidly becoming a de-facto standard to produce specifications in many application domains (e.g., planning, business process management, run-time monitoring, reactive synthesis). Several studies approached the respective satisfiability problem. In this paper, we investigate the problem of extracting the unsatisfiable core in LTLf specifications. We provide four algorithms for extracting an unsatisfiable core leveraging the adaptation of state-of-the-art approaches to LTLf satisfiability checking. We implement the different approaches within the respective tools and carry out an experimental evaluation on a set of reference benchmarks, restricting to the unsatisfiable ones. The results show the feasibility, effectiveness, and complementarities of the different algorithms and tools.
summary: Linear-time temporal logic on finite traces (LTLf) is rapidly becoming a de-facto standard to produce specifications in many application domains (e.g., planning, business process management, run-time monitoring, reactive synthesis). Several studies approached the respective satisfiability problem. In this paper, we investigate the problem of extracting the unsatisfiable core in LTLf specifications. We provide four algorithms for extracting an unsatisfiable core leveraging the adaptation of state-of-the-art approaches to LTLf satisfiability checking. We implement the different approaches within the respective tools and carry out an experimental evaluation on a set of reference benchmarks, restricting to the unsatisfiable ones. The results show the feasibility, effectiveness, and complementarities of the different algorithms and tools.
abstract_zh: 有限迹上的线性时间时序逻辑 (LTLf) 正在迅速成为许多应用领域（例如规划、业务流程管理、运行时监控、反应综合）中生成规范的事实上的标准。几项研究探讨了各自的可满足性问题。在本文中，我们研究了提取 LTLf 规范中不可满足的核心的问题。我们提供了四种算法来提取不可满足的核心，利用最先进的方法来进行 LTLf 可满足性检查。我们在各自的工具中实施不同的方法，并对一组参考基准进行实验评估，限制那些不能令人满意的基准。结果表明了不同算法和工具的可行性、有效性和互补性。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何为LTLf规范提取不可满足核心，并提出四种算法进行验证。
AI.motivation: 由于LTLf在多个领域应用广泛，但现有研究多关注可满足性，缺乏对不可满足核心的系统性提取方法，需解决此问题以辅助开发者分析冲突。
AI.method: 通过改进现有LTLf可满足性检查方法，提出四种提取不可满足核心的算法，并在工具中实现，使用基准测试进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了不同算法和工具的可行性、有效性及互补性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为LTLf规范分析提供了实用工具，展示了不同算法的互补性，有助于未来研究。

authors_text: Xiuyuan Li,Fengchao Li,Jiangang Yu,Guowen An
title: A high-precision underwater object detection based on joint self-supervised deblurring and improved spatial transformer network
title_zh: 基于联合自监督去模糊和改进空间变换网络的高精度水下目标检测
abstract: Deep learning-based underwater object detection (UOD) remains a major challenge due to the degraded visibility and difficulty to obtain sufficient underwater object images captured from various perspectives for training. To address these issues, this paper presents a high-precision UOD based on joint self-supervised deblurring and improved spatial transformer network. A self-supervised deblurring subnetwork is introduced into the designed multi-task learning aided object detection architecture to force the shared feature extraction module to output clean features for detection subnetwork. Aiming at alleviating the limitation of insufficient photos from different perspectives, an improved spatial transformer network is designed based on perspective transformation, adaptively enriching image features within the network. The experimental results show that the proposed UOD approach achieved 47.9 mAP in URPC2017 and 70.3 mAP in URPC2018, outperforming many state-of-the-art UOD methods and indicating the designed method is more suitable for UOD.
summary: Deep learning-based underwater object detection (UOD) remains a major challenge due to the degraded visibility and difficulty to obtain sufficient underwater object images captured from various perspectives for training. To address these issues, this paper presents a high-precision UOD based on joint self-supervised deblurring and improved spatial transformer network. A self-supervised deblurring subnetwork is introduced into the designed multi-task learning aided object detection architecture to force the shared feature extraction module to output clean features for detection subnetwork. Aiming at alleviating the limitation of insufficient photos from different perspectives, an improved spatial transformer network is designed based on perspective transformation, adaptively enriching image features within the network. The experimental results show that the proposed UOD approach achieved 47.9 mAP in URPC2017 and 70.3 mAP in URPC2018, outperforming many state-of-the-art UOD methods and indicating the designed method is more suitable for UOD.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的水下物体检测（UOD）仍然是一个重大挑战，因为可见度下降并且难以获得从不同角度捕获的足够的水下物体图像以进行训练。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种基于联合自监督去模糊和改进的空间变换网络的高精度UOD。在设计的多任务学习辅助目标检测架构中引入了自监督去模糊子网络，以强制共享特征提取模块为检测子网络输出干净的特征。针对不同视角照片不足的限制，基于视角变换设计了改进的空间变换网络，自适应丰富网络内的图​​像特征。实验结果表明，所提出的 UOD 方法在 URPC2017 中达到了 47.9 mAP，在 URPC2018 中达到了 70.3 mAP，优于许多最先进的 UOD 方法，表明设计的方法更适合 UOD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督去模糊与改进空间变换网络的高精度水下目标检测方法。
AI.motivation: 水下目标检测因能见度低及多视角训练数据不足导致检测效果差，亟需提升特征提取与视角适应能力。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，引入自监督去模糊子网络提取清晰特征，并基于透视变换改进空间变换网络以增强多视角特征表达。
AI.result: 在URPC2017和URPC2018数据集上分别达到47.9 mAP和70.3 mAP，优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过联合优化去模糊与视角适应，显著提升了水下目标检测精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Mohamed Ali Souibgui,Sanket Biswas,Andres Mafla,Ali Furkan Biten,Alicia Fornés,Yousri Kessentini,Josep Lladós,Lluis Gomez,Dimosthenis Karatzas
title: Text-DIAE: A Self-Supervised Degradation Invariant Autoencoders for Text Recognition and Document Enhancement
title_zh: Text-DIAE：用于文本识别和文档增强的自监督退化不变自动编码器
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Text-Degradation Invariant Auto Encoder (Text-DIAE), a self-supervised model designed to tackle two tasks, text recognition (handwritten or scene-text) and document image enhancement. We start by employing a transformer-based architecture that incorporates three pretext tasks as learning objectives to be optimized during pre-training without the usage of labeled data. Each of the pretext objectives is specifically tailored for the final downstream tasks. We conduct several ablation experiments that confirm the design choice of the selected pretext tasks. Importantly, the proposed model does not exhibit limitations of previous state-of-the-art methods based on contrastive losses, while at the same time requiring substantially fewer data samples to converge. Finally, we demonstrate that our method surpasses the state-of-the-art in existing supervised and self-supervised settings in handwritten and scene text recognition and document image enhancement. Our code and trained models will be made publicly available at~\url{ http://Upon_Acceptance}.
summary: In this paper, we propose a Text-Degradation Invariant Auto Encoder (Text-DIAE), a self-supervised model designed to tackle two tasks, text recognition (handwritten or scene-text) and document image enhancement. We start by employing a transformer-based architecture that incorporates three pretext tasks as learning objectives to be optimized during pre-training without the usage of labeled data. Each of the pretext objectives is specifically tailored for the final downstream tasks. We conduct several ablation experiments that confirm the design choice of the selected pretext tasks. Importantly, the proposed model does not exhibit limitations of previous state-of-the-art methods based on contrastive losses, while at the same time requiring substantially fewer data samples to converge. Finally, we demonstrate that our method surpasses the state-of-the-art in existing supervised and self-supervised settings in handwritten and scene text recognition and document image enhancement. Our code and trained models will be made publicly available at~\url{ http://Upon_Acceptance}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种文本降级不变自动编码器（Text-DIAE），这是一种自监督模型，旨在解决两个任务：文本识别（手写或场景文本）和文档图像增强。我们首先采用基于变压器的架构，该架构将三个借口任务作为学习目标，在预训练期间进行优化，而不使用标记数据。每个借口目标都是专门为最终下游任务量身定制的。我们进行了几次消融实验，以确认所选借口任务的设计选择。重要的是，所提出的模型没有表现出先前基于对比损失的最先进方法的局限性，同时需要更少的数据样本来收敛。最后，我们证明我们的方法在手写和场景文本识别以及文档图像增强方面超越了现有监督和自监督设置中的最先进技术。我们的代码和经过训练的模型将在 ~\url{ http://Upon_Acceptance} 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督的文本退化不变自编码器（Text-DIAE），用于文本识别（手写体和场景文本）和文档图像增强。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖对比损失且需要大量标注数据，存在局限性。本文旨在设计一种无需标注数据、能有效处理退化文本和图像的模型。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构，采用三个预训练任务进行自监督学习，任务设计针对下游任务优化，通过消融实验验证有效性。
AI.result: 在手写体和场景文本识别及文档增强任务中，Text-DIAE超越现有监督和自监督方法，且收敛所需数据量更少。
AI.conclusion: Text-DIAE在文本识别和文档增强任务中表现优异，具有高效性和鲁棒性，代码和模型将公开发布。

Importantly, the proposed model does not exhibit limitations of previous state-of-the-art methods based on contrastive losses, while at the same time requiring substantially fewer data samples to converge. Finally, we demonstrate that our method surpasses the state-of-the-art in existing supervised and self-supervised settings in handwritten and scene text recognition and document image enhancement. Our code and trained models will be made publicly available at~\url{ http://Upon_Acceptance}. 在本文中，我们提出了一种文本降级不变自动编码器（Text-DIAE），这是一种自监督模型，旨在解决两个任务：文本识别（手写或场景文本）和文档图像增强。我们首先采用基于变压器的架构，该架构将三个借口任务作为学习目标，在预训练期间进行优化，而不使用标记数据。每个借口目标都是专门为最终下游任务量身定制的。我们进行了几次消融实验，以确认所选借口任务的设计选择。重要的是，所提出的模型没有表现出先前基于对比损失的最先进方法的局限性，同时需要更少的数据样本来收敛。最后，我们证明我们的方法在手写和场景文本识别以及文档图像增强方面超越了现有监督和自监督设置中的最先进技术。我们的代码和经过训练的模型将在 ~\url{ http://Upon_Acceptance} 上公开。 本文提出一种自监督的文本退化不变自编码器（Text-DIAE），用于文本识别（手写体和场景文本）和文档图像增强。 Mohamed Ali Souibgui,Sanket Biswas,Andres Mafla,Ali Furkan Biten,Alicia Fornés,Yousri Kessentini,Josep Lladós,Lluis Gomez,Dimosthenis Karatzas cs.CV

authors_text: Rosana Montañez Rodriguez,Adham Atyabi,Shouhuai
title: Social Engineering Attacks and Defenses in the Physical World vs. Cyberspace: A Contrast Study
title_zh: 物理世界与网络空间中的社会工程攻击和防御：对比研究
abstract: Social engineering attacks are phenomena that are equally applicable to both the physical world and cyberspace. These attacks in the physical world have been studied for a much longer time than their counterpart in cyberspace. This motivates us to investigate how social engineering attacks in the physical world and cyberspace relate to each other, including their common characteristics and unique features. For this purpose, we propose a methodology to unify social engineering attacks and defenses in the physical world and cyberspace into a single framework, including: (i) a systematic model based on psychological principles for describing these attacks; (ii) a systematization of these attacks; and (iii) a systematization of defenses against them. Our study leads to several insights, which shed light on future research directions towards adequately defending against social engineering attacks in cyberspace.
summary: Social engineering attacks are phenomena that are equally applicable to both the physical world and cyberspace. These attacks in the physical world have been studied for a much longer time than their counterpart in cyberspace. This motivates us to investigate how social engineering attacks in the physical world and cyberspace relate to each other, including their common characteristics and unique features. For this purpose, we propose a methodology to unify social engineering attacks and defenses in the physical world and cyberspace into a single framework, including: (i) a systematic model based on psychological principles for describing these attacks; (ii) a systematization of these attacks; and (iii) a systematization of defenses against them. Our study leads to several insights, which shed light on future research directions towards adequately defending against social engineering attacks in cyberspace.
abstract_zh: 社会工程攻击是同样适用于物理世界和网络空间的现象。与网络空间中的攻击相比，人们对物理世界中的攻击的研究时间要长得多。这促使我们研究物理世界和网络空间中的社会工程攻击如何相互关联，包括它们的共同特征和独特特征。为此，我们提出了一种将物理世界和网络空间中的社会工程攻击和防御统一到单一框架中的方法，包括：（i）基于心理学原理的系统模型来描述这些攻击； (ii) 这些攻击的系统化； (iii) 防御系统化。我们的研究得出了一些见解，为充分防御网络空间中的社会工程攻击指明了未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对比研究现实世界与网络空间中的社会工程攻击与防御，提出统一框架以系统化描述攻击模式及防御策略。
AI.motivation: 现实世界社会工程攻击研究历史悠久，而网络空间相关研究相对不足，需探索两者关联性以指导网络安全防御。
AI.method: 构建基于心理学原理的系统模型，对攻击进行分类并系统化整理，同时归纳防御措施的体系化方法。
AI.result: 揭示了两类场景下社会工程攻击的共性与差异，为网络空间防御策略优化提供了理论依据与研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有助于跨领域理解社会工程攻击本质，未来需加强心理学、技术与社会学的交叉研究以完善防御体系。

authors_text: Xiuyuan Li,Jiangang Yu,Fengchao Li,Guowen An
title: A high-precision self-supervised monocular visual odometry in foggy weather based on robust cycled generative adversarial networks and multi-task learning aided depth estimation
title_zh: 基于鲁棒循环生成对抗网络和多任务学习辅助深度估计的雾天高精度自监督单目视觉里程计
abstract: This paper proposes a high-precision self-supervised monocular VO, which is specifically designed for navigation in foggy weather. A cycled generative adversarial network is designed to obtain high-quality self-supervised loss via forcing the forward and backward half-cycle to output consistent estimation. Moreover, gradient-based loss and perceptual loss are introduced to eliminate the interference of complex photometric change on self-supervised loss in foggy weather. To solve the ill-posed problem of depth estimation, a self-supervised multi-task learning aided depth estimation module is designed based on the strong correlation between the depth estimation and transmission map calculation of hazy images in foggy weather. The experimental results on the synthetic foggy KITTI dataset show that the proposed self-supervised monocular VO performs better in depth and pose estimation than other state-of-the-art monocular VO in the literature, indicating the designed method is more suitable for foggy weather.
summary: This paper proposes a high-precision self-supervised monocular VO, which is specifically designed for navigation in foggy weather. A cycled generative adversarial network is designed to obtain high-quality self-supervised loss via forcing the forward and backward half-cycle to output consistent estimation. Moreover, gradient-based loss and perceptual loss are introduced to eliminate the interference of complex photometric change on self-supervised loss in foggy weather. To solve the ill-posed problem of depth estimation, a self-supervised multi-task learning aided depth estimation module is designed based on the strong correlation between the depth estimation and transmission map calculation of hazy images in foggy weather. The experimental results on the synthetic foggy KITTI dataset show that the proposed self-supervised monocular VO performs better in depth and pose estimation than other state-of-the-art monocular VO in the literature, indicating the designed method is more suitable for foggy weather.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种高精度自监督单目VO，专为雾天导航而设计。循环生成对抗网络旨在通过强制前向和后向半循环输出一致的估计来获得高质量的自监督损失。此外，引入基于梯度的损失和感知损失，以消除雾天中复杂的光度变化对自监督损失的干扰。为了解决深度估计的不适定问题，基于雾天有雾图像的深度估计和传输图计算之间的强相关性，设计了自监督多任务学习辅助深度估计模块。在合成雾气 KITTI 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的自监督单目 VO 在深度和姿态估计方面比文献中其他最先进的单目 VO 表现更好，表明所设计的方法更适合雾天。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于雾天环境的高精度自监督单目视觉里程计方法，结合循环生成对抗网络和多任务学习辅助深度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有单目视觉里程计在雾天等复杂光照条件下存在深度估计不准确和自监督损失受光照变化干扰的问题，需提升雾天环境下的导航精度。
AI.method: 设计循环生成对抗网络强制前向与反向半周期输出一致估计，引入梯度损失和感知损失消除光照变化干扰；基于雾天图像深度估计与透射图计算的强相关性，构建多任务学习辅助深度估计模块。
AI.result: 在合成雾天KITTI数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在深度和位姿估计上优于现有最先进的单目视觉里程计方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合循环GAN与多任务学习的自监督单目视觉里程计方法能有效提升雾天环境下的深度和位姿估计精度，验证了该方法对雾天场景的适应性。

A cycled generative adversarial network is designed to obtain high-quality self-supervised loss via forcing the forward and backward half-cycle to output consistent estimation. Moreover, gradient-based loss and perceptual loss are introduced to eliminate the interference of complex photometric change on self-supervised loss in foggy weather. To solve the ill-posed problem of depth estimation, a self-supervised multi-task learning aided depth estimation module is designed based on the strong correlation between the depth estimation and transmission map calculation of hazy images in foggy weather. authors_text: Fu Li,Hao Yu,Ivan Shugurov,Benjamin Busam,Shaowu Yang,Slobodan Ilic
title: NeRF-Pose: A First-Reconstruct-Then-Regress Approach for Weakly-supervised 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: NeRF-Pose：弱监督 6D 物体姿态估计的先重建然后回归方法
abstract: Pose estimation of 3D objects in monocular images is a fundamental and long-standing problem in computer vision. Existing deep learning approaches for 6D pose estimation typically rely on the assumption of availability of 3D object models and 6D pose annotations. However, precise annotation of 6D poses in real data is intricate, time-consuming and not scalable, while synthetic data scales well but lacks realism. To avoid these problems, we present a weakly-supervised reconstruction-based pipeline, named NeRF-Pose, which needs only 2D object segmentation and known relative camera poses during training. Following the first-reconstruct-then-regress idea, we first reconstruct the objects from multiple views in the form of an implicit neural representation. Then, we train a pose regression network to predict pixel-wise 2D-3D correspondences between images and the reconstructed model. At inference, the approach only needs a single image as input. A NeRF-enabled PnP+RANSAC algorithm is used to estimate stable and accurate pose from the predicted correspondences. Experiments on LineMod and LineMod-Occlusion show that the proposed method has state-of-the-art accuracy in comparison to the best 6D pose estimation methods in spite of being trained only with weak labels. Besides, we extend the Homebrewed DB dataset with more real training images to support the weakly supervised task and achieve compelling results on this dataset. The extended dataset and code will be released soon.
summary: Pose estimation of 3D objects in monocular images is a fundamental and long-standing problem in computer vision. Existing deep learning approaches for 6D pose estimation typically rely on the assumption of availability of 3D object models and 6D pose annotations. However, precise annotation of 6D poses in real data is intricate, time-consuming and not scalable, while synthetic data scales well but lacks realism. To avoid these problems, we present a weakly-supervised reconstruction-based pipeline, named NeRF-Pose, which needs only 2D object segmentation and known relative camera poses during training. Following the first-reconstruct-then-regress idea, we first reconstruct the objects from multiple views in the form of an implicit neural representation. Then, we train a pose regression network to predict pixel-wise 2D-3D correspondences between images and the reconstructed model. At inference, the approach only needs a single image as input. A NeRF-enabled PnP+RANSAC algorithm is used to estimate stable and accurate pose from the predicted correspondences. Experiments on LineMod and LineMod-Occlusion show that the proposed method has state-of-the-art accuracy in comparison to the best 6D pose estimation methods in spite of being trained only with weak labels. Besides, we extend the Homebrewed DB dataset with more real training images to support the weakly supervised task and achieve compelling results on this dataset. The extended dataset and code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 单目图像中 3D 物体的姿态估计是计算机视觉中一个长期存在的基本问题。现有的 6D 姿态估计深度学习方法通​​常依赖于 3D 对象模型和 6D 姿态注释可用性的假设。然而，真实数据中 6D 姿态的精确注释是复杂、耗时且不可扩展的，而合成数据可扩展但缺乏真实性。为了避免这些问题，我们提出了一种基于弱监督重建的流程，名为 NeRF-Pose，它在训练期间只需要 2D 对象分割和已知的相对相机姿势。遵循先重建后回归的思想，我们首先以隐式神经表示的形式从多个视图重建对象。然后，我们训练姿态回归网络来预测图像和重建模型之间的像素级 2D-3D 对应关系。推理时，该方法只需要单个图像作为输入。使用支持 NeRF 的 PnP+RANSAC 算法根据预测的对应关系估计稳定且准确的姿态。 LineMod 和 LineMod-Occlusion 的实验表明，尽管仅使用弱标签进行训练，但与最好的 6D 姿态估计方法相比，所提出的方法具有最先进的精度。此外，我们用更真实的训练图像扩展了 Homebrewed DB 数据集，以支持弱监督任务并在此数据集上取得令人信服的结果。扩展数据集和代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的6D物体姿态估计方法NeRF-Pose，通过先重建后回归的策略，仅需2D分割和相机位姿作为训练标签。
AI.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计方法依赖精确的3D模型和6D标注，但真实数据标注复杂且不具扩展性，合成数据则缺乏真实感，亟需弱监督解决方案。
AI.method: 采用NeRF隐式重建多视角物体，训练像素级2D-3D对应关系回归网络，结合PnP+RANSAC算法实现单图姿态估计。
AI.result: 在LineMod和LineMod-Occlusion数据集上达到SOTA精度，扩展Homebrewed DB数据集后亦取得优异结果。
AI.conclusion: NeRF-Pose通过弱标签实现高精度姿态估计，为减少对精确标注依赖提供了有效途径。

search_text: NeRF-Pose: A First-Reconstruct-Then-Regress Approach for Weakly-supervised 6D Object Pose Estimation NeRF-Pose：弱监督 6D 物体姿态估计的先重建然后回归方法 Pose estimation of 3D objects in monocular images is a fundamental and long-standing problem in computer vision. Existing deep learning approaches for 6D pose estimation typically rely on the assumption of availability of 3D object models and 6D pose annotations. However, precise annotation of 6D poses in real data is intricate, time-consuming and not scalable, while synthetic data scales well but lacks realism. To avoid these problems, we present a weakly-supervised reconstruction-based pipeline, named NeRF-Pose, which needs only 2D object segmentation and known relative camera poses during training. Following the first-reconstruct-then-regress idea, we first reconstruct the objects from multiple views in the form of an implicit neural representation. Then, we train a pose regression network to predict pixel-wise 2D-3D correspondences between images and the reconstructed model. At inference, the approach only needs a single image as input. A NeRF-enabled PnP+RANSAC algorithm is used to estimate stable and accurate pose from the predicted correspondences. Experiments on LineMod and LineMod-Occlusion show that the proposed method has state-of-the-art accuracy in comparison to the best 6D pose estimation methods in spite of being trained only with weak labels. Besides, we extend the Homebrewed DB dataset with more real training images to support the weakly supervised task and achieve compelling results on this dataset. The extended dataset and code will be released soon. 单目图像中 3D 物体的姿态估计是计算机视觉中一个长期存在的基本问题。现有的 6D 姿态估计深度学习方法通​​常依赖于 3D 对象模型和 6D 姿态注释可用性的假设。然而，真实数据中 6D 姿态的精确注释是复杂、耗时且不可扩展的，而合成数据可扩展但缺乏真实性。为了避免这些问题，我们提出了一种基于弱监督重建的流程，名为 NeRF-Pose，它在训练期间只需要 2D 对象分割和已知的相对相机姿势。遵循先重建后回归的思想，我们首先以隐式神经表示的形式从多个视图重建对象。然后，我们训练姿态回归网络来预测图像和重建模型之间的像素级 2D-3D 对应关系。推理时，该方法只需要单个图像作为输入。使用支持 NeRF 的 PnP+RANSAC 算法根据预测的对应关系估计稳定且准确的姿态。 LineMod 和 LineMod-Occlusion 的实验表明，尽管仅使用弱标签进行训练，但与最好的 6D 姿态估计方法相比，所提出的方法具有最先进的精度。此外，我们用更真实的训练图像扩展了 Homebrewed DB 数据集，以支持弱监督任务并在此数据集上取得令人信服的结果。扩展数据集和代码即将发布。 本文提出一种弱监督的6D物体姿态估计方法NeRF-Pose，通过先重建后回归的策略，仅需2D分割和相机位姿作为训练标签。 Fu Li,Hao Yu,Ivan Shugurov,Benjamin Busam,Shaowu Yang,Slobodan Ilic cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammed Can Keles,Batuhan Salmanoglu,Mehmet Serdar Guzel,Baran Gursoy,Gazi Erkan Bostanci
title: Evaluation of YOLO Models with Sliced Inference for Small Object Detection
title_zh: 用于小物体检测的切片推理评估 YOLO 模型
abstract: Small object detection has major applications in the fields of UAVs, surveillance, farming and many others. In this work we investigate the performance of state of the art Yolo based object detection models for the task of small object detection as they are one of the most popular and easy to use object detection models. We evaluated YOLOv5 and YOLOX models in this study. We also investigate the effects of slicing aided inference and fine-tuning the model for slicing aided inference. We used the VisDrone2019Det dataset for training and evaluating our models. This dataset is challenging in the sense that most objects are relatively small compared to the image sizes. This work aims to benchmark the YOLOv5 and YOLOX models for small object detection. We have seen that sliced inference increases the AP50 score in all experiments, this effect was greater for the YOLOv5 models compared to the YOLOX models. The effects of sliced fine-tuning and sliced inference combined produced substantial improvement for all models. The highest AP50 score was achieved by the YOLOv5- Large model on the VisDrone2019Det test-dev subset with the score being 48.8.
summary: Small object detection has major applications in the fields of UAVs, surveillance, farming and many others. In this work we investigate the performance of state of the art Yolo based object detection models for the task of small object detection as they are one of the most popular and easy to use object detection models. We evaluated YOLOv5 and YOLOX models in this study. We also investigate the effects of slicing aided inference and fine-tuning the model for slicing aided inference. We used the VisDrone2019Det dataset for training and evaluating our models. This dataset is challenging in the sense that most objects are relatively small compared to the image sizes. This work aims to benchmark the YOLOv5 and YOLOX models for small object detection. We have seen that sliced inference increases the AP50 score in all experiments, this effect was greater for the YOLOv5 models compared to the YOLOX models. The effects of sliced fine-tuning and sliced inference combined produced substantial improvement for all models. The highest AP50 score was achieved by the YOLOv5- Large model on the VisDrone2019Det test-dev subset with the score being 48.8.
abstract_zh: 小物体检测在无人机、监控、农业等领域具有主要应用。在这项工作中，我们研究了最先进的基于 Yolo 的对象检测模型在小对象检测任务中的性能，因为它们是最流行且易于使用的对象检测模型之一。我们在本研究中评估了 YOLOv5 和 YOLOX 模型。我们还研究了切片辅助推理的效果，并对切片辅助推理的模型进行了微调。我们使用 VisDrone2019Det 数据集来训练和评估我们的模型。该数据集具有挑战性，因为大多数对象与图像大小相比相对较小。这项工作旨在对 YOLOv5 和 YOLOX 模型进行小物体检测进行基准测试。我们已经看到，切片推理在所有实验中都提高了 AP50 分数，与 YOLOx 模型相比，YOLOv5 模型的这种效果更大。切片微调和切片推理相结合的效果为所有模型带来了显着的改进。 YOLOv5-Large 模型在 VisDrone2019Det 测试开发子集上获得了最高的 AP50 分数，得分为 48.8。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了YOLOv5和YOLOX模型在小目标检测任务中的性能，并研究了切片推理和微调对模型表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测在无人机、监控、农业等领域有重要应用。YOLO模型因其高效性被广泛使用，但其在小目标检测中的表现仍有待评估。
AI.method: 使用VisDrone2019Det数据集对YOLOv5和YOLOX模型进行训练和评估，并研究了切片推理和切片微调对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 切片推理在所有实验中均提升了AP50分数，且对YOLOv5模型效果更显著。切片微调和切片推理结合使用后，所有模型均表现出显著改进。YOLOv5-Large模型在VisDrone2019Det测试集上取得了最高的AP50分数，为48.8。
AI.conclusion: 切片推理和微调能够有效提升YOLO模型在小目标检测任务中的性能，其中YOLOv5-Large模型表现最佳。

authors_text: Stefan Mengel
title: No Efficient Disjunction or Conjunction of Switch-Lists
title_zh: 开关列表没有有效的析取或结合
abstract: It is shown that disjunction of two switch-lists can blow up the representation size exponentially. Since switch-lists can be negated without any increase in size, this shows that conjunction of switch-lists also leads to an exponential blow-up in general.
summary: It is shown that disjunction of two switch-lists can blow up the representation size exponentially. Since switch-lists can be negated without any increase in size, this shows that conjunction of switch-lists also leads to an exponential blow-up in general.
abstract_zh: 结果表明，两个开关列表的析取可以使表示大小呈指数级增长。由于开关列表可以在不增加大小的情况下被否定，这表明开关列表的结合通常也会导致指数爆炸。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了两个开关列表的析取或合取操作会导致表示规模呈指数级增长，表明开关列表在处理这些逻辑运算时效率低下。
AI.motivation: 研究开关列表在逻辑运算中的表示效率，探讨其在计算复杂性中的局限性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，证明析取操作导致指数级规模膨胀，并利用否定操作的性质推导合取操作的同样结论。
AI.result: 开关列表的析取和合取操作在一般情况下均会导致表示规模的指数级增长。
AI.conclusion: 开关列表无法高效支持析取或合取运算，这对依赖此类结构的计算模型具有重要影响。

search_text: No Efficient Disjunction or Conjunction of Switch-Lists 开关列表没有有效的析取或结合 It is shown that disjunction of two switch-lists can blow up the representation size exponentially. Since switch-lists can be negated without any increase in size, this shows that conjunction of switch-lists also leads to an exponential blow-up in general. 结果表明，两个开关列表的析取可以使表示大小呈指数级增长。由于开关列表可以在不增加大小的情况下被否定，这表明开关列表的结合通常也会导致指数爆炸。 本文证明了两个开关列表的析取或合取操作会导致表示规模呈指数级增长，表明开关列表在处理这些逻辑运算时效率低下。 Stefan Mengel cs.CC,cs.AI

authors_text: Alessio Monti,Angelo Porrello,Simone Calderara,Pasquale Coscia,Lamberto Ballan,Rita Cucchiara
title: How many Observations are Enough? Knowledge Distillation for Trajectory Forecasting
title_zh: 多少次观察就足够了？用于轨迹预测的知识蒸馏
abstract: Accurate prediction of future human positions is an essential task for modern video-surveillance systems. Current state-of-the-art models usually rely on a "history" of past tracked locations (e.g., 3 to 5 seconds) to predict a plausible sequence of future locations (e.g., up to the next 5 seconds). We feel that this common schema neglects critical traits of realistic applications: as the collection of input trajectories involves machine perception (i.e., detection and tracking), incorrect detection and fragmentation errors may accumulate in crowded scenes, leading to tracking drifts. On this account, the model would be fed with corrupted and noisy input data, thus fatally affecting its prediction performance. In this regard, we focus on delivering accurate predictions when only few input observations are used, thus potentially lowering the risks associated with automatic perception. To this end, we conceive a novel distillation strategy that allows a knowledge transfer from a teacher network to a student one, the latter fed with fewer observations (just two ones). We show that a properly defined teacher supervision allows a student network to perform comparably to state-of-the-art approaches that demand more observations. Besides, extensive experiments on common trajectory forecasting datasets highlight that our student network better generalizes to unseen scenarios.
summary: Accurate prediction of future human positions is an essential task for modern video-surveillance systems. Current state-of-the-art models usually rely on a "history" of past tracked locations (e.g., 3 to 5 seconds) to predict a plausible sequence of future locations (e.g., up to the next 5 seconds). We feel that this common schema neglects critical traits of realistic applications: as the collection of input trajectories involves machine perception (i.e., detection and tracking), incorrect detection and fragmentation errors may accumulate in crowded scenes, leading to tracking drifts. On this account, the model would be fed with corrupted and noisy input data, thus fatally affecting its prediction performance. In this regard, we focus on delivering accurate predictions when only few input observations are used, thus potentially lowering the risks associated with automatic perception. To this end, we conceive a novel distillation strategy that allows a knowledge transfer from a teacher network to a student one, the latter fed with fewer observations (just two ones). We show that a properly defined teacher supervision allows a student network to perform comparably to state-of-the-art approaches that demand more observations. Besides, extensive experiments on common trajectory forecasting datasets highlight that our student network better generalizes to unseen scenarios.
abstract_zh: 准确预测未来人体位置是现代视频监控系统的一项基本任务。当前最先进的模型通常依赖于过去跟踪位置的“历史”（例如，3 到 5 秒）来预测未来位置的合理序列（例如，直到接下来的 5 秒）。我们认为这种常见模式忽略了实际应用程序的关键特征：由于输入轨迹的收集涉及机器感知（即检测和跟踪），不正确的检测和碎片错误可能会在拥挤的场景中累积，导致跟踪漂移。因此，模型将被输入损坏且有噪声的输入数据，从而致命地影响其预测性能。在这方面，我们专注于在仅使用少量输入观察时提供准确的预测，从而可能降低与自动感知相关的风险。为此，我们构思了一种新颖的蒸馏策略，允许将知识从教师网络转移到学生网络，后者接受较少的观察（只有两个）。我们表明，正确定义的教师监督可以使学生网络的表现与需要更多观察的最先进方法相媲美。此外，对常见轨迹预测数据集的大量实验表明，我们的学生网络可以更好地泛化到未见过的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的轨迹预测方法，通过减少输入观测数量来提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型依赖大量历史观测数据，但实际场景中检测和跟踪误差会导致输入数据噪声增加，影响预测性能。
AI.method: 设计知识蒸馏框架，将教师网络（使用多观测训练）的知识迁移至学生网络（仅使用两个观测进行训练）。
AI.result: 学生网络在常用数据集上表现与现有方法相当，并在未见过的场景中展现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过减少观测依赖，有效缓解了感知噪声对预测的影响，提升了模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Fabrice Lécuyer,Louis Jachiet,Clémence Magnien,Lionel Tabourier
title: Tailored vertex ordering for faster triangle listing in large graphs
title_zh: 定制的顶点排序可在大图中更快地列出三角形
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures. Open-source C++ code available at: https://github.com/lecfab/volt
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures. Open-source C++ code available at: https://github.com/lecfab/volt
abstract: Listing triangles is a fundamental graph problem with many applications, and large graphs require fast algorithms. Vertex ordering allows the orientation of edges from lower to higher vertex indices, and state-of-the-art triangle listing algorithms use this to accelerate their execution and to bound their time complexity. Yet, only basic orderings have been tested. In this paper, we show that studying the precise cost of algorithms instead of their bounded complexity leads to faster solutions. We introduce cost functions that link ordering properties with the running time of a given algorithm. We prove that their minimization is NP-hard and propose heuristics to obtain new orderings with different trade-offs between cost reduction and ordering time. Using datasets with up to two billion edges, we show that our heuristics accelerate the listing of triangles by an average of 38% when the ordering is already given as an input, and 16% when the ordering time is included.
summary: Listing triangles is a fundamental graph problem with many applications, and large graphs require fast algorithms. Vertex ordering allows the orientation of edges from lower to higher vertex indices, and state-of-the-art triangle listing algorithms use this to accelerate their execution and to bound their time complexity. Yet, only basic orderings have been tested. In this paper, we show that studying the precise cost of algorithms instead of their bounded complexity leads to faster solutions. We introduce cost functions that link ordering properties with the running time of a given algorithm. We prove that their minimization is NP-hard and propose heuristics to obtain new orderings with different trade-offs between cost reduction and ordering time. Using datasets with up to two billion edges, we show that our heuristics accelerate the listing of triangles by an average of 38% when the ordering is already given as an input, and 16% when the ordering time is included.
abstract_zh: 列出三角形是许多应用程序的基本图形问题，大型图形需要快速算法。顶点排序允许边的方向从较低的顶点索引到较高的顶点索引，最先进的三角形列表算法使用它来加速其执行并限制其时间复杂度。然而，仅测试了基本顺序。在本文中，我们表明，研究算法的精确成本而不是其有限复杂性可以带来更快的解决方案。我们引入了将排序属性与给定算法的运行时间联系起来的成本函数。我们证明它们的最小化是 NP 困难的，并提出启发式方法来获得新的排序，并在成本降低和排序时间之间进行不同的权衡。使用具有多达 20 亿条边的数据集，我们表明，当排序已经作为输入给出时，我们的启发式方法将三角形列表的速度平均加快了 38%，而当包含排序时间时，速度加快了 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种定制顶点排序方法，以加速大型图中的三角形列举。
AI.motivation: 现有顶点排序方法仅依赖基础排序策略，未充分考虑算法实际运行成本，导致效率受限。
AI.method: 引入关联排序属性与运行时间的成本函数，证明其最小化为NP难问题，并设计启发式方法生成优化排序。
AI.result: 在包含20亿边的数据集上，排序预处理加速三角形列举38%，含排序时间仍实现16%加速。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化排序成本可显著提升算法效率，为图算法优化提供新方向。

authors_text: Sen Jia,Yifan Wang
title: Multiscale Convolutional Transformer with Center Mask Pretraining for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 用于高光谱图像分类的具有中心掩模预训练的多尺度卷积变压器
abstract: Hyperspectral images (HSI) not only have a broad macroscopic field of view but also contain rich spectral information, and the types of surface objects can be identified through spectral information, which is one of the main applications in hyperspectral image related research.In recent years, more and more deep learning methods have been proposed, among which convolutional neural networks (CNN) are the most influential. However, CNN-based methods are difficult to capture long-range dependencies, and also require a large amount of labeled data for model training.Besides, most of the self-supervised training methods in the field of HSI classification are based on the reconstruction of input samples, and it is difficult to achieve effective use of unlabeled samples. To address the shortcomings of CNN networks, we propose a noval multi-scale convolutional embedding module for HSI to realize effective extraction of spatial-spectral information, which can be better combined with Transformer network.In order to make more efficient use of unlabeled data, we propose a new self-supervised pretask. Similar to Mask autoencoder, but our pre-training method only masks the corresponding token of the central pixel in the encoder, and inputs the remaining token into the decoder to reconstruct the spectral information of the central pixel.Such a pretask can better model the relationship between the central feature and the domain feature, and obtain more stable training results.
summary: Hyperspectral images (HSI) not only have a broad macroscopic field of view but also contain rich spectral information, and the types of surface objects can be identified through spectral information, which is one of the main applications in hyperspectral image related research.In recent years, more and more deep learning methods have been proposed, among which convolutional neural networks (CNN) are the most influential. However, CNN-based methods are difficult to capture long-range dependencies, and also require a large amount of labeled data for model training.Besides, most of the self-supervised training methods in the field of HSI classification are based on the reconstruction of input samples, and it is difficult to achieve effective use of unlabeled samples. To address the shortcomings of CNN networks, we propose a noval multi-scale convolutional embedding module for HSI to realize effective extraction of spatial-spectral information, which can be better combined with Transformer network.In order to make more efficient use of unlabeled data, we propose a new self-supervised pretask. Similar to Mask autoencoder, but our pre-training method only masks the corresponding token of the central pixel in the encoder, and inputs the remaining token into the decoder to reconstruct the spectral information of the central pixel.Such a pretask can better model the relationship between the central feature and the domain feature, and obtain more stable training results.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像（HSI）不仅具有广阔的宏观视场，而且还包含丰富的光谱信息，通过光谱信息可以识别地表物体的类型，是高光谱图像相关研究的主要应用之一。近年来，越来越多的深度学习方法被提出，其中以卷积神经网络（CNN）最为有影响力。然而，基于CNN的方法很难捕获长程依赖关系，并且还需要大量的标记数据进行模型训练。此外，HSI分类领域的自监督训练方法大多基于输入样本的重构，很难实现对未标记样本的有效利用。针对CNN网络的缺点，我们提出了一种新型的HSI多尺度卷积嵌入模块，以实现空间光谱信息的有效提取，可以更好地与Transformer网络结合。为了更有效地利用未标记数据，我们提出了一种新的自监督预任务。与Mask自动编码器类似，但我们的预训练方法仅在编码器中屏蔽中心像素对应的token，将剩余的token输入到解码器中以重建中心像素的光谱信息。这样的预任务可以更好地建模中心特征和领域特征之间的关系，并获得更稳定的训练结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多尺度卷积嵌入模块与中心掩码预训练的Transformer模型，用于高光谱图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN难以捕捉长距离依赖且依赖大量标注数据，而现有自监督方法对未标注样本利用效率低，需改进模型结构与预训练策略。
AI.method: 设计多尺度卷积嵌入模块提取空间-光谱特征并融合Transformer；提出中心掩码预训练任务，仅掩码中心像素token，通过剩余token重建中心光谱信息以提升自监督效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在高光谱图像分类任务中优于现有CNN与自监督方法，尤其在标注数据有限时表现更优（具体指标未明确）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结构创新与新型预训练任务有效结合了CNN的局部特征提取能力与Transformer的全局建模能力，为高光谱图像分类提供了新思路。

search_text: Multiscale Convolutional Transformer with Center Mask Pretraining for Hyperspectral Image Classification 用于高光谱图像分类的具有中心掩模预训练的多尺度卷积变压器 Hyperspectral images (HSI) not only have a broad macroscopic field of view but also contain rich spectral information, and the types of surface objects can be identified through spectral information, which is one of the main applications in hyperspectral image related research.In recent years, more and more deep learning methods have been proposed, among which convolutional neural networks (CNN) are the most influential. However, CNN-based methods are difficult to capture long-range dependencies, and also require a large amount of labeled data for model training.Besides, most of the self-supervised training methods in the field of HSI classification are based on the reconstruction of input samples, and it is difficult to achieve effective use of unlabeled samples. To address the shortcomings of CNN networks, we propose a noval multi-scale convolutional embedding module for HSI to realize effective extraction of spatial-spectral information, which can be better combined with Transformer network.In order to make more efficient use of unlabeled data, we propose a new self-supervised pretask. Similar to Mask autoencoder, but our pre-training method only masks the corresponding token of the central pixel in the encoder, and inputs the remaining token into the decoder to reconstruct the spectral information of the central pixel.Such a pretask can better model the relationship between the central feature and the domain feature, and obtain more stable training results. 高光谱图像（HSI）不仅具有广阔的宏观视场，而且还包含丰富的光谱信息，通过光谱信息可以识别地表物体的类型，是高光谱图像相关研究的主要应用之一。近年来，越来越多的深度学习方法被提出，其中以卷积神经网络（CNN）最为有影响力。然而，基于CNN的方法很难捕获长程依赖关系，并且还需要大量的标记数据进行模型训练。此外，HSI分类领域的自监督训练方法大多基于输入样本的重构，很难实现对未标记样本的有效利用。针对CNN网络的缺点，我们提出了一种新型的HSI多尺度卷积嵌入模块，以实现空间光谱信息的有效提取，可以更好地与Transformer网络结合。为了更有效地利用未标记数据，我们提出了一种新的自监督预任务。与Mask自动编码器类似，但我们的预训练方法仅在编码器中屏蔽中心像素对应的token，将剩余的token输入到解码器中以重建中心像素的光谱信息。这样的预任务可以更好地建模中心特征和领域特征之间的关系，并获得更稳定的训练结果。 本文提出一种结合多尺度卷积嵌入模块与中心掩码预训练的Transformer模型，用于高光谱图像分类任务。 Sen Jia,Yifan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Gian Maria Campedelli
title: Explainable Machine Learning for Predicting Homicide Clearance in the United States
title_zh: 用于预测美国凶杀案清案的可解释机器学习
abstract: Purpose: To explore the potential of Explainable Machine Learning in the prediction and detection of drivers of cleared homicides at the national- and state-levels in the United States. Methods: First, nine algorithmic approaches are compared to assess the best performance in predicting cleared homicides country-wise, using data from the Murder Accountability Project. The most accurate algorithm among all (XGBoost) is then used for predicting clearance outcomes state-wise. Second, SHAP, a framework for Explainable Artificial Intelligence, is employed to capture the most important features in explaining clearance patterns both at the national and state levels. Results: At the national level, XGBoost demonstrates to achieve the best performance overall. Substantial predictive variability is detected state-wise. In terms of explainability, SHAP highlights the relevance of several features in consistently predicting investigation outcomes. These include homicide circumstances, weapons, victims' sex and race, as well as number of involved offenders and victims. Conclusions: Explainable Machine Learning demonstrates to be a helpful framework for predicting homicide clearance. SHAP outcomes suggest a more organic integration of the two theoretical perspectives emerged in the literature. Furthermore, jurisdictional heterogeneity highlights the importance of developing ad hoc state-level strategies to improve police performance in clearing homicides.
summary: Purpose: To explore the potential of Explainable Machine Learning in the prediction and detection of drivers of cleared homicides at the national- and state-levels in the United States. Methods: First, nine algorithmic approaches are compared to assess the best performance in predicting cleared homicides country-wise, using data from the Murder Accountability Project. The most accurate algorithm among all (XGBoost) is then used for predicting clearance outcomes state-wise. Second, SHAP, a framework for Explainable Artificial Intelligence, is employed to capture the most important features in explaining clearance patterns both at the national and state levels. Results: At the national level, XGBoost demonstrates to achieve the best performance overall. Substantial predictive variability is detected state-wise. In terms of explainability, SHAP highlights the relevance of several features in consistently predicting investigation outcomes. These include homicide circumstances, weapons, victims' sex and race, as well as number of involved offenders and victims. Conclusions: Explainable Machine Learning demonstrates to be a helpful framework for predicting homicide clearance. SHAP outcomes suggest a more organic integration of the two theoretical perspectives emerged in the literature. Furthermore, jurisdictional heterogeneity highlights the importance of developing ad hoc state-level strategies to improve police performance in clearing homicides.
abstract_zh: 目的：探索可解释的机器学习在美国国家和州一级预测和检测已清除的凶杀案司机方面的潜力。方法：首先，使用谋杀问责项目的数据，比较九种算法方法，以评估预测全国范围内已查明的凶杀案的最佳性能。然后使用所有算法中最准确的算法 (XGBoost) 来预测各州的清除结果。其次，SHAP（可解释的人工智能框架）用于捕获解释国家和州层面的清除模式的最重要特征。结果：在国家层面，XGBoost 表现出整体最佳表现。各州检测到显着的预测变异性。在可解释性方面，SHAP 强调了几个特征在一致预测调查结果方面的相关性。其中包括凶杀案情、武器、受害者的性别和种族，以及涉案罪犯和受害者的人数。结论：可解释的机器学习被证明是预测凶杀案清除的有用框架。 SHAP 结果表明文献中出现的两种理论观点更加有机地结合在一起。此外，管辖权的异质性凸显了制定临时州级战略以提高警察侦破凶杀案绩效的重要性。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用可解释机器学习预测美国凶杀案结案情况，并识别影响结案的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效识别凶杀案结案的驱动因素，而可解释机器学习能提供透明预测，帮助制定针对性策略。
AI.method: 比较九种算法（如XGBoost）预测国家及州级结案率，使用SHAP框架分析特征重要性。
AI.result: XGBoost在国家层面表现最佳，各州差异显著；SHAP显示凶杀案情境、武器、受害者性别/种族等因素具重要解释力。
AI.conclusion: 可解释机器学习有效预测凶杀案结案，SHAP整合了两种理论视角，需基于各州差异制定本地化策略。

authors_text: Yike Zhang,Xiaobing Feng,Yi Liu,Songjun Cao,Long Ma
title: A practical framework for multi-domain speech recognition and an instance sampling method to neural language modeling
title_zh: 多领域语音识别的实用框架和神经语言建模的实例采样方法
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems used on smart phones or vehicles are usually required to process speech queries from very different domains. In such situations, a vanilla ASR system usually fails to perform well on every domain. This paper proposes a multi-domain ASR framework for Tencent Map, a navigation app used on smart phones and in-vehicle infotainment systems. The proposed framework consists of three core parts: a basic ASR module to generate n-best lists of a speech query, a text classification module to determine which domain the speech query belongs to, and a reranking module to rescore n-best lists using domain-specific language models. In addition, an instance sampling based method to training neural network language models (NNLMs) is proposed to address the data imbalance problem in multi-domain ASR. In experiments, the proposed framework was evaluated on navigation domain and music domain, since navigating and playing music are two main features of Tencent Map. Compared to a general ASR system, the proposed framework achieves a relative 13% $\sim$ 22% character error rate reduction on several test sets collected from Tencent Map and our in-car voice assistant.
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems used on smart phones or vehicles are usually required to process speech queries from very different domains. In such situations, a vanilla ASR system usually fails to perform well on every domain. This paper proposes a multi-domain ASR framework for Tencent Map, a navigation app used on smart phones and in-vehicle infotainment systems. The proposed framework consists of three core parts: a basic ASR module to generate n-best lists of a speech query, a text classification module to determine which domain the speech query belongs to, and a reranking module to rescore n-best lists using domain-specific language models. In addition, an instance sampling based method to training neural network language models (NNLMs) is proposed to address the data imbalance problem in multi-domain ASR. In experiments, the proposed framework was evaluated on navigation domain and music domain, since navigating and playing music are two main features of Tencent Map. Compared to a general ASR system, the proposed framework achieves a relative 13% $\sim$ 22% character error rate reduction on several test sets collected from Tencent Map and our in-car voice assistant.
abstract_zh: 智能手机或车辆上使用的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统通常需要处理来自不同领域的语音查询。在这种情况下，普通的 ASR 系统通常无法在每个域上都表现良好。本文为腾讯地图（一款用于智能手机和车载信息娱乐系统的导航应用程序）提出了一个多域 ASR 框架。所提出的框架由三个核心部分组成：一个基本的 ASR 模块，用于生成语音查询的 n 个最佳列表；一个文本分类模块，用于确定语音查询属于哪个域；以及一个重新排序模块，用于使用特定领域的语言模型重新评分 n 个最佳列表。此外，还提出了一种基于实例采样的神经网络语言模型（NNLM）训练方法来解决多域 ASR 中的数据不平衡问题。在实验中，由于导航和播放音乐是腾讯地图的两个主要功能，因此在导航领域和音乐领域对所提出的框架进行了评估。与一般的 ASR 系统相比，所提出的框架在从腾讯地图和车载语音助手收集的多个测试集上实现了相对 13% $\sim$ 和 22% 的字符错误率降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多领域语音识别的实用框架，并设计了一种基于实例采样的方法来训练神经网络语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的语音识别系统在处理来自不同领域的语音查询时表现不佳，因此需要一种能够适应多领域场景的语音识别框架。
AI.method: 该框架包括基础ASR模块、文本分类模块和重排序模块，同时提出了一种基于实例采样的方法来解决多领域ASR中的数据不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在导航和音乐两个主要领域上进行实验，与通用ASR系统相比，该框架在多个测试集上实现了13%至22%的字符错误率降低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了多领域语音识别的性能，适用于如腾讯地图等多场景语音助手系统。

method: 该框架包括基础ASR模块、文本分类模块和重排序模块，同时提出了一种基于实例采样的方法来解决多领域ASR中的数据不平衡问题。
result: 在导航和音乐两个主要领域上进行实验，与通用ASR系统相比，该框架在多个测试集上实现了13%至22%的字符错误率降低。
conclusion: 该框架有效提升了多领域语音识别的性能，适用于如腾讯地图等多场景语音助手系统。
search_text: A practical framework for multi-domain speech recognition and an instance sampling method to neural language modeling 多领域语音识别的实用框架和神经语言建模的实例采样方法 Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems used on smart phones or vehicles are usually required to process speech queries from very different domains. In such situations, a vanilla ASR system usually fails to perform well on every domain. This paper proposes a multi-domain ASR framework for Tencent Map, a navigation app used on smart phones and in-vehicle infotainment systems. The proposed framework consists of three core parts: a basic ASR module to generate n-best lists of a speech query, a text classification module to determine which domain the speech query belongs to, and a reranking module to rescore n-best lists using domain-specific language models. In addition, an instance sampling based method to training neural network language models (NNLMs) is proposed to address the data imbalance problem in multi-domain ASR. In experiments, the proposed framework was evaluated on navigation domain and music domain, since navigating and playing music are two main features of Tencent Map. Compared to a general ASR system, the proposed framework achieves a relative 13% $\sim$ 22% character error rate reduction on several test sets collected from Tencent Map and our in-car voice assistant. 智能手机或车辆上使用的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统通常需要处理来自不同领域的语音查询。在这种情况下，普通的 ASR 系统通常无法在每个域上都表现良好。本文为腾讯地图（一款用于智能手机和车载信息娱乐系统的导航应用程序）提出了一个多域 ASR 框架。所提出的框架由三个核心部分组成：一个基本的 ASR 模块，用于生成语音查询的 n 个最佳列表；一个文本分类模块，用于确定语音查询属于哪个域；以及一个重新排序模块，用于使用特定领域的语言模型重新评分 n 个最佳列表。此外，还提出了一种基于实例采样的神经网络语言模型（NNLM）训练方法来解决多域 ASR 中的数据不平衡问题。在实验中，由于导航和播放音乐是腾讯地图的两个主要功能，因此在导航领域和音乐领域对所提出的框架进行了评估。与一般的 ASR 系统相比，所提出的框架在从腾讯地图和车载语音助手收集的多个测试集上实现了相对 13% $\sim$ 和 22% 的字符错误率降低。 本文提出了一种用于多领域语音识别的实用框架，并设计了一种基于实例采样的方法来训练神经网络语言模型。 Yike Zhang,Xiaobing Feng,Yi Liu,Songjun Cao,Long Ma eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Víctor Mayoral-Vilches
title: Robot Hacking Manual (RHM)
title_zh: 机器人黑客手册 (RHM)
abstract: Robots are often shipped insecure and in some cases fully unprotected. The rationale behind is fourfold: first, defensive security mechanisms for robots are still on their early stages, not covering the complete threat landscape. Second, the inherent complexity of robotic systems makes their protection costly, both technically and economically. Third, robot vendors do not generally take responsibility in a timely manner, extending the zero-days exposure window (time until mitigation of a zero-day) to several years on average. Fourth, contrary to the common-sense expectations in 21st century and similar to Ford in the 1920s with cars, most robot manufacturers oppose or difficult robot repairs. The Robot Hacking Manual (RHM) is an introductory series about cybersecurity for robots, with an attempt to provide comprehensive case studies and step-by-step tutorials with the intent to raise awareness in the field and highlight the importance of taking a security-first approach. The material available here is also a personal learning attempt and it's disconnected from any particular organization. Content is provided as is and by no means it's encouraged or promoted the unauthorized tampering of robotic systems or related technologies.

Fourth, contrary to the common-sense expectations in 21st century and similar to Ford in the 1920s with cars, most robot manufacturers oppose or difficult robot repairs. The Robot Hacking Manual (RHM) is an introductory series about cybersecurity for robots, with an attempt to provide comprehensive case studies and step-by-step tutorials with the intent to raise awareness in the field and highlight the importance of taking a security-first approach. The material available here is also a personal learning attempt and it's disconnected from any particular organization. Content is provided as is and by no means it's encouraged or promoted the unauthorized tampering of robotic systems or related technologies.
abstract_zh: 机器人的运输通常不安全，在某些情况下甚至完全不受保护。其背后的理由有四个：首先，机器人的防御安全机制仍处于早期阶段，未能覆盖完整的威胁格局。其次，机器人系统固有的复杂性使得其保护在技术和经济上成本高昂。第三，机器人供应商普遍不及时承担责任，将零日漏洞暴露窗口（零日漏洞缓解的时间）平均延长至数年。第四，与21世纪的常识预期相反，与20年代的福特汽车类似，大多数机器人制造商反对或难以进行机器人维修。机器人黑客手册 (RHM) 是关于机器人网络安全的介绍性系列，试图提供全面的案例研究和分步教程，旨在提高该领域的认识并强调采取安全第一方法的重要性。这里提供的材料也是个人学习尝试，与任何特定组织无关。内容按原样提供，绝不鼓励或提倡未经授权篡改机器人系统或相关技术。

AI.tldr: 介绍机器人网络安全的案例研究和教程，以提高安全意识并强调安全优先的方法。
AI.motivation: 由于机器人安全机制不成熟、保护成本高、厂商响应迟缓及维修限制，导致机器人存在重大安全隐患，需提升安全意识。
AI.method: 通过提供案例研究和分步教程，系统性地介绍机器人网络安全的攻击方法和防御策略。
AI.result: 提高了机器人网络安全威胁的认识，并强调了在设计和维护中采用安全优先策略的重要性。
AI.conclusion: RHM作为教育工具促进机器人安全实践，但需行业和政策层面进一步改进以解决根本安全问题。

authors_text: Tai Hoang
title: Autonomous soft hand grasping -- Literature review
title_zh: 自主软手抓取——文献综述
abstract: Autonomous grasping remains challenging as unlike humans, robots do not possess a sophisticated sensing nor delicate interaction capability with the real environment. Among other efforts that tried to close the gap between them, anthropomorphic robotic hands is the most prominent direction. However, exactly following human hand design might be unnecessary as it will significantly increase the mechanical complexity and hence make it less economically feasible. Recently, soft robotic hands, a new trend has emerged, aiming to make the design adequately complex and affordable while requiring much less effort to control. In the first part of this article, we will lay out several prominent designs in this direction and their applications in real world scenarios. Having a suitable hardware simplified the complexity of software designing. However, manually controlling the hand for one task requires a significantly large amount of time and effort and doing it repeatedly is unsurprisingly tedious. Therefore, in the second part, we will show some recent techniques for soft hand autonomous control. We start by briefly discussing the analytic methods that mainly exploit the hand dynamic information. Then, data-driven approaches will be our main focus. It is the trending research topic for soft hand grasping in recent years as it has shown a high performance when dealing with a large number of various objects.
summary: Autonomous grasping remains challenging as unlike humans, robots do not possess a sophisticated sensing nor delicate interaction capability with the real environment. Among other efforts that tried to close the gap between them, anthropomorphic robotic hands is the most prominent direction. However, exactly following human hand design might be unnecessary as it will significantly increase the mechanical complexity and hence make it less economically feasible. Recently, soft robotic hands, a new trend has emerged, aiming to make the design adequately complex and affordable while requiring much less effort to control. In the first part of this article, we will lay out several prominent designs in this direction and their applications in real world scenarios. Having a suitable hardware simplified the complexity of software designing. However, manually controlling the hand for one task requires a significantly large amount of time and effort and doing it repeatedly is unsurprisingly tedious. Therefore, in the second part, we will show some recent techniques for soft hand autonomous control. We start by briefly discussing the analytic methods that mainly exploit the hand dynamic information. Then, data-driven approaches will be our main focus. It is the trending research topic for soft hand grasping in recent years as it has shown a high performance when dealing with a large number of various objects.
abstract_zh: 自主抓取仍然具有挑战性，因为与人类不同，机器人不具备复杂的感知能力，也不具备与真实环境的微妙交互能力。在试图缩小它们之间差距的其他努力中，拟人化机械手是最突出的方向。然而，完全遵循人手设计可能是不必要的，因为这会显着增加机械复杂性，从而使其在经济上不太可行。最近，软机器人手出现了一种新趋势，旨在使设计足够复杂且经济实惠，同时需要更少的控制力。在本文的第一部分中，我们将展示该方向的几个突出设计及其在现实场景中的应用。拥有合适的硬件可以简化软件设计的复杂性。然而，手动控制手来完成一项任务需要大量的时间和精力，并且重复地执行此操作毫无疑问是乏味的。因此，在第二部分中，我们将展示一些软手自主控制的最新技术。我们首先简要讨论主要利用手部动态信息的分析方法。那么，数据驱动的方法将是我们的主要关注点。它是近年来软手抓取的热门研究课题，因为它在处理大量不同物体时表现出高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自主软体机械手抓取的研究进展，重点分析了其设计及自主控制方法。
AI.motivation: 机器人自主抓取面临环境感知与交互能力不足的挑战，传统类人机械手设计复杂且成本高，软体机械手因其结构简化与控制便捷性成为研究热点。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分两部分：第一部分梳理典型软体机械手设计及其应用场景；第二部分探讨基于动力学分析与数据驱动的自主控制技术，重点分析数据驱动方法在多物体抓取中的表现。
AI.result: 总结了当前软体机械手的硬件设计趋势，并验证了数据驱动方法在复杂物体抓取任务中的高效性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 软体机械手通过简化结构与数据驱动控制有效提升了自主抓取能力，未来需进一步优化控制算法与硬件协同性。

authors_text: Anuj Pasricha,Yi-Shiuan Tung,Bradley Hayes,Alessandro Roncone
title: PokeRRT: A Kinodynamic Planning Approach for Poking Manipulation
title_zh: PokeRRT：用于戳操作的运动动力学规划方法
comment: Published at the IROS 2021 Workshop on Impact-Aware Robotics
comments: Published at the IROS 2021 Workshop on Impact-Aware Robotics
abstract: This work introduces PokeRRT, a novel motion planning algorithm that demonstrates poking as an effective non-prehensile manipulation skill to enable fast manipulation of objects and increase the size of a robot's reachable workspace. Our qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the advantages of poking over pushing and grasping in planning object trajectories through uncluttered and cluttered environments.
summary: This work introduces PokeRRT, a novel motion planning algorithm that demonstrates poking as an effective non-prehensile manipulation skill to enable fast manipulation of objects and increase the size of a robot's reachable workspace. Our qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the advantages of poking over pushing and grasping in planning object trajectories through uncluttered and cluttered environments.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了 PokeRRT，这是一种新颖的运动规划算法，该算法证明戳戳是一种有效的非抓握操纵技能，可以快速操纵物体并增加机器人可到达的工作空间的大小。我们的定性和定量结果证明了在整洁和杂乱的环境中规划物体轨迹时，戳戳相对于推和抓的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PokeRRT的运动规划算法，通过非抓取操作中的poking技能提升机器人操作物体的效率和可达空间。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取和推动操作在复杂环境中存在局限性，而poking作为一种非抓取技能，能更灵活地操作物体并扩大机器人工作空间。
AI.method: 设计基于运动学与动力学的PokeRRT算法，结合随机树扩展技术，专门优化poking操作的轨迹规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，PokeRRT在无杂乱和杂乱环境中均优于传统推动与抓取方法，能更高效规划物体轨迹。
AI.conclusion: PokeRRT验证了poking作为非抓取技能的有效性，为复杂环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wenxuan Guo,Junchi Yan,Hui-Ling Zhen,Xijun Li,Mingxuan Yuan,Yaohui Jin
title: Machine Learning Methods in Solving the Boolean Satisfiability Problem
title_zh: 解决布尔可满足性问题的机器学习方法
abstract: This paper reviews the recent literature on solving the Boolean satisfiability problem (SAT), an archetypal NP-complete problem, with the help of machine learning techniques. Despite the great success of modern SAT solvers to solve large industrial instances, the design of handcrafted heuristics is time-consuming and empirical. Under the circumstances, the flexible and expressive machine learning methods provide a proper alternative to solve this long-standing problem. We examine the evolving ML-SAT solvers from naive classifiers with handcrafted features to the emerging end-to-end SAT solvers such as NeuroSAT, as well as recent progress on combinations of existing CDCL and local search solvers with machine learning methods. Overall, solving SAT with machine learning is a promising yet challenging research topic. We conclude the limitations of current works and suggest possible future directions.
summary: This paper reviews the recent literature on solving the Boolean satisfiability problem (SAT), an archetypal NP-complete problem, with the help of machine learning techniques. Despite the great success of modern SAT solvers to solve large industrial instances, the design of handcrafted heuristics is time-consuming and empirical. Under the circumstances, the flexible and expressive machine learning methods provide a proper alternative to solve this long-standing problem. We examine the evolving ML-SAT solvers from naive classifiers with handcrafted features to the emerging end-to-end SAT solvers such as NeuroSAT, as well as recent progress on combinations of existing CDCL and local search solvers with machine learning methods. Overall, solving SAT with machine learning is a promising yet challenging research topic. We conclude the limitations of current works and suggest possible future directions.
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了最近关于借助机器学习技术解决布尔可满足性问题（SAT）（一种典型的 NP 完全问题）的文献。尽管现代 SAT 求解器在解决大型工业实例方面取得了巨大成功，但手工启发式的设计非常耗时且依赖经验。在这种情况下，灵活且富有表现力的机器学习方法为解决这个长期存在的问题提供了适当的选择。我们研究了不断发展的 ML-SAT 求解器，从具有手工特征的朴素分类器到新兴的端到端 SAT 求解器（例如 NeuroSAT），以及现有 CDCL 和本地搜索求解器与机器学习方法相结合的最新进展。总的来说，用机器学习解决 SAT 问题是一个有前途但又具有挑战性的研究课题。我们总结了当前工作的局限性并提出了未来可能的方向。

AI.tldr: 综述机器学习方法在解决布尔可满足性问题（SAT）中的应用及最新进展
AI.motivation: 传统SAT求解器依赖手工启发式方法，设计复杂且耗时，而机器学习方法提供灵活替代方案
AI.method: 通过回顾近期文献，分析从传统分类器到端到端模型（如NeuroSAT）及结合CDCL/局部搜索的混合方法
AI.result: 总结当前ML-SAT方法的局限性，指出其作为有前景但具挑战性研究方向的潜力
AI.conclusion: 机器学习解决SAT问题仍面临挑战，需进一步研究以提升效果与泛化能力

authors_text: Furkan Gursoy,Ioannis A. Kakadiaris
title: System Cards for AI-Based Decision-Making for Public Policy
title_zh: 基于人工智能的公共政策决策系统卡
abstract: Decisions impacting human lives are increasingly being made or assisted by automated decision-making algorithms. Many of these algorithms process personal data for predicting recidivism, credit risk analysis, identifying individuals using face recognition, and more. While potentially improving efficiency and effectiveness, such algorithms are not inherently free from bias, opaqueness, lack of explainability, maleficence, and the like. Given that the outcomes of these algorithms have a significant impact on individuals and society and are open to analysis and contestation after deployment, such issues must be accounted for before deployment. Formal audits are a way of ensuring algorithms meet the appropriate accountability standards. This work, based on an extensive analysis of the literature and an expert focus group study, proposes a unifying framework for a system accountability benchmark for formal audits of artificial intelligence-based decision-aiding systems. This work also proposes system cards to serve as scorecards presenting the outcomes of such audits. It consists of 56 criteria organized within a four-by-four matrix composed of rows focused on (i) data, (ii) model, (iii) code, (iv) system, and columns focused on (a) development, (b) assessment, (c) mitigation, and (d) assurance. The proposed system accountability benchmark reflects the state-of-the-art developments for accountable systems, serves as a checklist for algorithm audits, and paves the way for sequential work in future research.
summary: Decisions impacting human lives are increasingly being made or assisted by automated decision-making algorithms. Many of these algorithms process personal data for predicting recidivism, credit risk analysis, identifying individuals using face recognition, and more. While potentially improving efficiency and effectiveness, such algorithms are not inherently free from bias, opaqueness, lack of explainability, maleficence, and the like. Given that the outcomes of these algorithms have a significant impact on individuals and society and are open to analysis and contestation after deployment, such issues must be accounted for before deployment. Formal audits are a way of ensuring algorithms meet the appropriate accountability standards. This work, based on an extensive analysis of the literature and an expert focus group study, proposes a unifying framework for a system accountability benchmark for formal audits of artificial intelligence-based decision-aiding systems. This work also proposes system cards to serve as scorecards presenting the outcomes of such audits. It consists of 56 criteria organized within a four-by-four matrix composed of rows focused on (i) data, (ii) model, (iii) code, (iv) system, and columns focused on (a) development, (b) assessment, (c) mitigation, and (d) assurance. The proposed system accountability benchmark reflects the state-of-the-art developments for accountable systems, serves as a checklist for algorithm audits, and paves the way for sequential work in future research.
abstract_zh: 影响人类生活的决策越来越多地由自动决策算法做出或协助。其中许多算法处理个人数据以预测累犯、信用风险分析、使用面部识别来识别个人等等。虽然可能提高效率和有效性，但此类算法本质上并非没有偏见、不透明、缺乏可解释性、恶意等。鉴于这些算法的结果对个人和社会产生重大影响，并且在部署后容易受到分析和争议，因此在部署之前必须考虑到这些问题。正式审计是确保算法满足适当问责标准的一种方法。这项工作基于对文献的广泛分析和专家焦点小组研究，提出了一个统一的系统问责基准框架，用于基于人工智能的决策辅助系统的正式审计。这项工作还提出了系统卡作为记分卡来呈现此类审计的结果。它由 56 个标准组成，这些标准组织在一个 4×4 矩阵中，该矩阵由侧重于 (i) 数据、(ii) 模型、(iii) 代码、(iv) 系统的行和侧重于 (a) 开发、(b) 评估、(c) 缓解和 (d) 保证的列组成。拟议的系统问责基准反映了问责系统的最先进发展，可作为算法审计的清单，并为未来研究的后续工作铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于人工智能辅助决策系统的系统问责基准框架及系统卡片，以确保公共政策中算法决策的透明性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 自动化决策算法在公共政策中广泛应用，但存在偏见、不透明性和缺乏可解释性等问题，需通过正式审计确保问责标准。
AI.method: 基于文献分析和专家焦点小组研究，构建包含数据、模型、代码和系统四个维度的四乘四矩阵框架，并设计系统卡片作为审计结果评分表。
AI.result: 提出包含56项标准的系统问责基准框架，形成可操作的算法审计检查清单，为后续研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架反映了当前问责系统的最新进展，为公共政策中AI决策系统的审计提供了统一标准和实践工具。

The proposed system accountability benchmark reflects the state-of-the-art developments for accountable systems, serves as a checklist for algorithm audits, and paves the way for sequential work in future research. 影响人类生活的决策越来越多地由自动决策算法做出或协助。其中许多算法处理个人数据以预测累犯、信用风险分析、使用面部识别来识别个人等等。虽然可能提高效率和有效性，但此类算法本质上并非没有偏见、不透明、缺乏可解释性、恶意等。鉴于这些算法的结果对个人和社会产生重大影响，并且在部署后容易受到分析和争议，因此在部署之前必须考虑到这些问题。正式审计是确保算法满足适当问责标准的一种方法。这项工作基于对文献的广泛分析和专家焦点小组研究，提出了一个统一的系统问责基准框架，用于基于人工智能的决策辅助系统的正式审计。这项工作还提出了系统卡作为记分卡来呈现此类审计的结果。它由 56 个标准组成，这些标准组织在一个 4×4 矩阵中，该矩阵由侧重于 (i) 数据、(ii) 模型、(iii) 代码、(iv) 系统的行和侧重于 (a) 开发、(b) 评估、(c) 缓解和 (d) 保证的列组成。拟议的系统问责基准反映了问责系统的最先进发展，可作为算法审计的清单，并为未来研究的后续工作铺平道路。 本文提出了一种用于人工智能辅助决策系统的系统问责基准框架及系统卡片，以确保公共政策中算法决策的透明性和公平性。 Furkan Gursoy,Ioannis A. Kakadiaris cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Abdishakour Awale,Duygu Sarikaya
title: Human Gaze Guided Attention for Surgical Activity Recognition
title_zh: 人类凝视引导注意力以进行手术活动识别
abstract: Modeling and automatically recognizing surgical activities are fundamental steps toward automation in surgery and play important roles in providing timely feedback to surgeons. Accurately recognizing surgical activities in video poses a challenging problem that requires an effective means of learning both spatial and temporal dynamics. Human gaze and visual saliency carry important information about visual attention and can be used to extract more relevant features that better reflect these spatial and temporal dynamics. In this study, we propose to use human gaze with a spatio-temporal attention mechanism for activity recognition in surgical videos. Our model consists of an I3D-based architecture, learns spatio-temporal features using 3D convolutions, as well as learns an attention map using human gaze as supervision. We evaluate our model on the Suturing task of JIGSAWS which is a publicly available surgical video understanding dataset. To our knowledge, we are the first to use human gaze for surgical activity recognition. Our results and ablation studies support the contribution of using human gaze to guide attention by outperforming state-of-the art models with an accuracy of 85.4%.
summary: Modeling and automatically recognizing surgical activities are fundamental steps toward automation in surgery and play important roles in providing timely feedback to surgeons. Accurately recognizing surgical activities in video poses a challenging problem that requires an effective means of learning both spatial and temporal dynamics. Human gaze and visual saliency carry important information about visual attention and can be used to extract more relevant features that better reflect these spatial and temporal dynamics. In this study, we propose to use human gaze with a spatio-temporal attention mechanism for activity recognition in surgical videos. Our model consists of an I3D-based architecture, learns spatio-temporal features using 3D convolutions, as well as learns an attention map using human gaze as supervision. We evaluate our model on the Suturing task of JIGSAWS which is a publicly available surgical video understanding dataset. To our knowledge, we are the first to use human gaze for surgical activity recognition. Our results and ablation studies support the contribution of using human gaze to guide attention by outperforming state-of-the art models with an accuracy of 85.4%.
abstract_zh: 建模和自动识别手术活动是手术自动化的基本步骤，在向外科医生提供及时反馈方面发挥着重要作用。准确识别视频中的手术活动是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要一种有效的方法来学习空间和时间动态。人类凝视和视觉显着性携带有关视觉注意力的重要信息，可用于提取更多相关特征，更好地反映这些空间和时间动态。在这项研究中，我们建议使用人类凝视和时空注意机制来识别手术视频中的活动。我们的模型由基于 I3D 的架构组成，使用 3D 卷积学习时空特征，并使用人类凝视作为监督来学习注意力图。我们在 JIGSAWS 的缝合任务上评估我们的模型，JIGSAWS 是一个公开的手术视频理解数据集。据我们所知，我们是第一个使用人类凝视进行手术活动识别的人。我们的结果和消融研究支持使用人类凝视来引导注意力的贡献，其准确率优于最先进的模型，准确率为 85.4%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于人类注视引导的时空注意力机制，用于手术视频中的活动识别
AI.motivation: 手术活动识别需要有效捕捉时空动态，而人类注视能提供关键视觉注意力信息，有助于提取更相关特征
AI.method: 基于I3D架构，结合3D卷积提取时空特征，并利用人类注视作为监督信号学习注意力图
AI.result: 在JIGSAWS缝合任务中达到85.4%的准确率，优于现有最佳模型
AI.conclusion: 首次将人类注视应用于手术活动识别，验证了其有效性，为手术视频理解提供了新方法

authors_text: Kshitij Tiwari,Basak Sakcak,Prasanna Routray,Manivannan M.,Steven M. LaValle
title: Visibility-Inspired Models of Touch Sensors for Navigation
title_zh: 用于导航的触摸传感器的可见性模型
abstract: This paper introduces mathematical models of \sensors\ for mobile robots based on visibility. Serving a purpose similar to the pinhole camera model for computer vision, the introduced models are expected to provide a useful, idealized characterization of task-relevant information that can be inferred from their outputs or observations. Possible tasks include navigation, localization and mapping when a mobile robot is deployed in an unknown environment. These models allow direct comparisons to be made between traditional depth sensors, highlighting cases in which touch sensing may be interchangeable with time of flight or vision sensors, and characterizing unique advantages provided by touch sensing. The models include contact detection, compression, load bearing, and deflection. The results could serve as a basic building block for innovative touch sensor designs for mobile robot sensor fusion systems.
summary: This paper introduces mathematical models of \sensors\ for mobile robots based on visibility. Serving a purpose similar to the pinhole camera model for computer vision, the introduced models are expected to provide a useful, idealized characterization of task-relevant information that can be inferred from their outputs or observations. Possible tasks include navigation, localization and mapping when a mobile robot is deployed in an unknown environment. These models allow direct comparisons to be made between traditional depth sensors, highlighting cases in which touch sensing may be interchangeable with time of flight or vision sensors, and characterizing unique advantages provided by touch sensing. The models include contact detection, compression, load bearing, and deflection. The results could serve as a basic building block for innovative touch sensor designs for mobile robot sensor fusion systems.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于可见性的移动机器人“传感器”的数学模型。与计算机视觉的针孔相机模型类似，所引入的模型有望提供有用的、理想化的任务相关信息表征，这些信息可以从其输出或观察中推断出来。当移动机器人部署在未知环境中时，可能的任务包括导航、定位和绘图。这些模型允许在传统深度传感器之间进行直接比较，突出显示触摸传感可以与飞行时间或视觉传感器互换的情况，并表征触摸传感提供的独特优势。这些模型包括接触检测、压缩、承载和偏转。研究结果可以作为移动机器人传感器融合系统创新触摸传感器设计的基本构建模块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可见性的触觉传感器数学模型，用于移动机器人的导航、定位和地图构建任务。
AI.motivation: 为移动机器人在未知环境中提供理想化的任务相关信息表征，弥补传统深度传感器与触觉传感器在功能上的差异。
AI.method: 借鉴针孔相机模型，建立包含接触检测、压缩、负载承载和偏转的触觉传感器数学模型，并与传统传感器进行对比分析。
AI.result: 构建了触觉传感器的理论框架，明确了其与飞行时间传感器或视觉传感器的可替代场景及独特优势。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为触觉传感器在移动机器人多模态感知系统中的创新设计提供了基础理论支持。
