authors_text: Tianyu Shi,Yifei Ai,Omar ElSamadisy,Baher Abdulhai
title: Bilateral Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach for Better-than-human Car Following Model
title_zh: 优于人类汽车跟随模型的双边深度强化学习方法
abstract: In the coming years and decades, autonomous vehicles (AVs) will become increasingly prevalent, offering new opportunities for safer and more convenient travel and potentially smarter traffic control methods exploiting automation and connectivity. Car following is a prime function in autonomous driving. Car following based on reinforcement learning has received attention in recent years with the goal of learning and achieving performance levels comparable to humans. However, most existing RL methods model car following as a unilateral problem, sensing only the vehicle ahead. Recent literature, however, Wang and Horn [16] has shown that bilateral car following that considers the vehicle ahead and the vehicle behind exhibits better system stability. In this paper we hypothesize that this bilateral car following can be learned using RL, while learning other goals such as efficiency maximisation, jerk minimization, and safety rewards leading to a learned model that outperforms human driving. We propose and introduce a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) framework for car following control by integrating bilateral information into both state and reward function based on the bilateral control model (BCM) for car following control. Furthermore, we use a decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning framework to generate the corresponding control action for each agent. Our simulation results demonstrate that our learned policy is better than the human driving policy in terms of (a) inter-vehicle headways, (b) average speed, (c) jerk, (d) Time to Collision (TTC) and (e) string stability.
summary: In the coming years and decades, autonomous vehicles (AVs) will become increasingly prevalent, offering new opportunities for safer and more convenient travel and potentially smarter traffic control methods exploiting automation and connectivity. Car following is a prime function in autonomous driving. Car following based on reinforcement learning has received attention in recent years with the goal of learning and achieving performance levels comparable to humans. However, most existing RL methods model car following as a unilateral problem, sensing only the vehicle ahead. Recent literature, however, Wang and Horn [16] has shown that bilateral car following that considers the vehicle ahead and the vehicle behind exhibits better system stability. In this paper we hypothesize that this bilateral car following can be learned using RL, while learning other goals such as efficiency maximisation, jerk minimization, and safety rewards leading to a learned model that outperforms human driving. We propose and introduce a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) framework for car following control by integrating bilateral information into both state and reward function based on the bilateral control model (BCM) for car following control. Furthermore, we use a decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning framework to generate the corresponding control action for each agent. Our simulation results demonstrate that our learned policy is better than the human driving policy in terms of (a) inter-vehicle headways, (b) average speed, (c) jerk, (d) Time to Collision (TTC) and (e) string stability.
abstract_zh: 在未来几年和几十年里，自动驾驶汽车（AV）将变得越来越普遍，为更安全、更方便的出行以及利用自动化和连接的潜在更智能的交通控制方法提供了新的机会。汽车跟随是自动驾驶的主要功能。基于强化学习的汽车跟随近年来受到关注，其目标是学习并达到与人类相当的表现水平。然而，大多数现有的强化学习方法将汽车跟随模型视为单方面问题，仅感知前方车辆。然而，最近的文献 Wang 和 Horn [16] 表明，考虑前方车辆和后方车辆的双边汽车跟随表现出更好的系统稳定性。在本文中，我们假设这种双边汽车跟随可以使用强化学习来学习，同时学习其他目标，例如效率最大化、加加速度最小化和安全奖励，从而形成优于人类驾驶的学习模型。我们提出并引入了一种用于汽车跟随控制的深度强化学习（DRL）框架，基于用于汽车跟随控制的双边控制模型（BCM），将双边信息集成到状态和奖励函数中。此外，我们使用分散的多智能体强化学习框架来为每个智能体生成相应的控制动作。我们的模拟结果表明，我们学习的策略在以下方面优于人类驾驶策略：(a) 车距、(b) 平均速度、(c) 加加速度、(d) 碰撞时间 (TTC) 和 (e) 字符串稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双侧信息的深度强化学习框架，用于改进自动驾驶车辆的跟车模型，使其性能超越人类驾驶。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法仅考虑前方车辆信息，而双侧跟车模型（考虑前后车辆）能提升系统稳定性，但尚未被有效应用于强化学习训练。
AI.method: 整合双侧信息至状态空间和奖励函数，基于双侧控制模型（BCM）设计深度强化学习框架，并采用分散式多智能体强化学习生成控制策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，所学策略在跟车间距、平均速度、加加速度（jerk）、碰撞时间（TTC）和串行稳定性等指标上均优于人类驾驶策略。
AI.conclusion: 双侧信息强化学习框架可有效学习更优跟车策略，为自动驾驶提供更安全稳定的控制方案。

search_text: Bilateral Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach for Better-than-human Car Following Model 优于人类汽车跟随模型的双边深度强化学习方法 In the coming years and decades, autonomous vehicles (AVs) will become increasingly prevalent, offering new opportunities for safer and more convenient travel and potentially smarter traffic control methods exploiting automation and connectivity. Car following is a prime function in autonomous driving. Car following based on reinforcement learning has received attention in recent years with the goal of learning and achieving performance levels comparable to humans. However, most existing RL methods model car following as a unilateral problem, sensing only the vehicle ahead. Recent literature, however, Wang and Horn [16] has shown that bilateral car following that considers the vehicle ahead and the vehicle behind exhibits better system stability. In this paper we hypothesize that this bilateral car following can be learned using RL, while learning other goals such as efficiency maximisation, jerk minimization, and safety rewards leading to a learned model that outperforms human driving. We propose and introduce a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) framework for car following control by integrating bilateral information into both state and reward function based on the bilateral control model (BCM) for car following control. Furthermore, we use a decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning framework to generate the corresponding control action for each agent. Our simulation results demonstrate that our learned policy is better than the human driving policy in terms of (a) inter-vehicle headways, (b) average speed, (c) jerk, (d) Time to Collision (TTC) and (e) string stability. 在未来几年和几十年里，自动驾驶汽车（AV）将变得越来越普遍，为更安全、更方便的出行以及利用自动化和连接的潜在更智能的交通控制方法提供了新的机会。汽车跟随是自动驾驶的主要功能。基于强化学习的汽车跟随近年来受到关注，其目标是学习并达到与人类相当的表现水平。然而，大多数现有的强化学习方法将汽车跟随模型视为单方面问题，仅感知前方车辆。然而，最近的文献 Wang 和 Horn [16] 表明，考虑前方车辆和后方车辆的双边汽车跟随表现出更好的系统稳定性。在本文中，我们假设这种双边汽车跟随可以使用强化学习来学习，同时学习其他目标，例如效率最大化、加加速度最小化和安全奖励，从而形成优于人类驾驶的学习模型。我们提出并引入了一种用于汽车跟随控制的深度强化学习（DRL）框架，基于用于汽车跟随控制的双边控制模型（BCM），将双边信息集成到状态和奖励函数中。此外，我们使用分散的多智能体强化学习框架来为每个智能体生成相应的控制动作。我们的模拟结果表明，我们学习的策略在以下方面优于人类驾驶策略：(a) 车距、(b) 平均速度、(c) 加加速度、(d) 碰撞时间 (TTC) 和 (e) 字符串稳定性。 本文提出一种基于双侧信息的深度强化学习框架，用于改进自动驾驶车辆的跟车模型，使其性能超越人类驾驶。 Tianyu Shi,Yifei Ai,Omar ElSamadisy,Baher Abdulhai cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: John Harwell,London Lowmanstone,Maria Gini
title: SIERRA: A Modular Framework for Research Automation
title_zh: SIERRA：研究自动化的模块化框架
abstract: Modern intelligent systems researchers employ the scientific method: they form hypotheses about system behavior, and then run experiments using one or more independent variables to test their hypotheses. We present SIERRA, a novel framework structured around that idea for accelerating research developments and improving reproducibility of results. SIERRA makes it easy to quickly specify the independent variable(s) for an experiment, generate experimental inputs, automatically run the experiment, and process the results to generate deliverables such as graphs and videos. SIERRA provides reproducible automation independent of the execution environment (HPC hardware, real robots, etc.) and targeted platform (arbitrary simulator or real robots), enabling exact experiment replication (up to the limit of the execution environment and platform). It employs a deeply modular approach that allows easy customization and extension of automation for the needs of individual researchers, thereby eliminating manual experiment configuration and result processing via throw-away scripts.
summary: Modern intelligent systems researchers employ the scientific method: they form hypotheses about system behavior, and then run experiments using one or more independent variables to test their hypotheses. We present SIERRA, a novel framework structured around that idea for accelerating research developments and improving reproducibility of results. SIERRA makes it easy to quickly specify the independent variable(s) for an experiment, generate experimental inputs, automatically run the experiment, and process the results to generate deliverables such as graphs and videos. SIERRA provides reproducible automation independent of the execution environment (HPC hardware, real robots, etc.) and targeted platform (arbitrary simulator or real robots), enabling exact experiment replication (up to the limit of the execution environment and platform). It employs a deeply modular approach that allows easy customization and extension of automation for the needs of individual researchers, thereby eliminating manual experiment configuration and result processing via throw-away scripts.
abstract_zh: 现代智能系统研究人员采用科学方法：他们提出有关系统行为的假设，然后使用一个或多个自变量进行实验来检验他们的假设。我们推出了 SIERRA，这是一个围绕这一理念构建的新颖框架，旨在加速研究发展并提高结果的可重复性。 SIERRA 可以轻松快速地指定实验的自变量、生成实验输入、自动运行实验以及处理结果以生成图表和视频等可交付成果。 SIERRA 提供独立于执行环境（HPC 硬件、真实机器人等）和目标平台（任意模拟器或真实机器人）的可重复自动化，从而实现精确的实验复制（达到执行环境和平台的限制）。它采用深度模块化方法，可以根据个别研究人员的需求轻松定制和扩展自动化，从而消除通过一次性脚本进行的手动实验配置和结果处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIERRA框架，通过模块化设计实现研究自动化，提升实验可重复性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统研究实验依赖手动配置与处理，导致可重复性差且效率低下，亟需自动化工具支持跨平台实验复现。
AI.method: 基于模块化架构设计SIERRA，支持自变量快速定义、实验自动执行及结果自动化处理，兼容不同执行环境与平台。
AI.result: SIERRA实现了跨平台实验的精确复现，减少人工干预，提升实验流程自动化水平与结果交付效率。
AI.conclusion: SIERRA通过深度模块化设计有效解决了研究自动化难题，为科研提供高效、可扩展的实验框架支持。

authors_text: Albert Mosella-Montoro,Javier Ruiz-Hidalgo
title: SkinningNet: Two-Stream Graph Convolutional Neural Network for Skinning Prediction of Synthetic Characters
title_zh: SkinningNet：用于合成字符剥皮预测的双流图卷积神经网络
abstract: This work presents SkinningNet, an end-to-end Two-Stream Graph Neural Network architecture that computes skinning weights from an input mesh and its associated skeleton, without making any assumptions on shape class and structure of the provided mesh. Whereas previous methods pre-compute handcrafted features that relate the mesh and the skeleton or assume a fixed topology of the skeleton, the proposed method extracts this information in an end-to-end learnable fashion by jointly learning the best relationship between mesh vertices and skeleton joints. The proposed method exploits the benefits of the novel Multi-Aggregator Graph Convolution that combines the results of different aggregators during the summarizing step of the Message-Passing scheme, helping the operation to generalize for unseen topologies. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the contributions of our novel architecture, with SkinningNet outperforming current state-of-the-art alternatives.
summary: This work presents SkinningNet, an end-to-end Two-Stream Graph Neural Network architecture that computes skinning weights from an input mesh and its associated skeleton, without making any assumptions on shape class and structure of the provided mesh. Whereas previous methods pre-compute handcrafted features that relate the mesh and the skeleton or assume a fixed topology of the skeleton, the proposed method extracts this information in an end-to-end learnable fashion by jointly learning the best relationship between mesh vertices and skeleton joints. The proposed method exploits the benefits of the novel Multi-Aggregator Graph Convolution that combines the results of different aggregators during the summarizing step of the Message-Passing scheme, helping the operation to generalize for unseen topologies. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the contributions of our novel architecture, with SkinningNet outperforming current state-of-the-art alternatives.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 SkinningNet，一种端到端的双流图神经网络架构，它根据输入网格及其相关骨架计算蒙皮权重，而不对所提供网格的形状类别和结构做出任何假设。以前的方法预先计算与网格和骨架相关的手工特征或假设骨架的固定拓扑，而所提出的方法通过共同学习网格顶点和骨架关节之间的最佳关系，以端到端可学习的方式提取此信息。所提出的方法利用了新颖的多聚合器图卷积的优点，该方法在消息传递方案的汇总步骤中结合了不同聚合器的结果，帮助操作泛化看不见的拓扑。实验结果证明了我们新颖架构的贡献的有效性，SkinningNet 的性能优于当前最先进的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的双流图卷积神经网络架构SkinningNet，用于从输入网格和关联骨骼中计算蒙皮权重，无需对网格形状类别和结构做任何假设。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预计算的手工特征或假设骨骼拓扑结构固定，缺乏灵活性和泛化能力，难以适应复杂多样的网格和骨骼组合。
AI.method: 设计双流图神经网络架构，结合多聚合器图卷积技术，在消息传递过程中融合不同聚合器结果，以学习网格顶点与骨骼关节间的最优关系。
AI.result: 实验表明SkinningNet在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性和对未知拓扑结构的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过端到端学习机制和多聚合器设计，成功解决了传统蒙皮权重计算方法的局限性，为合成角色动画提供了更灵活的解决方案。

Whereas previous methods pre-compute handcrafted features that relate the mesh and the skeleton or assume a fixed topology of the skeleton, the proposed method extracts this information in an end-to-end learnable fashion by jointly learning the best relationship between mesh vertices and skeleton joints. The proposed method exploits the benefits of the novel Multi-Aggregator Graph Convolution that combines the results of different aggregators during the summarizing step of the Message-Passing scheme, helping the operation to generalize for unseen topologies. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the contributions of our novel architecture, with SkinningNet outperforming current state-of-the-art alternatives. 这项工作提出了 SkinningNet，一种端到端的双流图神经网络架构，它根据输入网格及其相关骨架计算蒙皮权重，而不对所提供网格的形状类别和结构做出任何假设。以前的方法预先计算与网格和骨架相关的手工特征或假设骨架的固定拓扑，而所提出的方法通过共同学习网格顶点和骨架关节之间的最佳关系，以端到端可学习的方式提取此信息。所提出的方法利用了新颖的多聚合器图卷积的优点，该方法在消息传递方案的汇总步骤中结合了不同聚合器的结果，帮助操作泛化看不见的拓扑。实验结果证明了我们新颖架构的贡献的有效性，SkinningNet 的性能优于当前最先进的替代方案。 本文提出了一种端到端的双流图卷积神经网络架构SkinningNet，用于从输入网格和关联骨骼中计算蒙皮权重，无需对网格形状类别和结构做任何假设。 Albert Mosella-Montoro,Javier Ruiz-Hidalgo cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Cristina Gena
title: Kids Computer Interaction with a Focus on Story Telling and Educational Robotics
title_zh: 儿童计算机交互，重点是讲故事和教育机器人
abstract: In the invited talk at KDAH 2018 workshop (CIKM 2018 conference) I have presented two projects carried out in our HCI lab and target to child: the first one is related to the evaluation in the wild of of a storytelling app for kids based on the swipe story approach, the second one is related to Wolly, an educational robot co-designed with children.
summary: In the invited talk at KDAH 2018 workshop (CIKM 2018 conference) I have presented two projects carried out in our HCI lab and target to child: the first one is related to the evaluation in the wild of of a storytelling app for kids based on the swipe story approach, the second one is related to Wolly, an educational robot co-designed with children.
abstract_zh: 在 KDAH 2018 研讨会（CIKM 2018 会议）的邀请演讲中，我介绍了我们的 HCI 实验室开展的两个针对儿童的项目：第一个项目与基于滑动故事方法的儿童讲故事应用程序的野外评估有关，第二个项目与 Wolly 相关，这是一款与儿童共同设计的教育机器人。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了两项针对儿童的计算机交互项目：基于滑动故事的讲故事应用评估以及与儿童共同设计的教育机器人Wolly。
AI.motivation: 探索儿童在自然场景下的数字交互方式，通过故事讲述和教育机器人提升儿童的学习体验与参与度。
AI.method: 通过野外实验评估讲故事应用的用户反馈，并采用参与式设计方法与儿童协作开发教育机器人Wolly。
AI.result: 验证了滑动故事应用在儿童中的互动性与教育潜力，同时展示了Wolly在教育场景中的可行性与儿童接受度。
AI.conclusion: 儿童导向的交互设计需结合趣味性与教育性，未来应进一步探索技术工具在儿童学习中的长期影响。

authors_text: Han Liu,Xiaoyu Song,Ge Gao,Hehua Zhang,Yu-Shen Liu,Ming Gu
title: Modeling and Validating Temporal Rules with Semantic Petri-Net for Digital Twins
title_zh: 使用数字孪生语义 Petri 网建模和验证时间规则
comment: Preprint submitted to 29th International Workshop on Intelligent Computing in Engineering (EG-ICE)
comments: Preprint submitted to 29th International Workshop on Intelligent Computing in Engineering (EG-ICE)
abstract: Semantic rule checking on RDFS/OWL data has been widely used in the construction industry. At present, semantic rule checking is mainly performed on static models. There are still challenges in integrating temporal models and semantic models for combined rule checking. In this paper, Semantic Petri-Net (SPN) is proposed as a novel temporal modeling and validating method, which implements the states and transitions of the Colored Petri-Net directly based on RDFS and SPARQL, and realizes two-way sharing of knowledge between domain semantic webs and temporal models in the runtime. Several cases are provided to demonstrate the possible applications in digital twins with concurrent state changes and dependencies.
summary: Semantic rule checking on RDFS/OWL data has been widely used in the construction industry. At present, semantic rule checking is mainly performed on static models. There are still challenges in integrating temporal models and semantic models for combined rule checking. In this paper, Semantic Petri-Net (SPN) is proposed as a novel temporal modeling and validating method, which implements the states and transitions of the Colored Petri-Net directly based on RDFS and SPARQL, and realizes two-way sharing of knowledge between domain semantic webs and temporal models in the runtime. Several cases are provided to demonstrate the possible applications in digital twins with concurrent state changes and dependencies.
abstract_zh: RDFS/OWL数据的语义规则检查已广泛应用于建筑行业。目前，语义规则检查主要针对静态模型进行。集成时间模型和语义模型以进行组合规则检查仍然存在挑战。本文提出语义Petri网(SPN)作为一种新颖的时态建模和验证方法，直接基于RDFS和SPARQL实现彩色Petri网的状态和转换，并在运行时实现领域语义网和时态模型之间的双向知识共享。提供了几个案例来演示具有并发状态变化和依赖性的数字孪生的可能应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义Petri网（SPN）的方法，用于数字孪生中的时态规则建模与验证，解决静态模型与时态模型整合的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有语义规则检查主要针对静态模型，难以处理数字孪生中动态时态模型与语义模型的联合验证需求。
AI.method: 设计语义Petri网（SPN），通过RDFS和SPARQL直接实现彩色Petri网的状态与转换，建立语义网与时态模型的双向知识共享机制。
AI.result: 通过多个案例验证SPN在数字孪生场景中有效处理并发状态变化及依赖关系，证明方法的可行性与应用价值。
AI.conclusion: SPN方法为数字孪生提供了动态语义规则验证的新框架，能够有效整合时态与语义模型，推动相关应用发展。

authors_text: Puze Liu,Kuo Zhang,Davide Tateo,Snehal Jauhri,Jan Peters,Georgia Chalvatzaki
title: Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields for Reactive Motion Generation
title_zh: 用于生成反应运动的正则化深符号距离场
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Autonomous robots should operate in real-world dynamic environments and collaborate with humans in tight spaces. A key component for allowing robots to leave structured lab and manufacturing settings is their ability to evaluate online and real-time collisions with the world around them. Distance-based constraints are fundamental for enabling robots to plan their actions and act safely, protecting both humans and their hardware. However, different applications require different distance resolutions, leading to various heuristic approaches for measuring distance fields w.r.t. obstacles, which are computationally expensive and hinder their application in dynamic obstacle avoidance use-cases. We propose Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields (ReDSDF), a single neural implicit function that can compute smooth distance fields at any scale, with fine-grained resolution over high-dimensional manifolds and articulated bodies like humans, thanks to our effective data generation and a simple inductive bias during training. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in representative simulated tasks for whole-body control (WBC) and safe Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) in shared workspaces. Finally, we provide proof of concept of a real-world application in a HRI handover task with a mobile manipulator robot.
summary: Autonomous robots should operate in real-world dynamic environments and collaborate with humans in tight spaces. A key component for allowing robots to leave structured lab and manufacturing settings is their ability to evaluate online and real-time collisions with the world around them. Distance-based constraints are fundamental for enabling robots to plan their actions and act safely, protecting both humans and their hardware. However, different applications require different distance resolutions, leading to various heuristic approaches for measuring distance fields w.r.t. obstacles, which are computationally expensive and hinder their application in dynamic obstacle avoidance use-cases. We propose Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields (ReDSDF), a single neural implicit function that can compute smooth distance fields at any scale, with fine-grained resolution over high-dimensional manifolds and articulated bodies like humans, thanks to our effective data generation and a simple inductive bias during training. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in representative simulated tasks for whole-body control (WBC) and safe Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) in shared workspaces. Finally, we provide proof of concept of a real-world application in a HRI handover task with a mobile manipulator robot.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人应该在现实世界的动态环境中运行，并在狭小的空间中与人类协作。允许机器人离开结构化实验室和制造环境的一个关键因素是它们能够在线评估与周围世界的实时碰撞。基于距离的约束对于机器人能够规划其行动并安全行动、保护人类及其硬件至关重要。然而，不同的应用需要不同的距离分辨率，从而导致了用于测量距离场的各种启发式方法。障碍物，计算成本很高，并且阻碍了它们在动态避障用例中的应用。我们提出了正则化深度符号距离场（ReDSDF），这是一个单一的神经隐式函数，可以计算任何尺度的平滑距离场，在高维流形和像人类这样的关节体上具有细粒度的分辨率，这要归功于我们有效的数据生成和训练期间的简单归纳偏差。我们在共享工作空间中的全身控制（WBC）和安全人机交互（HRI）的代表性模拟任务中展示了我们的方法的有效性。最后，我们提供了移动机械手机器人在 HRI 移交任务中的实际应用的概念证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ReDSDF的神经隐式函数，用于实时生成高精度距离场，以解决动态环境中机器人的碰撞检测与避障问题。
AI.motivation: 传统距离场计算方法在动态障碍物避障场景中存在计算开销大、分辨率不足的问题，难以满足实时性和高维复杂物体的建模需求。
AI.method: 设计Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields（ReDSDF）模型，结合有效数据生成策略和训练时的归纳偏置，实现任意尺度下平滑距离场的高效计算。
AI.result: 在全身控制仿真任务和共享工作空间的安全人机交互场景中验证了方法有效性，并在移动机械臂的人机交接任务中展示了实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: ReDSDF通过统一框架解决了多尺度距离场计算难题，在保证精度的同时显著提升了动态环境下的实时反应能力。

method: 设计Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields（ReDSDF）模型，结合有效数据生成策略和训练时的归纳偏置，实现任意尺度下平滑距离场的高效计算。
result: 在全身控制仿真任务和共享工作空间的安全人机交互场景中验证了方法有效性，并在移动机械臂的人机交接任务中展示了实际应用潜力。
conclusion: ReDSDF通过统一框架解决了多尺度距离场计算难题，在保证精度的同时显著提升了动态环境下的实时反应能力。
search_text: Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields for Reactive Motion Generation 用于生成反应运动的正则化深符号距离场 Autonomous robots should operate in real-world dynamic environments and collaborate with humans in tight spaces. A key component for allowing robots to leave structured lab and manufacturing settings is their ability to evaluate online and real-time collisions with the world around them. Distance-based constraints are fundamental for enabling robots to plan their actions and act safely, protecting both humans and their hardware. However, different applications require different distance resolutions, leading to various heuristic approaches for measuring distance fields w.r.t. obstacles, which are computationally expensive and hinder their application in dynamic obstacle avoidance use-cases. We propose Regularized Deep Signed Distance Fields (ReDSDF), a single neural implicit function that can compute smooth distance fields at any scale, with fine-grained resolution over high-dimensional manifolds and articulated bodies like humans, thanks to our effective data generation and a simple inductive bias during training. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in representative simulated tasks for whole-body control (WBC) and safe Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) in shared workspaces. Finally, we provide proof of concept of a real-world application in a HRI handover task with a mobile manipulator robot. 自主机器人应该在现实世界的动态环境中运行，并在狭小的空间中与人类协作。允许机器人离开结构化实验室和制造环境的一个关键因素是它们能够在线评估与周围世界的实时碰撞。基于距离的约束对于机器人能够规划其行动并安全行动、保护人类及其硬件至关重要。然而，不同的应用需要不同的距离分辨率，从而导致了用于测量距离场的各种启发式方法。障碍物，计算成本很高，并且阻碍了它们在动态避障用例中的应用。我们提出了正则化深度符号距离场（ReDSDF），这是一个单一的神经隐式函数，可以计算任何尺度的平滑距离场，在高维流形和像人类这样的关节体上具有细粒度的分辨率，这要归功于我们有效的数据生成和训练期间的简单归纳偏差。我们在共享工作空间中的全身控制（WBC）和安全人机交互（HRI）的代表性模拟任务中展示了我们的方法的有效性。最后，我们提供了移动机械手机器人在 HRI 移交任务中的实际应用的概念证明。 本文提出一种名为ReDSDF的神经隐式函数，用于实时生成高精度距离场，以解决动态环境中机器人的碰撞检测与避障问题。 Puze Liu,Kuo Zhang,Davide Tateo,Snehal Jauhri,Jan Peters,Georgia Chalvatzaki cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Gordon Euhyun Moon,Eric C. Cyr
title: Parallel Training of GRU Networks with a Multi-Grid Solver for Long Sequences
title_zh: 使用多网格求解器对长序列进行 GRU 网络的并行训练
abstract: Parallelizing Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) networks is a challenging task, as the training procedure of GRU is inherently sequential. Prior efforts to parallelize GRU have largely focused on conventional parallelization strategies such as data-parallel and model-parallel training algorithms. However, when the given sequences are very long, existing approaches are still inevitably performance limited in terms of training time. In this paper, we present a novel parallel training scheme (called parallel-in-time) for GRU based on a multigrid reduction in time (MGRIT) solver. MGRIT partitions a sequence into multiple shorter sub-sequences and trains the sub-sequences on different processors in parallel. The key to achieving speedup is a hierarchical correction of the hidden state to accelerate end-to-end communication in both the forward and backward propagation phases of gradient descent. Experimental results on the HMDB51 dataset, where each video is an image sequence, demonstrate that the new parallel training scheme achieves up to 6.5$\times$ speedup over a serial approach. As efficiency of our new parallelization strategy is associated with the sequence length, our parallel GRU algorithm achieves significant performance improvement as the sequence length increases.
summary: Parallelizing Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) networks is a challenging task, as the training procedure of GRU is inherently sequential. Prior efforts to parallelize GRU have largely focused on conventional parallelization strategies such as data-parallel and model-parallel training algorithms. However, when the given sequences are very long, existing approaches are still inevitably performance limited in terms of training time. In this paper, we present a novel parallel training scheme (called parallel-in-time) for GRU based on a multigrid reduction in time (MGRIT) solver. MGRIT partitions a sequence into multiple shorter sub-sequences and trains the sub-sequences on different processors in parallel. The key to achieving speedup is a hierarchical correction of the hidden state to accelerate end-to-end communication in both the forward and backward propagation phases of gradient descent. Experimental results on the HMDB51 dataset, where each video is an image sequence, demonstrate that the new parallel training scheme achieves up to 6.5$\times$ speedup over a serial approach. As efficiency of our new parallelization strategy is associated with the sequence length, our parallel GRU algorithm achieves significant performance improvement as the sequence length increases.
abstract_zh: 并行化门控循环单元 (GRU) 网络是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为 GRU 的训练过程本质上是顺序的。之前的 GRU 并行化工作主要集中在传统的并行化策略上，例如数据并行和模型并行训练算法。然而，当给定的序列很长时，现有方法在训练时间方面仍然不可避免地受到性能限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多重网格时间缩减 (MGRIT) 求解器的新型 GRU 并行训练方案（称为时间并行）。 MGRIT 将序列划分为多个较短的子序列，并在不同处理器上并行训练子序列。实现加速的关键是对隐藏状态进行分层校正，以加速梯度下降的前向和后向传播阶段的端到端通信。 HMDB51 数据集（其中每个视频都是一个图像序列）的实验结果表明，新的并行训练方案比串行方法实现了高达 6.5$\times$ 的加速。由于我们新的并行化策略的效率与序列长度相关，因此随着序列长度的增加，我们的并行 GRU 算法实现了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多网格时间缩减（MGRIT）求解器的GRU网络并行训练方法，以解决长序列训练效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GRU网络训练因序列顺序性难以并行化，现有数据并行或模型并行方法在处理超长序列时仍存在训练时间性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用MGRIT求解器将长序列分割为多个子序列并行训练，通过分层修正隐藏状态加速前向和反向传播中的端到端通信。
AI.result: 在HMDB51数据集上实现最高6.5倍加速，且序列长度越长性能提升越显著。
AI.conclusion: 该并行训练方案有效突破了传统方法的局限性，在处理长序列任务时展现出显著的效率优势。

authors_text: Gourav Datta,Souvik Kundu,Zihan Yin,Ravi Teja Lakkireddy,Joe Mathai,Ajey Jacob,Peter A. Beerel,Akhilesh R. Jaiswal
title: P2M: A Processing-in-Pixel-in-Memory Paradigm for Resource-Constrained TinyML Applications
title_zh: P2M：适用于资源受限的 TinyML 应用程序的内存像素处理范式
abstract: The demand to process vast amounts of data generated from state-of-the-art high resolution cameras has motivated novel energy-efficient on-device AI solutions. Visual data in such cameras are usually captured in the form of analog voltages by a sensor pixel array, and then converted to the digital domain for subsequent AI processing using analog-to-digital converters (ADC). Recent research has tried to take advantage of massively parallel low-power analog/digital computing in the form of near- and in-sensor processing, in which the AI computation is performed partly in the periphery of the pixel array and partly in a separate on-board CPU/accelerator. Unfortunately, high-resolution input images still need to be streamed between the camera and the AI processing unit, frame by frame, causing energy, bandwidth, and security bottlenecks. To mitigate this problem, we propose a novel Processing-in-Pixel-in-memory (P2M) paradigm, that customizes the pixel array by adding support for analog multi-channel, multi-bit convolution, batch normalization, and ReLU (Rectified Linear Units). Our solution includes a holistic algorithm-circuit co-design approach and the resulting P2M paradigm can be used as a drop-in replacement for embedding memory-intensive first few layers of convolutional neural network (CNN) models within foundry-manufacturable CMOS image sensor platforms. Our experimental results indicate that P2M reduces data transfer bandwidth from sensors and analog to digital conversions by ~21x, and the energy-delay product (EDP) incurred in processing a MobileNetV2 model on a TinyML use case for visual wake words dataset (VWW) by up to ~11x compared to standard near-processing or in-sensor implementations, without any significant drop in test accuracy.
summary: The demand to process vast amounts of data generated from state-of-the-art high resolution cameras has motivated novel energy-efficient on-device AI solutions. Visual data in such cameras are usually captured in the form of analog voltages by a sensor pixel array, and then converted to the digital domain for subsequent AI processing using analog-to-digital converters (ADC). Recent research has tried to take advantage of massively parallel low-power analog/digital computing in the form of near- and in-sensor processing, in which the AI computation is performed partly in the periphery of the pixel array and partly in a separate on-board CPU/accelerator. Unfortunately, high-resolution input images still need to be streamed between the camera and the AI processing unit, frame by frame, causing energy, bandwidth, and security bottlenecks. To mitigate this problem, we propose a novel Processing-in-Pixel-in-memory (P2M) paradigm, that customizes the pixel array by adding support for analog multi-channel, multi-bit convolution, batch normalization, and ReLU (Rectified Linear Units). Our solution includes a holistic algorithm-circuit co-design approach and the resulting P2M paradigm can be used as a drop-in replacement for embedding memory-intensive first few layers of convolutional neural network (CNN) models within foundry-manufacturable CMOS image sensor platforms. Our experimental results indicate that P2M reduces data transfer bandwidth from sensors and analog to digital conversions by ~21x, and the energy-delay product (EDP) incurred in processing a MobileNetV2 model on a TinyML use case for visual wake words dataset (VWW) by up to ~11x compared to standard near-processing or in-sensor implementations, without any significant drop in test accuracy.
abstract_zh: 处理最先进的高分辨率摄像头生成的大量数据的需求催生了新型节能的设备端人工智能解决方案。此类相机中的视觉数据通常由传感器像素阵列以模拟电压的形式捕获，然后使用模数转换器 (ADC) 转换为数字域，以便进行后续的 AI 处理。最近的研究试图以近传感器和传感器内处理的形式利用大规模并行低功耗模拟/数字计算，其中人工智能计算部分在像素阵列的外围执行，部分在单独的板载CPU/加速器中执行。不幸的是，高分辨率输入图像仍然需要在相机和人工智能处理单元之间逐帧传输，从而造成能源、带宽和安全瓶颈。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的内存中像素处理（P2M）范例，通过添加对模拟多通道、多位卷积、批量归一化和 ReLU（整流线性单元）的支持来定制像素阵列。我们的解决方案包括整体算法电路协同设计方法，由此产生的 P2M 范式可用作在可代工厂制造的 CMOS 图像传感器平台中嵌入内存密集型卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型的前几层的直接替代方案。我们的实验结果表明，与标准近处处理或传感器内实现相比，P2M 将传感器和模数转换的数据传输带宽减少了约 21 倍，并且在视觉唤醒词数据集 (VWW) 的 TinyML 用例上处理 MobileNetV2 模型时产生的能量延迟积 (EDP) 减少了约 11 倍，而测试精度没有任何显着下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为P2M的新型处理范式，通过在像素阵列中集成内存和计算功能，解决资源受限的TinyML应用中高分辨率图像处理的能效问题。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头需将高分辨率图像逐帧传输至AI处理单元，导致能耗、带宽和安全瓶颈，亟需在传感器端实现更高效的本地化处理。
AI.method: 通过定制像素阵列，支持模拟多通道多比特卷积、批量归一化和ReLU操作，并采用算法-电路协同设计方法，实现内存密集型CNN模型的嵌入式部署。
AI.result: 实验表明，P2M将传感器数据传输带宽降低约21倍，处理MobileNetV2模型时能量延迟乘积（EDP）降低约11倍，且测试精度无显著下降。
AI.conclusion: P2M范式通过在像素级实现计算与存储集成，有效解决了TinyML应用中的带宽和能效瓶颈，为高分辨率视觉任务提供了低功耗解决方案。

Visual data in such cameras are usually captured in the form of analog voltages by a sensor pixel array, and then converted to the digital domain for subsequent AI processing using analog-to-digital converters (ADC). Recent research has tried to take advantage of massively parallel low-power analog/digital computing in the form of near- and in-sensor processing, in which the AI computation is performed partly in the periphery of the pixel array and partly in a separate on-board CPU/accelerator. Unfortunately, high-resolution input images still need to be streamed between the camera and the AI processing unit, frame by frame, causing energy, bandwidth, and security bottlenecks. To mitigate this problem, we propose a novel Processing-in-Pixel-in-memory (P2M) paradigm, that customizes the pixel array by adding support for analog multi-channel, multi-bit convolution, batch normalization, and ReLU (Rectified Linear Units). Our solution includes a holistic algorithm-circuit co-design approach and the resulting P2M paradigm can be used as a drop-in replacement for embedding memory-intensive first few layers of convolutional neural network (CNN) models within foundry-manufacturable CMOS image sensor platforms. Our experimental results indicate that P2M reduces data transfer bandwidth from sensors and analog to digital conversions by ~21x, and the energy-delay product (EDP) incurred in processing a MobileNetV2 model on a TinyML use case for visual wake words dataset (VWW) by up to ~11x compared to standard near-processing or in-sensor implementations, without any significant drop in test accuracy. 处理最先进的高分辨率摄像头生成的大量数据的需求催生了新型节能的设备端人工智能解决方案。此类相机中的视觉数据通常由传感器像素阵列以模拟电压的形式捕获，然后使用模数转换器 (ADC) 转换为数字域，以便进行后续的 AI 处理。最近的研究试图以近传感器和传感器内处理的形式利用大规模并行低功耗模拟/数字计算，其中人工智能计算部分在像素阵列的外围执行，部分在单独的板载CPU/加速器中执行。不幸的是，高分辨率输入图像仍然需要在相机和人工智能处理单元之间逐帧传输，从而造成能源、带宽和安全瓶颈。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的内存中像素处理（P2M）范例，通过添加对模拟多通道、多位卷积、批量归一化和 ReLU（整流线性单元）的支持来定制像素阵列。我们的解决方案包括整体算法电路协同设计方法，由此产生的 P2M 范式可用作在可代工厂制造的 CMOS 图像传感器平台中嵌入内存密集型卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型的前几层的直接替代方案。我们的实验结果表明，与标准近处处理或传感器内实现相比，P2M 将传感器和模数转换的数据传输带宽减少了约 21 倍，并且在视觉唤醒词数据集 (VWW) 的 TinyML 用例上处理 MobileNetV2 模型时产生的能量延迟积 (EDP) 减少了约 11 倍，而测试精度没有任何显着下降。 本文提出了一种名为P2M的新型处理范式，通过在像素阵列中集成内存和计算功能，解决资源受限的TinyML应用中高分辨率图像处理的能效问题。 Gourav Datta,Souvik Kundu,Zihan Yin,Ravi Teja Lakkireddy,Joe Mathai,Ajey Jacob,Peter A. Beerel,Akhilesh R. Jaiswal cs.LG,cs.AR,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhe Zheng,Xin-Zheng Lu,Ke-Yin Chen,Yu-Cheng Zhou,Jia-Rui Lin
title: Pretrained Domain-Specific Language Model for General Information Retrieval Tasks in the AEC Domain
title_zh: 用于 AEC 领域一般信息检索任务的预训练领域特定语言模型
abstract: As an essential task for the architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) industry, information retrieval (IR) from unstructured textual data based on natural language processing (NLP) is gaining increasing attention. Although various deep learning (DL) models for IR tasks have been investigated in the AEC domain, it is still unclear how domain corpora and domain-specific pretrained DL models can improve performance in various IR tasks. To this end, this work systematically explores the impacts of domain corpora and various transfer learning techniques on the performance of DL models for IR tasks and proposes a pretrained domain-specific language model for the AEC domain. First, both in-domain and close-domain corpora are developed. Then, two types of pretrained models, including traditional wording embedding models and BERT-based models, are pretrained based on various domain corpora and transfer learning strategies. Finally, several widely used DL models for IR tasks are further trained and tested based on various configurations and pretrained models. The result shows that domain corpora have opposite effects on traditional word embedding models for text classification and named entity recognition tasks but can further improve the performance of BERT-based models in all tasks. Meanwhile, BERT-based models dramatically outperform traditional methods in all IR tasks, with maximum improvements of 5.4% and 10.1% in the F1 score, respectively. This research contributes to the body of knowledge in two ways: 1) demonstrating the advantages of domain corpora and pretrained DL models and 2) opening the first domain-specific dataset and pretrained language model for the AEC domain, to the best of our knowledge. Thus, this work sheds light on the adoption and application of pretrained models in the AEC domain.

Although various deep learning (DL) models for IR tasks have been investigated in the AEC domain, it is still unclear how domain corpora and domain-specific pretrained DL models can improve performance in various IR tasks. To this end, this work systematically explores the impacts of domain corpora and various transfer learning techniques on the performance of DL models for IR tasks and proposes a pretrained domain-specific language model for the AEC domain. First, both in-domain and close-domain corpora are developed. Then, two types of pretrained models, including traditional wording embedding models and BERT-based models, are pretrained based on various domain corpora and transfer learning strategies. Finally, several widely used DL models for IR tasks are further trained and tested based on various configurations and pretrained models. The result shows that domain corpora have opposite effects on traditional word embedding models for text classification and named entity recognition tasks but can further improve the performance of BERT-based models in all tasks. Meanwhile, BERT-based models dramatically outperform traditional methods in all IR tasks, with maximum improvements of 5.4% and 10.1% in the F1 score, respectively. This research contributes to the body of knowledge in two ways: 1) demonstrating the advantages of domain corpora and pretrained DL models and 2) opening the first domain-specific dataset and pretrained language model for the AEC domain, to the best of our knowledge. Thus, this work sheds light on the adoption and application of pretrained models in the AEC domain.
abstract_zh: 作为建筑、工程和建造（AEC）行业的一项重要任务，基于自然语言处理（NLP）的非结构化文本数据的信息检索（IR）越来越受到关注。尽管已经在 AEC 领域研究了各种用于 IR 任务的深度学习 (DL) 模型，但仍不清楚领域语料库和特定领域的预训练 DL 模型如何提高各种 IR 任务的性能。为此，这项工作系统地探讨了领域语料库和各种迁移学习技术对 IR 任务的 DL 模型性能的影响，并提出了一种针对 AEC 领域的预训练的特定领域语言模型。首先，开发域内和近域语料库。然后，基于各种领域语料库和迁移学习策略，预训练两种类型的预训练模型，包括传统的词嵌入模型和基于 BERT 的模型。最后，基于各种配置和预训练模型，进一步训练和测试了几种广泛用于 IR 任务的 DL 模型。结果表明，领域语料库对用于文本分类和命名实体识别任务的传统词嵌入模型具有相反的效果，但可以进一步提高基于 BERT 的模型在所有任务中的性能。与此同时，基于 BERT 的模型在所有 IR 任务中都显着优于传统方法，F1 分数最大分别提高了 5.4% 和 10.1%。这项研究以两种方式对知识体系做出了贡献：1）展示了领域语料库和预训练深度学习模型的优势；2）据我们所知，为 AEC 领域开放第一个特定领域数据集和预训练语言模型。因此，这项工作揭示了预训练模型在 AEC 领域的采用和应用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为建筑、工程与施工（AEC）领域开发预训练的领域特定语言模型，以提升信息检索任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有深度学习模型应用于AEC领域信息检索，但领域语料库与预训练模型对任务性能的影响尚不明确，需系统研究并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 构建领域内及相关领域语料库，预训练传统词嵌入模型与BERT模型，并基于不同迁移学习策略优化模型；进一步训练和测试多种信息检索深度学习模型。
AI.result: 领域语料库对传统模型效果分化，但显著提升BERT模型性能（F1分数最高提高5.4%至10.1%）；BERT模型全面优于传统方法，且首次发布AEC领域数据集与预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 领域语料库与预训练模型能有效提升AEC信息检索性能，研究为该领域提供了首个专用数据集与模型，推动预训练技术的应用。

authors_text: Yiran Wei,Stephen J. Price,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Chao Li
title: Predicting conversion of mild cognitive impairment to Alzheimer's disease
title_zh: 预测轻度认知障碍向阿尔茨海默病的转化
abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is the most common age-related dementia. Mild cognitive impairment (MCI) is the early stage of cognitive decline before AD. It is crucial to predict the MCI-to-AD conversion for precise management, which remains challenging due to the diversity of patients. Previous evidence shows that the brain network generated from diffusion MRI promises to classify dementia using deep learning. However, the limited availability of diffusion MRI challenges the model training. In this study, we develop a self-supervised contrastive learning approach to generate structural brain networks from routine anatomical MRI under the guidance of diffusion MRI. The generated brain networks are applied to train a learning framework for predicting the MCI-to-AD conversion. Instead of directly modelling the AD brain networks, we train a graph encoder and a variational autoencoder to model the healthy ageing trajectories from brain networks of healthy controls. To predict the MCI-to-AD conversion, we further design a recurrent neural networks based approach to model the longitudinal deviation of patients' brain networks from the healthy ageing trajectory. Numerical results show that the proposed methods outperform the benchmarks in the prediction task. We also visualize the model interpretation to explain the prediction and identify abnormal changes of white matter tracts.
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is the most common age-related dementia. Mild cognitive impairment (MCI) is the early stage of cognitive decline before AD. It is crucial to predict the MCI-to-AD conversion for precise management, which remains challenging due to the diversity of patients. Previous evidence shows that the brain network generated from diffusion MRI promises to classify dementia using deep learning. However, the limited availability of diffusion MRI challenges the model training. In this study, we develop a self-supervised contrastive learning approach to generate structural brain networks from routine anatomical MRI under the guidance of diffusion MRI. The generated brain networks are applied to train a learning framework for predicting the MCI-to-AD conversion. Instead of directly modelling the AD brain networks, we train a graph encoder and a variational autoencoder to model the healthy ageing trajectories from brain networks of healthy controls. To predict the MCI-to-AD conversion, we further design a recurrent neural networks based approach to model the longitudinal deviation of patients' brain networks from the healthy ageing trajectory. Numerical results show that the proposed methods outperform the benchmarks in the prediction task. We also visualize the model interpretation to explain the prediction and identify abnormal changes of white matter tracts.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是最常见的与年龄相关的痴呆症。轻度认知障碍（MCI）是 AD 之前认知能力下降的早期阶段。预测 MCI 向 AD 的转化对于精确管理至关重要，但由于患者的多样性，这仍然具有挑战性。先前的证据表明，由扩散 MRI 生成的大脑网络有望利用深度学习对痴呆症进行分类。然而，扩散磁共振成像的有限可用性对模型训练提出了挑战。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种自我监督的对比学习方法，在扩散 MRI 的指导下从常规解剖 MRI 生成结构性大脑网络。生成的大脑网络用于训练预测 MCI 到 AD 转换的学习框架。我们没有直接对 AD 大脑网络进行建模，而是训练一个图编码器和一个变分自动编码器来根据健康对照组的大脑网络来建模健康衰老轨迹。为了预测 MCI 到 AD 的转换，我们进一步设计了一种基于循环神经网络的方法来模拟患者大脑网络与健康衰老轨迹的纵向偏差。数值结果表明，所提出的方法在预测任务中优于基准。我们还可视化模型解释来解释预测并识别白质束的异常变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构MRI生成脑网络的方法，用于预测轻度认知障碍（MCI）向阿尔茨海默病（AD）的转化。
AI.motivation: 由于患者多样性及扩散MRI数据获取困难，现有MCI向AD转化预测方法存在局限性，需开发更实用的预测模型。
AI.method: 采用自监督对比学习从常规解剖MRI生成结构脑网络，并结合扩散MRI指导；通过图编码器和变分自编码器建模健康衰老轨迹，利用循环神经网络分析患者脑网络的纵向偏离。
AI.result: 所提方法在预测任务中优于基准模型，可视化分析揭示了白质束的异常变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无扩散MRI条件下有效预测MCI转化，为临床提供了可行工具，并突出了关键白质异常特征。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构MRI生成脑网络的方法，用于预测轻度认知障碍（MCI）向阿尔茨海默病（AD）的转化。
motivation: 由于患者多样性及扩散MRI数据获取困难，现有MCI向AD转化预测方法存在局限性，需开发更实用的预测模型。
method: 采用自监督对比学习从常规解剖MRI生成结构脑网络，并结合扩散MRI指导；通过图编码器和变分自编码器建模健康衰老轨迹，利用循环神经网络分析患者脑网络的纵向偏离。
result: 所提方法在预测任务中优于基准模型，可视化分析揭示了白质束的异常变化。
conclusion: 该方法在无扩散MRI条件下有效预测MCI转化，为临床提供了可行工具，并突出了关键白质异常特征。
search_text: Predicting conversion of mild cognitive impairment to Alzheimer's disease 预测轻度认知障碍向阿尔茨海默病的转化 Alzheimer's disease (AD) is the most common age-related dementia. Mild cognitive impairment (MCI) is the early stage of cognitive decline before AD. It is crucial to predict the MCI-to-AD conversion for precise management, which remains challenging due to the diversity of patients. Previous evidence shows that the brain network generated from diffusion MRI promises to classify dementia using deep learning. However, the limited availability of diffusion MRI challenges the model training. In this study, we develop a self-supervised contrastive learning approach to generate structural brain networks from routine anatomical MRI under the guidance of diffusion MRI. The generated brain networks are applied to train a learning framework for predicting the MCI-to-AD conversion. Instead of directly modelling the AD brain networks, we train a graph encoder and a variational autoencoder to model the healthy ageing trajectories from brain networks of healthy controls. To predict the MCI-to-AD conversion, we further design a recurrent neural networks based approach to model the longitudinal deviation of patients' brain networks from the healthy ageing trajectory. Numerical results show that the proposed methods outperform the benchmarks in the prediction task. We also visualize the model interpretation to explain the prediction and identify abnormal changes of white matter tracts. 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是最常见的与年龄相关的痴呆症。轻度认知障碍（MCI）是 AD 之前认知能力下降的早期阶段。预测 MCI 向 AD 的转化对于精确管理至关重要，但由于患者的多样性，这仍然具有挑战性。先前的证据表明，由扩散 MRI 生成的大脑网络有望利用深度学习对痴呆症进行分类。然而，扩散磁共振成像的有限可用性对模型训练提出了挑战。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种自我监督的对比学习方法，在扩散 MRI 的指导下从常规解剖 MRI 生成结构性大脑网络。生成的大脑网络用于训练预测 MCI 到 AD 转换的学习框架。我们没有直接对 AD 大脑网络进行建模，而是训练一个图编码器和一个变分自动编码器来根据健康对照组的大脑网络来建模健康衰老轨迹。为了预测 MCI 到 AD 的转换，我们进一步设计了一种基于循环神经网络的方法来模拟患者大脑网络与健康衰老轨迹的纵向偏差。数值结果表明，所提出的方法在预测任务中优于基准。我们还可视化模型解释来解释预测并识别白质束的异常变化。 本文提出了一种基于结构MRI生成脑网络的方法，用于预测轻度认知障碍（MCI）向阿尔茨海默病（AD）的转化。 Yiran Wei,Stephen J. Price,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Chao Li eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: He Wang,Yunfeng Diao,Zichang Tan,Guodong Guo
title: Defending Black-box Skeleton-based Human Activity Classifiers
title_zh: 捍卫基于黑盒骨架的人类活动分类器
abstract: Skeletal motions have been heavily replied upon for human activity recognition (HAR). Recently, a universal vulnerability of skeleton-based HAR has been identified across a variety of classifiers and data, calling for mitigation. To this end, we propose the first black-box defense method for skeleton-based HAR to our best knowledge. Our method is featured by full Bayesian treatments of the clean data, the adversaries and the classifier, leading to (1) a new Bayesian Energy-based formulation of robust discriminative classifiers, (2) a new adversary sampling scheme based on natural motion manifolds, and (3) a new post-train Bayesian strategy for black-box defense. We name our framework Bayesian Energy-based Adversarial Training or BEAT. BEAT is straightforward but elegant, which turns vulnerable black-box classifiers into robust ones without sacrificing accuracy. It demonstrates surprising and universal effectiveness across a wide range of skeletal HAR classifiers and datasets, under various attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/realcrane/RobustActionRecogniser.
summary: Skeletal motions have been heavily replied upon for human activity recognition (HAR). Recently, a universal vulnerability of skeleton-based HAR has been identified across a variety of classifiers and data, calling for mitigation. To this end, we propose the first black-box defense method for skeleton-based HAR to our best knowledge. Our method is featured by full Bayesian treatments of the clean data, the adversaries and the classifier, leading to (1) a new Bayesian Energy-based formulation of robust discriminative classifiers, (2) a new adversary sampling scheme based on natural motion manifolds, and (3) a new post-train Bayesian strategy for black-box defense. We name our framework Bayesian Energy-based Adversarial Training or BEAT. BEAT is straightforward but elegant, which turns vulnerable black-box classifiers into robust ones without sacrificing accuracy. It demonstrates surprising and universal effectiveness across a wide range of skeletal HAR classifiers and datasets, under various attacks. Code is available at https://github.com/realcrane/RobustActionRecogniser.
abstract_zh: 骨骼运动在人类活动识别（HAR）中得到了广泛的应用。最近，在各种分类器和数据中发现了基于骨架的 HAR 的普遍漏洞，需要缓解。为此，我们据我们所知提出了第一个基于骨架的 HAR 黑盒防御方法。我们的方法的特点是对干净数据、对手和分类器进行完整的贝叶斯处理，从而产生（1）基于贝叶斯能量的鲁棒判别分类器的新公式，（2）基于自然运动流形的新对手采样方案，以及（3）用于黑盒防御的新的训练后贝叶斯策略。我们将我们的框架命名为基于贝叶斯能量的对抗训练或 BEAT。 BEAT 简单而优雅，它将脆弱的黑盒分类器变成强大的分类器，而不会牺牲准确性。在各种攻击下，它在各种骨架 HAR 分类器和数据集上展示了令人惊讶的普遍有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/realcrane/RobustActionRecogniser 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对骨骼动作识别分类器的黑盒防御方法BEAT，通过贝叶斯能量对抗训练提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 骨骼动作识别存在跨分类器和数据集的普遍脆弱性，需设计无需修改原始模型且不损失准确率的防御方案。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯框架构建能量函数，结合自然运动流形生成对抗样本，并设计后训练阶段的贝叶斯策略形成BEAT防御框架。
AI.result: 在多种骨骼动作数据集和攻击方式下验证有效性，成功提升分类器鲁棒性且保持原有准确率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: BEAT通过贝叶斯能量对抗训练实现了对黑盒骨骼动作分类器的通用防御，为动作识别安全提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yukun Su,Jingliang Deng,Ruizhou Sun,Guosheng Lin,Qingyao Wu
title: A Unified Transformer Framework for Group-based Segmentation: Co-Segmentation, Co-Saliency Detection and Video Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于基于组的分割的统一 Transformer 框架：联合分割、联合显着性检测和视频显着性对象检测
abstract: Humans tend to mine objects by learning from a group of images or several frames of video since we live in a dynamic world. In the computer vision area, many researches focus on co-segmentation (CoS), co-saliency detection (CoSD) and video salient object detection (VSOD) to discover the co-occurrent objects. However, previous approaches design different networks on these similar tasks separately, and they are difficult to apply to each other, which lowers the upper bound of the transferability of deep learning frameworks. Besides, they fail to take full advantage of the cues among inter- and intra-feature within a group of images. In this paper, we introduce a unified framework to tackle these issues, term as UFO (Unified Framework for Co-Object Segmentation). Specifically, we first introduce a transformer block, which views the image feature as a patch token and then captures their long-range dependencies through the self-attention mechanism. This can help the network to excavate the patch structured similarities among the relevant objects. Furthermore, we propose an intra-MLP learning module to produce self-mask to enhance the network to avoid partial activation. Extensive experiments on four CoS benchmarks (PASCAL, iCoseg, Internet and MSRC), three CoSD benchmarks (Cosal2015, CoSOD3k, and CocA) and four VSOD benchmarks (DAVIS16, FBMS, ViSal and SegV2) show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-arts on three different tasks in both accuracy and speed by using the same network architecture , which can reach 140 FPS in real-time.
summary: Humans tend to mine objects by learning from a group of images or several frames of video since we live in a dynamic world. In the computer vision area, many researches focus on co-segmentation (CoS), co-saliency detection (CoSD) and video salient object detection (VSOD) to discover the co-occurrent objects. However, previous approaches design different networks on these similar tasks separately, and they are difficult to apply to each other, which lowers the upper bound of the transferability of deep learning frameworks. Besides, they fail to take full advantage of the cues among inter- and intra-feature within a group of images. In this paper, we introduce a unified framework to tackle these issues, term as UFO (Unified Framework for Co-Object Segmentation). Specifically, we first introduce a transformer block, which views the image feature as a patch token and then captures their long-range dependencies through the self-attention mechanism. This can help the network to excavate the patch structured similarities among the relevant objects. Furthermore, we propose an intra-MLP learning module to produce self-mask to enhance the network to avoid partial activation. Extensive experiments on four CoS benchmarks (PASCAL, iCoseg, Internet and MSRC), three CoSD benchmarks (Cosal2015, CoSOD3k, and CocA) and four VSOD benchmarks (DAVIS16, FBMS, ViSal and SegV2) show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-arts on three different tasks in both accuracy and speed by using the same network architecture , which can reach 140 FPS in real-time.
abstract_zh: 由于我们生活在一个动态的世界中，人类倾向于通过从一组图像或几帧视频中学习来挖掘对象。在计算机视觉领域，许多研究集中在协同分割（CoS）、协同显着性检测（CoSD）和视频显着性对象检测（VSOD）上以发现共现对象。然而，以前的方法针对这些相似的任务分别设计不同的网络，并且它们很难相互适用，这降低了深度学习框架可迁移性的上限。此外，他们未能充分利用一组图像内特征间和特征内的线索。在本文中，我们引入了一个统一的框架来解决这些问题，术语为 UFO（联合对象分割统一框架）。具体来说，我们首先引入一个转换器块，它将图像特征视为补丁标记，然后通过自注意力机制捕获它们的远程依赖关系。这可以帮助网络挖掘相关对象之间的补丁结构相似性。此外，我们提出了一个 MLP 内学习模块来生成自我掩码来增强网络以避免部分激活。对四个 CoS 基准（PASCAL、iCoseg、Internet 和 MSRC）、三个 CoSD 基准（Cosal2015、CoSOD3k 和 CocA）和四个 VSOD 基准（DAVIS16、FBMS、ViSal 和 SegV2）的大量实验表明，我们的方法使用相同的网络架构，在三个不同任务上的准确性和速度上都优于其他最先进的方法，可以达到实时 140 FPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的Transformer框架UFO，用于解决基于群体的分割任务，包括协同分割、协同显著性检测和视频显著物体检测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法针对协同分割、协同显著性检测和视频显著物体检测等相似任务设计独立网络，导致模型可迁移性差且未能充分利用群体图像中的跨模态与模态内特征线索。
AI.method: 引入Transformer块将图像特征视为补丁标记并通过自注意力机制捕捉长距离依赖关系，同时提出内MLP学习模块生成自掩码以增强网络鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在四个协同分割、三个协同显著性检测和四个视频显著物体检测基准测试中，该方法在相同网络架构下均优于现有最佳方法，实时速度可达140 FPS。
AI.conclusion: UFO框架通过统一架构和跨任务特征学习有效提升了群体分割任务的准确率与效率，为多任务学习提供了新思路。

In the computer vision area, many researches focus on co-segmentation (CoS), co-saliency detection (CoSD) and video salient object detection (VSOD) to discover the co-occurrent objects. However, previous approaches design different networks on these similar tasks separately, and they are difficult to apply to each other, which lowers the upper bound of the transferability of deep learning frameworks. Besides, they fail to take full advantage of the cues among inter- and intra-feature within a group of images. In this paper, we introduce a unified framework to tackle these issues, term as UFO (Unified Framework for Co-Object Segmentation). Specifically, we first introduce a transformer block, which views the image feature as a patch token and then captures their long-range dependencies through the self-attention mechanism. This can help the network to excavate the patch structured similarities among the relevant objects. Furthermore, we propose an intra-MLP learning module to produce self-mask to enhance the network to avoid partial activation. Extensive experiments on four CoS benchmarks (PASCAL, iCoseg, Internet and MSRC), three CoSD benchmarks (Cosal2015, CoSOD3k, and CocA) and four VSOD benchmarks (DAVIS16, FBMS, ViSal and SegV2) show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-arts on three different tasks in both accuracy and speed by using the same network architecture , which can reach 140 FPS in real-time. 由于我们生活在一个动态的世界中，人类倾向于通过从一组图像或几帧视频中学习来挖掘对象。在计算机视觉领域，许多研究集中在协同分割（CoS）、协同显着性检测（CoSD）和视频显着性对象检测（VSOD）上以发现共现对象。然而，以前的方法针对这些相似的任务分别设计不同的网络，并且它们很难相互适用，这降低了深度学习框架可迁移性的上限。此外，他们未能充分利用一组图像内特征间和特征内的线索。在本文中，我们引入了一个统一的框架来解决这些问题，术语为 UFO（联合对象分割统一框架）。具体来说，我们首先引入一个转换器块，它将图像特征视为补丁标记，然后通过自注意力机制捕获它们的远程依赖关系。这可以帮助网络挖掘相关对象之间的补丁结构相似性。此外，我们提出了一个 MLP 内学习模块来生成自我掩码来增强网络以避免部分激活。对四个 CoS 基准（PASCAL、iCoseg、Internet 和 MSRC）、三个 CoSD 基准（Cosal2015、CoSOD3k 和 CocA）和四个 VSOD 基准（DAVIS16、FBMS、ViSal 和 SegV2）的大量实验表明，我们的方法使用相同的网络架构，在三个不同任务上的准确性和速度上都优于其他最先进的方法，可以达到实时 140 FPS。 本文提出一种统一的Transformer框架UFO，用于解决基于群体的分割任务，包括协同分割、协同显著性检测和视频显著物体检测。 Yukun Su,Jingliang Deng,Ruizhou Sun,Guosheng Lin,Qingyao Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Line H. Clemmensen,Rune D. Kjærsgaard
title: Data Representativity for Machine Learning and AI Systems
title_zh: 机器学习和人工智能系统的数据代表性
abstract: Data representativity is crucial when drawing inference from data through machine learning models. Scholars have increased focus on unraveling the bias and fairness in models, also in relation to inherent biases in the input data. However, limited work exists on the representativity of samples (datasets) for appropriate inference in AI systems. This paper reviews definitions and notions of a representative sample and surveys their use in scientific AI literature. We introduce three measurable concepts to help focus the notions and evaluate different data samples. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the contrast between a representative sample in the sense of coverage of the input space, versus a representative sample mimicking the distribution of the target population is of particular relevance when building AI systems. Through empirical demonstrations on US Census data, we evaluate the opposing inherent qualities of these concepts. Finally, we propose a framework of questions for creating and documenting data with data representativity in mind, as an addition to existing dataset documentation templates.
summary: Data representativity is crucial when drawing inference from data through machine learning models. Scholars have increased focus on unraveling the bias and fairness in models, also in relation to inherent biases in the input data. However, limited work exists on the representativity of samples (datasets) for appropriate inference in AI systems. This paper reviews definitions and notions of a representative sample and surveys their use in scientific AI literature. We introduce three measurable concepts to help focus the notions and evaluate different data samples. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the contrast between a representative sample in the sense of coverage of the input space, versus a representative sample mimicking the distribution of the target population is of particular relevance when building AI systems. Through empirical demonstrations on US Census data, we evaluate the opposing inherent qualities of these concepts. Finally, we propose a framework of questions for creating and documenting data with data representativity in mind, as an addition to existing dataset documentation templates.
abstract_zh: 通过机器学习模型从数据中进行推断时，数据代表性至关重要。学者们越来越关注揭示模型中的偏差和公平性，以及输入数据中固有偏差的问题。然而，在人工智能系统中进行适当推理的样本（数据集）代表性方面的工作有限。本文回顾了代表性样本的定义和概念，并调查了它们在科学人工智能文献中的使用。我们引入三个可测量的概念来帮助集中概念并评估不同的数据样本。此外，我们证明，在构建人工智能系统时，输入空间覆盖范围内的代表性样本与模仿目标群体分布的代表性样本之间的对比尤其重要。通过对美国人口普查数据的实证论证，我们评估了这些概念相对立的内在品质。最后，我们提出了一个问题框架，用于在考虑数据代表性的情况下创建和记录数据，作为现有数据集文档模板的补充。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨机器学习和AI系统中数据代表性的核心问题，通过定义可衡量的概念并提出评估框架，以提升数据样本的代表性。
AI.motivation: 尽管学者关注模型偏见和公平性，但现有研究对数据样本在AI系统中是否具备充分代表性的分析仍显不足，影响模型推断的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述定义代表性样本概念，引入三个可量化指标，结合美国人口普查数据进行实证分析，并提出数据代表性框架的文档化问题清单。
AI.result: 实证表明，覆盖输入空间与模拟目标群体分布的代表性存在本质差异，框架可帮助系统化评估数据样本的代表性。
AI.conclusion: 数据代表性需兼顾覆盖广度与分布匹配性，本文提出的框架为AI系统的数据构建和文档化提供了补充指导。

authors_text: Guillaume Couairon,Asya Grechka,Jakob Verbeek,Holger Schwenk,Matthieu Cord
title: FlexIT: Towards Flexible Semantic Image Translation
title_zh: FlexIT：迈向灵活的语义图像翻译
abstract: Deep generative models, like GANs, have considerably improved the state of the art in image synthesis, and are able to generate near photo-realistic images in structured domains such as human faces. Based on this success, recent work on image editing proceeds by projecting images to the GAN latent space and manipulating the latent vector. However, these approaches are limited in that only images from a narrow domain can be transformed, and with only a limited number of editing operations. We propose FlexIT, a novel method which can take any input image and a user-defined text instruction for editing. Our method achieves flexible and natural editing, pushing the limits of semantic image translation. First, FlexIT combines the input image and text into a single target point in the CLIP multimodal embedding space. Via the latent space of an auto-encoder, we iteratively transform the input image toward the target point, ensuring coherence and quality with a variety of novel regularization terms. We propose an evaluation protocol for semantic image translation, and thoroughly evaluate our method on ImageNet. Code will be made publicly available.
summary: Deep generative models, like GANs, have considerably improved the state of the art in image synthesis, and are able to generate near photo-realistic images in structured domains such as human faces. Based on this success, recent work on image editing proceeds by projecting images to the GAN latent space and manipulating the latent vector. However, these approaches are limited in that only images from a narrow domain can be transformed, and with only a limited number of editing operations. We propose FlexIT, a novel method which can take any input image and a user-defined text instruction for editing. Our method achieves flexible and natural editing, pushing the limits of semantic image translation. First, FlexIT combines the input image and text into a single target point in the CLIP multimodal embedding space. Via the latent space of an auto-encoder, we iteratively transform the input image toward the target point, ensuring coherence and quality with a variety of novel regularization terms. We propose an evaluation protocol for semantic image translation, and thoroughly evaluate our method on ImageNet. Code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 像 GAN 这样的深度生成模型极大地提高了图像合成的技术水平，并且能够在人脸等结构化领域生成接近照片真实感的图像。基于这一成功，最近的图像编辑工作通过将图像投影到 GAN 潜在空间并操纵潜在向量来进行。然而，这些方法的局限性在于只能转换来自狭窄域的图像，并且只能进行有限数量的编辑操作。我们提出了 FlexIT，这是一种新颖的方法，可以采用任何输入图像和用户定义的文本指令进行编辑。我们的方法实现了灵活自然的编辑，突破了语义图像翻译的极限。首先，FlexIT 将输入图像和文本组合成 CLIP 多模态嵌入空间中的单个目标点。通过自动编码器的潜在空间，我们迭代地将输入图像转换为目标点，确保与各种新颖的正则化项的一致性和质量。我们提出了一种语义图像翻译的评估协议，并在 ImageNet 上彻底评估了我们的方法。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: FlexIT通过结合图像和文本指令实现灵活的语义图像翻译，突破传统方法的领域和操作限制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的图像编辑方法仅能处理特定领域且编辑操作有限，难以满足多样化需求。
AI.method: 将输入图像与文本指令融合到CLIP多模态嵌入空间，通过自编码器潜在空间迭代优化图像，并引入正则化项保证质量。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上验证了方法的有效性，代码开源。
AI.conclusion: FlexIT为语义图像翻译提供了更灵活的解决方案，推动了跨模态生成技术的发展。

authors_text: Md Rashad Al Hasan Rony,Mirza Mohtashim Alam,Semab Ali,Jens Lehmann,Sahar Vahdati
title: LEMON: LanguagE ModeL for Negative Sampling of Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: LEMON：用于知识图嵌入负采样的语言模型
abstract: Knowledge Graph Embedding models have become an important area of machine learning.Those models provide a latent representation of entities and relations in a knowledge graph which can then be used in downstream machine learning tasks such as link prediction. The learning process of such models can be performed by contrasting positive and negative triples. While all triples of a KG are considered positive, negative triples are usually not readily available. Therefore, the choice of the sampling method to obtain the negative triples play a crucial role in the performance and effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embedding models. Most of the current methods fetch negative samples from a random distribution of entities in the underlying Knowledge Graph which also often includes meaningless triples. Other known methods use adversarial techniques or generative neural networks which consequently reduce the efficiency of the process. In this paper, we propose an approach for generating informative negative samples considering available complementary knowledge about entities. Particularly, Pre-trained Language Models are used to form neighborhood clusters by utilizing the distances between entities to obtain representations of symbolic entities via their textual information. Our comprehensive evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on benchmark Knowledge Graphs with textual information for the link prediction task.
summary: Knowledge Graph Embedding models have become an important area of machine learning.Those models provide a latent representation of entities and relations in a knowledge graph which can then be used in downstream machine learning tasks such as link prediction. The learning process of such models can be performed by contrasting positive and negative triples. While all triples of a KG are considered positive, negative triples are usually not readily available. Therefore, the choice of the sampling method to obtain the negative triples play a crucial role in the performance and effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embedding models. Most of the current methods fetch negative samples from a random distribution of entities in the underlying Knowledge Graph which also often includes meaningless triples. Other known methods use adversarial techniques or generative neural networks which consequently reduce the efficiency of the process. In this paper, we propose an approach for generating informative negative samples considering available complementary knowledge about entities. Particularly, Pre-trained Language Models are used to form neighborhood clusters by utilizing the distances between entities to obtain representations of symbolic entities via their textual information. Our comprehensive evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on benchmark Knowledge Graphs with textual information for the link prediction task.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入模型已经成为机器学习的一个重要领域。这些模型提供了知识图中实体和关系的潜在表示，然后可以将其用于下游机器学习任务，例如链接预测。此类模型的学习过程可以通过对比正三元组和负三元组来执行。虽然 KG 的所有三元组都被认为是正的，但负三元组通常不容易获得。因此，获取负三元组的采样方法的选择对于知识图嵌入模型的性能和有效性起着至关重要的作用。当前的大多数方法都是从底层知识图中实体的随机分布中获取负样本，其中通常还包含无意义的三元组。其他已知的方法使用对抗性技术或生成神经网络，从而降低了过程的效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种考虑有关实体的可用补充知识来生成信息丰富的负样本的方法。特别是，预训练语言模型用于通过利用实体之间的距离来形成邻域簇，从而通过其文本信息获得符号实体的表示。我们的综合评估证明了所提出的方法在具有链接预测任务文本信息的基准知识图上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEMON方法，利用预训练语言模型生成知识图谱嵌入中的信息性负样本。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型的负采样方法存在随机性高、效率低或生成无意义三元组的问题，亟需更有效的负样本生成策略。
AI.method: 通过预训练语言模型计算实体文本表示，基于实体间距离构建语义邻域聚类，生成符合语义的负三元组。
AI.result: 在包含文本信息的基准知识图谱上进行链接预测任务评估，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合文本语义的负采样方法能显著提升知识图谱嵌入模型性能，为负样本生成提供新思路。

search_text: LEMON: LanguagE ModeL for Negative Sampling of Knowledge Graph Embeddings LEMON：用于知识图嵌入负采样的语言模型 Knowledge Graph Embedding models have become an important area of machine learning.Those models provide a latent representation of entities and relations in a knowledge graph which can then be used in downstream machine learning tasks such as link prediction. The learning process of such models can be performed by contrasting positive and negative triples. While all triples of a KG are considered positive, negative triples are usually not readily available. Therefore, the choice of the sampling method to obtain the negative triples play a crucial role in the performance and effectiveness of Knowledge Graph Embedding models. Most of the current methods fetch negative samples from a random distribution of entities in the underlying Knowledge Graph which also often includes meaningless triples. Other known methods use adversarial techniques or generative neural networks which consequently reduce the efficiency of the process. In this paper, we propose an approach for generating informative negative samples considering available complementary knowledge about entities. Particularly, Pre-trained Language Models are used to form neighborhood clusters by utilizing the distances between entities to obtain representations of symbolic entities via their textual information. Our comprehensive evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on benchmark Knowledge Graphs with textual information for the link prediction task. 知识图嵌入模型已经成为机器学习的一个重要领域。这些模型提供了知识图中实体和关系的潜在表示，然后可以将其用于下游机器学习任务，例如链接预测。此类模型的学习过程可以通过对比正三元组和负三元组来执行。虽然 KG 的所有三元组都被认为是正的，但负三元组通常不容易获得。因此，获取负三元组的采样方法的选择对于知识图嵌入模型的性能和有效性起着至关重要的作用。当前的大多数方法都是从底层知识图中实体的随机分布中获取负样本，其中通常还包含无意义的三元组。其他已知的方法使用对抗性技术或生成神经网络，从而降低了过程的效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种考虑有关实体的可用补充知识来生成信息丰富的负样本的方法。特别是，预训练语言模型用于通过利用实体之间的距离来形成邻域簇，从而通过其文本信息获得符号实体的表示。我们的综合评估证明了所提出的方法在具有链接预测任务文本信息的基准知识图上的有效性。 本文提出LEMON方法，利用预训练语言模型生成知识图谱嵌入中的信息性负样本。 Md Rashad Al Hasan Rony,Mirza Mohtashim Alam,Semab Ali,Jens Lehmann,Sahar Vahdati cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jingxuan Chai,Guangming Shi
title: ModulE: Module Embedding for Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: ModulE：知识图的模块嵌入
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) has been shown to be a powerful tool for predicting missing links of a knowledge graph. However, existing methods mainly focus on modeling relation patterns, while simply embed entities to vector spaces, such as real field, complex field and quaternion space. To model the embedding space from a more rigorous and theoretical perspective, we propose a novel general group theory-based embedding framework for rotation-based models, in which both entities and relations are embedded as group elements. Furthermore, in order to explore more available KGE models, we utilize a more generic group structure, module, a generalization notion of vector space. Specifically, under our framework, we introduce a more generic embedding method, ModulE, which projects entities to a module. Following the method of ModulE, we build three instantiating models: ModulE$_{\mathbb{R},\mathbb{C}}$, ModulE$_{\mathbb{R},\mathbb{H}}$ and ModulE$_{\mathbb{H},\mathbb{H}}$, by adopting different module structures. Experimental results show that ModulE$_{\mathbb{H},\mathbb{H}}$ which embeds entities to a module over non-commutative ring, achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmark datasets.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) has been shown to be a powerful tool for predicting missing links of a knowledge graph. However, existing methods mainly focus on modeling relation patterns, while simply embed entities to vector spaces, such as real field, complex field and quaternion space. To model the embedding space from a more rigorous and theoretical perspective, we propose a novel general group theory-based embedding framework for rotation-based models, in which both entities and relations are embedded as group elements. Furthermore, in order to explore more available KGE models, we utilize a more generic group structure, module, a generalization notion of vector space. Specifically, under our framework, we introduce a more generic embedding method, ModulE, which projects entities to a module. Following the method of ModulE, we build three instantiating models: ModulE$_{\mathbb{R},\mathbb{C}}$, ModulE$_{\mathbb{R},\mathbb{H}}$ and ModulE$_{\mathbb{H},\mathbb{H}}$, by adopting different module structures. Experimental results show that ModulE$_{\mathbb{H},\mathbb{H}}$ which embeds entities to a module over non-commutative ring, achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）已被证明是预测知识图缺失链接的强大工具。然而，现有的方法主要集中在对关系模式进行建模，而简单地将实体嵌入到向量空间，例如实数域、复数域和四元数空间。为了从更严格和理论的角度对嵌入空间进行建模，我们提出了一种新颖的基于通用群论的基于旋转模型的嵌入框架，其中实体和关系都作为群元素嵌入。此外，为了探索更多可用的 KGE 模型，我们利用更通用的群结构、模块、向量空间的泛化概念。具体来说，在我们的框架下，我们引入了一种更通用的嵌入方法 ModulE，它将实体投影到模块中。遵循ModulE的方法，采用不同的模块结构，构建了三个实例化模型：ModulE$_{\mathbb{R},\mathbb{C}}$、ModulE$_{\mathbb{R},\mathbb{H}}$和ModulE$_{\mathbb{H},\mathbb{H}}$。实验结果表明，ModulE$_{\mathbb{H},\mathbb{H}}$ 将实体嵌入到非交换环上的模块中，在多个基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模块嵌入的知识图谱嵌入方法ModulE，以更严格的理论框架建模知识图谱。
AI.motivation: 现有的知识图谱嵌入方法主要关注关系模式，而将实体简单地嵌入到向量空间中，缺乏更严格的理论支持。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于群论的嵌入框架，将实体和关系都嵌入为群元素，并利用更通用的模块结构构建了ModulE方法及其三个实例模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ModulE在非交换环上的模块嵌入方法在多个基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的ModulE方法通过引入模块结构，为知识图谱嵌入提供了一种更通用和理论严谨的框架。

authors_text: Zheng Zhang,Xiaohan Wang,Qingrui Zhang,Tianjiang Hu
title: Multi-robot Cooperative Pursuit via Potential Field-Enhanced Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过势场增强强化学习进行多机器人协作追踪
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICRA 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by ICRA 2022
abstract: It is of great challenge, though promising, to coordinate collective robots for hunting an evader in a decentralized manner purely in light of local observations. In this paper, this challenge is addressed by a novel hybrid cooperative pursuit algorithm that combines reinforcement learning with the artificial potential field method. In the proposed algorithm, decentralized deep reinforcement learning is employed to learn cooperative pursuit policies that are adaptive to dynamic environments. The artificial potential field method is integrated into the learning process as predefined rules to improve the data efficiency and generalization ability. It is shown by numerical simulations that the proposed hybrid design outperforms the pursuit policies either learned from vanilla reinforcement learning or designed by the potential field method. Furthermore, experiments are conducted by transferring the learned pursuit policies into real-world mobile robots. Experimental results demonstrate the feasibility and potential of the proposed algorithm in learning multiple cooperative pursuit strategies.
summary: It is of great challenge, though promising, to coordinate collective robots for hunting an evader in a decentralized manner purely in light of local observations. In this paper, this challenge is addressed by a novel hybrid cooperative pursuit algorithm that combines reinforcement learning with the artificial potential field method. In the proposed algorithm, decentralized deep reinforcement learning is employed to learn cooperative pursuit policies that are adaptive to dynamic environments. The artificial potential field method is integrated into the learning process as predefined rules to improve the data efficiency and generalization ability. It is shown by numerical simulations that the proposed hybrid design outperforms the pursuit policies either learned from vanilla reinforcement learning or designed by the potential field method. Furthermore, experiments are conducted by transferring the learned pursuit policies into real-world mobile robots. Experimental results demonstrate the feasibility and potential of the proposed algorithm in learning multiple cooperative pursuit strategies.
abstract_zh: 纯粹根据当地的观察结果来协调集体机器人以分散的方式追捕逃亡者是一项巨大的挑战，尽管前景广阔。在本文中，通过一种新颖的混合协作追踪算法解决了这一挑战，该算法将强化学习与人工势场方法相结合。在所提出的算法中，采用去中心化深度强化学习来学习适应动态环境的合作追踪策略。将人工势场方法作为预定义规则集成到学习过程中，以提高数据效率和泛化能力。数值模拟表明，所提出的混合设计优于从普通强化学习中学习或通过势场方法设计的追踪策略。此外，通过将学习到的追踪策略转移到现实世界的移动机器人中来进行实验。实验结果证明了该算法在学习多种合作追踪策略方面的可行性和潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合强化学习与人工势场的混合算法，解决多机器人协作追踪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态环境下数据效率低或泛化能力不足，需结合规则与学习方法提升性能。
AI.method: 融合分散深度强化学习与人工势场规则，提升策略适应性与数据效率。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验表明，混合方法在追踪性能上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明该算法在多机器人协作追踪中的可行性与潜力，为实际应用提供新思路。

It is shown by numerical simulations that the proposed hybrid design outperforms the pursuit policies either learned from vanilla reinforcement learning or designed by the potential field method. Furthermore, experiments are conducted by transferring the learned pursuit policies into real-world mobile robots. Experimental results demonstrate the feasibility and potential of the proposed algorithm in learning multiple cooperative pursuit strategies. 纯粹根据当地的观察结果来协调集体机器人以分散的方式追捕逃亡者是一项巨大的挑战，尽管前景广阔。在本文中，通过一种新颖的混合协作追踪算法解决了这一挑战，该算法将强化学习与人工势场方法相结合。在所提出的算法中，采用去中心化深度强化学习来学习适应动态环境的合作追踪策略。将人工势场方法作为预定义规则集成到学习过程中，以提高数据效率和泛化能力。数值模拟表明，所提出的混合设计优于从普通强化学习中学习或通过势场方法设计的追踪策略。此外，通过将学习到的追踪策略转移到现实世界的移动机器人中来进行实验。实验结果证明了该算法在学习多种合作追踪策略方面的可行性和潜力。 提出一种结合强化学习与人工势场的混合算法，解决多机器人协作追踪问题。 Zheng Zhang,Xiaohan Wang,Qingrui Zhang,Tianjiang Hu cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Boris Shminke
title: Gym-saturation: an OpenAI Gym environment for saturation provers
title_zh: Gym-saturation：用于饱和度证明者的 OpenAI Gym 环境
abstract: `gym-saturation` is an OpenAI Gym environment for reinforcement learning (RL) agents capable of proving theorems. Currently, only theorems written in a formal language of the Thousands of Problems for Theorem Provers (TPTP) library in clausal normal form (CNF) are supported. `gym-saturation` implements the 'given clause' algorithm (similar to the one used in Vampire and E Prover). Being written in Python, `gym-saturation` was inspired by PyRes. In contrast to the monolithic architecture of a typical Automated Theorem Prover (ATP), `gym-saturation` gives different agents opportunities to select clauses themselves and train from their experience. Combined with a particular agent, `gym-saturation` can work as an ATP. Even with a non trained agent based on heuristics, `gym-saturation` can find refutations for 688 (of 8257) CNF problems from TPTP v7.5.0.
summary: `gym-saturation` is an OpenAI Gym environment for reinforcement learning (RL) agents capable of proving theorems. Currently, only theorems written in a formal language of the Thousands of Problems for Theorem Provers (TPTP) library in clausal normal form (CNF) are supported. `gym-saturation` implements the 'given clause' algorithm (similar to the one used in Vampire and E Prover). Being written in Python, `gym-saturation` was inspired by PyRes. In contrast to the monolithic architecture of a typical Automated Theorem Prover (ATP), `gym-saturation` gives different agents opportunities to select clauses themselves and train from their experience. Combined with a particular agent, `gym-saturation` can work as an ATP. Even with a non trained agent based on heuristics, `gym-saturation` can find refutations for 688 (of 8257) CNF problems from TPTP v7.5.0.
abstract_zh: “gym-saturation”是一个 OpenAI Gym 环境，适用于能够证明定理的强化学习 (RL) 代理。目前，仅支持以子句范式 (CNF) 的数千个定理证明问题 (TPTP) 库的形式语言编写的定理。 “gym-saturation”实现了“给定子句”算法（类似于 Vampire 和 E Prover 中使用的算法）。 “gym-saturation”是用 Python 编写的，其灵感来自 PyRes。与典型的自动定理证明器（ATP）的整体架构相比，“健身房饱和”为不同的智能体提供了自行选择条款并根据经验进行训练的机会。与特定药剂结合，“健身房饱和度”可以作为 ATP 发挥作用。即使使用基于启发式的未经训练的代理，“gym-saturation”也可以从 TPTP v7.5.0 中找到 688 个（共 8257 个）CNF 问题的反驳。

AI.tldr: 开发一个基于OpenAI Gym的强化学习环境，用于训练能够证明定理的智能体
AI.motivation: 传统自动定理证明器（ATP）采用固定策略，缺乏灵活性；通过强化学习让智能体自主选择子句，提升定理证明的效率和适应性
AI.method: 基于Python实现的OpenAI Gym环境，采用‘given clause’算法，允许智能体自主选择子句并从经验中学习
AI.result: 未经过训练的启发式智能体在TPTP v7.5.0中成功解决688个CNF问题（共8257个）
AI.conclusion: Gym-saturation为自动定理证明提供了新的强化学习框架，展示了智能体通过训练提升证明能力的潜力

authors_text: Yi Chang,Sofiane Laridi,Zhao Ren,Gregory Palmer,Björn W. Schuller,Marco Fisichella
title: Robust Federated Learning Against Adversarial Attacks for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 针对语音情感识别的对抗性攻击的鲁棒联合学习
abstract: Due to the development of machine learning and speech processing, speech emotion recognition has been a popular research topic in recent years. However, the speech data cannot be protected when it is uploaded and processed on servers in the internet-of-things applications of speech emotion recognition. Furthermore, deep neural networks have proven to be vulnerable to human-indistinguishable adversarial perturbations. The adversarial attacks generated from the perturbations may result in deep neural networks wrongly predicting the emotional states. We propose a novel federated adversarial learning framework for protecting both data and deep neural networks. The proposed framework consists of i) federated learning for data privacy, and ii) adversarial training at the training stage and randomisation at the testing stage for model robustness. The experiments show that our proposed framework can effectively protect the speech data locally and improve the model robustness against a series of adversarial attacks.
summary: Due to the development of machine learning and speech processing, speech emotion recognition has been a popular research topic in recent years. However, the speech data cannot be protected when it is uploaded and processed on servers in the internet-of-things applications of speech emotion recognition. Furthermore, deep neural networks have proven to be vulnerable to human-indistinguishable adversarial perturbations. The adversarial attacks generated from the perturbations may result in deep neural networks wrongly predicting the emotional states. We propose a novel federated adversarial learning framework for protecting both data and deep neural networks. The proposed framework consists of i) federated learning for data privacy, and ii) adversarial training at the training stage and randomisation at the testing stage for model robustness. The experiments show that our proposed framework can effectively protect the speech data locally and improve the model robustness against a series of adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 由于机器学习和语音处理的发展，语音情感识别成为近年来的热门研究课题。然而，在语音情感识别的物联网应用中，语音数据上传到服务器并进行处理时，无法得到保护。此外，深度神经网络已被证明容易受到人类无法区分的对抗性扰动的影响。扰动产生的对抗性攻击可能会导致深度神经网络错误地预测情绪状态。我们提出了一种新颖的联合对抗学习框架，用于保护数据和深度神经网络。所提出的框架包括：i）用于数据隐私的联邦学习；ii）训练阶段的对抗性训练和测试阶段的随机化以保证模型的鲁棒性。实验表明，我们提出的框架可以有效地在本地保护语音数据，并提高模型针对一系列对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦对抗学习框架，旨在保护语音情感识别中的数据隐私并增强模型对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 语音数据在云端处理时存在隐私泄露风险，且深度神经网络易受对抗扰动攻击，导致情感识别错误。
AI.method: 结合联邦学习保护数据隐私，在训练阶段采用对抗训练，在测试阶段引入随机化技术以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明框架能有效保护本地语音数据，并显著提高模型对多种对抗攻击的防御能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为语音情感识别提供了兼顾数据隐私与模型安全的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。
