authors_text: Cian Eastwood,Li Nanbo,Christopher K. I. Williams
title: Align-Deform-Subtract: An Interventional Framework for Explaining Object Differences
title_zh: 对齐-变形-减去：解释对象差异的介入框架
comment: ICLR 2022 Workshop on Objects, Structure and Causality
comments: ICLR 2022 Workshop on Objects, Structure and Causality
abstract: Given two object images, how can we explain their differences in terms of the underlying object properties? To address this question, we propose Align-Deform-Subtract (ADS) -- an interventional framework for explaining object differences. By leveraging semantic alignments in image-space as counterfactual interventions on the underlying object properties, ADS iteratively quantifies and removes differences in object properties. The result is a set of "disentangled" error measures which explain object differences in terms of the underlying properties. Experiments on real and synthetic data illustrate the efficacy of the framework.
summary: Given two object images, how can we explain their differences in terms of the underlying object properties? To address this question, we propose Align-Deform-Subtract (ADS) -- an interventional framework for explaining object differences. By leveraging semantic alignments in image-space as counterfactual interventions on the underlying object properties, ADS iteratively quantifies and removes differences in object properties. The result is a set of "disentangled" error measures which explain object differences in terms of the underlying properties. Experiments on real and synthetic data illustrate the efficacy of the framework.
abstract_zh: 给定两个对象图像，我们如何解释它们在底层对象属性方面的差异？为了解决这个问题，我们提出了对齐-变形-减去（ADS）——一种用于解释对象差异的干预框架。通过利用图像空间中的语义对齐作为对底层对象属性的反事实干预，ADS 迭代地量化并消除对象属性的差异。结果是一组“解开的”误差测量，它们根据底层属性解释对象差异。对真实数据和合成数据的实验说明了该框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出Align-Deform-Subtract（ADS）框架，通过语义对齐和反事实干预解释物体图像间的差异
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效解释物体图像间的差异，需量化并消除底层属性差异以明确解释差异原因
AI.method: 通过图像空间语义对齐进行反事实干预，迭代量化并消除物体属性差异，生成解耦误差度量
AI.result: 实验表明ADS框架在真实和合成数据上有效解释物体差异
AI.conclusion: ADS框架通过解耦误差度量有效解释物体差异，为属性差异分析提供新方法

By leveraging semantic alignments in image-space as counterfactual interventions on the underlying object properties, ADS iteratively quantifies and removes differences in object properties. The result is a set of "disentangled" error measures which explain object differences in terms of the underlying properties. Experiments on real and synthetic data illustrate the efficacy of the framework. 给定两个对象图像，我们如何解释它们在底层对象属性方面的差异？为了解决这个问题，我们提出了对齐-变形-减去（ADS）——一种用于解释对象差异的干预框架。通过利用图像空间中的语义对齐作为对底层对象属性的反事实干预，ADS 迭代地量化并消除对象属性的差异。结果是一组“解开的”误差测量，它们根据底层属性解释对象差异。对真实数据和合成数据的实验说明了该框架的有效性。 提出Align-Deform-Subtract（ADS）框架，通过语义对齐和反事实干预解释物体图像间的差异 Cian Eastwood,Li Nanbo,Christopher K. I. Williams cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Fang Fang,Shenliao Bao
title: FragmGAN: Generative Adversarial Nets for Fragmentary Data Imputation and Prediction
title_zh: FragmGAN：用于碎片数据插补和预测的生成对抗网络
abstract: Modern scientific research and applications very often encounter "fragmentary data" which brings big challenges to imputation and prediction. By leveraging the structure of response patterns, we propose a unified and flexible framework based on Generative Adversarial Nets (GAN) to deal with fragmentary data imputation and label prediction at the same time. Unlike most of the other generative model based imputation methods that either have no theoretical guarantee or only consider Missing Completed At Random (MCAR), the proposed FragmGAN has theoretical guarantees for imputation with data Missing At Random (MAR) while no hint mechanism is needed. FragmGAN trains a predictor with the generator and discriminator simultaneously. This linkage mechanism shows significant advantages for predictive performances in extensive experiments.
summary: Modern scientific research and applications very often encounter "fragmentary data" which brings big challenges to imputation and prediction. By leveraging the structure of response patterns, we propose a unified and flexible framework based on Generative Adversarial Nets (GAN) to deal with fragmentary data imputation and label prediction at the same time. Unlike most of the other generative model based imputation methods that either have no theoretical guarantee or only consider Missing Completed At Random (MCAR), the proposed FragmGAN has theoretical guarantees for imputation with data Missing At Random (MAR) while no hint mechanism is needed. FragmGAN trains a predictor with the generator and discriminator simultaneously. This linkage mechanism shows significant advantages for predictive performances in extensive experiments.
abstract_zh: 现代科学研究和应用经常遇到“碎片数据”，这给估算和预测带来了巨大的挑战。通过利用响应模式的结构，我们提出了一个基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的统一且灵活的框架，以同时处理碎片数据插补和标签预测。与大多数其他基于生成模型的插补方法没有理论保证或仅考虑随机完成缺失（MCAR）不同，所提出的 FragmGAN 对随机缺失数据（MAR）插补具有理论保证，同时不需要提示机制。 FragmGAN 同时使用生成器和鉴别器训练预测器。这种连接机制在大量实验中显示出预测性能的显着优势。

AI.tldr: 提出基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的FragmGAN框架，同时解决碎片化数据的填补与预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型填补方法多缺乏理论保证或仅适用于随机缺失（MCAR），难以处理更普遍的缺失数据（MAR）且需依赖提示机制，亟需更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建生成对抗网络框架，通过同时训练预测器、生成器与判别器的联动机制，无需提示机制即可处理缺失数据（MAR）的填补与预测。
AI.result: 在多个实验中显著提升预测性能，验证了方法在处理碎片化数据填补与预测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FragmGAN为碎片化数据填补与预测提供了理论保障且无需提示机制，展示了生成对抗网络在处理缺失数据任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Sangtae Ahn,Uri Wollner,Graeme McKinnon,Isabelle Heukensfeldt Jansen,Rafi Brada,Dan Rettmann,Ty A. Cashen,John Huston,J. Kevin DeMarco,Robert Y. Shih,Joshua D. Trzasko,Christopher J. Hardy,Thomas K. F. Foo
title: Deep learning-based reconstruction of highly accelerated 3D MRI
title_zh: 基于深度学习的高加速 3D MRI 重建
abstract: Purpose: To accelerate brain 3D MRI scans by using a deep learning method for reconstructing images from highly-undersampled multi-coil k-space data Methods: DL-Speed, an unrolled optimization architecture with dense skip-layer connections, was trained on 3D T1-weighted brain scan data to reconstruct complex-valued images from highly-undersampled k-space data. The trained model was evaluated on 3D MPRAGE brain scan data retrospectively-undersampled with a 10-fold acceleration, compared to a conventional parallel imaging method with a 2-fold acceleration. Scores of SNR, artifacts, gray/white matter contrast, resolution/sharpness, deep gray-matter, cerebellar vermis, anterior commissure, and overall quality, on a 5-point Likert scale, were assessed by experienced radiologists. In addition, the trained model was tested on retrospectively-undersampled 3D T1-weighted LAVA (Liver Acquisition with Volume Acceleration) abdominal scan data, and prospectively-undersampled 3D MPRAGE and LAVA scans in three healthy volunteers and one, respectively. Results: The qualitative scores for DL-Speed with a 10-fold acceleration were higher than or equal to those for the parallel imaging with 2-fold acceleration. DL-Speed outperformed a compressed sensing method in quantitative metrics on retrospectively-undersampled LAVA data. DL-Speed was demonstrated to perform reasonably well on prospectively-undersampled scan data, realizing a 2-5 times reduction in scan time. Conclusion: DL-Speed was shown to accelerate 3D MPRAGE and LAVA with up to a net 10-fold acceleration, achieving 2-5 times faster scans compared to conventional parallel imaging and acceleration, while maintaining diagnostic image quality and real-time reconstruction. The brain scan data-trained DL-Speed also performed well when reconstructing abdominal LAVA scan data, demonstrating versatility of the network.
summary: Purpose: To accelerate brain 3D MRI scans by using a deep learning method for reconstructing images from highly-undersampled multi-coil k-space data Methods: DL-Speed, an unrolled optimization architecture with dense skip-layer connections, was trained on 3D T1-weighted brain scan data to reconstruct complex-valued images from highly-undersampled k-space data. The trained model was evaluated on 3D MPRAGE brain scan data retrospectively-undersampled with a 10-fold acceleration, compared to a conventional parallel imaging method with a 2-fold acceleration. Scores of SNR, artifacts, gray/white matter contrast, resolution/sharpness, deep gray-matter, cerebellar vermis, anterior commissure, and overall quality, on a 5-point Likert scale, were assessed by experienced radiologists. In addition, the trained model was tested on retrospectively-undersampled 3D T1-weighted LAVA (Liver Acquisition with Volume Acceleration) abdominal scan data, and prospectively-undersampled 3D MPRAGE and LAVA scans in three healthy volunteers and one, respectively. Results: The qualitative scores for DL-Speed with a 10-fold acceleration were higher than or equal to those for the parallel imaging with 2-fold acceleration. DL-Speed outperformed a compressed sensing method in quantitative metrics on retrospectively-undersampled LAVA data. DL-Speed was demonstrated to perform reasonably well on prospectively-undersampled scan data, realizing a 2-5 times reduction in scan time. Conclusion: DL-Speed was shown to accelerate 3D MPRAGE and LAVA with up to a net 10-fold acceleration, achieving 2-5 times faster scans compared to conventional parallel imaging and acceleration, while maintaining diagnostic image quality and real-time reconstruction. The brain scan data-trained DL-Speed also performed well when reconstructing abdominal LAVA scan data, demonstrating versatility of the network.
abstract_zh: 目的：通过使用深度学习方法从高度欠采样的多线圈 k 空间数据重建图像来加速大脑 3D MRI 扫描。方法：DL-Speed 是一种具有密集跳层连接的展开优化架构，在 3D T1 加权脑部扫描数据上进行训练，以从高度欠采样的 k 空间数据重建复杂值图像。与采用 2 倍加速度的传统并行成像方法相比，使用 10 倍加速度回顾性欠采样的 3D MPRAGE 脑部扫描数据对训练后的模型进行了评估。信噪比、伪影、灰/白质对比度、分辨率/清晰度、深部灰质、小脑蚓部、前连合和整体质量的评分由经验丰富的放射科医生按照 5 点李克特量表进行评估。此外，训练后的模型分别在三名健康志愿者和一名健康志愿者中对回顾性欠采样 3D T1 加权 LAVA（肝脏采集与体积加速）腹部扫描数据以及前瞻性欠采样 3D MPRAGE 和 LAVA 扫描进行了测试。结果：10倍加速的DL-Speed的定性得分高于或等于2倍加速的并行成像的定性得分。 DL-Speed 在回顾性欠采样 LAVA 数据的定量指标方面优于压缩感知方法。 DL-Speed 经证明在预期欠采样扫描数据上表现相当良好，实现了 2-5 倍的扫描时间缩短。结论：DL-Speed 能够加速 3D MPRAGE 和 LAVA，净加速高达 10 倍，与传统并行成像和加速相比，扫描速度提高 2-5 倍，同时保持诊断图像质量和实时重建。经过大脑扫描数据训练的 DL-Speed 在重建腹部 LAVA 扫描数据时也表现良好，证明了网络的多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的方法DL-Speed，用于加速3D MRI扫描的图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统平行成像方法加速倍数有限，需在扫描时间与图像质量间权衡，亟需更高效的重建技术。
AI.method: 设计带密集跳跃连接的解卷积优化架构DL-Speed，利用3D T1加权脑部数据训练模型，从高度欠采样的k空间数据重建图像，并在脑部和腹部扫描数据中验证。
AI.result: DL-Speed在10倍加速下图像质量评分优于2倍加速的传统方法，定量指标优于压缩感知方法，腹部数据测试显示网络泛化能力，扫描时间减少2-5倍。
AI.conclusion: DL-Speed实现最高10倍加速，保持诊断质量且实时重建，证明其在脑部和腹部MRI中的通用性。

authors_text: Jianqiang Ren,Yuan Yao,Biwen Lei,Miaomiao Cui,Xuansong Xie
title: Structure-Aware Flow Generation for Human Body Reshaping
title_zh: 用于人体重塑的结构感知流生成
abstract: Body reshaping is an important procedure in portrait photo retouching. Due to the complicated structure and multifarious appearance of human bodies, existing methods either fall back on the 3D domain via body morphable model or resort to keypoint-based image deformation, leading to inefficiency and unsatisfied visual quality. In this paper, we address these limitations by formulating an end-to-end flow generation architecture under the guidance of body structural priors, including skeletons and Part Affinity Fields, and achieve unprecedentedly controllable performance under arbitrary poses and garments. A compositional attention mechanism is introduced for capturing both visual perceptual correlations and structural associations of the human body to reinforce the manipulation consistency among related parts. For a comprehensive evaluation, we construct the first large-scale body reshaping dataset, namely BR-5K, which contains 5,000 portrait photos as well as professionally retouched targets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual performance, controllability, and efficiency. The dataset is available at our website: https://github.com/JianqiangRen/FlowBasedBodyReshaping.
summary: Body reshaping is an important procedure in portrait photo retouching. Due to the complicated structure and multifarious appearance of human bodies, existing methods either fall back on the 3D domain via body morphable model or resort to keypoint-based image deformation, leading to inefficiency and unsatisfied visual quality. In this paper, we address these limitations by formulating an end-to-end flow generation architecture under the guidance of body structural priors, including skeletons and Part Affinity Fields, and achieve unprecedentedly controllable performance under arbitrary poses and garments. A compositional attention mechanism is introduced for capturing both visual perceptual correlations and structural associations of the human body to reinforce the manipulation consistency among related parts. For a comprehensive evaluation, we construct the first large-scale body reshaping dataset, namely BR-5K, which contains 5,000 portrait photos as well as professionally retouched targets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual performance, controllability, and efficiency. The dataset is available at our website: https://github.com/JianqiangRen/FlowBasedBodyReshaping.
abstract_zh: 身材重塑是人像照片修饰中的一个重要环节。由于人体结构复杂、外观多样，现有方法要么通过人体可变形模型回到3D领域，要么诉诸基于关键点的图像变形，导致效率低下且视觉质量不理想。在本文中，我们通过在身体结构先验（包括骨骼和部分亲和力场）的指导下制定端到端流生成架构来解决这些限制，并在任意姿势和服装下实现前所未有的可控性能。引入组合注意力机制来捕获视觉感知相关性和人体的结构关联，以增强相关部分之间的操作一致性。为了进行综合评估，我们构建了第一个大规模身体重塑数据集，即 BR-5K，其中包含 5,000 张肖像照片以及经过专业修饰的目标。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在视觉性能、可控性和效率方面显着优于现有的最先进的方法。该数据集可在我们的网站上获取：https://github.com/JianqiangRen/FlowBasedBodyReshaping。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人体结构先验的端到端流生成架构，用于实现更高效且视觉质量更高的人体重塑。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖3D模型或关键点变形，存在效率低和视觉效果不佳的问题，需通过结构先验指导的流生成方法提升可控性和效果。
AI.method: 设计端到端流生成网络，结合骨骼和部分关联场（PAF）结构先验，并引入组合注意力机制以增强相关部位的操控一致性，同时构建BR-5K数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在视觉效果、可控性和效率上显著优于现有方法，实验验证了其在任意姿势和服装下的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构感知的流生成和组合注意力机制，为人体重塑提供了更高效且可控的解决方案，并为后续研究提供了大规模数据集支持。

search_text: Structure-Aware Flow Generation for Human Body Reshaping 用于人体重塑的结构感知流生成 Body reshaping is an important procedure in portrait photo retouching. Due to the complicated structure and multifarious appearance of human bodies, existing methods either fall back on the 3D domain via body morphable model or resort to keypoint-based image deformation, leading to inefficiency and unsatisfied visual quality. In this paper, we address these limitations by formulating an end-to-end flow generation architecture under the guidance of body structural priors, including skeletons and Part Affinity Fields, and achieve unprecedentedly controllable performance under arbitrary poses and garments. A compositional attention mechanism is introduced for capturing both visual perceptual correlations and structural associations of the human body to reinforce the manipulation consistency among related parts. For a comprehensive evaluation, we construct the first large-scale body reshaping dataset, namely BR-5K, which contains 5,000 portrait photos as well as professionally retouched targets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual performance, controllability, and efficiency. The dataset is available at our website: https://github.com/JianqiangRen/FlowBasedBodyReshaping. 身材重塑是人像照片修饰中的一个重要环节。由于人体结构复杂、外观多样，现有方法要么通过人体可变形模型回到3D领域，要么诉诸基于关键点的图像变形，导致效率低下且视觉质量不理想。在本文中，我们通过在身体结构先验（包括骨骼和部分亲和力场）的指导下制定端到端流生成架构来解决这些限制，并在任意姿势和服装下实现前所未有的可控性能。引入组合注意力机制来捕获视觉感知相关性和人体的结构关联，以增强相关部分之间的操作一致性。为了进行综合评估，我们构建了第一个大规模身体重塑数据集，即 BR-5K，其中包含 5,000 张肖像照片以及经过专业修饰的目标。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在视觉性能、可控性和效率方面显着优于现有的最先进的方法。该数据集可在我们的网站上获取：https://github.com/JianqiangRen/FlowBasedBodyReshaping。 本文提出了一种基于人体结构先验的端到端流生成架构，用于实现更高效且视觉质量更高的人体重塑。 Jianqiang Ren,Yuan Yao,Biwen Lei,Miaomiao Cui,Xuansong Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Andong Deng,Xingjian Li,Di Hu,Tianyang Wang,Haoyi Xiong,Chengzhong Xu
title: Towards Inadequately Pre-trained Models in Transfer Learning
title_zh: 针对迁移学习中预训练模型不充分的问题
abstract: Pre-training has been a popular learning paradigm in deep learning era, especially in annotation-insufficient scenario. Better ImageNet pre-trained models have been demonstrated, from the perspective of architecture, by previous research to have better transferability to downstream tasks. However, in this paper, we found that during the same pre-training process, models at middle epochs, which is inadequately pre-trained, can outperform fully trained models when used as feature extractors (FE), while the fine-tuning (FT) performance still grows with the source performance. This reveals that there is not a solid positive correlation between top-1 accuracy on ImageNet and the transferring result on target data. Based on the contradictory phenomenon between FE and FT that better feature extractor fails to be fine-tuned better accordingly, we conduct comprehensive analyses on features before softmax layer to provide insightful explanations. Our discoveries suggest that, during pre-training, models tend to first learn spectral components corresponding to large singular values and the residual components contribute more when fine-tuning.
summary: Pre-training has been a popular learning paradigm in deep learning era, especially in annotation-insufficient scenario. Better ImageNet pre-trained models have been demonstrated, from the perspective of architecture, by previous research to have better transferability to downstream tasks. However, in this paper, we found that during the same pre-training process, models at middle epochs, which is inadequately pre-trained, can outperform fully trained models when used as feature extractors (FE), while the fine-tuning (FT) performance still grows with the source performance. This reveals that there is not a solid positive correlation between top-1 accuracy on ImageNet and the transferring result on target data. Based on the contradictory phenomenon between FE and FT that better feature extractor fails to be fine-tuned better accordingly, we conduct comprehensive analyses on features before softmax layer to provide insightful explanations. Our discoveries suggest that, during pre-training, models tend to first learn spectral components corresponding to large singular values and the residual components contribute more when fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 预训练已经成为深度学习时代流行的学习范式，尤其是在标注不足的场景下。之前的研究已经从架构的角度证明了更好的 ImageNet 预训练模型对下游任务具有更好的可迁移性。然而，在本文中，我们发现，在相同的预训练过程中，预训练不充分的中期模型在用作特征提取器（FE）时可以优于完全训练的模型，而微调（FT）性能仍然随着源性能而增长。这表明 ImageNet 上的 top-1 准确率与目标数据上的传输结果之间不存在牢固的正相关性。基于FE和FT之间的矛盾现象，即更好的特征提取器无法相应地进行更好的微调，我们对softmax层之前的特征进行了全面的分析，以提供有见地的解释。我们的发现表明，在预训练期间，模型倾向于首先学习与大奇异值相对应的频谱分量，而残差分量在微调时贡献更多。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了迁移学习中不充分预训练模型的表现，发现中间阶段的预训练模型作为特征提取器可能优于完全训练模型，挑战了传统观点。
AI.motivation: 传统认为更充分的ImageNet预训练能提升迁移性能，但作者观察到中间阶段模型在特征提取任务中表现更优，因此探究其背后原因。
AI.method: 通过对比不同预训练阶段模型在下游任务中的特征提取与微调表现，分析softmax层前特征的谱分解与残差成分贡献。
AI.result: 中间阶段模型在特征提取任务中表现更优，但微调性能随源模型性能提升；ImageNet准确率与迁移效果无直接正相关。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型的迁移能力不仅取决于ImageNet性能，特征学习阶段的谱分量与残差成分在微调中的作用需被重视。

authors_text: Tim Michels,Arne Petersen,Luca Palmieri,Reinhard Koch
title: Simulation of Plenoptic Cameras
title_zh: 全光相机的模拟
comment: ef:2018-3DTV-Conference: The True Vision-Capture, Transmission and Display of 3D Video (3DTV-CON). IEEE, 2018
comments: ef:2018-3DTV-Conference: The True Vision-Capture, Transmission and Display of 3D Video (3DTV-CON). IEEE, 2018
abstract: Plenoptic cameras enable the capturing of spatial as well as angular color information which can be used for various applications among which are image refocusing and depth calculations. However, these cameras are expensive and research in this area currently lacks data for ground truth comparisons. In this work we describe a flexible, easy-to-use Blender model for the different plenoptic camera types which is on the one hand able to provide the ground truth data for research and on the other hand allows an inexpensive assessment of the cameras usefulness for the desired applications. Furthermore we show that the rendering results exhibit the same image degradation effects as real cameras and make our simulation publicly available.
summary: Plenoptic cameras enable the capturing of spatial as well as angular color information which can be used for various applications among which are image refocusing and depth calculations. However, these cameras are expensive and research in this area currently lacks data for ground truth comparisons. In this work we describe a flexible, easy-to-use Blender model for the different plenoptic camera types which is on the one hand able to provide the ground truth data for research and on the other hand allows an inexpensive assessment of the cameras usefulness for the desired applications. Furthermore we show that the rendering results exhibit the same image degradation effects as real cameras and make our simulation publicly available.
abstract_zh: 全光相机能够捕获空间和角度颜色信息，这些信息可用于图像重新聚焦和深度计算等各种应用。然而，这些相机价格昂贵，而且该领域的研究目前缺乏用于地面实况比较的数据。在这项工作中，我们描述了一种适用于不同全光相机类型的灵活、易于使用的 Blender 模型，该模型一方面能够提供用于研究的地面实况数据，另一方面允许对相机对于所需应用的有用性进行廉价评估。此外，我们表明渲染结果表现出与真实相机相同的图像退化效果，并使我们的模拟公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Blender的plenoptic相机模拟模型，用于生成地面真实数据并评估其应用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有plenoptic相机成本高昂且缺乏地面真实数据，阻碍了相关研究和应用评估。
AI.method: 开发可灵活配置的Blender模型，模拟不同类型plenoptic相机的成像过程及图像退化效果。
AI.result: 生成的模拟数据准确反映真实相机特性，且公开了可复用的仿真工具。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟系统为plenoptic相机研究提供了低成本的数据支持与验证手段。

ai_content.conclusion: 该模拟系统为plenoptic相机研究提供了低成本的数据支持与验证手段。

However, these cameras are expensive and research in this area currently lacks data for ground truth comparisons. In this work we describe a flexible, easy-to-use Blender model for the different plenoptic camera types which is on the one hand able to provide the ground truth data for research and on the other hand allows an inexpensive assessment of the cameras usefulness for the desired applications. Furthermore we show that the rendering results exhibit the same image degradation effects as real cameras and make our simulation publicly available. 全光相机能够捕获空间和角度颜色信息，这些信息可用于图像重新聚焦和深度计算等各种应用。然而，这些相机价格昂贵，而且该领域的研究目前缺乏用于地面实况比较的数据。在这项工作中，我们描述了一种适用于不同全光相机类型的灵活、易于使用的 Blender 模型，该模型一方面能够提供用于研究的地面实况数据，另一方面允许对相机对于所需应用的有用性进行廉价评估。此外，我们表明渲染结果表现出与真实相机相同的图像退化效果，并使我们的模拟公开可用。 本文提出一种基于Blender的plenoptic相机模拟模型，用于生成地面真实数据并评估其应用效果。 Tim Michels,Arne Petersen,Luca Palmieri,Reinhard Koch eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Tim Michels,Arne Petersen,Reinhard Koch
title: Creating Realistic Ground Truth Data for the Evaluation of Calibration Methods for Plenoptic and Conventional Cameras
title_zh: 创建真实的地面实况数据以评估全光相机和传统相机的校准方法
abstract: Camera calibration methods usually consist of capturing images of known calibration patterns and using the detected correspondences to optimize the parameters of the assumed camera model. A meaningful evaluation of these methods relies on the availability of realistic synthetic data. In previous works concerned with conventional cameras the synthetic data was mainly created by rendering perfect images with a pinhole camera and subsequently adding distortions and aberrations to the renderings and correspondences according to the assumed camera model. This method can bias the evaluation since not every camera perfectly complies with an assumed model. Furthermore, in the field of plenoptic camera calibration there is no synthetic ground truth data available at all. We address these problems by proposing a method based on backward ray tracing to create realistic ground truth data that can be used for an unbiased evaluation of calibration methods for both types of cameras.
summary: Camera calibration methods usually consist of capturing images of known calibration patterns and using the detected correspondences to optimize the parameters of the assumed camera model. A meaningful evaluation of these methods relies on the availability of realistic synthetic data. In previous works concerned with conventional cameras the synthetic data was mainly created by rendering perfect images with a pinhole camera and subsequently adding distortions and aberrations to the renderings and correspondences according to the assumed camera model. This method can bias the evaluation since not every camera perfectly complies with an assumed model. Furthermore, in the field of plenoptic camera calibration there is no synthetic ground truth data available at all. We address these problems by proposing a method based on backward ray tracing to create realistic ground truth data that can be used for an unbiased evaluation of calibration methods for both types of cameras.
abstract_zh: 相机校准方法通常包括捕获已知校准图案的图像并使用检测到的对应关系来优化假设相机模型的参数。对这些方法的有意义的评估依赖于实际合成数据的可用性。在以前涉及传统相机的工作中，合成数据主要是通过使用针孔相机渲染完美图像，然后根据假设的相机模型在渲染和对应中添加扭曲和像差来创建的。这种方法可能会使评估产生偏差，因为并非每个相机都完全符合假设的模型。此外，在全光相机校准领域，根本没有可用的合成地面实况数据。我们通过提出一种基于反向光线追踪的方法来解决这些问题，以创建真实的地面实况数据，该数据可用于对两种类型相机的校准方法进行公正的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反向光线追踪的方法，生成用于评估plenoptic和传统相机标定方法的真实地面数据。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据生成方法依赖理想化模型假设，可能导致评估偏差；plenoptic相机领域缺乏合成数据，限制了标定方法的客观评估。
AI.method: 采用反向光线追踪技术直接模拟真实成像过程，生成符合实际光学特性的合成数据，避免传统方法的模型假设偏差。
AI.result: 成功创建了适用于两种相机类型的无偏合成数据集，为标定方法评估提供了可靠基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了传统数据生成的局限性，为相机标定研究提供了更真实的评估基础，推动了plenoptic相机校准领域的发展。

authors_text: Tim Michels,Reinhard Koch
title: Ray Tracing-Guided Design of Plenoptic Cameras
title_zh: 光线追踪引导的全光相机设计
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures. Accepted at 3DV 2021. 2021 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV). IEEE, 2021
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures. Accepted at 3DV 2021. 2021 International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV). IEEE, 2021
abstract: The design of a plenoptic camera requires the combination of two dissimilar optical systems, namely a main lens and an array of microlenses. And while the construction process of a conventional camera is mainly concerned with focusing the image onto a single plane, in the case of plenoptic cameras there can be additional requirements such as a predefined depth of field or a desired range of disparities in neighboring microlens images. Due to this complexity, the manual creation of multiple plenoptic camera setups is often a time-consuming task. In this work we assume a simulation framework as well as the main lens data given and present a method to calculate the remaining aperture, sensor and microlens array parameters under different sets of constraints. Our ray tracing-based approach is shown to result in models outperforming their pendants generated with the commonly used paraxial approximations in terms of image quality, while still meeting the desired constraints. Both the implementation and evaluation setup including 30 plenoptic camera designs are made publicly available.
summary: The design of a plenoptic camera requires the combination of two dissimilar optical systems, namely a main lens and an array of microlenses. And while the construction process of a conventional camera is mainly concerned with focusing the image onto a single plane, in the case of plenoptic cameras there can be additional requirements such as a predefined depth of field or a desired range of disparities in neighboring microlens images. Due to this complexity, the manual creation of multiple plenoptic camera setups is often a time-consuming task. In this work we assume a simulation framework as well as the main lens data given and present a method to calculate the remaining aperture, sensor and microlens array parameters under different sets of constraints. Our ray tracing-based approach is shown to result in models outperforming their pendants generated with the commonly used paraxial approximations in terms of image quality, while still meeting the desired constraints. Both the implementation and evaluation setup including 30 plenoptic camera designs are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 全光相机的设计需要组合两个不同的光学系统，即主透镜和微透镜阵列。虽然传统相机的构造过程主要涉及将图像聚焦到单个平面上，但在全光相机的情况下，可能还有其他要求，例如预定义的景深或相邻微透镜图像中所需的视差范围。由于这种复杂性，手动创建多个全光相机设置通常是一项耗时的任务。在这项工作中，我们假设了一个仿真框架以及给定的主透镜数据，并提出了一种在不同约束条件下计算剩余孔径、传感器和微透镜阵列参数的方法。我们基于光线追踪的方法被证明可以使模型在图像质量方面优于常用的近轴近似生成的模型，同时仍然满足所需的约束。包括 30 个全光相机设计在内的实施和评估设置均已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光线追踪的plenoptic相机设计方法，通过模拟框架计算光圈、传感器和微透镜阵列参数以满足不同约束条件。
AI.motivation: 传统plenoptic相机设计需手动组合主镜头与微透镜阵列，且需满足深度场或视差范围等复杂需求，手动过程耗时且难以保证图像质量。
AI.method: 在给定主镜头数据和仿真框架基础上，采用光线追踪技术计算剩余参数，替代传统近似方法，并验证满足约束条件的模型。
AI.result: 所设计的模型在图像质量上优于传统近似方法生成的模型，且公开提供了包含30种设计的实现与评估数据。
AI.conclusion: 光线追踪方法能更高效地生成符合约束条件的plenoptic相机设计，优于传统近似方法。

Our ray tracing-based approach is shown to result in models outperforming their pendants generated with the commonly used paraxial approximations in terms of image quality, while still meeting the desired constraints. authors_text: Wen-Kai Yu,Chong Cao,Ying Yang,Ning Wei,Shuo-Fei Wang,Chen-Xi Zhu
title: Single-pixel imaging based on weight sort of the Hadamard basis
title_zh: 基于Hadamard基权重排序的单像素成像
abstract: Single-pixel imaging (SPI) is very popular in subsampling applications, but the random measurement matrices it typically uses will lead to measurement blindness as well as difficulties in calculation and storage, and will also limit the further reduction in sampling rate. The deterministic Hadamard basis has become an alternative choice due to its orthogonality and structural characteristics. There is evidence that sorting the Hadamard basis is beneficial to further reduce the sampling rate, thus many orderings have emerged, but their relations remain unclear and lack a unified theory. Given this, here we specially propose a concept named selection history, which can record the Hadamard spatial folding process, and build a model based on it to reveal the formation mechanisms of different orderings and to deduce the mutual conversion relationship among them. Then, a weight ordering of the Hadamard basis is proposed. Both numerical simulation and experimental results have demonstrated that with this weight sort technique, the sampling rate, reconstruction time and matrix memory consumption are greatly reduced in comparison to traditional sorting methods. Therefore, we believe that this method may pave the way for real-time single-pixel imaging.
summary: Single-pixel imaging (SPI) is very popular in subsampling applications, but the random measurement matrices it typically uses will lead to measurement blindness as well as difficulties in calculation and storage, and will also limit the further reduction in sampling rate. The deterministic Hadamard basis has become an alternative choice due to its orthogonality and structural characteristics. There is evidence that sorting the Hadamard basis is beneficial to further reduce the sampling rate, thus many orderings have emerged, but their relations remain unclear and lack a unified theory. Given this, here we specially propose a concept named selection history, which can record the Hadamard spatial folding process, and build a model based on it to reveal the formation mechanisms of different orderings and to deduce the mutual conversion relationship among them. Then, a weight ordering of the Hadamard basis is proposed. Both numerical simulation and experimental results have demonstrated that with this weight sort technique, the sampling rate, reconstruction time and matrix memory consumption are greatly reduced in comparison to traditional sorting methods. Therefore, we believe that this method may pave the way for real-time single-pixel imaging.
abstract_zh: 单像素成像（SPI）在二次采样应用中非常流行，但其通常使用的随机测量矩阵会导致测量盲目性以及计算和存储的困难，并且也会限制采样率的进一步降低。确定性Hadamard基由于其正交性和结构特征而成为一种替代选择。有证据表明，对Hadamard基进行排序有利于进一步降低采样率，因此出现了许多排序，但它们之间的关系仍不清楚，缺乏统一的理论。鉴于此，我们在这里特别提出一个选择历史的概念，它可以记录Hadamard空间折叠过程，并基于它建立模型来揭示不同排序的形成机制并推导它们之间的相互转换关系。然后，提出了Hadamard基的权重排序。数值模拟和实验结果都表明，采用这种权重排序技术，与传统排序方法相比，采样率、重建时间和矩阵内存消耗都大大降低。因此，我们相信这种方法可能为实时单像素成像铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于权重排序的哈达玛基单像素成像方法，以提高采样效率和降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统单像素成像使用的随机测量矩阵存在测量盲目性、计算存储困难及采样率难以进一步降低的问题，而哈达玛基的正交性和结构特性可作为替代方案，但其排序关系缺乏统一理论。
AI.method: 提出‘选择历史’概念记录哈达玛基的空间折叠过程，建立模型揭示不同排序机制并推导相互转换关系，进而设计权重排序方法。
AI.result: 数值模拟和实验表明，该方法在采样率、重建时间和矩阵内存消耗上均优于传统排序方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望为实时单像素成像提供可行方案。

search_text: Single-pixel imaging based on weight sort of the Hadamard basis 基于Hadamard基权重排序的单像素成像 Single-pixel imaging (SPI) is very popular in subsampling applications, but the random measurement matrices it typically uses will lead to measurement blindness as well as difficulties in calculation and storage, and will also limit the further reduction in sampling rate. The deterministic Hadamard basis has become an alternative choice due to its orthogonality and structural characteristics. There is evidence that sorting the Hadamard basis is beneficial to further reduce the sampling rate, thus many orderings have emerged, but their relations remain unclear and lack a unified theory. Given this, here we specially propose a concept named selection history, which can record the Hadamard spatial folding process, and build a model based on it to reveal the formation mechanisms of different orderings and to deduce the mutual conversion relationship among them. Then, a weight ordering of the Hadamard basis is proposed. Both numerical simulation and experimental results have demonstrated that with this weight sort technique, the sampling rate, reconstruction time and matrix memory consumption are greatly reduced in comparison to traditional sorting methods. Therefore, we believe that this method may pave the way for real-time single-pixel imaging. 单像素成像（SPI）在二次采样应用中非常流行，但其通常使用的随机测量矩阵会导致测量盲目性以及计算和存储的困难，并且也会限制采样率的进一步降低。确定性Hadamard基由于其正交性和结构特征而成为一种替代选择。有证据表明，对Hadamard基进行排序有利于进一步降低采样率，因此出现了许多排序，但它们之间的关系仍不清楚，缺乏统一的理论。鉴于此，我们在这里特别提出一个选择历史的概念，它可以记录Hadamard空间折叠过程，并基于它建立模型来揭示不同排序的形成机制并推导它们之间的相互转换关系。然后，提出了Hadamard基的权重排序。数值模拟和实验结果都表明，采用这种权重排序技术，与传统排序方法相比，采样率、重建时间和矩阵内存消耗都大大降低。因此，我们相信这种方法可能为实时单像素成像铺平道路。 本文提出了一种基于权重排序的哈达玛基单像素成像方法，以提高采样效率和降低计算复杂度。 Wen-Kai Yu,Chong Cao,Ying Yang,Ning Wei,Shuo-Fei Wang,Chen-Xi Zhu eess.IV,cs.IT,eess.SP,physics.optics

authors_text: Fuzhi Zhong,Rui Wang,Yuchi Huo,Hujun Bao
title: Normal and Visibility Estimation of Human Face from a Single Image
title_zh: 从单个图像中估计人脸的法线和可见度
abstract: Recent work on the intrinsic image of humans starts to consider the visibility of incident illumination and encodes the light transfer function by spherical harmonics. In this paper, we show that such a light transfer function can be further decomposed into visibility and cosine terms related to surface normal. Such decomposition allows us to recover the surface normal in addition to visibility. We propose a deep learning-based approach with a reconstruction loss for training on real-world images. Results show that compared with previous works, the reconstruction of human face from our method better reveals the surface normal and shading details especially around regions where visibility effect is strong.
summary: Recent work on the intrinsic image of humans starts to consider the visibility of incident illumination and encodes the light transfer function by spherical harmonics. In this paper, we show that such a light transfer function can be further decomposed into visibility and cosine terms related to surface normal. Such decomposition allows us to recover the surface normal in addition to visibility. We propose a deep learning-based approach with a reconstruction loss for training on real-world images. Results show that compared with previous works, the reconstruction of human face from our method better reveals the surface normal and shading details especially around regions where visibility effect is strong.
abstract_zh: 最近关于人类内在图像的工作开始考虑入射照明的可见性，并通过球谐函数对光传递函数进行编码。在本文中，我们表明这种光传递函数可以进一步分解为与表面法线相关的可见性和余弦项。这种分解使我们能够恢复表面法线以及可见度。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，具有重建损失，用于对真实世界图像进行训练。结果表明，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法重建的人脸更好地揭示了表面法线和阴影细节，特别是在可见度影响较强的区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，从单张图像中同时估计人脸表面法线和光照可见性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽考虑光照可见性，但未能有效分离表面法线与可见性信息，导致阴影细节重建不足。
AI.method: 将光传输函数分解为可见性与法线相关余弦项，设计深度学习模型并引入重建损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: 在可见性显著区域（如阴影/高光）的法线和阴影细节重建效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离可见性与法线信息，显著提升了人脸表面属性的重建精度。

authors_text: Yanda Meng,Xu Chen,Dongxu Gao,Yitian Zhao,Xiaoyun Yang,Yihong Qiao,Xiaowei Huang,Yalin Zheng
title: 3D Dense Face Alignment with Fused Features by Aggregating CNNs and GCNs
title_zh: 通过聚合 CNN 和 GCN 进行具有融合特征的 3D 密集面部对齐
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel multi-level aggregation network to regress the coordinates of the vertices of a 3D face from a single 2D image in an end-to-end manner. This is achieved by seamlessly combining standard convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with Graph Convolution Networks (GCNs). By iteratively and hierarchically fusing the features across different layers and stages of the CNNs and GCNs, our approach can provide a dense face alignment and 3D face reconstruction simultaneously for the benefit of direct feature learning of 3D face mesh. Experiments on several challenging datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on both 2D and 3D face alignment tasks.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel multi-level aggregation network to regress the coordinates of the vertices of a 3D face from a single 2D image in an end-to-end manner. This is achieved by seamlessly combining standard convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with Graph Convolution Networks (GCNs). By iteratively and hierarchically fusing the features across different layers and stages of the CNNs and GCNs, our approach can provide a dense face alignment and 3D face reconstruction simultaneously for the benefit of direct feature learning of 3D face mesh. Experiments on several challenging datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on both 2D and 3D face alignment tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多级聚合网络，以端到端的方式从单个 2D 图像回归 3D 人脸顶点的坐标。这是通过将标准卷积神经网络 (CNN) 与图卷积网络 (GCN) 无缝结合来实现的。通过迭代和分层地融合 CNN 和 GCN 的不同层和阶段的特征，我们的方法可以同时提供密集的面部对齐和 3D 面部重建，从而有利于 3D 面部网格的直接特征学习。对几个具有挑战性的数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在 2D 和 3D 人脸对齐任务上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级聚合网络，通过结合CNN和GCN从单张2D图像中端到端地回归3D人脸顶点坐标，实现密集人脸对齐与3D重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以直接学习3D人脸网格特征，需通过融合CNN的局部特征与GCN的全局图结构关系来提升对齐精度。
AI.method: 设计多级聚合网络，迭代层次化融合CNN与GCN不同层的特征，实现2D图像到3D人脸顶点坐标的联合优化。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性数据集上，该方法在2D和3D人脸对齐任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合CNN与GCN的特征学习框架有效提升了3D人脸重建精度，验证了跨模态特征融合对密集人脸对齐的促进作用。

authors_text: Beyza Ermis,Giovanni Zappella,Martin Wistuba,Aditya Rawal,Cedric Archambeau
title: Memory Efficient Continual Learning with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行高效内存持续学习
comment: This paper was published at NeurIPS 2022
comments: This paper was published at NeurIPS 2022
abstract: In many real-world scenarios, data to train machine learning models becomes available over time. Unfortunately, these models struggle to continually learn new concepts without forgetting what has been learnt in the past. This phenomenon is known as catastrophic forgetting and it is difficult to prevent due to practical constraints. For instance, the amount of data that can be stored or the computational resources that can be used might be limited. Moreover, applications increasingly rely on large pre-trained neural networks, such as pre-trained Transformers, since the resources or data might not be available in sufficiently large quantities to practitioners to train the model from scratch. In this paper, we devise a method to incrementally train a model on a sequence of tasks using pre-trained Transformers and extending them with Adapters. Different than the existing approaches, our method is able to scale to a large number of tasks without significant overhead and allows sharing information across tasks. On both image and text classification tasks, we empirically demonstrate that our method maintains a good predictive performance without retraining the model or increasing the number of model parameters over time. The resulting model is also significantly faster at inference time compared to Adapter-based state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In many real-world scenarios, data to train machine learning models becomes available over time. Unfortunately, these models struggle to continually learn new concepts without forgetting what has been learnt in the past. This phenomenon is known as catastrophic forgetting and it is difficult to prevent due to practical constraints. For instance, the amount of data that can be stored or the computational resources that can be used might be limited. Moreover, applications increasingly rely on large pre-trained neural networks, such as pre-trained Transformers, since the resources or data might not be available in sufficiently large quantities to practitioners to train the model from scratch. In this paper, we devise a method to incrementally train a model on a sequence of tasks using pre-trained Transformers and extending them with Adapters. Different than the existing approaches, our method is able to scale to a large number of tasks without significant overhead and allows sharing information across tasks. On both image and text classification tasks, we empirically demonstrate that our method maintains a good predictive performance without retraining the model or increasing the number of model parameters over time. The resulting model is also significantly faster at inference time compared to Adapter-based state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实场景中，随着时间的推移，训练机器学习模型的数据就会变得可用。不幸的是，这些模型很难在不忘记过去学到的东西的情况下不断学习新概念。这种现象被称为灾难性遗忘，由于实际限制很难预防。例如，可以存储的数据量或可以使用的计算资源可能是有限的。此外，应用程序越来越依赖于大型预训练神经网络，例如预训练 Transformer，因为实践者可能无法获得足够多的资源或数据来从头开始训练模型。在本文中，我们设计了一种方法，使用预先训练的 Transformer 并使用适配器扩展它们，在一系列任务上增量训练模型。与现有方法不同，我们的方法能够扩展到大量任务，而无需大量开销，并且允许跨任务共享信息。在图像和文本分类任务上，我们凭经验证明我们的方法保持了良好的预测性能，而无需重新训练模型或随着时间的推移增加模型参数的数量。与基于适配器的最先进方法相比，生成的模型在推理时间上也明显更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练Transformer和适配器的高效持续学习方法，解决模型在增量任务中遗忘已学知识的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中模型需持续学习新任务但易出现灾难性遗忘，且受限于存储和计算资源，传统方法难以扩展至大量任务。
AI.method: 通过扩展预训练Transformer的适配器模块，实现跨任务信息共享，在不增加参数量的情况下增量训练模型。
AI.result: 在图像和文本分类任务中，该方法在无需重新训练和增加参数的前提下保持良好性能，推理速度显著优于现有适配器方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的适配器扩展方法有效解决了Transformer的持续学习问题，兼具高效性和可扩展性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练Transformer和适配器的高效持续学习方法，解决模型在增量任务中遗忘已学知识的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现实场景中模型需持续学习新任务但易出现灾难性遗忘，且受限于存储和计算资源，传统方法难以扩展至大量任务。
ai_content.method: 通过扩展预训练Transformer的适配器模块，实现跨任务信息共享，在不增加参数量的情况下增量训练模型。
ai_content.result: 在图像和文本分类任务中，该方法在无需重新训练和增加参数的前提下保持良好性能，推理速度显著优于现有适配器方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的适配器扩展方法有效解决了Transformer的持续学习问题，兼具高效性和可扩展性。

search_text: Memory Efficient Continual Learning with Transformers 使用 Transformer 进行高效内存持续学习 In many real-world scenarios, data to train machine learning models becomes available over time. Unfortunately, these models struggle to continually learn new concepts without forgetting what has been learnt in the past. This phenomenon is known as catastrophic forgetting and it is difficult to prevent due to practical constraints. For instance, the amount of data that can be stored or the computational resources that can be used might be limited. Moreover, applications increasingly rely on large pre-trained neural networks, such as pre-trained Transformers, since the resources or data might not be available in sufficiently large quantities to practitioners to train the model from scratch. In this paper, we devise a method to incrementally train a model on a sequence of tasks using pre-trained Transformers and extending them with Adapters. Different than the existing approaches, our method is able to scale to a large number of tasks without significant overhead and allows sharing information across tasks. On both image and text classification tasks, we empirically demonstrate that our method maintains a good predictive performance without retraining the model or increasing the number of model parameters over time. The resulting model is also significantly faster at inference time compared to Adapter-based state-of-the-art methods. 在许多现实场景中，随着时间的推移，训练机器学习模型的数据就会变得可用。不幸的是，这些模型很难在不忘记过去学到的东西的情况下不断学习新概念。这种现象被称为灾难性遗忘，由于实际限制很难预防。例如，可以存储的数据量或可以使用的计算资源可能是有限的。此外，应用程序越来越依赖于大型预训练神经网络，例如预训练 Transformer，因为实践者可能无法获得足够多的资源或数据来从头开始训练模型。在本文中，我们设计了一种方法，使用预先训练的 Transformer 并使用适配器扩展它们，在一系列任务上增量训练模型。与现有方法不同，我们的方法能够扩展到大量任务，而无需大量开销，并且允许跨任务共享信息。在图像和文本分类任务上，我们凭经验证明我们的方法保持了良好的预测性能，而无需重新训练模型或随着时间的推移增加模型参数的数量。与基于适配器的最先进方法相比，生成的模型在推理时间上也明显更快。 本文提出一种基于预训练Transformer和适配器的高效持续学习方法，解决模型在增量任务中遗忘已学知识的问题。 Beyza Ermis,Giovanni Zappella,Martin Wistuba,Aditya Rawal,Cedric Archambeau cs.CL,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Enric Sesa-Nogueras,Stefano Marinozzi
title: Speaker Identification Experiments Under Gender De-Identification
title_zh: 性别去识别下的说话人识别实验
comment: 5 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.03932
comments: 5 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.03932
abstract: The present work is based on the COST Action IC1206 for De-identification in multimedia content. It was performed to test four algorithms of voice modifications on a speech gender recognizer to find the degree of modification of pitch when the speech recognizer have the probability of success equal to the probability of failure. The purpose of this analysis is to assess the intensity of the speech tone modification, the quality, the reversibility and not-reversibility of the changes made. Keywords DeIdentification; Speech Algorithms
summary: The present work is based on the COST Action IC1206 for De-identification in multimedia content. It was performed to test four algorithms of voice modifications on a speech gender recognizer to find the degree of modification of pitch when the speech recognizer have the probability of success equal to the probability of failure. The purpose of this analysis is to assess the intensity of the speech tone modification, the quality, the reversibility and not-reversibility of the changes made. Keywords DeIdentification; Speech Algorithms
abstract_zh: 目前的工作基于用于多媒体内容去识别化的 COST Action IC1206。它是为了在语音性别识别器上测试四种语音修改算法，以找出当语音识别器成功概率等于失败概率时音调修改的程度。此分析的目的是评估语音语调修改的强度、质量、所做更改的可逆性和不可逆性。关键词去识别；语音算法

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在性别去标识化过程中，四种语音修改算法对语音性别识别器的影响。
AI.motivation: 该研究旨在评估语音音调修改的强度、质量以及修改的可逆性与不可逆性，以测试去标识化技术在多媒体内容中的有效性。
AI.method: 通过在语音性别识别器上测试四种语音修改算法，分析在识别成功概率等于失败概率时的音调修改程度。
AI.result: 研究结果揭示了不同算法对语音音调的修改强度及质量，并评估了修改的可逆性与不可逆性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为语音去标识化提供了有价值的参考，有助于进一步改进语音修改算法以实现更有效的隐私保护。

authors_text: Haoyu Liu,Yang Liu,Hongkai He,Hangfang Yang
title: LEBP -- Language Expectation & Binding Policy: A Two-Stream Framework for Embodied Vision-and-Language Interaction Task Learning Agents
title_zh: LEBP——语言期望和绑定策略：体现视觉和语言交互任务学习代理的两流框架
abstract: People always desire an embodied agent that can perform a task by understanding language instruction. Moreover, they also want to monitor and expect agents to understand commands the way they expected. But, how to build such an embodied agent is still unclear. Recently, people can explore this problem with the Vision-and-Language Interaction benchmark ALFRED, which requires an agent to perform complicated daily household tasks following natural language instructions in unseen scenes. In this paper, we propose LEBP -- Language Expectation and Binding Policy Module to tackle the ALFRED. The LEBP contains a two-stream process: 1) It first conducts a language expectation module to generate an expectation describing how to perform tasks by understanding the language instruction. The expectation consists of a sequence of sub-steps for the task (e.g., Pick an apple). The expectation allows people to access and check the understanding results of instructions before the agent takes actual actions, in case the task might go wrong. 2) Then, it uses the binding policy module to bind sub-steps in expectation to actual actions to specific scenarios. Actual actions include navigation and object manipulation. Experimental results suggest our approach achieves comparable performance to currently published SOTA methods and can avoid large decay from seen scenarios to unseen scenarios.
summary: People always desire an embodied agent that can perform a task by understanding language instruction. Moreover, they also want to monitor and expect agents to understand commands the way they expected. But, how to build such an embodied agent is still unclear. Recently, people can explore this problem with the Vision-and-Language Interaction benchmark ALFRED, which requires an agent to perform complicated daily household tasks following natural language instructions in unseen scenes. In this paper, we propose LEBP -- Language Expectation and Binding Policy Module to tackle the ALFRED. The LEBP contains a two-stream process: 1) It first conducts a language expectation module to generate an expectation describing how to perform tasks by understanding the language instruction. The expectation consists of a sequence of sub-steps for the task (e.g., Pick an apple). The expectation allows people to access and check the understanding results of instructions before the agent takes actual actions, in case the task might go wrong. 2) Then, it uses the binding policy module to bind sub-steps in expectation to actual actions to specific scenarios. Actual actions include navigation and object manipulation. Experimental results suggest our approach achieves comparable performance to currently published SOTA methods and can avoid large decay from seen scenarios to unseen scenarios.
abstract_zh: 人们总是希望有一个能够通过理解语言指令来执行任务的实体代理。此外，他们还希望监控并期望代理按照他们期望的方式理解命令。但是，如何构建这样一个实体代理仍不清楚。最近，人们可以通过视觉与语言交互基准 ALFRED 来探索这个问题，该基准要求智能体在看不见的场景中按照自然语言指令执行复杂的日常家务任务。在本文中，我们提出 LEBP——语言期望和绑定策略模块来解决 ALFRED。 LEBP包含一个双流过程：1）它首先执行语言期望模块来生成描述如何通过理解语言指令来执行任务的期望。期望由任务的一系列子步骤组成（例如，摘一个苹果）。这种期望允许人们在代理采取实际行动之前访问和检查指令的理解结果，以防任务可能出错。 2）然后，它使用绑定策略模块将期望的子步骤与特定场景的实际操作绑定。实际操作包括导航和对象操作。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与当前发布的 SOTA 方法相当的性能，并且可以避免从已见场景到未见场景的大幅衰减。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEBP框架，通过语言期望与绑定策略模块，解决具身视觉-语言交互任务中的复杂家庭场景指令理解与执行问题。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体在未见过的场景中执行语言指令时表现不稳定，且缺乏对指令理解过程的可监控性，需设计能生成可验证任务期望并适配具体场景的框架。
AI.method: LEBP采用双流架构：1) 语言期望模块将指令解析为可验证的子步骤序列；2) 绑定策略模块将子步骤映射到导航和物体操作等具体动作，实现场景适配。
AI.result: 在ALFRED基准测试中，LEBP性能与当前最优方法相当，且在从已见场景到未见场景的迁移中表现出更小的性能衰减。
AI.conclusion: LEBP通过分离语言理解与动作执行的模块化设计，有效提升了具身智能体在未见过场景中的任务执行鲁棒性与可解释性。

Actual actions include navigation and object manipulation. Experimental results suggest our approach achieves comparable performance to currently published SOTA methods and can avoid large decay from seen scenarios to unseen scenarios. 人们总是希望有一个能够通过理解语言指令来执行任务的实体代理。此外，他们还希望监控并期望代理按照他们期望的方式理解命令。但是，如何构建这样一个实体代理仍不清楚。最近，人们可以通过视觉与语言交互基准 ALFRED 来探索这个问题，该基准要求智能体在看不见的场景中按照自然语言指令执行复杂的日常家务任务。在本文中，我们提出 LEBP——语言期望和绑定策略模块来解决 ALFRED。 LEBP包含一个双流过程：1）它首先执行语言期望模块来生成描述如何通过理解语言指令来执行任务的期望。期望由任务的一系列子步骤组成（例如，摘一个苹果）。这种期望允许人们在代理采取实际行动之前访问和检查指令的理解结果，以防任务可能出错。 2）然后，它使用绑定策略模块将期望的子步骤与特定场景的实际操作绑定。实际操作包括导航和对象操作。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与当前发布的 SOTA 方法相当的性能，并且可以避免从已见场景到未见场景的大幅衰减。 本文提出LEBP框架，通过语言期望与绑定策略模块，解决具身视觉-语言交互任务中的复杂家庭场景指令理解与执行问题。 Haoyu Liu,Yang Liu,Hongkai He,Hangfang Yang cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Xiao Yang,Yinpeng Dong,Tianyu Pang,Zihao Xiao,Hang Su,Jun Zhu
title: Controllable Evaluation and Generation of Physical Adversarial Patch on Face Recognition
title_zh: 人脸识别物理对抗补丁的可控评估与生成
abstract: Recent studies have revealed the vulnerability of face recognition models against physical adversarial patches, which raises security concerns about the deployed face recognition systems. However, it is still challenging to ensure the reproducibility for most attack algorithms under complex physical conditions, which leads to the lack of a systematic evaluation of the existing methods. It is therefore imperative to develop a framework that can enable a comprehensive evaluation of the vulnerability of face recognition in the physical world. To this end, we propose to simulate the complex transformations of faces in the physical world via 3D-face modeling, which serves as a digital counterpart of physical faces. The generic framework allows us to control different face variations and physical conditions to conduct reproducible evaluations comprehensively. With this digital simulator, we further propose a Face3DAdv method considering the 3D face transformations and realistic physical variations. Extensive experiments validate that Face3DAdv can significantly improve the effectiveness of diverse physically realizable adversarial patches in both simulated and physical environments, against various white-box and black-box face recognition models.
summary: Recent studies have revealed the vulnerability of face recognition models against physical adversarial patches, which raises security concerns about the deployed face recognition systems. However, it is still challenging to ensure the reproducibility for most attack algorithms under complex physical conditions, which leads to the lack of a systematic evaluation of the existing methods. It is therefore imperative to develop a framework that can enable a comprehensive evaluation of the vulnerability of face recognition in the physical world. To this end, we propose to simulate the complex transformations of faces in the physical world via 3D-face modeling, which serves as a digital counterpart of physical faces. The generic framework allows us to control different face variations and physical conditions to conduct reproducible evaluations comprehensively. With this digital simulator, we further propose a Face3DAdv method considering the 3D face transformations and realistic physical variations. Extensive experiments validate that Face3DAdv can significantly improve the effectiveness of diverse physically realizable adversarial patches in both simulated and physical environments, against various white-box and black-box face recognition models.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究揭示了人脸识别模型针对物理对抗补丁的脆弱性，这引发了对已部署的人脸识别系统的安全担忧。然而，确保大多数攻击算法在复杂物理条件下的再现性仍然具有挑战性，这导致缺乏对现有方法的系统评估。因此，迫切需要开发一个能够全面评估物理世界中人脸识别脆弱性的框架。为此，我们建议通过 3D 人脸建模来模拟物理世界中人脸的复杂变换，作为物理人脸的数字对应物。通用框架使我们能够控制不同的面部变化和身体条件，以全面地进行可重复的评估。通过这个数字模拟器，我们进一步提出了一种考虑 3D 面部变换和现实物理变化的 Face3DAdv 方法。大量实验验证了 Face3DAdv 可以显着提高模拟和物理环境中各种物理可实现的对抗补丁针对各种白盒和黑盒人脸识别模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D人脸建模的可控框架，用于生成和评估物理对抗补丁对人脸识别系统的攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有物理对抗补丁攻击方法在复杂物理条件下缺乏可重复性评估，导致难以系统性验证人脸识别系统的安全漏洞。
AI.method: 通过3D人脸数字孪生技术模拟物理世界中的面部变化与光照条件，提出考虑三维形变和真实物理因素的Face3DAdv生成方法。
AI.result: 实验表明Face3DAdv在模拟环境和真实物理场景中均能显著提升对抗补丁对多种白盒/黑盒人脸识别模型的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为物理对抗攻击的系统性评估提供了新方法，揭示了人脸识别系统在真实场景中的潜在安全风险。

authors_text: Dou Hu,Mengyuan Zhou,Xiyang Du,Mengfei Yuan,Meizhi Jin,Lianxin Jiang,Yang Mo,Xiaofeng Shi
title: PALI-NLP at SemEval-2022 Task 4: Discriminative Fine-tuning of Transformers for Patronizing and Condescending Language Detection
title_zh: SemEval-2022 任务 4 上的 PALI-NLP：变压器的判别性微调，用于居高临下和居高临下的语言检测
comment: 8 pages, submitted in SemEval-2022 Workshop (co-located with NAACL)
comments: 8 pages, submitted in SemEval-2022 Workshop (co-located with NAACL)
abstract: Patronizing and condescending language (PCL) has a large harmful impact and is difficult to detect, both for human judges and existing NLP systems. At SemEval-2022 Task 4, we propose a novel Transformer-based model and its ensembles to accurately understand such language context for PCL detection. To facilitate comprehension of the subtle and subjective nature of PCL, two fine-tuning strategies are applied to capture discriminative features from diverse linguistic behaviour and categorical distribution. The system achieves remarkable results on the official ranking, including 1st in Subtask 1 and 5th in Subtask 2. Extensive experiments on the task demonstrate the effectiveness of our system and its strategies.
summary: Patronizing and condescending language (PCL) has a large harmful impact and is difficult to detect, both for human judges and existing NLP systems. At SemEval-2022 Task 4, we propose a novel Transformer-based model and its ensembles to accurately understand such language context for PCL detection. To facilitate comprehension of the subtle and subjective nature of PCL, two fine-tuning strategies are applied to capture discriminative features from diverse linguistic behaviour and categorical distribution. The system achieves remarkable results on the official ranking, including 1st in Subtask 1 and 5th in Subtask 2. Extensive experiments on the task demonstrate the effectiveness of our system and its strategies.
abstract_zh: 无论对于人类法官还是现有的 NLP 系统来说，居高临下的语言（PCL）都会产生很大的有害影响并且难以检测。在 SemEval-2022 任务 4 中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的模型及其集成，以准确理解此类语言上下文以进行 PCL 检测。为了促进对 PCL 微妙和主观本质的理解，应用了两种微调策略来捕获不同语言行为和分类分布的判别特征。该系统在官方排名中取得了显着的成绩，包括子任务 1 中的第一名和子任务 2 中的第五名。该任务的大量实验证明了我们的系统及其策略的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的模型及其集成，用于检测居高临下和轻蔑语言（PCL）
AI.motivation: PCL对人类和现有NLP系统难以检测，需更有效方法
AI.method: 应用两种微调策略，捕捉多样语言行为和分类分布的区分特征
AI.result: 子任务1第一，子任务2第五，验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 系统及策略有效，提升PCL检测性能

authors_text: Zhiyuan Cai,Li Lin,Huaqing He,Xiaoying Tang
title: Uni4Eye: Unified 2D and 3D Self-supervised Pre-training via Masked Image Modeling Transformer for Ophthalmic Image Classification
title_zh: Uni4Eye：通过掩模图像建模变压器进行统一的 2D 和 3D 自监督预训练，用于眼科图像分类
abstract: A large-scale labeled dataset is a key factor for the success of supervised deep learning in computer vision. However, a limited number of annotated data is very common, especially in ophthalmic image analysis, since manual annotation is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods bring huge opportunities for better utilizing unlabeled data, as they do not need massive annotations. With an attempt to use as many as possible unlabeled ophthalmic images, it is necessary to break the dimension barrier, simultaneously making use of both 2D and 3D images. In this paper, we propose a universal self-supervised Transformer framework, named Uni4Eye, to discover the inherent image property and capture domain-specific feature embedding in ophthalmic images. Uni4Eye can serve as a global feature extractor, which builds its basis on a Masked Image Modeling task with a Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture. We employ a Unified Patch Embedding module to replace the origin patch embedding module in ViT for jointly processing both 2D and 3D input images. Besides, we design a dual-branch multitask decoder module to simultaneously perform two reconstruction tasks on the input image and its gradient map, delivering discriminative representations for better convergence. We evaluate the performance of our pre-trained Uni4Eye encoder by fine-tuning it on six downstream ophthalmic image classification tasks. The superiority of Uni4Eye is successfully established through comparisons to other state-of-the-art SSL pre-training methods.
summary: A large-scale labeled dataset is a key factor for the success of supervised deep learning in computer vision. However, a limited number of annotated data is very common, especially in ophthalmic image analysis, since manual annotation is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods bring huge opportunities for better utilizing unlabeled data, as they do not need massive annotations. With an attempt to use as many as possible unlabeled ophthalmic images, it is necessary to break the dimension barrier, simultaneously making use of both 2D and 3D images. In this paper, we propose a universal self-supervised Transformer framework, named Uni4Eye, to discover the inherent image property and capture domain-specific feature embedding in ophthalmic images. Uni4Eye can serve as a global feature extractor, which builds its basis on a Masked Image Modeling task with a Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture. We employ a Unified Patch Embedding module to replace the origin patch embedding module in ViT for jointly processing both 2D and 3D input images. Besides, we design a dual-branch multitask decoder module to simultaneously perform two reconstruction tasks on the input image and its gradient map, delivering discriminative representations for better convergence. We evaluate the performance of our pre-trained Uni4Eye encoder by fine-tuning it on six downstream ophthalmic image classification tasks. The superiority of Uni4Eye is successfully established through comparisons to other state-of-the-art SSL pre-training methods.
abstract_zh: 大规模标记数据集是计算机视觉监督深度学习成功的关键因素。然而，有限数量的注释数据是很常见的，特别是在眼科图像分析中，因为手动注释既耗时又费力。自监督学习（SSL）方法为更好地利用未标记数据带来了巨大的机会，因为它们不需要大量注释。为了尝试使用尽可能多的未标记眼科图像，有必要打破维度障碍，同时利用 2D 和 3D 图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的自监督 Transformer 框架，名为 Uni4Eye，用于发现固有的图像属性并捕获眼科图像中嵌入的特定领域特征。 Uni4Eye 可以用作全局特征提取器，其基础是具有视觉变换器 (ViT) 架构的掩模图像建模任务。我们采用统一补丁嵌入模块来替换 ViT 中的原始补丁嵌入模块，以联合处理 2D 和 3D 输入图像。此外，我们设计了一个双分支多任务解码器模块，可以同时对输入图像及其梯度图执行两个重建任务，提供判别性表示以实现更好的收敛。我们通过在六个下游眼科图像分类任务上对其进行微调来评估预训练 Uni4Eye 编码器的性能。通过与其他最先进的 SSL 预训练方法的比较，成功确立了 Uni4Eye 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的2D和3D自监督预训练框架Uni4Eye，用于眼科图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 眼科图像分析中标注数据有限，而自监督学习能有效利用未标注数据，但现有方法难以同时处理2D和3D图像。
AI.method: 设计基于Vision Transformer的Uni4Eye框架，包含统一的补丁嵌入模块和双分支多任务解码器，通过掩码图像建模任务联合处理2D/3D图像及其梯度图。
AI.result: 在六个眼科图像分类任务中，Uni4Eye的微调模型性能优于其他先进自监督预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: Uni4Eye通过统一处理多维医学图像和双任务解码，有效提升了眼科图像分类的自监督预训练效果。

ai_content.result: 在六个眼科图像分类任务中，Uni4Eye的微调模型性能优于其他先进自监督预训练方法。
ai_content.conclusion: Uni4Eye通过统一处理多维医学图像和双任务解码，有效提升了眼科图像分类的自监督预训练效果。

method: 设计基于Vision Transformer的Uni4Eye框架，包含统一的补丁嵌入模块和双分支多任务解码器，通过掩码图像建模任务联合处理2D/3D图像及其梯度图。

search_text: Uni4Eye: Unified 2D and 3D Self-supervised Pre-training via Masked Image Modeling Transformer for Ophthalmic Image Classification Uni4Eye：通过掩模图像建模变压器进行统一的 2D 和 3D 自监督预训练，用于眼科图像分类 A large-scale labeled dataset is a key factor for the success of supervised deep learning in computer vision. However, a limited number of annotated data is very common, especially in ophthalmic image analysis, since manual annotation is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods bring huge opportunities for better utilizing unlabeled data, as they do not need massive annotations. With an attempt to use as many as possible unlabeled ophthalmic images, it is necessary to break the dimension barrier, simultaneously making use of both 2D and 3D images. In this paper, we propose a universal self-supervised Transformer framework, named Uni4Eye, to discover the inherent image property and capture domain-specific feature embedding in ophthalmic images. Uni4Eye can serve as a global feature extractor, which builds its basis on a Masked Image Modeling task with a Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture. We employ a Unified Patch Embedding module to replace the origin patch embedding module in ViT for jointly processing both 2D and 3D input images. Besides, we design a dual-branch multitask decoder module to simultaneously perform two reconstruction tasks on the input image and its gradient map, delivering discriminative representations for better convergence. We evaluate the performance of our pre-trained Uni4Eye encoder by fine-tuning it on six downstream ophthalmic image classification tasks. The superiority of Uni4Eye is successfully established through comparisons to other state-of-the-art SSL pre-training methods. 大规模标记数据集是计算机视觉监督深度学习成功的关键因素。然而，有限数量的注释数据是很常见的，特别是在眼科图像分析中，因为手动注释既耗时又费力。自监督学习（SSL）方法为更好地利用未标记数据带来了巨大的机会，因为它们不需要大量注释。为了尝试使用尽可能多的未标记眼科图像，有必要打破维度障碍，同时利用 2D 和 3D 图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的自监督 Transformer 框架，名为 Uni4Eye，用于发现固有的图像属性并捕获眼科图像中嵌入的特定领域特征。 Uni4Eye 可以用作全局特征提取器，其基础是具有视觉变换器 (ViT) 架构的掩模图像建模任务。我们采用统一补丁嵌入模块来替换 ViT 中的原始补丁嵌入模块，以联合处理 2D 和 3D 输入图像。此外，我们设计了一个双分支多任务解码器模块，可以同时对输入图像及其梯度图执行两个重建任务，提供判别性表示以实现更好的收敛。我们通过在六个下游眼科图像分类任务上对其进行微调来评估预训练 Uni4Eye 编码器的性能。通过与其他最先进的 SSL 预训练方法的比较，成功确立了 Uni4Eye 的优越性。 本文提出了一种统一的2D和3D自监督预训练框架Uni4Eye，用于眼科图像分类任务。 Zhiyuan Cai,Li Lin,Huaqing He,Xiaoying Tang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Matthieu Zins,Gilles Simon,Marie-Odile Berger
title: Object-Based Visual Camera Pose Estimation From Ellipsoidal Model and 3D-Aware Ellipse Prediction
title_zh: 基于椭圆体模型和 3D 感知椭圆预测的基于对象的视觉相机姿态估计
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method for initial camera pose estimation from just a single image which is robust to viewing conditions and does not require a detailed model of the scene. This method meets the growing need of easy deployment of robotics or augmented reality applications in any environments, especially those for which no accurate 3D model nor huge amount of ground truth data are available. It exploits the ability of deep learning techniques to reliably detect objects regardless of viewing conditions. Previous works have also shown that abstracting the geometry of a scene of objects by an ellipsoid cloud allows to compute the camera pose accurately enough for various application needs. Though promising, these approaches use the ellipses fitted to the detection bounding boxes as an approximation of the imaged objects. In this paper, we go one step further and propose a learning-based method which detects improved elliptic approximations of objects which are coherent with the 3D ellipsoids in terms of perspective projection. Experiments prove that the accuracy of the computed pose significantly increases thanks to our method. This is achieved with very little effort in terms of training data acquisition - a few hundred calibrated images of which only three need manual object annotation. Code and models are released at https://gitlab.inria.fr/tangram/3d-aware-ellipses-for-visual-localization
summary: In this paper, we propose a method for initial camera pose estimation from just a single image which is robust to viewing conditions and does not require a detailed model of the scene. This method meets the growing need of easy deployment of robotics or augmented reality applications in any environments, especially those for which no accurate 3D model nor huge amount of ground truth data are available. It exploits the ability of deep learning techniques to reliably detect objects regardless of viewing conditions. Previous works have also shown that abstracting the geometry of a scene of objects by an ellipsoid cloud allows to compute the camera pose accurately enough for various application needs. Though promising, these approaches use the ellipses fitted to the detection bounding boxes as an approximation of the imaged objects. In this paper, we go one step further and propose a learning-based method which detects improved elliptic approximations of objects which are coherent with the 3D ellipsoids in terms of perspective projection. Experiments prove that the accuracy of the computed pose significantly increases thanks to our method. This is achieved with very little effort in terms of training data acquisition - a few hundred calibrated images of which only three need manual object annotation. Code and models are released at https://gitlab.inria.fr/tangram/3d-aware-ellipses-for-visual-localization
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种仅根据单个图像进行初始相机姿态估计的方法，该方法对观看条件具有鲁棒性，并且不需要场景的详细模型。这种方法满足了在任何环境中轻松部署机器人或增强现实应用程序日益增长的需求，特别是那些没有准确的 3D 模型或大量地面实况数据可用的环境。它利用深度学习技术的能力，无论观看条件如何，都能可靠地检测对象。之前的工作还表明，通过椭球云抽象对象场景的几何形状可以足够准确地计算相机姿势，以满足各种应用需求。尽管很有希望，但这些方法使用适合检测边界框的椭圆作为成像对象的近似值。在本文中，我们更进一步提出了一种基于学习的方法，该方法可以检测在透视投影方面与 3D 椭球体一致的改进的椭圆近似对象。实验证明，由于我们的方法，计算姿势的准确性显着提高。在训练数据采集方面，只需付出很少的努力即可实现这一目标 - 数百张校准图像，其中只有三幅需要手动对象注释。代码和模型发布于 https://gitlab.inria.fr/tangram/3d-aware-ellipses-for-visual-localization

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于椭球模型和3D感知椭圆预测的单目相机位姿估计方法，无需详细场景模型即可实现鲁棒的初始位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖检测框拟合的椭圆近似，难以满足复杂环境下的精度需求，且需要大量标注数据。本文旨在开发一种数据高效、适应性强的位姿估计方案，以支持机器人和增强现实等应用场景。
AI.method: 结合深度学习目标检测与椭球几何建模，提出学习-based方法生成与3D椭球一致的透视投影椭圆近似，仅需少量标注数据（数百张校准图像，其中仅三张需手动标注）。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升位姿估计精度，且训练数据获取成本极低。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过改进椭圆建模与3D感知机制，在无详细场景模型条件下实现了高效准确的相机位姿估计，为资源受限环境下的视觉定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qilong Zhang,Youheng Sun,Chaoning Zhang,Chaoqun Li,Xuanhan Wang,Jingkuan Song,Lianli Gao
title: Practical No-box Adversarial Attacks with Training-free Hybrid Image Transformation
title_zh: 通过免训练混合图像转换进行实用的无框对抗攻击
abstract: In recent years, the adversarial vulnerability of deep neural networks (DNNs) has raised increasing attention. Among all the threat models, no-box attacks are the most practical but extremely challenging since they neither rely on any knowledge of the target model or similar substitute model, nor access the dataset for training a new substitute model. Although a recent method has attempted such an attack in a loose sense, its performance is not good enough and computational overhead of training is expensive. In this paper, we move a step forward and show the existence of a \textbf{training-free} adversarial perturbation under the no-box threat model, which can be successfully used to attack different DNNs in real-time. Motivated by our observation that high-frequency component (HFC) domains in low-level features and plays a crucial role in classification, we attack an image mainly by manipulating its frequency components. Specifically, the perturbation is manipulated by suppression of the original HFC and adding of noisy HFC. We empirically and experimentally analyze the requirements of effective noisy HFC and show that it should be regionally homogeneous, repeating and dense. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed no-box method. It attacks ten well-known models with a success rate of \textbf{98.13\%} on average, which outperforms state-of-the-art no-box attacks by \textbf{29.39\%}. Furthermore, our method is even competitive to mainstream transfer-based black-box attacks.
summary: In recent years, the adversarial vulnerability of deep neural networks (DNNs) has raised increasing attention. Among all the threat models, no-box attacks are the most practical but extremely challenging since they neither rely on any knowledge of the target model or similar substitute model, nor access the dataset for training a new substitute model. Although a recent method has attempted such an attack in a loose sense, its performance is not good enough and computational overhead of training is expensive. In this paper, we move a step forward and show the existence of a \textbf{training-free} adversarial perturbation under the no-box threat model, which can be successfully used to attack different DNNs in real-time. Motivated by our observation that high-frequency component (HFC) domains in low-level features and plays a crucial role in classification, we attack an image mainly by manipulating its frequency components. Specifically, the perturbation is manipulated by suppression of the original HFC and adding of noisy HFC. We empirically and experimentally analyze the requirements of effective noisy HFC and show that it should be regionally homogeneous, repeating and dense. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed no-box method. It attacks ten well-known models with a success rate of \textbf{98.13\%} on average, which outperforms state-of-the-art no-box attacks by \textbf{29.39\%}. Furthermore, our method is even competitive to mainstream transfer-based black-box attacks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络（DNN）的对抗脆弱性引起了越来越多的关注。在所有威胁模型中，无盒攻击是最实用的，但也极具挑战性，因为它们既不依赖于目标模型或类似替代模型的任何知识，也不访问数据集来训练新的替代模型。尽管最近的方法在松散意义上尝试了这种攻击，但其性能不够好，并且训练的计算开销昂贵。在本文中，我们向前迈出了一步，证明了无框威胁模型下 \textbf{training-free} 对抗性扰动的存在，它可以成功地用于实时攻击不同的 DNN。受我们观察到低级特征中的高频分量（HFC）域在分类中起着至关重要的作用的启发，我们主要通过操纵图像的频率分量来攻击图像。具体来说，扰动是通过抑制原始 HFC 和添加噪声 HFC 来控制的。我们通过实证和实验分析了有效噪声 HFC 的要求，并表明它应该是区域均匀的、重复的和密集的。在 ImageNet 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的无盒方法的有效性。它攻击 10 个知名模型，平均成功率为 \textbf{98.13\%}，比最先进的 no-box 攻击高出 \textbf{29.39\%}。此外，我们的方法甚至比主流的基于传输的黑盒攻击具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的无框对抗攻击方法，通过混合图像变换实时攻击不同深度神经网络。
AI.motivation: 无框攻击是实际但极具挑战性的对抗攻击模型，现有方法计算开销大且效果不佳，需开发无需训练且高效的攻击方案。
AI.method: 通过操控图像的高频分量（HFC），抑制原始高频并添加符合区域均匀性、重复性和密集性的噪声高频分量，实现训练-free的对抗扰动。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法对10个知名模型的平均攻击成功率达98.13%，优于现有无框攻击29.39%，且性能接近主流迁移型黑盒攻击。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了频率域操控在无框攻击中的有效性，提出的方法为实际对抗攻击提供了高效可行的新思路。

ai_content.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法对10个知名模型的平均攻击成功率达98.13%，优于现有无框攻击29.39%，且性能接近主流迁移型黑盒攻击。

motivation: 无框攻击是实际但极具挑战性的对抗攻击模型，现有方法计算开销大且效果不佳，需开发无需训练且高效的攻击方案。
method: 通过操控图像的高频分量（HFC），抑制原始高频并添加符合区域均匀性、重复性和密集性的噪声高频分量，实现训练-free的对抗扰动。
result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法对10个知名模型的平均攻击成功率达98.13%，优于现有无框攻击29.39%，且性能接近主流迁移型黑盒攻击。

search_text: Practical No-box Adversarial Attacks with Training-free Hybrid Image Transformation 通过免训练混合图像转换进行实用的无框对抗攻击 In recent years, the adversarial vulnerability of deep neural networks (DNNs) has raised increasing attention. Among all the threat models, no-box attacks are the most practical but extremely challenging since they neither rely on any knowledge of the target model or similar substitute model, nor access the dataset for training a new substitute model. Although a recent method has attempted such an attack in a loose sense, its performance is not good enough and computational overhead of training is expensive. In this paper, we move a step forward and show the existence of a \textbf{training-free} adversarial perturbation under the no-box threat model, which can be successfully used to attack different DNNs in real-time. Motivated by our observation that high-frequency component (HFC) domains in low-level features and plays a crucial role in classification, we attack an image mainly by manipulating its frequency components. Specifically, the perturbation is manipulated by suppression of the original HFC and adding of noisy HFC. We empirically and experimentally analyze the requirements of effective noisy HFC and show that it should be regionally homogeneous, repeating and dense. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed no-box method. It attacks ten well-known models with a success rate of \textbf{98.13\%} on average, which outperforms state-of-the-art no-box attacks by \textbf{29.39\%}. Furthermore, our method is even competitive to mainstream transfer-based black-box attacks. 近年来，深度神经网络（DNN）的对抗脆弱性引起了越来越多的关注。在所有威胁模型中，无盒攻击是最实用的，但也极具挑战性，因为它们既不依赖于目标模型或类似替代模型的任何知识，也不访问数据集来训练新的替代模型。尽管最近的方法在松散意义上尝试了这种攻击，但其性能不够好，并且训练的计算开销昂贵。在本文中，我们向前迈出了一步，证明了无框威胁模型下 \textbf{training-free} 对抗性扰动的存在，它可以成功地用于实时攻击不同的 DNN。受我们观察到低级特征中的高频分量（HFC）域在分类中起着至关重要的作用的启发，我们主要通过操纵图像的频率分量来攻击图像。具体来说，扰动是通过抑制原始 HFC 和添加噪声 HFC 来控制的。我们通过实证和实验分析了有效噪声 HFC 的要求，并表明它应该是区域均匀的、重复的和密集的。在 ImageNet 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的无盒方法的有效性。它攻击 10 个知名模型，平均成功率为 \textbf{98.13\%}，比最先进的 no-box 攻击高出 \textbf{29.39\%}。此外，我们的方法甚至比主流的基于传输的黑盒攻击具有竞争力。 本文提出了一种无需训练的无框对抗攻击方法，通过混合图像变换实时攻击不同深度神经网络。 Qilong Zhang,Youheng Sun,Chaoning Zhang,Chaoqun Li,Xuanhan Wang,Jingkuan Song,Lianli Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Novanto Yudistira,Muthu Subash Kavitha,Jeny Rajan,Takio Kurita
title: Attention-effective multiple instance learning on weakly stem cell colony segmentation
title_zh: 弱干细胞集落分割的注意力有效多实例学习
abstract: The detection of induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC) colonies often needs the precise extraction of the colony features. However, existing computerized systems relied on segmentation of contours by preprocessing for classifying the colony conditions were task-extensive. To maximize the efficiency in categorizing colony conditions, we propose a multiple instance learning (MIL) in weakly supervised settings. It is designed in a single model to produce weak segmentation and classification of colonies without using finely labeled samples. As a single model, we employ a U-net-like convolution neural network (CNN) to train on binary image-level labels for MIL colonies classification. Furthermore, to specify the object of interest we used a simple post-processing method. The proposed approach is compared over conventional methods using five-fold cross-validation and receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve. The maximum accuracy of the MIL-net is 95%, which is 15 % higher than the conventional methods. Furthermore, the ability to interpret the location of the iPSC colonies based on the image level label without using a pixel-wise ground truth image is more appealing and cost-effective in colony condition recognition.
summary: The detection of induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC) colonies often needs the precise extraction of the colony features. However, existing computerized systems relied on segmentation of contours by preprocessing for classifying the colony conditions were task-extensive. To maximize the efficiency in categorizing colony conditions, we propose a multiple instance learning (MIL) in weakly supervised settings. It is designed in a single model to produce weak segmentation and classification of colonies without using finely labeled samples. As a single model, we employ a U-net-like convolution neural network (CNN) to train on binary image-level labels for MIL colonies classification. Furthermore, to specify the object of interest we used a simple post-processing method. The proposed approach is compared over conventional methods using five-fold cross-validation and receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve. The maximum accuracy of the MIL-net is 95%, which is 15 % higher than the conventional methods. Furthermore, the ability to interpret the location of the iPSC colonies based on the image level label without using a pixel-wise ground truth image is more appealing and cost-effective in colony condition recognition.
abstract_zh: 诱导多能干细胞（iPSC）集落的检测通常需要精确提取集落特征。然而，现有的计算机化系统依赖于通过预处理对轮廓进行分割来对菌落条件进行分类，这是一项任务繁重的任务。为了最大限度地提高群落条件分类的效率，我们提出了弱监督环境下的多实例学习（MIL）。它被设计为单一模型，可在不使用精细标记样本的情况下产生菌落的弱分割和分类。作为单一模型，我们采用类似 U 网的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来训练二进制图像级标签以进行 MIL 菌落分类。此外，为了指定感兴趣的对象，我们使用了简单的后处理方法。使用五重交叉验证和受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线将所提出的方法与传统方法进行比较。 MIL-net的最大准确度为95%，比传统方法高出15%。此外，在不使用像素级地面实况图像的情况下，基于图像级标签解释 iPSC 集落位置的能力在集落条件识别中更具吸引力且更具成本效益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督下的多实例学习方法，用于高效分类诱导性多能干细胞（iPSC）集落状态，无需精细标注的像素级数据。
AI.motivation: 现有iPSC集落检测方法依赖预处理分割轮廓，流程繁琐且效率低，需开发更高效且无需精细标注的分类方法。
AI.method: 设计单模型结合U-Net类似卷积神经网络（CNN），利用二值图像标签进行多实例学习（MIL）分类，并通过简单后处理定位目标区域。
AI.result: MIL-net在五折交叉验证中达到95%的最高准确率，较传统方法提升15%，且无需像素级标注即可解释iPSC集落位置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在成本效益和可解释性上优于传统技术，适用于弱监督下的iPSC集落状态识别任务。
