authors_text: Beomjoon Kim,Luke Shimanuki,Leslie Pack Kaelbling,Tomás Lozano-Pérez
title: Representation, learning, and planning algorithms for geometric task and motion planning
title_zh: 几何任务和运动规划的表示、学习和规划算法
abstract: We present a framework for learning to guide geometric task and motion planning (GTAMP). GTAMP is a subclass of task and motion planning in which the goal is to move multiple objects to target regions among movable obstacles. A standard graph search algorithm is not directly applicable, because GTAMP problems involve hybrid search spaces and expensive action feasibility checks. To handle this, we introduce a novel planner that extends basic heuristic search with random sampling and a heuristic function that prioritizes feasibility checking on promising state action pairs. The main drawback of such pure planners is that they lack the ability to learn from planning experience to improve their efficiency. We propose two learning algorithms to address this. The first is an algorithm for learning a rank function that guides the discrete task level search, and the second is an algorithm for learning a sampler that guides the continuous motionlevel search. We propose design principles for designing data efficient algorithms for learning from planning experience and representations for effective generalization. We evaluate our framework in challenging GTAMP problems, and show that we can improve both planning and data efficiency
summary: We present a framework for learning to guide geometric task and motion planning (GTAMP). GTAMP is a subclass of task and motion planning in which the goal is to move multiple objects to target regions among movable obstacles. A standard graph search algorithm is not directly applicable, because GTAMP problems involve hybrid search spaces and expensive action feasibility checks. To handle this, we introduce a novel planner that extends basic heuristic search with random sampling and a heuristic function that prioritizes feasibility checking on promising state action pairs. The main drawback of such pure planners is that they lack the ability to learn from planning experience to improve their efficiency. We propose two learning algorithms to address this. The first is an algorithm for learning a rank function that guides the discrete task level search, and the second is an algorithm for learning a sampler that guides the continuous motionlevel search. We propose design principles for designing data efficient algorithms for learning from planning experience and representations for effective generalization. We evaluate our framework in challenging GTAMP problems, and show that we can improve both planning and data efficiency
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个学习指导几何任务和运动规划（GTAMP）的框架。 GTAMP 是任务和运动规划的一个子类，其目标是将多个对象移动到可移动障碍物之间的目标区域。标准图搜索算法并不直接适用，因为 GTAMP 问题涉及混合搜索空间和昂贵的动作可行性检查。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的规划器，它通过随机采样和启发式函数来扩展基本的启发式搜索，该函数优先考虑有希望的状态动作对的可行性检查。这种纯粹的规划者的主要缺点是他们缺乏从规划经验中学习以提高效率的能力。我们提出了两种学习算法来解决这个问题。第一个是用于学习指导离散任务级别搜索的排序函数的算法，第二个是用于学习指导连续运动级别搜索的采样器的算法。我们提出了设计数据有效算法的设计原则，以便从规划经验和表示中学习，以实现有效的泛化。我们在挑战 GTAMP 问题时评估了我们的框架，并表明我们可以提高规划和数据效率

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合学习与规划算法的框架，用于解决几何任务和运动规划（GTAMP）问题，通过学习提升规划效率。
AI.motivation: 传统图搜索算法难以处理GTAMP问题中的混合搜索空间和高成本可行性检查，且纯规划器无法从经验中学习优化效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型规划器，结合启发式搜索、随机采样与启发函数，并提出两种学习算法：任务级排名函数学习与运动级采样器学习，同时制定数据高效的设计原则。
AI.result: 在复杂GTAMP问题中验证了框架的有效性，显著提升了规划效率和数据利用效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过融合学习与规划算法，有效解决了GTAMP问题的挑战，为未来研究提供了数据高效的学习与规划方法方向。

The first is an algorithm for learning a rank function that guides the discrete task level search, and the second is an algorithm for learning a sampler that guides the continuous motionlevel search. We propose design principles for designing data efficient algorithms for learning from planning experience and representations for effective generalization. We evaluate our framework in challenging GTAMP problems, and show that we can improve both planning and data efficiency 我们提出了一个学习指导几何任务和运动规划（GTAMP）的框架。 GTAMP 是任务和运动规划的一个子类，其目标是将多个对象移动到可移动障碍物之间的目标区域。标准图搜索算法并不直接适用，因为 GTAMP 问题涉及混合搜索空间和昂贵的动作可行性检查。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的规划器，它通过随机采样和启发式函数来扩展基本的启发式搜索，该函数优先考虑有希望的状态动作对的可行性检查。这种纯粹的规划者的主要缺点是他们缺乏从规划经验中学习以提高效率的能力。我们提出了两种学习算法来解决这个问题。第一个是用于学习指导离散任务级别搜索的排序函数的算法，第二个是用于学习指导连续运动级别搜索的采样器的算法。我们提出了设计数据有效算法的设计原则，以便从规划经验和表示中学习，以实现有效的泛化。我们在挑战 GTAMP 问题时评估了我们的框架，并表明我们可以提高规划和数据效率 本文提出了一种结合学习与规划算法的框架，用于解决几何任务和运动规划（GTAMP）问题，通过学习提升规划效率。 Beomjoon Kim,Luke Shimanuki,Leslie Pack Kaelbling,Tomás Lozano-Pérez cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziyue Li,Kan Ren,Xinyang Jiang,Bo Li,Haipeng Zhang,Dongsheng Li
title: Domain Generalization using Pretrained Models without Fine-tuning
title_zh: 使用预训练模型进行领域泛化，无需微调
abstract: Fine-tuning pretrained models is a common practice in domain generalization (DG) tasks. However, fine-tuning is usually computationally expensive due to the ever-growing size of pretrained models. More importantly, it may cause over-fitting on source domain and compromise their generalization ability as shown in recent works. Generally, pretrained models possess some level of generalization ability and can achieve decent performance regarding specific domains and samples. However, the generalization performance of pretrained models could vary significantly over different test domains even samples, which raises challenges for us to best leverage pretrained models in DG tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization paradigm to better leverage various pretrained models, named specialized ensemble learning for domain generalization (SEDGE). It first trains a linear label space adapter upon fixed pretrained models, which transforms the outputs of the pretrained model to the label space of the target domain. Then, an ensemble network aware of model specialty is proposed to dynamically dispatch proper pretrained models to predict each test sample. Experimental studies on several benchmarks show that SEDGE achieves significant performance improvements comparing to strong baselines including state-of-the-art method in DG tasks and reduces the trainable parameters by ~99% and the training time by ~99.5%.
summary: Fine-tuning pretrained models is a common practice in domain generalization (DG) tasks. However, fine-tuning is usually computationally expensive due to the ever-growing size of pretrained models. More importantly, it may cause over-fitting on source domain and compromise their generalization ability as shown in recent works. Generally, pretrained models possess some level of generalization ability and can achieve decent performance regarding specific domains and samples. However, the generalization performance of pretrained models could vary significantly over different test domains even samples, which raises challenges for us to best leverage pretrained models in DG tasks. In this paper, we propose a novel domain generalization paradigm to better leverage various pretrained models, named specialized ensemble learning for domain generalization (SEDGE). It first trains a linear label space adapter upon fixed pretrained models, which transforms the outputs of the pretrained model to the label space of the target domain. Then, an ensemble network aware of model specialty is proposed to dynamically dispatch proper pretrained models to predict each test sample. Experimental studies on several benchmarks show that SEDGE achieves significant performance improvements comparing to strong baselines including state-of-the-art method in DG tasks and reduces the trainable parameters by ~99% and the training time by ~99.5%.
abstract_zh: 微调预训练模型是领域泛化 (DG) 任务中的常见做法。然而，由于预训练模型的规模不断增长，微调的计算成本通常很高。更重要的是，如最近的工作所示，它可能会导致源域的过度拟合并损害其泛化能力。一般来说，预训练模型具有一定程度的泛化能力，并且可以在特定领域和样本上取得不错的性能。然而，预训练模型的泛化性能在不同的测试域甚至样本中可能会有很大差异，这给我们在 DG 任务中最好地利用预训练模型带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的领域泛化范式，以更好地利用各种预训练模型，称为领域泛化专用集成学习（SEDGE）。它首先在固定的预训练模型上训练线性标签空间适配器，将预训练模型的输出转换为目标域的标签空间。然后，提出了一种了解模型特性的集成网络，以动态调度适当的预训练模型来预测每个测试样本。对多个基准的实验研究表明，与强大的基线（包括 DG 任务中最先进的方法）相比，SEDGE 实现了显着的性能改进，并将可训练参数减少了约 99%，训练时间减少了约 99.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需微调预训练模型的领域泛化方法SEDGE，通过线性标签空间适配器和模型专长感知的集成网络提升跨领域性能。
AI.motivation: 微调预训练模型计算成本高且易导致源域过拟合，而预训练模型在不同测试领域的泛化性能差异显著，需更高效利用其能力。
AI.method: 首先在固定预训练模型上训练线性标签空间适配器以转换输出标签空间，再构建感知模型专长的集成网络动态分配合适模型进行预测。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法，参数量减少约99%，训练时间减少约99.5%。
AI.conclusion: SEDGE通过避免微调并动态集成预训练模型，有效提升了领域泛化性能，降低了计算成本。

However, fine-tuning is usually computationally expensive due to the ever-growing size of pretrained models. More importantly, it may cause over-fitting on source domain and compromise their generalization ability as shown in recent works. Generally, pretrained models possess some level of generalization ability and can achieve decent performance regarding specific domains and samples. Then, an ensemble network aware of model specialty is proposed to dynamically dispatch proper pretrained models to predict each test sample. authors_text: Qiuchen Qian,James O'Keeffe,Yanran Wang,David Boyle
title: Practical Mission Planning for Optimized UAV-Sensor Wireless Recharging
title_zh: 优化无人机传感器无线充电的实用任务规划
abstract: Optimal maintenance of sensor nodes in a Wireless Rechargeable Sensor Network (WRSN) requires effective scheduling of power delivery vehicles by solving the Charging Scheduling Problem (CSP). Deploying Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) as mobile chargers has emerged as a promising solution due to their mobility and flexibility. The CSP can be formulated as a Mixed-Integer Non-Linear Programming problem whose optimization objective is maximizing the recharged energy of sensor nodes within the UAV battery constraint. While many studies have demonstrated satisfactory performance of heuristic algorithms in addressing specific routing problems, few studies explore online updating (i.e., mission re-planning `on the fly') in the CSP context. Here we present a new offline and online mission planner leveraging a first-principles power consumption model that uses real-time state information and environmental information. The planner, namely Rapid Online Metaheuristic-based Planner (ROMP), supplements solutions from a Guided Local Search (GLS) with our Context-aware Black Hole Algorithm. Our results demonstrate that ROMP outperforms GLS in most cases tested. We developed and proposed FastROMP to speed up the online mission (re-)planning algorithm by introducing a new online adjustment operator that uses the latest state information as input, eliminating the need for re-initialization. FastROMP not only provides a better quality route, but it also significantly reduces computational time. The reduction ranges from 39.57% in sparse deployment to 93.3% in denser deployments.
summary: Optimal maintenance of sensor nodes in a Wireless Rechargeable Sensor Network (WRSN) requires effective scheduling of power delivery vehicles by solving the Charging Scheduling Problem (CSP). Deploying Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) as mobile chargers has emerged as a promising solution due to their mobility and flexibility. The CSP can be formulated as a Mixed-Integer Non-Linear Programming problem whose optimization objective is maximizing the recharged energy of sensor nodes within the UAV battery constraint. While many studies have demonstrated satisfactory performance of heuristic algorithms in addressing specific routing problems, few studies explore online updating (i.e., mission re-planning `on the fly') in the CSP context. Here we present a new offline and online mission planner leveraging a first-principles power consumption model that uses real-time state information and environmental information. The planner, namely Rapid Online Metaheuristic-based Planner (ROMP), supplements solutions from a Guided Local Search (GLS) with our Context-aware Black Hole Algorithm. Our results demonstrate that ROMP outperforms GLS in most cases tested. We developed and proposed FastROMP to speed up the online mission (re-)planning algorithm by introducing a new online adjustment operator that uses the latest state information as input, eliminating the need for re-initialization. FastROMP not only provides a better quality route, but it also significantly reduces computational time. The reduction ranges from 39.57% in sparse deployment to 93.3% in denser deployments.
abstract_zh: 无线可充电传感器网络（WRSN）中传感器节点的优化维护需要通过解决充电调度问题（CSP）来有效调度电力输送车辆。由于其移动性和灵活性，部署无人机（UAV）作为移动充电器已成为一种有前途的解决方案。 CSP 可以表述为混合整数非线性规划问题，其优化目标是在无人机电池约束内最大化传感器节点的充电能量。虽然许多研究已经证明启发式算法在解决特定路由问题方面具有令人满意的性能，但很少有研究探索 CSP 环境中的在线更新（即“动态”任务重新规划）。在这里，我们提出了一种新的离线和在线任务规划器，利用第一原理功耗模型，该模型使用实时状态信息和环境信息。该规划器，即基于元启发式的快速在线规划器 (ROMP)，通过我们的上下文感知黑洞算法补充了引导本地搜索 (GLS) 的解决方案。我们的结果表明，在大多数测试情况下，ROMP 的性能优于 GLS。我们开发并提出了 FastROMP，通过引入使用最新状态信息作为输入的新在线调整算子来加速在线任务（重新）规划算法，从而无需重新初始化。 FastROMP不仅提供了更好质量的路线，而且还显着减少了计算时间。减少范围从稀疏部署的 39.57% 到密集部署的 93.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合离线与在线任务规划的无人机无线充电优化方法，以解决无线可充电传感器网络中的充电调度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在充电调度问题（CSP）中缺乏对动态环境下的实时调整能力，需开发支持在线更新的高效算法以提升无人机充电效率。
AI.method: 提出Rapid Online Metaheuristic-based Planner（ROMP），融合引导局部搜索（GLS）与上下文感知黑洞算法，并设计FastROMP通过在线调整算子减少计算时间。
AI.result: 实验表明，ROMP在多数场景下优于GLS，FastROMP在稀疏部署中减少39.57%计算时间，在密集部署中减少高达93.3%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过实时状态信息调整任务规划，在保证充电质量的同时显著提升算法效率，适用于动态变化的无线传感器网络环境。

The reduction ranges from 39.57% in sparse deployment to 93.3% in denser deployments. 无线可充电传感器网络（WRSN）中传感器节点的优化维护需要通过解决充电调度问题（CSP）来有效调度电力输送车辆。由于其移动性和灵活性，部署无人机（UAV）作为移动充电器已成为一种有前途的解决方案。 CSP 可以表述为混合整数非线性规划问题，其优化目标是在无人机电池约束内最大化传感器节点的充电能量。虽然许多研究已经证明启发式算法在解决特定路由问题方面具有令人满意的性能，但很少有研究探索 CSP 环境中的在线更新（即“动态”任务重新规划）。在这里，我们提出了一种新的离线和在线任务规划器，利用第一原理功耗模型，该模型使用实时状态信息和环境信息。该规划器，即基于元启发式的快速在线规划器 (ROMP)，通过我们的上下文感知黑洞算法补充了引导本地搜索 (GLS) 的解决方案。我们的结果表明，在大多数测试情况下，ROMP 的性能优于 GLS。我们开发并提出了 FastROMP，通过引入使用最新状态信息作为输入的新在线调整算子来加速在线任务（重新）规划算法，从而无需重新初始化。 FastROMP不仅提供了更好质量的路线，而且还显着减少了计算时间。减少范围从稀疏部署的 39.57% 到密集部署的 93.3%。 本文提出了一种结合离线与在线任务规划的无人机无线充电优化方法，以解决无线可充电传感器网络中的充电调度问题。 Qiuchen Qian,James O'Keeffe,Yanran Wang,David Boyle cs.RO

authors_text: Simon Ott,Adriano Barbosa-Silva,Kathrin Blagec,Jan Brauner,Matthias Samwald
title: Mapping global dynamics of benchmark creation and saturation in artificial intelligence
title_zh: 绘制人工智能基准创建和饱和的全球动态
comment: This version includes more recent data and additional analyses
comments: This version includes more recent data and additional analyses
abstract: Benchmarks are crucial to measuring and steering progress in artificial intelligence (AI). However, recent studies raised concerns over the state of AI benchmarking, reporting issues such as benchmark overfitting, benchmark saturation and increasing centralization of benchmark dataset creation. To facilitate monitoring of the health of the AI benchmarking ecosystem, we introduce methodologies for creating condensed maps of the global dynamics of benchmark creation and saturation. We curated data for 3765 benchmarks covering the entire domains of computer vision and natural language processing, and show that a large fraction of benchmarks quickly trended towards near-saturation, that many benchmarks fail to find widespread utilization, and that benchmark performance gains for different AI tasks were prone to unforeseen bursts. We analyze attributes associated with benchmark popularity, and conclude that future benchmarks should emphasize versatility, breadth and real-world utility.
summary: Benchmarks are crucial to measuring and steering progress in artificial intelligence (AI). However, recent studies raised concerns over the state of AI benchmarking, reporting issues such as benchmark overfitting, benchmark saturation and increasing centralization of benchmark dataset creation. To facilitate monitoring of the health of the AI benchmarking ecosystem, we introduce methodologies for creating condensed maps of the global dynamics of benchmark creation and saturation. We curated data for 3765 benchmarks covering the entire domains of computer vision and natural language processing, and show that a large fraction of benchmarks quickly trended towards near-saturation, that many benchmarks fail to find widespread utilization, and that benchmark performance gains for different AI tasks were prone to unforeseen bursts. We analyze attributes associated with benchmark popularity, and conclude that future benchmarks should emphasize versatility, breadth and real-world utility.
abstract_zh: 基准对于衡量和指导人工智能 (AI) 的进展至关重要。然而，最近的研究引起了人们对人工智能基准测试现状的担忧，报告了基准过度拟合、基准饱和以及基准数据集创建日益集中化等问题。为了便于监控人工智能基准测试生态系统的健康状况，我们引入了创建基准创建和饱和全球动态简明地图的方法。我们整理了涵盖计算机视觉和自然语言处理整个领域的 3765 个基准测试的数据，结果表明，很大一部分基准测试很快就趋于接近饱和，许多基准测试未能得到广泛利用，而且不同 AI 任务的基准性能增益很容易出现不可预见的爆发。我们分析了与基准受欢迎程度相关的属性，并得出结论：未来的基准应该强调多功能性、广度和现实世界的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析人工智能领域基准测试的创建与饱和动态，绘制全球基准生态系统的演变图谱。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试存在过拟合、饱和度上升及数据集创建集中化等问题，需建立方法监控基准生态健康状态。
AI.method: 收集3765个计算机视觉与自然语言处理领域基准数据，分析其动态趋势及流行度关联属性。
AI.result: 大量基准迅速饱和且利用率低，性能提升呈现突发性，基准流行度与多功能性、实际应用相关。
AI.conclusion: 未来基准设计应注重跨领域适应性、任务广度及现实场景实用性以提升价值。

authors_text: Ziqi Huang,Li Lin,Pujin Cheng,Linkai Peng,Xiaoying Tang
title: Multi-modal Brain Tumor Segmentation via Missing Modality Synthesis and Modality-level Attention Fusion
title_zh: 通过缺失模态合成和模态级注意力融合进行多模态脑肿瘤分割
abstract: Multi-modal magnetic resonance (MR) imaging provides great potential for diagnosing and analyzing brain gliomas. In clinical scenarios, common MR sequences such as T1, T2 and FLAIR can be obtained simultaneously in a single scanning process. However, acquiring contrast enhanced modalities such as T1ce requires additional time, cost, and injection of contrast agent. As such, it is clinically meaningful to develop a method to synthesize unavailable modalities which can also be used as additional inputs to downstream tasks (e.g., brain tumor segmentation) for performance enhancing. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework named Modality-Level Attention Fusion Network (MAF-Net), wherein we innovatively conduct patchwise contrastive learning for extracting multi-modal latent features and dynamically assigning attention weights to fuse different modalities. Through extensive experiments on BraTS2020, our proposed MAF-Net is found to yield superior T1ce synthesis performance (SSIM of 0.8879 and PSNR of 22.78) and accurate brain tumor segmentation (mean Dice scores of 67.9%, 41.8% and 88.0% on segmenting the tumor core, enhancing tumor and whole tumor).
summary: Multi-modal magnetic resonance (MR) imaging provides great potential for diagnosing and analyzing brain gliomas. In clinical scenarios, common MR sequences such as T1, T2 and FLAIR can be obtained simultaneously in a single scanning process. However, acquiring contrast enhanced modalities such as T1ce requires additional time, cost, and injection of contrast agent. As such, it is clinically meaningful to develop a method to synthesize unavailable modalities which can also be used as additional inputs to downstream tasks (e.g., brain tumor segmentation) for performance enhancing. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework named Modality-Level Attention Fusion Network (MAF-Net), wherein we innovatively conduct patchwise contrastive learning for extracting multi-modal latent features and dynamically assigning attention weights to fuse different modalities. Through extensive experiments on BraTS2020, our proposed MAF-Net is found to yield superior T1ce synthesis performance (SSIM of 0.8879 and PSNR of 22.78) and accurate brain tumor segmentation (mean Dice scores of 67.9%, 41.8% and 88.0% on segmenting the tumor core, enhancing tumor and whole tumor).
abstract_zh: 多模态磁共振（MR）成像为诊断和分析脑胶质瘤提供了巨大的潜力。在临床场景中，可以在一次扫描过程中同时获得T1、T2和FLAIR等常见MR序列。然而，获得 T1ce 等对比增强模式需要额外的时间、成本和注射造影剂。因此，开发一种合成不可用模式的方法具有临床意义，该方法也可以用作下游任务（例如脑肿瘤分割）的额外输入以提高性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为模态级注意力融合网络（MAF-Net）的端到端框架，其中我们创新性地进行补丁对比学习，以提取多模态潜在特征并动态分配注意力权重以融合不同模态。通过在 BraTS2020 上的大量实验，我们提出的 MAF-Net 被发现具有优异的 T1ce 合成性能（SSIM 为 0.8879，PSNR 为 22.78）和准确的脑肿瘤分割（在分割肿瘤核心、增强肿瘤和整个肿瘤方面的平均 Dice 分数分别为 67.9%、41.8% 和 88.0%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态脑肿瘤分割方法，通过合成缺失的MRI模态（如T1ce）并结合模态级注意力融合来提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 临床中获取所有MRI模态（如T1ce）需额外时间和成本，而缺失模态会影响脑肿瘤分割的准确性，因此需开发合成缺失模态并提升分割效果的方法。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架MAF-Net，通过块级对比学习提取多模态潜在特征，并动态分配注意力权重融合不同模态信息。
AI.result: 在BraTS2020数据集上，T1ce合成达到SSIM 0.8879和PSNR 22.78，肿瘤分割Dice分数分别为67.9%、41.8%和88.0%。
AI.conclusion: MAF-Net有效合成缺失模态并提升分割精度，为临床缺失数据场景下的脑肿瘤分析提供可行方案。

In clinical scenarios, common MR sequences such as T1, T2 and FLAIR can be obtained simultaneously in a single scanning process. However, acquiring contrast enhanced modalities such as T1ce requires additional time, cost, and injection of contrast agent. As such, it is clinically meaningful to develop a method to synthesize unavailable modalities which can also be used as additional inputs to downstream tasks (e.g., brain tumor segmentation) for performance enhancing. In this work, we propose an end-to-end framework named Modality-Level Attention Fusion Network (MAF-Net), wherein we innovatively conduct patchwise contrastive learning for extracting multi-modal latent features and dynamically assigning attention weights to fuse different modalities. authors_text: Yizhou Lu,Mingkun Huang,Xinghua Qu,Pengfei Wei,Zejun Ma
title: Language Adaptive Cross-lingual Speech Representation Learning with Sparse Sharing Sub-networks
title_zh: 具有稀疏共享子网络的语言自适应跨语言语音表示学习
abstract: Unsupervised cross-lingual speech representation learning (XLSR) has recently shown promising results in speech recognition by leveraging vast amounts of unlabeled data across multiple languages. However, standard XLSR model suffers from language interference problem due to the lack of language specific modeling ability. In this work, we investigate language adaptive training on XLSR models. More importantly, we propose a novel language adaptive pre-training approach based on sparse sharing sub-networks. It makes room for language specific modeling by pruning out unimportant parameters for each language, without requiring any manually designed language specific component. After pruning, each language only maintains a sparse sub-network, while the sub-networks are partially shared with each other. Experimental results on a downstream multilingual speech recognition task show that our proposed method significantly outperforms baseline XLSR models on both high resource and low resource languages. Besides, our proposed method consistently outperforms other adaptation methods and requires fewer parameters.
summary: Unsupervised cross-lingual speech representation learning (XLSR) has recently shown promising results in speech recognition by leveraging vast amounts of unlabeled data across multiple languages. However, standard XLSR model suffers from language interference problem due to the lack of language specific modeling ability. In this work, we investigate language adaptive training on XLSR models. More importantly, we propose a novel language adaptive pre-training approach based on sparse sharing sub-networks. It makes room for language specific modeling by pruning out unimportant parameters for each language, without requiring any manually designed language specific component. After pruning, each language only maintains a sparse sub-network, while the sub-networks are partially shared with each other. Experimental results on a downstream multilingual speech recognition task show that our proposed method significantly outperforms baseline XLSR models on both high resource and low resource languages. Besides, our proposed method consistently outperforms other adaptation methods and requires fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 无监督跨语言语音表示学习 (XLSR) 最近通过利用跨多种语言的大量未标记数据，在语音识别方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，标准XLSR模型由于缺乏特定于语言的建模能力而存在语言干扰问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了 XLSR 模型的语言自适应训练。更重要的是，我们提出了一种基于稀疏共享子网络的新型语言自适应预训练方法。它通过删除每种语言的不重要参数来为特定于语言的建模腾出空间，而不需要任何手动设计的特定于语言的组件。剪枝后，每种语言仅维护一个稀疏子网络，而子网络之间部分共享。下游多语言语音识别任务的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在高资源和低资源语言上都显着优于基线 XLSR 模型。此外，我们提出的方法始终优于其他适应方法并且需要更少的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏共享子网络的语言自适应跨语言语音表征学习方法，以解决标准XLSR模型的语言干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 标准XLSR模型因缺乏语言特定建模能力导致语言干扰，需在无需手动设计语言特定组件的情况下提升多语言语音识别性能。
AI.method: 通过剪枝去除各语言无关参数，构建部分共享的稀疏子网络，实现语言特定建模与参数共享的平衡。
AI.result: 在多语言语音识别任务中，该方法在高低资源语言上均显著优于基线XLSR模型及其他适配方法，且参数更少。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏共享子网络有效缓解语言干扰，通过自动参数剪枝实现跨语言表征学习的高效语言自适应。

search_text: Language Adaptive Cross-lingual Speech Representation Learning with Sparse Sharing Sub-networks 具有稀疏共享子网络的语言自适应跨语言语音表示学习 Unsupervised cross-lingual speech representation learning (XLSR) has recently shown promising results in speech recognition by leveraging vast amounts of unlabeled data across multiple languages. However, standard XLSR model suffers from language interference problem due to the lack of language specific modeling ability. In this work, we investigate language adaptive training on XLSR models. More importantly, we propose a novel language adaptive pre-training approach based on sparse sharing sub-networks. It makes room for language specific modeling by pruning out unimportant parameters for each language, without requiring any manually designed language specific component. After pruning, each language only maintains a sparse sub-network, while the sub-networks are partially shared with each other. Experimental results on a downstream multilingual speech recognition task show that our proposed method significantly outperforms baseline XLSR models on both high resource and low resource languages. Besides, our proposed method consistently outperforms other adaptation methods and requires fewer parameters. 无监督跨语言语音表示学习 (XLSR) 最近通过利用跨多种语言的大量未标记数据，在语音识别方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，标准XLSR模型由于缺乏特定于语言的建模能力而存在语言干扰问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了 XLSR 模型的语言自适应训练。更重要的是，我们提出了一种基于稀疏共享子网络的新型语言自适应预训练方法。它通过删除每种语言的不重要参数来为特定于语言的建模腾出空间，而不需要任何手动设计的特定于语言的组件。剪枝后，每种语言仅维护一个稀疏子网络，而子网络之间部分共享。下游多语言语音识别任务的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在高资源和低资源语言上都显着优于基线 XLSR 模型。此外，我们提出的方法始终优于其他适应方法并且需要更少的参数。 本文提出一种基于稀疏共享子网络的语言自适应跨语言语音表征学习方法，以解决标准XLSR模型的语言干扰问题。 Yizhou Lu,Mingkun Huang,Xinghua Qu,Pengfei Wei,Zejun Ma eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Damien Chablat,Rémi Prébet,Mohab Safey El Din,Durgesh Salunkhe,Philippe Wenger
title: Deciding Cuspidality of Manipulators through Computer Algebra and Algorithms in Real Algebraic Geometry
title_zh: 通过计算机代数和实代数几何算法确定机械臂的尖角
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, published in the Proceedings of ISSAC2022
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, published in the Proceedings of ISSAC2022
abstract: Cuspidal robots are robots with at least two inverse kinematic solutions that can be connected by a singularity-free path. Deciding the cuspidality of generic 3R robots has been studied in the past, but extending the study to six-degree-of-freedom robots can be a challenging problem. Many robots can be modeled as a polynomial map together with a real algebraic set so that the notion of cuspidality can be extended to these data. In this paper we design an algorithm that, on input a polynomial map in $n$ indeterminates, and $s$ polynomials in the same indeterminates describing a real algebraic set of dimension $d$, decides the cuspidality of the restriction of the map to the real algebraic set under consideration. Moreover, if $D$ and $τ$ are, respectively the maximum degree and the bound on the bit size of the coefficients of the input polynomials, this algorithm runs in time log-linear in $τ$ and polynomial in $((s+d)D)^{O(n^2)}$. It relies on many high-level algorithms in computer algebra which use advanced methods on real algebraic sets and critical loci of polynomial maps. As far as we know, this is the first algorithm that tackles the cuspidality problem from a general point of view.
summary: Cuspidal robots are robots with at least two inverse kinematic solutions that can be connected by a singularity-free path. Deciding the cuspidality of generic 3R robots has been studied in the past, but extending the study to six-degree-of-freedom robots can be a challenging problem. Many robots can be modeled as a polynomial map together with a real algebraic set so that the notion of cuspidality can be extended to these data. In this paper we design an algorithm that, on input a polynomial map in $n$ indeterminates, and $s$ polynomials in the same indeterminates describing a real algebraic set of dimension $d$, decides the cuspidality of the restriction of the map to the real algebraic set under consideration. Moreover, if $D$ and $τ$ are, respectively the maximum degree and the bound on the bit size of the coefficients of the input polynomials, this algorithm runs in time log-linear in $τ$ and polynomial in $((s+d)D)^{O(n^2)}$. It relies on many high-level algorithms in computer algebra which use advanced methods on real algebraic sets and critical loci of polynomial maps. As far as we know, this is the first algorithm that tackles the cuspidality problem from a general point of view.
abstract_zh: 尖瓣机器人是具有至少两个可通过无奇点路径连接的逆运动学解的机器人。过去已经研究过确定通用 3R 机器人的尖角，但将研究扩展到六自由度机器人可能是一个具有挑战性的问题。许多机器人可以与实代数集一起建模为多项式映射，以便尖度概念可以扩展到这些数据。在本文中，我们设计了一种算法，在输入 $n$ 不定式中的多项式映射和描述维度 $d$ 实代数集的相同不定式中的 $s$ 多项式时，决定映射对所考虑的实代数集的限制的尖锐性。此外，如果 $D$ 和 $τ$ 分别是输入多项式系数的最大次数和位大小的界限，则该算法在 $τ$ 中按时间对数线性运行，在 $((s+d)D)^{O(n^2)}$ 中按时间对数线性运行多项式。它依赖于计算机代数中的许多高级算法，这些算法在实代数集和多项式映射的关键轨迹上使用先进的方法。据我们所知，这是第一个从一般角度解决尖峰问题的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过计算机代数和实代数几何算法判断机械臂可挠性（Cuspidality）的通用方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究解决通用3R机械臂的可挠性判定问题，但扩展到六自由度机械臂仍面临挑战，需开发通用算法处理更复杂的多项式映射和实代数集。
AI.method: 设计基于多项式映射和实代数集的算法，结合计算机代数中的高级方法（如临界点计算）判定限制映射的可挠性，时间复杂度为log-线性于系数位数且多项式于输入参数的组合幂。
AI.result: 首次提出适用于通用多项式映射和实代数集的可挠性判定算法，并证明其时间复杂度上界。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为分析复杂机械臂的可挠性提供了理论框架和计算工具，推动了机器人学与代数几何的交叉研究。

authors_text: Michael Katz,Eli Kravchik
title: Reinforced Meta Active Learning
title_zh: 强化元主动学习
abstract: In stream-based active learning, the learning procedure typically has access to a stream of unlabeled data instances and must decide for each instance whether to label it and use it for training or to discard it. There are numerous active learning strategies which try to minimize the number of labeled samples required for training in this setting by identifying and retaining the most informative data samples. Most of these schemes are rule-based and rely on the notion of uncertainty, which captures how small the distance of a data sample is from the classifier's decision boundary. Recently, there have been some attempts to learn optimal selection strategies directly from the data, but many of them are still lacking generality for several reasons: 1) They focus on specific classification setups, 2) They rely on rule-based metrics, 3) They require offline pre-training of the active learner on related tasks. In this work we address the above limitations and present an online stream-based meta active learning method which learns on the fly an informativeness measure directly from the data, and is applicable to a general class of classification problems without any need for pretraining of the active learner on related tasks. The method is based on reinforcement learning and combines episodic policy search and a contextual bandits approach which are used to train the active learner in conjunction with training of the model. We demonstrate on several real datasets that this method learns to select training samples more efficiently than existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In stream-based active learning, the learning procedure typically has access to a stream of unlabeled data instances and must decide for each instance whether to label it and use it for training or to discard it. There are numerous active learning strategies which try to minimize the number of labeled samples required for training in this setting by identifying and retaining the most informative data samples. Most of these schemes are rule-based and rely on the notion of uncertainty, which captures how small the distance of a data sample is from the classifier's decision boundary. Recently, there have been some attempts to learn optimal selection strategies directly from the data, but many of them are still lacking generality for several reasons: 1) They focus on specific classification setups, 2) They rely on rule-based metrics, 3) They require offline pre-training of the active learner on related tasks. In this work we address the above limitations and present an online stream-based meta active learning method which learns on the fly an informativeness measure directly from the data, and is applicable to a general class of classification problems without any need for pretraining of the active learner on related tasks. The method is based on reinforcement learning and combines episodic policy search and a contextual bandits approach which are used to train the active learner in conjunction with training of the model. We demonstrate on several real datasets that this method learns to select training samples more efficiently than existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在基于流的主动学习中，学习过程通常可以访问未标记的数据实例流，并且必须为每个实例决定是对其进行标记并将其用于训练还是将其丢弃。有许多主动学习策略试图通过识别和保留信息最丰富的数据样本来最大程度地减少在此设置中训练所需的标记样本数量。这些方案大多数都是基于规则的，并依赖于不确定性的概念，它捕获数据样本与分类器决策边界的距离有多小。最近，已经有一些尝试直接从数据中学习最佳选择策略，但其中许多仍然缺乏通用性，原因如下：1）它们专注于特定的分类设置，2）它们依赖于基于规则的指标，3）它们需要对主动学习器进行相关任务的离线预训练。在这项工作中，我们解决了上述局限性，并提出了一种基于在线流的元主动学习方法，该方法直接从数据中即时学习信息量，并且适用于一般类别的分类问题，而不需要对主动学习器进行相关任务的预训练。该方法基于强化学习，结合了情景策略搜索和上下文强盗方法，用于结合模型训练来训练主动学习器。我们在几个真实数据集上证明，该方法比现有最先进的方法更有效地学习选择训练样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的在线流式元主动学习方法，直接从数据中学习信息度量，无需预训练即可适用于多种分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习策略依赖规则和不确定性度量，存在适用范围有限、需预训练等缺陷，缺乏通用性和在线学习能力。
AI.method: 结合强化学习中的经验策略搜索与上下文老虎机方法，通过在线流式数据动态学习信息度量，无需预训练相关任务。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上验证了该方法在样本选择效率上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的元主动学习框架克服了传统方法的局限性，实现了通用分类场景下的高效在线学习。

motivation: 现有主动学习策略依赖规则和不确定性度量，存在适用范围有限、需预训练等缺陷，缺乏通用性和在线学习能力。
method: 结合强化学习中的经验策略搜索与上下文老虎机方法，通过在线流式数据动态学习信息度量，无需预训练相关任务。
result: 在多个真实数据集上验证了该方法在样本选择效率上优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 提出的元主动学习框架克服了传统方法的局限性，实现了通用分类场景下的高效在线学习。
search_text: Reinforced Meta Active Learning 强化元主动学习 In stream-based active learning, the learning procedure typically has access to a stream of unlabeled data instances and must decide for each instance whether to label it and use it for training or to discard it. There are numerous active learning strategies which try to minimize the number of labeled samples required for training in this setting by identifying and retaining the most informative data samples. Most of these schemes are rule-based and rely on the notion of uncertainty, which captures how small the distance of a data sample is from the classifier's decision boundary. Recently, there have been some attempts to learn optimal selection strategies directly from the data, but many of them are still lacking generality for several reasons: 1) They focus on specific classification setups, 2) They rely on rule-based metrics, 3) They require offline pre-training of the active learner on related tasks. In this work we address the above limitations and present an online stream-based meta active learning method which learns on the fly an informativeness measure directly from the data, and is applicable to a general class of classification problems without any need for pretraining of the active learner on related tasks. The method is based on reinforcement learning and combines episodic policy search and a contextual bandits approach which are used to train the active learner in conjunction with training of the model. We demonstrate on several real datasets that this method learns to select training samples more efficiently than existing state-of-the-art methods. 在基于流的主动学习中，学习过程通常可以访问未标记的数据实例流，并且必须为每个实例决定是对其进行标记并将其用于训练还是将其丢弃。有许多主动学习策略试图通过识别和保留信息最丰富的数据样本来最大程度地减少在此设置中训练所需的标记样本数量。这些方案大多数都是基于规则的，并依赖于不确定性的概念，它捕获数据样本与分类器决策边界的距离有多小。最近，已经有一些尝试直接从数据中学习最佳选择策略，但其中许多仍然缺乏通用性，原因如下：1）它们专注于特定的分类设置，2）它们依赖于基于规则的指标，3）它们需要对主动学习器进行相关任务的离线预训练。在这项工作中，我们解决了上述局限性，并提出了一种基于在线流的元主动学习方法，该方法直接从数据中即时学习信息量，并且适用于一般类别的分类问题，而不需要对主动学习器进行相关任务的预训练。该方法基于强化学习，结合了情景策略搜索和上下文强盗方法，用于结合模型训练来训练主动学习器。我们在几个真实数据集上证明，该方法比现有最先进的方法更有效地学习选择训练样本。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的在线流式元主动学习方法，直接从数据中学习信息度量，无需预训练即可适用于多种分类任务。 Michael Katz,Eli Kravchik cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Michael Hersche,Mustafa Zeqiri,Luca Benini,Abu Sebastian,Abbas Rahimi
title: A Neuro-vector-symbolic Architecture for Solving Raven's Progressive Matrices
title_zh: 用于求解 Raven 渐进矩阵的神经向量符号架构
comment: Updated version with additional NVSA end-to-end training, generalization experiments, and PGM experiments
comments: Updated version with additional NVSA end-to-end training, generalization experiments, and PGM experiments
abstract: Neither deep neural networks nor symbolic AI alone has approached the kind of intelligence expressed in humans. This is mainly because neural networks are not able to decompose joint representations to obtain distinct objects (the so-called binding problem), while symbolic AI suffers from exhaustive rule searches, among other problems. These two problems are still pronounced in neuro-symbolic AI which aims to combine the best of the two paradigms. Here, we show that the two problems can be addressed with our proposed neuro-vector-symbolic architecture (NVSA) by exploiting its powerful operators on high-dimensional distributed representations that serve as a common language between neural networks and symbolic AI. The efficacy of NVSA is demonstrated by solving the Raven's progressive matrices datasets. Compared to state-of-the-art deep neural network and neuro-symbolic approaches, end-to-end training of NVSA achieves a new record of 87.7% average accuracy in RAVEN, and 88.1% in I-RAVEN datasets. Moreover, compared to the symbolic reasoning within the neuro-symbolic approaches, the probabilistic reasoning of NVSA with less expensive operations on the distributed representations is two orders of magnitude faster. Our code is available at https://github.com/IBM/neuro-vector-symbolic-architectures.
summary: Neither deep neural networks nor symbolic AI alone has approached the kind of intelligence expressed in humans. This is mainly because neural networks are not able to decompose joint representations to obtain distinct objects (the so-called binding problem), while symbolic AI suffers from exhaustive rule searches, among other problems. These two problems are still pronounced in neuro-symbolic AI which aims to combine the best of the two paradigms. Here, we show that the two problems can be addressed with our proposed neuro-vector-symbolic architecture (NVSA) by exploiting its powerful operators on high-dimensional distributed representations that serve as a common language between neural networks and symbolic AI. The efficacy of NVSA is demonstrated by solving the Raven's progressive matrices datasets. Compared to state-of-the-art deep neural network and neuro-symbolic approaches, end-to-end training of NVSA achieves a new record of 87.7% average accuracy in RAVEN, and 88.1% in I-RAVEN datasets. Moreover, compared to the symbolic reasoning within the neuro-symbolic approaches, the probabilistic reasoning of NVSA with less expensive operations on the distributed representations is two orders of magnitude faster. Our code is available at https://github.com/IBM/neuro-vector-symbolic-architectures.
abstract_zh: 无论是深度神经网络还是符号人工智能本身都无法达到人类所表达的智能。这主要是因为神经网络无法分解联合表示以获得不同的对象（所谓的绑定问题），而符号人工智能则面临着详尽的规则搜索等问题。这两个问题在神经符号人工智能中仍然很明显，神经符号人工智能旨在结合两种范式的优点。在这里，我们表明，通过利用我们提出的神经向量符号架构（NVSA）在高维分布式表示上的强大算子（作为神经网络和符号人工智能之间的通用语言）可以解决这两个问题。 NVSA 的功效通过求解 Raven 渐进矩阵数据集得到证明。与最先进的深度神经网络和神经符号方法相比，NVSA 的端到端训练在 RAVEN 中达到了 87.7% 的平均准确率，在 I-RAVEN 数据集中达到了 88.1% 的新纪录。此外，与神经符号方法中的符号推理相比，NVSA 的概率推理在分布式表示上使用成本较低的操作，速度快了两个数量级。我们的代码可从 https://github.com/IBM/neuro-vector-symbolic-architectures 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经矢量符号架构（NVSA），结合神经网络与符号AI优势，解决瑞文推理题中的绑定问题与规则搜索效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络无法分解联合表示获取独立对象（绑定问题），符号AI则因规则搜索效率低下，现有神经符号AI仍存在这些问题，需新方法突破。
AI.method: 设计NVSA架构，利用高维分布式表示作为神经网络与符号AI的通用语言，通过高效操作实现概率推理与符号操作的结合。
AI.result: 在RAVEN和I-RAVEN数据集上分别达到87.7%和88.1%的平均准确率，较现有方法提升显著；分布式表示操作速度比符号推理快两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: NVSA通过统一高维表示有效融合神经与符号方法，在复杂推理任务中展现优越性能，为神经符号AI提供新方向。

authors_text: Zhuoran Song,Yihong Xu,Zhezhi He,Li Jiang,Naifeng Jing,Xiaoyao Liang
title: CP-ViT: Cascade Vision Transformer Pruning via Progressive Sparsity Prediction
title_zh: CP-ViT：通过渐进稀疏性预测进行级联视觉变压器修剪
abstract: Vision transformer (ViT) has achieved competitive accuracy on a variety of computer vision applications, but its computational cost impedes the deployment on resource-limited mobile devices. We explore the sparsity in ViT and observe that informative patches and heads are sufficient for accurate image recognition. In this paper, we propose a cascade pruning framework named CP-ViT by predicting sparsity in ViT models progressively and dynamically to reduce computational redundancy while minimizing the accuracy loss. Specifically, we define the cumulative score to reserve the informative patches and heads across the ViT model for better accuracy. We also propose the dynamic pruning ratio adjustment technique based on layer-aware attention range. CP-ViT has great general applicability for practical deployment, which can be applied to a wide range of ViT models and can achieve superior accuracy with or without fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 with various pre-trained models have demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of CP-ViT. By progressively pruning 50\% patches, our CP-ViT method reduces over 40\% FLOPs while maintaining accuracy loss within 1\%.
summary: Vision transformer (ViT) has achieved competitive accuracy on a variety of computer vision applications, but its computational cost impedes the deployment on resource-limited mobile devices. We explore the sparsity in ViT and observe that informative patches and heads are sufficient for accurate image recognition. In this paper, we propose a cascade pruning framework named CP-ViT by predicting sparsity in ViT models progressively and dynamically to reduce computational redundancy while minimizing the accuracy loss. Specifically, we define the cumulative score to reserve the informative patches and heads across the ViT model for better accuracy. We also propose the dynamic pruning ratio adjustment technique based on layer-aware attention range. CP-ViT has great general applicability for practical deployment, which can be applied to a wide range of ViT models and can achieve superior accuracy with or without fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 with various pre-trained models have demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of CP-ViT. By progressively pruning 50\% patches, our CP-ViT method reduces over 40\% FLOPs while maintaining accuracy loss within 1\%.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）在各种计算机视觉应用中实现了具有竞争力的精度，但其计算成本阻碍了在资源有限的移动设备上的部署。我们探索了 ViT 的稀疏性，并观察到信息丰富的补丁和头部足以进行准确的图像识别。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CP-ViT 的级联剪枝框架，通过逐步动态地预测 ViT 模型中的稀疏性来减少计算冗余，同时最小化精度损失。具体来说，我们定义累积分数来保留 ViT 模型中的信息补丁和头部，以获得更好的准确性。我们还提出了基于层感知注意力范围的动态剪枝比率调整技术。 CP-ViT对于实际部署具有很强的通用性，可以应用于广泛的ViT模型，并且无论是否进行微调都可以达到较高的精度。使用各种预训练模型在 ImageNet、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上进行的大量实验证明了 CP-ViT 的有效性和效率。通过逐步修剪 50% 的补丁，我们的 CP-ViT 方法减少了超过 40% 的 FLOP，同时将精度损失保持在 1% 以内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CP-ViT方法，通过渐进式稀疏性预测对视觉Transformer（ViT）进行级联剪枝，在保持精度的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: ViT在计算机视觉任务中表现优异，但其高计算成本限制了在移动端的部署。观察到图像识别中仅有部分patch和注意力头具有关键信息，因此需设计高效剪枝方法以减少冗余计算。
AI.method: 提出级联剪枝框架CP-ViT，通过动态预测ViT模型各层的稀疏性，结合层感知注意力范围的动态剪枝比例调整技术，利用累积评分保留关键patch和注意力头。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、CIFAR-10/100数据集上，通过渐进式剪枝50%的patch，CP-ViT在无需微调的情况下实现超过40%的FLOPs减少且精度损失小于1%。
AI.conclusion: CP-ViT为ViT模型在资源受限设备上的部署提供了通用高效的解决方案，在保持模型精度的前提下显著提升了计算效率。

search_text: CP-ViT: Cascade Vision Transformer Pruning via Progressive Sparsity Prediction CP-ViT：通过渐进稀疏性预测进行级联视觉变压器修剪 Vision transformer (ViT) has achieved competitive accuracy on a variety of computer vision applications, but its computational cost impedes the deployment on resource-limited mobile devices. We explore the sparsity in ViT and observe that informative patches and heads are sufficient for accurate image recognition. In this paper, we propose a cascade pruning framework named CP-ViT by predicting sparsity in ViT models progressively and dynamically to reduce computational redundancy while minimizing the accuracy loss. Specifically, we define the cumulative score to reserve the informative patches and heads across the ViT model for better accuracy. We also propose the dynamic pruning ratio adjustment technique based on layer-aware attention range. CP-ViT has great general applicability for practical deployment, which can be applied to a wide range of ViT models and can achieve superior accuracy with or without fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 with various pre-trained models have demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of CP-ViT. By progressively pruning 50\% patches, our CP-ViT method reduces over 40\% FLOPs while maintaining accuracy loss within 1\%. 视觉变换器（ViT）在各种计算机视觉应用中实现了具有竞争力的精度，但其计算成本阻碍了在资源有限的移动设备上的部署。我们探索了 ViT 的稀疏性，并观察到信息丰富的补丁和头部足以进行准确的图像识别。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CP-ViT 的级联剪枝框架，通过逐步动态地预测 ViT 模型中的稀疏性来减少计算冗余，同时最小化精度损失。具体来说，我们定义累积分数来保留 ViT 模型中的信息补丁和头部，以获得更好的准确性。我们还提出了基于层感知注意力范围的动态剪枝比率调整技术。 CP-ViT对于实际部署具有很强的通用性，可以应用于广泛的ViT模型，并且无论是否进行微调都可以达到较高的精度。使用各种预训练模型在 ImageNet、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上进行的大量实验证明了 CP-ViT 的有效性和效率。通过逐步修剪 50% 的补丁，我们的 CP-ViT 方法减少了超过 40% 的 FLOP，同时将精度损失保持在 1% 以内。 本文提出CP-ViT方法，通过渐进式稀疏性预测对视觉Transformer（ViT）进行级联剪枝，在保持精度的同时显著降低计算成本。 Zhuoran Song,Yihong Xu,Zhezhi He,Li Jiang,Naifeng Jing,Xiaoyao Liang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Wentao Liu,Tong Tian,Weijin Xu,Huihua Yang,Xipeng Pan,Songlin Yan,Lemeng Wang
title: PHTrans: Parallelly Aggregating Global and Local Representations for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: PHTrans：并行聚合医学图像分割的全局和局部表示
abstract: The success of Transformer in computer vision has attracted increasing attention in the medical imaging community. Especially for medical image segmentation, many excellent hybrid architectures based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Transformer have been presented and achieve impressive performance. However, most of these methods, which embed modular Transformer into CNNs, struggle to reach their full potential. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid architecture for medical image segmentation called PHTrans, which parallelly hybridizes Transformer and CNN in main building blocks to produce hierarchical representations from global and local features and adaptively aggregate them, aiming to fully exploit their strengths to obtain better segmentation performance. Specifically, PHTrans follows the U-shaped encoder-decoder design and introduces the parallel hybird module in deep stages, where convolution blocks and the modified 3D Swin Transformer learn local features and global dependencies separately, then a sequence-to-volume operation unifies the dimensions of the outputs to achieve feature aggregation. Extensive experimental results on both Multi-Atlas Labeling Beyond the Cranial Vault and Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challeng datasets corroborate its effectiveness, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at: https://github.com/lseventeen/PHTrans.
summary: The success of Transformer in computer vision has attracted increasing attention in the medical imaging community. Especially for medical image segmentation, many excellent hybrid architectures based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Transformer have been presented and achieve impressive performance. However, most of these methods, which embed modular Transformer into CNNs, struggle to reach their full potential. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid architecture for medical image segmentation called PHTrans, which parallelly hybridizes Transformer and CNN in main building blocks to produce hierarchical representations from global and local features and adaptively aggregate them, aiming to fully exploit their strengths to obtain better segmentation performance. Specifically, PHTrans follows the U-shaped encoder-decoder design and introduces the parallel hybird module in deep stages, where convolution blocks and the modified 3D Swin Transformer learn local features and global dependencies separately, then a sequence-to-volume operation unifies the dimensions of the outputs to achieve feature aggregation. Extensive experimental results on both Multi-Atlas Labeling Beyond the Cranial Vault and Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challeng datasets corroborate its effectiveness, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at: https://github.com/lseventeen/PHTrans.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在计算机视觉领域的成功引起了医学成像界越来越多的关注。特别是对于医学图像分割，许多基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和 Transformer 的优秀混合架构已经被提出并取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，大多数将模块化 Transformer 嵌入到 CNN 中的方法都难以充分发挥其潜力。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 PHTrans 的新型医学图像分割混合架构，它在主要构建块中并行混合 Transformer 和 CNN，从全局和局部特征生成层次表示并自适应聚合它们，旨在充分利用它们的优势以获得更好的分割性能。具体来说，PHTrans遵循U形编码器-解码器设计，并在深层引入并行混合模块，其中卷积块和改进的3D Swin Transformer分别学习局部特征和全局依赖关系，然后序列到体积操作统一输出的维度以实现特征聚合。在颅穹外多图谱标记和自动心脏诊断挑战数据集上的大量实验结果证实了其有效性，始终优于最先进的方法。该代码位于：https://github.com/lseventeen/PHTrans。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PHTrans的混合架构，用于医学图像分割，通过并行结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer模块，以充分利用局部和全局特征。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN和Transformer的混合方法在医学图像分割中未能充分发挥两者潜力，因此需要一种更有效的融合方式以提升性能。
AI.method: PHTrans采用U型编码器-解码器结构，在深层阶段引入并行混合模块，其中卷积块与改进的3D Swin Transformer分别提取局部特征和全局依赖，再通过序列到体积操作进行特征聚合。
AI.result: 在Multi-Atlas Labeling Beyond the Cranial Vault和Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challenge数据集上的实验表明，PHTrans优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PHTrans通过并行融合CNN与Transformer的优势，有效提升了医学图像分割的性能。

authors_text: Brijen Thananjeyan,Justin Kerr,Huang Huang,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Ken Goldberg
title: All You Need is LUV: Unsupervised Collection of Labeled Images using Invisible UV Fluorescent Indicators
title_zh: 您所需要的只是 LUV：使用不可见 UV 荧光指示器无监督地收集标记图像
abstract: Large-scale semantic image annotation is a significant challenge for learning-based perception systems in robotics. Current approaches often rely on human labelers, which can be expensive, or simulation data, which can visually or physically differ from real data. This paper proposes Labels from UltraViolet (LUV), a novel framework that enables rapid, labeled data collection in real manipulation environments without human labeling. LUV uses transparent, ultraviolet-fluorescent paint with programmable ultraviolet LEDs to collect paired images of a scene in standard lighting and UV lighting to autonomously extract segmentation masks and keypoints via color segmentation. We apply LUV to a suite of diverse robot perception tasks to evaluate its labeling quality, flexibility, and data collection rate. Results suggest that LUV is 180-2500 times faster than a human labeler across the tasks. We show that LUV provides labels consistent with human annotations on unpainted test images. The networks trained on these labels are used to smooth and fold crumpled towels with 83% success rate and achieve 1.7mm position error with respect to human labels on a surgical needle pose estimation task. The low cost of LUV makes it ideal as a lightweight replacement for human labeling systems, with the one-time setup costs at $300 equivalent to the cost of collecting around 200 semantic segmentation labels on Amazon Mechanical Turk. Code, datasets, visualizations, and supplementary material can be found at https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/luv

Current approaches often rely on human labelers, which can be expensive, or simulation data, which can visually or physically differ from real data. This paper proposes Labels from UltraViolet (LUV), a novel framework that enables rapid, labeled data collection in real manipulation environments without human labeling. abstract_zh: 大规模语义图像注释是机器人中基于学习的感知系统的重大挑战。目前的方法通常依赖于人工贴标机（这可能很昂贵）或模拟数据（在视觉上或物理上可能与真实数据不同）。本文提出了 UltraViolet 标签（LUV），这是一种新颖的框架，可以在真实操作环境中快速收集标记数据，而无需人工标记。 LUV 使用透明的紫外线荧光涂料和可编程紫外线 LED 来收集标准照明和紫外线照明下场景的配对图像，通过颜色分割自动提取分割掩模和关键点。我们将 LUV 应用于一系列不同的机器人感知任务，以评估其标签质量、灵活性和数据收集率。结果表明，LUV 在执行任务时比人类贴标员快 180-2500 倍。我们证明 LUV 在未绘制的测试图像上提供了与人类注释一致的标签。在这些标签上训练的网络用于平滑和折叠皱巴巴的毛巾，成功率高达 83%，并且在手术针姿态估计任务中相对于人类标签实现 1.7 毫米的位置误差。 LUV 的低成本使其成为人工标签系统的轻量级替代品的理想选择，一次性设置成本为 300 美元，相当于在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上收集约 200 个语义分割标签的成本。代码、数据集、可视化和补充材料可以在 https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/luv 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出LUV框架，通过不可见紫外线荧光标记实现机器人环境中无需人工标注的图像自动标注。
AI.motivation: 大规模语义图像标注依赖人工标注或仿真数据，但人工成本高且仿真数据与真实数据存在差异，亟需低成本高效的自动标注方案。
AI.method: 使用透明紫外线荧光涂料与可编程UV LED，通过标准光与UV光下图像配对，利用颜色分割自动提取分割掩码和关键点。
AI.result: LUV在多个任务中比人工标注快180-2500倍，标注结果与人工标注一致，成功完成毛巾折叠（83%成功率）和手术针位姿估计（1.7mm误差），单次设置成本仅300美元。
AI.conclusion: LUV提供了一种低成本、高效的替代方案，可作为人工标注系统的轻量级替代，显著提升机器人感知任务的数据收集效率。

Code, datasets, visualizations, and supplementary material can be found at https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/luv 大规模语义图像注释是机器人中基于学习的感知系统的重大挑战。目前的方法通常依赖于人工贴标机（这可能很昂贵）或模拟数据（在视觉上或物理上可能与真实数据不同）。本文提出了 UltraViolet 标签（LUV），这是一种新颖的框架，可以在真实操作环境中快速收集标记数据，而无需人工标记。 LUV 使用透明的紫外线荧光涂料和可编程紫外线 LED 来收集标准照明和紫外线照明下场景的配对图像，通过颜色分割自动提取分割掩模和关键点。我们将 LUV 应用于一系列不同的机器人感知任务，以评估其标签质量、灵活性和数据收集率。结果表明，LUV 在执行任务时比人类贴标员快 180-2500 倍。我们证明 LUV 在未绘制的测试图像上提供了与人类注释一致的标签。在这些标签上训练的网络用于平滑和折叠皱巴巴的毛巾，成功率高达 83%，并且在手术针姿态估计任务中相对于人类标签实现 1.7 毫米的位置误差。 LUV 的低成本使其成为人工标签系统的轻量级替代品的理想选择，一次性设置成本为 300 美元，相当于在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上收集约 200 个语义分割标签的成本。代码、数据集、可视化和补充材料可以在 https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/luv 找到 本文提出LUV框架，通过不可见紫外线荧光标记实现机器人环境中无需人工标注的图像自动标注。 Brijen Thananjeyan,Justin Kerr,Huang Huang,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Ken Goldberg cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Chao Xu,Jiangning Zhang,Miao Hua,Qian He,Zili Yi,Yong Liu
title: Region-Aware Face Swapping
title_zh: 区域感知面部交换
abstract: This paper presents a novel Region-Aware Face Swapping (RAFSwap) network to achieve identity-consistent harmonious high-resolution face generation in a local-global manner: \textbf{1)} Local Facial Region-Aware (FRA) branch augments local identity-relevant features by introducing the Transformer to effectively model misaligned cross-scale semantic interaction. \textbf{2)} Global Source Feature-Adaptive (SFA) branch further complements global identity-relevant cues for generating identity-consistent swapped faces. Besides, we propose a \textit{Face Mask Predictor} (FMP) module incorporated with StyleGAN2 to predict identity-relevant soft facial masks in an unsupervised manner that is more practical for generating harmonious high-resolution faces. Abundant experiments qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the superiority of our method for generating more identity-consistent high-resolution swapped faces over SOTA methods, \eg, obtaining 96.70 ID retrieval that outperforms SOTA MegaFS by 5.87$\uparrow$.
summary: This paper presents a novel Region-Aware Face Swapping (RAFSwap) network to achieve identity-consistent harmonious high-resolution face generation in a local-global manner: \textbf{1)} Local Facial Region-Aware (FRA) branch augments local identity-relevant features by introducing the Transformer to effectively model misaligned cross-scale semantic interaction. \textbf{2)} Global Source Feature-Adaptive (SFA) branch further complements global identity-relevant cues for generating identity-consistent swapped faces. Besides, we propose a \textit{Face Mask Predictor} (FMP) module incorporated with StyleGAN2 to predict identity-relevant soft facial masks in an unsupervised manner that is more practical for generating harmonious high-resolution faces. Abundant experiments qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the superiority of our method for generating more identity-consistent high-resolution swapped faces over SOTA methods, \eg, obtaining 96.70 ID retrieval that outperforms SOTA MegaFS by 5.87$\uparrow$.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的区域感知面部交换（RAFSwap）网络，以局部全局方式实现身份一致的和谐高分辨率面部生成： \textbf{1)} 局部面部区域感知（FRA）分支通过引入 Transformer 来有效地建模未对齐的跨尺度语义交互，从而增强了局部身份相关特征。 \textbf{2)} 全局源特征自适应（SFA）分支进一步补充了全局身份相关线索，用于生成身份一致的交换面孔。此外，我们提出了一个与 StyleGAN2 结合的 \textit{Face Mask Predictor} (FMP) 模块，以无监督的方式预测与身份相关的软面膜，这对于生成和谐的高分辨率面部更加实用。大量的实验定性和定量地证明了我们的方法在生成更多身份一致的高分辨率交换面孔方面优于 SOTA 方法，例如，获得 96.70 ID 检索，比 SOTA MegaFS 好 5.87$\uparrow$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种区域感知的换脸网络RAFSwap，通过局部与全局特征融合生成高分辨率且身份一致的换脸结果。
AI.motivation: 现有换脸方法在处理跨尺度语义交互和身份一致性时存在不足，难以生成高质量高分辨率的和谐人脸。
AI.method: 设计局部面部区域感知分支（FRA）与全局源特征自适应分支（SFA），结合Transformer建模跨尺度语义，并引入StyleGAN2的面部掩码预测模块（FMP）实现无监督软掩码预测。
AI.result: 在ID检索任务中达到96.70分，较SOTA方法MegaFS提升5.87分，生成效果在定性和定量实验中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RAFSwap通过区域感知的局部-全局特征融合机制，有效解决了高分辨率换脸中的身份一致性与视觉和谐性难题。

authors_text: Shreyansh Daftry,Neil Abcouwer,Tyler Del Sesto,Siddarth Venkatraman,Jialin Song,Lucas Igel,Amos Byon,Ugo Rosolia,Yisong Yue,Masahiro Ono
title: MLNav: Learning to Safely Navigate on Martian Terrains
title_zh: MLNav：学习在火星地形上安全导航
comment: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) and ICRA 2022
comments: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) and ICRA 2022
abstract: We present MLNav, a learning-enhanced path planning framework for safety-critical and resource-limited systems operating in complex environments, such as rovers navigating on Mars. MLNav makes judicious use of machine learning to enhance the efficiency of path planning while fully respecting safety constraints. In particular, the dominant computational cost in such safety-critical settings is running a model-based safety checker on the proposed paths. Our learned search heuristic can simultaneously predict the feasibility for all path options in a single run, and the model-based safety checker is only invoked on the top-scoring paths. We validate in high-fidelity simulations using both real Martian terrain data collected by the Perseverance rover, as well as a suite of challenging synthetic terrains. Our experiments show that: (i) compared to the baseline ENav path planner on board the Perserverance rover, MLNav can provide a significant improvement in multiple key metrics, such as a 10x reduction in collision checks when navigating real Martian terrains, despite being trained with synthetic terrains; and (ii) MLNav can successfully navigate highly challenging terrains where the baseline ENav fails to find a feasible path before timing out.
summary: We present MLNav, a learning-enhanced path planning framework for safety-critical and resource-limited systems operating in complex environments, such as rovers navigating on Mars. MLNav makes judicious use of machine learning to enhance the efficiency of path planning while fully respecting safety constraints. In particular, the dominant computational cost in such safety-critical settings is running a model-based safety checker on the proposed paths. Our learned search heuristic can simultaneously predict the feasibility for all path options in a single run, and the model-based safety checker is only invoked on the top-scoring paths. We validate in high-fidelity simulations using both real Martian terrain data collected by the Perseverance rover, as well as a suite of challenging synthetic terrains. Our experiments show that: (i) compared to the baseline ENav path planner on board the Perserverance rover, MLNav can provide a significant improvement in multiple key metrics, such as a 10x reduction in collision checks when navigating real Martian terrains, despite being trained with synthetic terrains; and (ii) MLNav can successfully navigate highly challenging terrains where the baseline ENav fails to find a feasible path before timing out.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MLNav，这是一种学习增强型路径规划框架，适用于在复杂环境中运行的安全关键和资源有限的系统，例如在火星上导航的漫游车。 MLNav 明智地利用机器学习来提高路径规划的效率，同时充分尊重安全约束。特别是，在这种安全关键设置中，主要的计算成本是在建议的路径上运行基于模型的安全检查器。我们学习的搜索启发式可以在一次运行中同时预测所有路径选项的可行性，并且基于模型的安全检查器仅在得分最高的路径上调用。我们使用毅力号火星车收集的真实火星地形数据以及一系列具有挑战性的合成地形进行高保真模拟验证。我们的实验表明：(i) 与 Perserverance 漫游车上的基线 ENav 路径规划器相比，MLNav 可以在多个关键指标上提供显着改进，例如，尽管经过合成地形训练，但在导航真实火星地形时，碰撞检查减少了 10 倍； (ii) MLNav 可以成功地导航极具挑战性的地形，其中基线 ENav 在超时之前无法找到可行的路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MLNav，一种利用机器学习提升火星地形导航安全性和效率的路径规划框架。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划在复杂火星地形中需频繁运行安全检查器，导致计算成本高且效率低，尤其在资源受限的火星车任务中亟需优化。
AI.method: 通过学习搜索启发式方法，MLNav可一次性预测所有路径选项的可行性，仅对高分路径调用安全检查器，减少计算开销。
AI.result: 在真实火星地形与合成地形的仿真中，MLNav相比基线ENav减少10倍碰撞检查，并成功解决ENav因超时未找到可行路径的复杂场景。
AI.conclusion: MLNav在保持安全约束的前提下显著提升路径规划效率，适用于资源受限的安全关键系统。

authors_text: Ziting Wen,Oscar Pizarro,Stefan Williams
title: Active Self-Semi-Supervised Learning for Few Labeled Samples
title_zh: 针对少量标记样本的主动自半监督学习
abstract: Training deep models with limited annotations poses a significant challenge when applied to diverse practical domains. Employing semi-supervised learning alongside the self-supervised model offers the potential to enhance label efficiency. However, this approach faces a bottleneck in reducing the need for labels. We observed that the semi-supervised model disrupts valuable information from self-supervised learning when only limited labels are available. To address this issue, this paper proposes a simple yet effective framework, active self-semi-supervised learning (AS3L). AS3L bootstraps semi-supervised models with prior pseudo-labels (PPL). These PPLs are obtained by label propagation over self-supervised features. Based on the observations the accuracy of PPL is not only affected by the quality of features but also by the selection of the labeled samples. We develop active learning and label propagation strategies to obtain accurate PPL. Consequently, our framework can significantly improve the performance of models in the case of limited annotations while demonstrating fast convergence. On the image classification tasks across four datasets, our method outperforms the baseline by an average of 5.4\%. Additionally, it achieves the same accuracy as the baseline method in about 1/3 of the training time.
summary: Training deep models with limited annotations poses a significant challenge when applied to diverse practical domains. Employing semi-supervised learning alongside the self-supervised model offers the potential to enhance label efficiency. However, this approach faces a bottleneck in reducing the need for labels. We observed that the semi-supervised model disrupts valuable information from self-supervised learning when only limited labels are available. To address this issue, this paper proposes a simple yet effective framework, active self-semi-supervised learning (AS3L). AS3L bootstraps semi-supervised models with prior pseudo-labels (PPL). These PPLs are obtained by label propagation over self-supervised features. Based on the observations the accuracy of PPL is not only affected by the quality of features but also by the selection of the labeled samples. We develop active learning and label propagation strategies to obtain accurate PPL. Consequently, our framework can significantly improve the performance of models in the case of limited annotations while demonstrating fast convergence. On the image classification tasks across four datasets, our method outperforms the baseline by an average of 5.4\%. Additionally, it achieves the same accuracy as the baseline method in about 1/3 of the training time.
abstract_zh: 当应用于不同的实际领域时，训练具有有限注释的深度模型提出了重大挑战。将半监督学习与自监督模型结合使用可以提高标签效率。然而，这种方法在减少标签需求方面面临着瓶颈。我们观察到，当只有有限的标签可用时，半监督模型会破坏来自自我监督学习的有价值的信息。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一个简单而有效的框架，即主动自半监督学习（AS3L）。 AS3L 使用先验伪标签 (PPL) 引导半监督模型。这些 PPL 是通过自监督特征上的标签传播获得的。根据观察，PPL 的准确性不仅受到特征质量的影响，还受到标记样本选择的影响。我们开发主动学习和标签传播策略以获得准确的 PPL。因此，我们的框架可以在注释有限的情况下显着提高模型的性能，同时展示快速收敛。在四个数据集的图像分类任务中，我们的方法平均优于基线 5.4%。此外，它在大约 1/3 的训练时间内达到了与基线方法相同的精度。

AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，使用深度模型时标注数据有限，半监督学习结合自监督学习虽能提高标签效率，但存在标签需求减少的瓶颈。
AI.method: AS3L通过利用自监督特征进行标签传播获得先验伪标签（PPL），并结合主动学习和标签传播策略，以获得更准确的PPL。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的图像分类任务中，该方法平均优于基线方法5.4%，并且在约三分之一的训练时间内达到与基线方法相同的准确率。
AI.conclusion: AS3L框架在有限标注样本情况下显著提升了模型性能，并且具有快速收敛的优势。

search_text: Active Self-Semi-Supervised Learning for Few Labeled Samples 针对少量标记样本的主动自半监督学习 Training deep models with limited annotations poses a significant challenge when applied to diverse practical domains. Employing semi-supervised learning alongside the self-supervised model offers the potential to enhance label efficiency. However, this approach faces a bottleneck in reducing the need for labels. We observed that the semi-supervised model disrupts valuable information from self-supervised learning when only limited labels are available. To address this issue, this paper proposes a simple yet effective framework, active self-semi-supervised learning (AS3L). AS3L bootstraps semi-supervised models with prior pseudo-labels (PPL). These PPLs are obtained by label propagation over self-supervised features. Based on the observations the accuracy of PPL is not only affected by the quality of features but also by the selection of the labeled samples. We develop active learning and label propagation strategies to obtain accurate PPL. Consequently, our framework can significantly improve the performance of models in the case of limited annotations while demonstrating fast convergence. On the image classification tasks across four datasets, our method outperforms the baseline by an average of 5.4\%. Additionally, it achieves the same accuracy as the baseline method in about 1/3 of the training time. 当应用于不同的实际领域时，训练具有有限注释的深度模型提出了重大挑战。将半监督学习与自监督模型结合使用可以提高标签效率。然而，这种方法在减少标签需求方面面临着瓶颈。我们观察到，当只有有限的标签可用时，半监督模型会破坏来自自我监督学习的有价值的信息。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一个简单而有效的框架，即主动自半监督学习（AS3L）。 AS3L 使用先验伪标签 (PPL) 引导半监督模型。这些 PPL 是通过自监督特征上的标签传播获得的。根据观察，PPL 的准确性不仅受到特征质量的影响，还受到标记样本选择的影响。我们开发主动学习和标签传播策略以获得准确的 PPL。因此，我们的框架可以在注释有限的情况下显着提高模型的性能，同时展示快速收敛。在四个数据集的图像分类任务中，我们的方法平均优于基线 5.4%。此外，它在大约 1/3 的训练时间内达到了与基线方法相同的精度。 本文提出了一种名为主动自半监督学习（AS3L）的框架，以提高在有限标注样本下的模型性能。 Ziting Wen,Oscar Pizarro,Stefan Williams cs.CV

authors_text: Yuecong Xu,Jianfei Yang,Haozhi Cao,Keyu Wu,Wu Min,Zhenghua Chen
title: Source-free Video Domain Adaptation by Learning Temporal Consistency for Action Recognition
title_zh: 通过学习时间一致性进行动作识别的无源视频域适应
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022, update to camera-ready version with updated title. 22 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022, update to camera-ready version with updated title. 22 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables
abstract: Video-based Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) methods improve the robustness of video models, enabling them to be applied to action recognition tasks across different environments. However, these methods require constant access to source data during the adaptation process. Yet in many real-world applications, subjects and scenes in the source video domain should be irrelevant to those in the target video domain. With the increasing emphasis on data privacy, such methods that require source data access would raise serious privacy issues. Therefore, to cope with such concern, a more practical domain adaptation scenario is formulated as the Source-Free Video-based Domain Adaptation (SFVDA). Though there are a few methods for Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) on image data, these methods yield degenerating performance in SFVDA due to the multi-modality nature of videos, with the existence of additional temporal features. In this paper, we propose a novel Attentive Temporal Consistent Network (ATCoN) to address SFVDA by learning temporal consistency, guaranteed by two novel consistency objectives, namely feature consistency and source prediction consistency, performed across local temporal features. ATCoN further constructs effective overall temporal features by attending to local temporal features based on prediction confidence. Empirical results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of ATCoN across various cross-domain action recognition benchmarks.
summary: Video-based Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) methods improve the robustness of video models, enabling them to be applied to action recognition tasks across different environments. However, these methods require constant access to source data during the adaptation process. Yet in many real-world applications, subjects and scenes in the source video domain should be irrelevant to those in the target video domain. With the increasing emphasis on data privacy, such methods that require source data access would raise serious privacy issues. Therefore, to cope with such concern, a more practical domain adaptation scenario is formulated as the Source-Free Video-based Domain Adaptation (SFVDA). Though there are a few methods for Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) on image data, these methods yield degenerating performance in SFVDA due to the multi-modality nature of videos, with the existence of additional temporal features. In this paper, we propose a novel Attentive Temporal Consistent Network (ATCoN) to address SFVDA by learning temporal consistency, guaranteed by two novel consistency objectives, namely feature consistency and source prediction consistency, performed across local temporal features. ATCoN further constructs effective overall temporal features by attending to local temporal features based on prediction confidence. Empirical results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of ATCoN across various cross-domain action recognition benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的无监督域适应（VUDA）方法提高了视频模型的鲁棒性，使其能够应用于跨不同环境的动作识别任务。然而，这些方法需要在适应过程中不断访问源数据。然而，在许多实际应用中，源视频域中的主题和场景应该与目标视频域中的主题和场景无关。随着人们对数据隐私的日益重视，这种需要访问源数据的方法将引发严重的隐私问题。因此，为了解决这种问题，一种更实用的域适应场景被制定为基于无源视频的域适应（SFVDA）。尽管有几种针对图像数据的无源域适应 (SFDA) 方法，但由于视频的多模态性质以及附加时间特征的存在，这些方法在 SFVDA 中产生性能退化。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的关注时间一致性网络（ATCoN），通过学习时间一致性来解决 SFVDA，由两个新颖的一致性目标保证，即跨局部时间特征执行的特征一致性和源预测一致性。 ATCoN 通过基于预测置信度关注局部时间特征，进一步构建有效的整体时间特征。实证结果证明了 ATCoN 在各种跨域动作识别基准中的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需源域数据的视频领域自适应方法ATCoN，通过学习时间一致性解决跨领域动作识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频领域自适应方法依赖源域数据，存在隐私风险且不适用于实际场景，需开发无需源数据的源自由视频领域自适应（SFVDA）方法。
AI.method: 设计Attentive Temporal Consistent Network（ATCoN），通过特征一致性与源预测一致性两个目标学习局部时间特征，并基于预测置信度构建全局时间特征。
AI.result: 在多个跨领域动作识别基准测试中，ATCoN达到最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: ATCoN通过时间一致性学习有效解决源自由视频领域自适应问题，为隐私敏感场景提供可行方案。

Yet in many real-world applications, subjects and scenes in the source video domain should be irrelevant to those in the target video domain. With the increasing emphasis on data privacy, such methods that require source data access would raise serious privacy issues. Therefore, to cope with such concern, a more practical domain adaptation scenario is formulated as the Source-Free Video-based Domain Adaptation (SFVDA). In this paper, we propose a novel Attentive Temporal Consistent Network (ATCoN) to address SFVDA by learning temporal consistency, guaranteed by two novel consistency objectives, namely feature consistency and source prediction consistency, performed across local temporal features. ATCoN further constructs effective overall temporal features by attending to local temporal features based on prediction confidence. authors_text: Kei Kimura,Kotaro Nakayama
title: Neighborhood persistency of the linear optimization relaxation of integer linear optimization
title_zh: 整数线性优化的线性优化松弛的邻域持续性
abstract: For an integer linear optimization (ILO) problem, persistency of its linear optimization (LO) relaxation is a property that for every optimal solution of the relaxation that assigns integer values to some variables, there exists an optimal solution of the ILO problem in which these variables retain the same values. Although persistency has been used to develop heuristic, approximation, and fixed-parameter algorithms for special cases of ILO, its applicability remains unknown in the literature. In this paper we reveal a maximal subclass of ILO such that its LO relaxation has persistency. Specifically, we show that the LO relaxation of ILO on unit-two-variable-per-inequality (UTVPI) systems has persistency and is (in a certain sense) maximal among such ILO. Our persistency result generalizes the results of Nemhauser and Trotter, Hochbaum et al., and Fiorini et al. Even more, we propose a stronger property called \emph{neighborhood persistency} and show that the LO relaxation of ILO on UTVPI systems in general has this property. Using this stronger result, we obtain a fixed-parameter algorithm (where the parameter is the solution size) and another proof of two-approximability for ILO on UTVPI systems where objective functions and variables are non-negative.
summary: For an integer linear optimization (ILO) problem, persistency of its linear optimization (LO) relaxation is a property that for every optimal solution of the relaxation that assigns integer values to some variables, there exists an optimal solution of the ILO problem in which these variables retain the same values. Although persistency has been used to develop heuristic, approximation, and fixed-parameter algorithms for special cases of ILO, its applicability remains unknown in the literature. In this paper we reveal a maximal subclass of ILO such that its LO relaxation has persistency. Specifically, we show that the LO relaxation of ILO on unit-two-variable-per-inequality (UTVPI) systems has persistency and is (in a certain sense) maximal among such ILO. Our persistency result generalizes the results of Nemhauser and Trotter, Hochbaum et al., and Fiorini et al. Even more, we propose a stronger property called \emph{neighborhood persistency} and show that the LO relaxation of ILO on UTVPI systems in general has this property. Using this stronger result, we obtain a fixed-parameter algorithm (where the parameter is the solution size) and another proof of two-approximability for ILO on UTVPI systems where objective functions and variables are non-negative.
abstract_zh: 对于整数线性优化 (ILO) 问题，其线性优化 (LO) 松弛的持久性是这样一个属性：对于将整数值分配给某些变量的松弛的每个最优解，都存在一个 ILO 问题的最优解，其中这些变量保留相同的值。尽管持久性已被用于开发针对 ILO 特殊情况的启发式、近似式和固定参数算法，但其适用性在文献中仍然未知。在本文中，我们揭示了 ILO 的最大子类，使其 LO 松弛具有持久性。具体来说，我们表明 ILO 在每不等式两个变量 (UTVPI) 系统上的 LO 松弛具有持久性，并且（在某种意义上）在此类 ILO 中是最大的。我们的持久性结果概括了 Nemhauser 和 Trotter、Hochbaum 等人和 Fiorini 等人的结果。更重要的是，我们提出了一个更强的属性，称为 \emph{邻域持久性}，并表明 ILO 在 UTVPI 系统上的 LO 松弛通常具有此属性。利用这个更强的结果，我们获得了一个固定参数算法（其中参数是解的大小），以及 ILO 在 UTVPI 系统上的二次逼近性的另一个证明，其中目标函数和变量都是非负的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了整数线性优化问题的线性优化松弛的持久性性质，特别是在单位双变量不等式系统（UTVPI）中的应用。
AI.motivation: 持久性性质在开发启发式算法和近似算法中具有重要作用，但其适用范围尚不明确。本文旨在揭示具有持久性的整数线性优化问题的子类，并扩展相关理论。
AI.method: 通过分析UTVPI系统的结构，引入更强的『邻域持久性』概念，并结合参数化算法与近似证明方法进行理论推导。
AI.result: 证明了UTVPI系统的LO松弛具有持久性且是最大子类，提出了基于邻域持久性的固定参数算法，并重新证明了非负情形下的两近似性。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了经典结果，为UTVPI类整数规划问题提供了理论支持与实用算法框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了整数线性优化问题的线性优化松弛的持久性性质，特别是在单位双变量不等式系统（UTVPI）中的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 持久性性质在开发启发式算法和近似算法中具有重要作用，但其适用范围尚不明确。本文旨在揭示具有持久性的整数线性优化问题的子类，并扩展相关理论。
ai_content.method: 通过分析UTVPI系统的结构，引入更强的『邻域持久性』概念，并结合参数化算法与近似证明方法进行理论推导。
ai_content.result: 证明了UTVPI系统的LO松弛具有持久性且是最大子类，提出了基于邻域持久性的固定参数算法，并重新证明了非负情形下的两近似性。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文扩展了经典结果，为UTVPI类整数规划问题提供了理论支持与实用算法框架。

search_text: Neighborhood persistency of the linear optimization relaxation of integer linear optimization 整数线性优化的线性优化松弛的邻域持续性 For an integer linear optimization (ILO) problem, persistency of its linear optimization (LO) relaxation is a property that for every optimal solution of the relaxation that assigns integer values to some variables, there exists an optimal solution of the ILO problem in which these variables retain the same values. Although persistency has been used to develop heuristic, approximation, and fixed-parameter algorithms for special cases of ILO, its applicability remains unknown in the literature. In this paper we reveal a maximal subclass of ILO such that its LO relaxation has persistency. Specifically, we show that the LO relaxation of ILO on unit-two-variable-per-inequality (UTVPI) systems has persistency and is (in a certain sense) maximal among such ILO. Our persistency result generalizes the results of Nemhauser and Trotter, Hochbaum et al., and Fiorini et al. Even more, we propose a stronger property called \emph{neighborhood persistency} and show that the LO relaxation of ILO on UTVPI systems in general has this property. Using this stronger result, we obtain a fixed-parameter algorithm (where the parameter is the solution size) and another proof of two-approximability for ILO on UTVPI systems where objective functions and variables are non-negative. 对于整数线性优化 (ILO) 问题，其线性优化 (LO) 松弛的持久性是这样一个属性：对于将整数值分配给某些变量的松弛的每个最优解，都存在一个 ILO 问题的最优解，其中这些变量保留相同的值。尽管持久性已被用于开发针对 ILO 特殊情况的启发式、近似式和固定参数算法，但其适用性在文献中仍然未知。在本文中，我们揭示了 ILO 的最大子类，使其 LO 松弛具有持久性。具体来说，我们表明 ILO 在每不等式两个变量 (UTVPI) 系统上的 LO 松弛具有持久性，并且（在某种意义上）在此类 ILO 中是最大的。我们的持久性结果概括了 Nemhauser 和 Trotter、Hochbaum 等人和 Fiorini 等人的结果。更重要的是，我们提出了一个更强的属性，称为 \emph{邻域持久性}，并表明 ILO 在 UTVPI 系统上的 LO 松弛通常具有此属性。利用这个更强的结果，我们获得了一个固定参数算法（其中参数是解的大小），以及 ILO 在 UTVPI 系统上的二次逼近性的另一个证明，其中目标函数和变量都是非负的。 本文研究了整数线性优化问题的线性优化松弛的持久性性质，特别是在单位双变量不等式系统（UTVPI）中的应用。 Kei Kimura,Kotaro Nakayama math.OC,cs.DS

authors_text: Qing Su,Shihao Ji
title: ChiTransformer:Towards Reliable Stereo from Cues
title_zh: ChiTransformer：从提示迈向可靠的立体声
comment: Published as a main conference paper at CVPR 2022
comments: Published as a main conference paper at CVPR 2022
abstract: Current stereo matching techniques are challenged by restricted searching space, occluded regions and sheer size. While single image depth estimation is spared from these challenges and can achieve satisfactory results with the extracted monocular cues, the lack of stereoscopic relationship renders the monocular prediction less reliable on its own, especially in highly dynamic or cluttered environments. To address these issues in both scenarios, we present an optic-chiasm-inspired self-supervised binocular depth estimation method, wherein a vision transformer (ViT) with gated positional cross-attention (GPCA) layers is designed to enable feature-sensitive pattern retrieval between views while retaining the extensive context information aggregated through self-attentions. Monocular cues from a single view are thereafter conditionally rectified by a blending layer with the retrieved pattern pairs. This crossover design is biologically analogous to the optic-chasma structure in the human visual system and hence the name, ChiTransformer. Our experiments show that this architecture yields substantial improvements over state-of-the-art self-supervised stereo approaches by 11%, and can be used on both rectilinear and non-rectilinear (e.g., fisheye) images. Project is available at https://github.com/ISL-CV/ChiTransformer.
summary: Current stereo matching techniques are challenged by restricted searching space, occluded regions and sheer size. While single image depth estimation is spared from these challenges and can achieve satisfactory results with the extracted monocular cues, the lack of stereoscopic relationship renders the monocular prediction less reliable on its own, especially in highly dynamic or cluttered environments. To address these issues in both scenarios, we present an optic-chiasm-inspired self-supervised binocular depth estimation method, wherein a vision transformer (ViT) with gated positional cross-attention (GPCA) layers is designed to enable feature-sensitive pattern retrieval between views while retaining the extensive context information aggregated through self-attentions. Monocular cues from a single view are thereafter conditionally rectified by a blending layer with the retrieved pattern pairs. This crossover design is biologically analogous to the optic-chasma structure in the human visual system and hence the name, ChiTransformer. Our experiments show that this architecture yields substantial improvements over state-of-the-art self-supervised stereo approaches by 11%, and can be used on both rectilinear and non-rectilinear (e.g., fisheye) images. Project is available at https://github.com/ISL-CV/ChiTransformer.
abstract_zh: 当前的立体匹配技术受到有限的搜索空间、遮挡区域和巨大尺寸的挑战。虽然单图像深度估计可以免受这些挑战，并且可以通过提取的单目线索获得令人满意的结果，但缺乏立体关系使得单目预测本身不太可靠，特别是在高度动态或杂乱的环境中。为了解决这两种情况下的这些问题，我们提出了一种受视交叉启发的自监督双目深度估计方法，其中设计了具有门控位置交叉注意（GPCA）层的视觉变换器（ViT），以实现视图之间的特征敏感模式检索，同时保留通过自注意聚合的广泛上下文信息。此后，来自单个视图的单目线索将通过混合层与检索到的模式对进行有条件的校正。这种交叉设计在生物学上类似于人类视觉系统中的视裂隙结构，因此得名 ChiTransformer。我们的实验表明，这种架构比最先进的自监督立体方法有了 11% 的实质性改进，并且可以用于直线和非直线（例如鱼眼）图像。项目可在 https://github.com/ISL-CV/ChiTransformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChiTransformer，一种受人类视觉系统视神经交叉启发的自监督双目深度估计方法，旨在解决立体匹配中的搜索空间限制、遮挡区域和图像尺寸问题。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配技术受限于搜索空间、遮挡区域和图像尺寸，而单目深度估计虽能利用单视角线索但缺乏立体关系可靠性。需结合两者优势以提升动态或复杂环境下的深度估计性能。
AI.method: 设计包含门控位置交叉注意力（GPCA）层的视觉Transformer（ViT），通过跨视角特征敏感模式检索与自注意力机制保留上下文信息，并利用混合层条件性修正单目线索，形成类视神经交叉的双目深度估计架构。
AI.result: 该方法在自监督立体匹配任务中较现有最佳方法提升11%，且适用于直线坐标和非直线坐标（如鱼眼）图像。
AI.conclusion: ChiTransformer通过生物启发的跨视角特征交互机制，有效融合单目线索与立体信息，在复杂场景下实现了更可靠的深度估计性能。
