authors_text: Zhuozhu Jian,Zihong Lu,Xiao Zhou,Bin Lan,Anxing Xiao,Xueqian Wang,Bin Liang
title: PUTN: A Plane-fitting based Uneven Terrain Navigation Framework
title_zh: PUTN：一种基于平面拟合的不均匀地形导航框架
comment: Accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: Accepted by IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Autonomous navigation of ground robots has been widely used in indoor structured 2D environments, but there are still many challenges in outdoor 3D unstructured environments, especially in rough, uneven terrains. This paper proposed a plane-fitting based uneven terrain navigation framework (PUTN) to solve this problem. The implementation of PUTN is divided into three steps. First, based on Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT), an improved sample-based algorithm called Plane Fitting RRT* (PF-RRT*) is proposed to obtain a sparse trajectory. Each sampling point corresponds to a custom traversability index and a fitted plane on the point cloud. These planes are connected in series to form a traversable strip. Second, Gaussian Process Regression is used to generate traversability of the dense trajectory interpolated from the sparse trajectory, and the sampling tree is used as the training set. Finally, local planning is performed using nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC). By adding the traversability index and uncertainty to the cost function, and adding obstacles generated by the real-time point cloud to the constraint function, a safe motion planning algorithm with smooth speed and strong robustness is available. Experiments in real scenarios are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the method. The source code is released for the reference of the community.
summary: Autonomous navigation of ground robots has been widely used in indoor structured 2D environments, but there are still many challenges in outdoor 3D unstructured environments, especially in rough, uneven terrains. This paper proposed a plane-fitting based uneven terrain navigation framework (PUTN) to solve this problem. The implementation of PUTN is divided into three steps. First, based on Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT), an improved sample-based algorithm called Plane Fitting RRT* (PF-RRT*) is proposed to obtain a sparse trajectory. Each sampling point corresponds to a custom traversability index and a fitted plane on the point cloud. These planes are connected in series to form a traversable strip. Second, Gaussian Process Regression is used to generate traversability of the dense trajectory interpolated from the sparse trajectory, and the sampling tree is used as the training set. Finally, local planning is performed using nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC). By adding the traversability index and uncertainty to the cost function, and adding obstacles generated by the real-time point cloud to the constraint function, a safe motion planning algorithm with smooth speed and strong robustness is available. Experiments in real scenarios are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the method. The source code is released for the reference of the community.
abstract_zh: 地面机器人自主导航已在室内结构化2D环境中得到广泛应用，但在室外3D非结构化环境中，特别是在崎岖不平的地形中，仍然存在许多挑战。本文提出了一种基于平面拟合的不平坦地形导航框架（PUTN）来解决这一问题。 PUTN的实施分为三个步骤。首先，基于快速探索随机树（RRT），提出了一种称为平面拟合RRT*（PF-RRT*）的改进的基于样本的算法来获得稀疏轨迹。每个采样点对应于一个自定义的可遍历性指数和点云上的拟合平面。这些平面串联起来形成一条可穿越的带。其次，利用高斯过程回归生成稀疏轨迹插值得到的稠密轨迹的可遍历性，并使用采样树作为训练集。最后，使用非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）执行局部规划。通过在代价函数中加入可通性指标和不确定性，在约束函数中加入实时点云产生的障碍物，可以得到速度平滑、鲁棒性强的安全运动规划算法。通过真实场景实验验证了该方法的有效性。源码发布出来供社区参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于平面拟合的不平坦地形导航框架PUTN，以解决地面机器人在户外复杂三维环境中的自主导航问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在户外不规则地形中存在路径规划不安全、适应性差等问题，需提升机器人在复杂地形中的鲁棒性和通过性。
AI.method: PUTN分三步实现：1）改进RRT*算法生成稀疏轨迹并拟合平面；2）通过高斯过程回归生成密集轨迹的可穿越性图；3）结合非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）进行局部规划，融合可穿越性指数与实时点云障碍约束。
AI.result: 实验验证了PUTN在真实场景中的有效性，算法具备平滑速度与强鲁棒性，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PUTN通过平面拟合与多阶段规划方法，为复杂地形下的安全导航提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: PUTN: A Plane-fitting based Uneven Terrain Navigation Framework PUTN：一种基于平面拟合的不均匀地形导航框架 Autonomous navigation of ground robots has been widely used in indoor structured 2D environments, but there are still many challenges in outdoor 3D unstructured environments, especially in rough, uneven terrains. This paper proposed a plane-fitting based uneven terrain navigation framework (PUTN) to solve this problem. The implementation of PUTN is divided into three steps. First, based on Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT), an improved sample-based algorithm called Plane Fitting RRT* (PF-RRT*) is proposed to obtain a sparse trajectory. Each sampling point corresponds to a custom traversability index and a fitted plane on the point cloud. These planes are connected in series to form a traversable strip. Second, Gaussian Process Regression is used to generate traversability of the dense trajectory interpolated from the sparse trajectory, and the sampling tree is used as the training set. Finally, local planning is performed using nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC). By adding the traversability index and uncertainty to the cost function, and adding obstacles generated by the real-time point cloud to the constraint function, a safe motion planning algorithm with smooth speed and strong robustness is available. Experiments in real scenarios are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the method. The source code is released for the reference of the community. 地面机器人自主导航已在室内结构化2D环境中得到广泛应用，但在室外3D非结构化环境中，特别是在崎岖不平的地形中，仍然存在许多挑战。本文提出了一种基于平面拟合的不平坦地形导航框架（PUTN）来解决这一问题。 PUTN的实施分为三个步骤。首先，基于快速探索随机树（RRT），提出了一种称为平面拟合RRT*（PF-RRT*）的改进的基于样本的算法来获得稀疏轨迹。每个采样点对应于一个自定义的可遍历性指数和点云上的拟合平面。这些平面串联起来形成一条可穿越的带。其次，利用高斯过程回归生成稀疏轨迹插值得到的稠密轨迹的可遍历性，并使用采样树作为训练集。最后，使用非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）执行局部规划。通过在代价函数中加入可通性指标和不确定性，在约束函数中加入实时点云产生的障碍物，可以得到速度平滑、鲁棒性强的安全运动规划算法。通过真实场景实验验证了该方法的有效性。源码发布出来供社区参考。 本文提出了一种基于平面拟合的不平坦地形导航框架PUTN，以解决地面机器人在户外复杂三维环境中的自主导航问题。 Zhuozhu Jian,Zihong Lu,Xiao Zhou,Bin Lan,Anxing Xiao,Xueqian Wang,Bin Liang cs.RO

authors_text: Keqian Li,Yifan Hu,Logan Palanisamy,Lisa Jones,Akshay Gupta,Jason Grigsby,Ili Selinger,Matt Gillingham,Fei Tan
title: MetaCon: Unified Predictive Segments System with Trillion Concept Meta-Learning
title_zh: MetaCon：具有万亿概念元学习的统一预测细分系统
abstract: Accurate understanding of users in terms of predicative segments play an essential role in the day to day operation of modern internet enterprises. Nevertheless, there are significant challenges that limit the quality of data, especially on long tail predictive tasks. In this work, we present MetaCon, our unified predicative segments system with scalable, trillion concepts meta learning that addresses these challenges. It builds on top of a flat concept representation that summarizes entities' heterogeneous digital footprint, jointly considers the entire spectrum of predicative tasks as a single learning task, and leverages principled meta learning approach with efficient first order meta-optimization procedure under a provable performance guarantee in order to solve the learning task. Experiments on both proprietary production datasets and public structured learning tasks demonstrate that MetaCon can lead to substantial improvements over state of the art recommendation and ranking approaches.
summary: Accurate understanding of users in terms of predicative segments play an essential role in the day to day operation of modern internet enterprises. Nevertheless, there are significant challenges that limit the quality of data, especially on long tail predictive tasks. In this work, we present MetaCon, our unified predicative segments system with scalable, trillion concepts meta learning that addresses these challenges. It builds on top of a flat concept representation that summarizes entities' heterogeneous digital footprint, jointly considers the entire spectrum of predicative tasks as a single learning task, and leverages principled meta learning approach with efficient first order meta-optimization procedure under a provable performance guarantee in order to solve the learning task. Experiments on both proprietary production datasets and public structured learning tasks demonstrate that MetaCon can lead to substantial improvements over state of the art recommendation and ranking approaches.
abstract_zh: 从预测细分角度准确理解用户对于现代互联网企业的日常运营至关重要。然而，仍然存在限制数据质量的重大挑战，尤其是在长尾预测任务上。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MetaCon，这是我们的统一预测细分系统，具有可扩展的万亿概念元学习，可以解决这些挑战。它建立在总结实体异构数字足迹的平面概念表示之上，共同将整个预测任务视为单个学习任务，并在可证明的性能保证下利用有原则的元学习方法和高效的一阶元优化过程来解决学习任务。对专有生产数据集和公共结构化学习任务的实验表明，MetaCon 可以比最先进的推荐和排名方法带来实质性改进。

AI.tldr: 提出MetaCon系统，解决长期尾部预测任务中的数据质量挑战，提升推荐和排序效果
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长期尾部预测任务中面临数据质量限制，需统一系统提升预测准确性
AI.method: 基于扁平概念表示，联合处理所有预测任务，结合元学习与一阶元优化算法进行高效训练
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验证明MetaCon在推荐和排序任务中显著优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: MetaCon通过统一框架和元学习有效解决长期尾部预测挑战，为实际应用提供高效解决方案

authors_text: Fei Sheng,Feng Xue,Yicong Chang,Wenteng Liang,Anlong Ming
title: Monocular Depth Distribution Alignment with Low Computation
title_zh: 低计算量的单目深度分布对齐
abstract: The performance of monocular depth estimation generally depends on the amount of parameters and computational cost. It leads to a large accuracy contrast between light-weight networks and heavy-weight networks, which limits their application in the real world. In this paper, we model the majority of accuracy contrast between them as the difference of depth distribution, which we call "Distribution drift". To this end, a distribution alignment network (DANet) is proposed. We firstly design a pyramid scene transformer (PST) module to capture inter-region interaction in multiple scales. By perceiving the difference of depth features between every two regions, DANet tends to predict a reasonable scene structure, which fits the shape of distribution to ground truth. Then, we propose a local-global optimization (LGO) scheme to realize the supervision of global range of scene depth. Thanks to the alignment of depth distribution shape and scene depth range, DANet sharply alleviates the distribution drift, and achieves a comparable performance with prior heavy-weight methods, but uses only 1% floating-point operations per second (FLOPs) of them. The experiments on two datasets, namely the widely used NYUDv2 dataset and the more challenging iBims-1 dataset, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. The source code is available at https://github.com/YiLiM1/DANet.
summary: The performance of monocular depth estimation generally depends on the amount of parameters and computational cost. It leads to a large accuracy contrast between light-weight networks and heavy-weight networks, which limits their application in the real world. In this paper, we model the majority of accuracy contrast between them as the difference of depth distribution, which we call "Distribution drift". To this end, a distribution alignment network (DANet) is proposed. We firstly design a pyramid scene transformer (PST) module to capture inter-region interaction in multiple scales. By perceiving the difference of depth features between every two regions, DANet tends to predict a reasonable scene structure, which fits the shape of distribution to ground truth. Then, we propose a local-global optimization (LGO) scheme to realize the supervision of global range of scene depth. Thanks to the alignment of depth distribution shape and scene depth range, DANet sharply alleviates the distribution drift, and achieves a comparable performance with prior heavy-weight methods, but uses only 1% floating-point operations per second (FLOPs) of them. The experiments on two datasets, namely the widely used NYUDv2 dataset and the more challenging iBims-1 dataset, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. The source code is available at https://github.com/YiLiM1/DANet.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计的性能通常取决于参数的数量和计算成本。它导致轻量级网络和重量级网络之间存在较大的精度反差，从而限制了它们在现实世界中的应用。在本文中，我们将它们之间的大部分精度对比建模为深度分布的差异，我们称之为“分布漂移”。为此，提出了分布对齐网络（DANet）。我们首先设计了一个金字塔场景转换器（PST）模块来捕获多个尺度的区域间交互。通过感知每两个区域之间深度特征的差异，DANet 倾向于预测合理的场景结构，使分布形状符合地面实况。然后，我们提出了一种局部全局优化（LGO）方案来实现场景深度全局范围的监督。由于深度分布形状和场景深度范围的对齐，DANet 极大地缓解了分布漂移，并实现了与先前重量级方法相当的性能，但每秒仅使用 1% 的浮点运算（FLOPs）。在两个数据集（即广泛使用的 NYUDv2 数据集和更具挑战性的 iBims-1 数据集）上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。源代码可在 https://github.com/YiLiM1/DANet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低计算量的单目深度估计方法，通过分布对齐减少轻量网络与重型网络之间的精度差距。
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计中轻量网络与重型网络存在显著精度差异，限制了其实际应用。作者将这种差异归因于深度分布差异（分布漂移），并提出解决方法。
AI.method: 设计金字塔场景变换器（PST）模块捕捉多尺度区域交互，并提出局部-全局优化（LGO）方案监督场景深度范围，通过分布对齐缓解分布漂移。
AI.result: 在NYUDv2和iBims-1数据集上实验表明，该方法在仅使用重型方法1%计算量的情况下达到相近性能。
AI.conclusion: DANet通过深度分布形状与场景深度范围的对齐，有效缓解分布漂移，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算成本。

The source code is available at https://github.com/YiLiM1/DANet. 单目深度估计的性能通常取决于参数的数量和计算成本。它导致轻量级网络和重量级网络之间存在较大的精度反差，从而限制了它们在现实世界中的应用。在本文中，我们将它们之间的大部分精度对比建模为深度分布的差异，我们称之为“分布漂移”。为此，提出了分布对齐网络（DANet）。我们首先设计了一个金字塔场景转换器（PST）模块来捕获多个尺度的区域间交互。通过感知每两个区域之间深度特征的差异，DANet 倾向于预测合理的场景结构，使分布形状符合地面实况。然后，我们提出了一种局部全局优化（LGO）方案来实现场景深度全局范围的监督。由于深度分布形状和场景深度范围的对齐，DANet 极大地缓解了分布漂移，并实现了与先前重量级方法相当的性能，但每秒仅使用 1% 的浮点运算（FLOPs）。在两个数据集（即广泛使用的 NYUDv2 数据集和更具挑战性的 iBims-1 数据集）上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。源代码可在 https://github.com/YiLiM1/DANet 获取。 本文提出一种低计算量的单目深度估计方法，通过分布对齐减少轻量网络与重型网络之间的精度差距。 Fei Sheng,Feng Xue,Yicong Chang,Wenteng Liang,Anlong Ming cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yicong Chang,Feng Xue,Fei Sheng,Wenteng Liang,Anlong Ming
title: Fast Road Segmentation via Uncertainty-aware Symmetric Network
title_zh: 通过不确定性感知对称网络进行快速道路分段
abstract: The high performance of RGB-D based road segmentation methods contrasts with their rare application in commercial autonomous driving, which is owing to two reasons: 1) the prior methods cannot achieve high inference speed and high accuracy in both ways; 2) the different properties of RGB and depth data are not well-exploited, limiting the reliability of predicted road. In this paper, based on the evidence theory, an uncertainty-aware symmetric network (USNet) is proposed to achieve a trade-off between speed and accuracy by fully fusing RGB and depth data. Firstly, cross-modal feature fusion operations, which are indispensable in the prior RGB-D based methods, are abandoned. We instead separately adopt two light-weight subnetworks to learn road representations from RGB and depth inputs. The light-weight structure guarantees the real-time inference of our method. Moreover, a multiscale evidence collection (MEC) module is designed to collect evidence in multiple scales for each modality, which provides sufficient evidence for pixel class determination. Finally, in uncertainty-aware fusion (UAF) module, the uncertainty of each modality is perceived to guide the fusion of the two subnetworks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy with real-time inference speed of 43+ FPS. The source code is available at https://github.com/morancyc/USNet.
summary: The high performance of RGB-D based road segmentation methods contrasts with their rare application in commercial autonomous driving, which is owing to two reasons: 1) the prior methods cannot achieve high inference speed and high accuracy in both ways; 2) the different properties of RGB and depth data are not well-exploited, limiting the reliability of predicted road. In this paper, based on the evidence theory, an uncertainty-aware symmetric network (USNet) is proposed to achieve a trade-off between speed and accuracy by fully fusing RGB and depth data. Firstly, cross-modal feature fusion operations, which are indispensable in the prior RGB-D based methods, are abandoned. We instead separately adopt two light-weight subnetworks to learn road representations from RGB and depth inputs. The light-weight structure guarantees the real-time inference of our method. Moreover, a multiscale evidence collection (MEC) module is designed to collect evidence in multiple scales for each modality, which provides sufficient evidence for pixel class determination. Finally, in uncertainty-aware fusion (UAF) module, the uncertainty of each modality is perceived to guide the fusion of the two subnetworks. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy with real-time inference speed of 43+ FPS. The source code is available at https://github.com/morancyc/USNet.
abstract_zh: 基于RGB-D的道路分割方法的高性能与其在商业自动驾驶中的罕见应用形成鲜明对比，这是由于两个原因：1）现有方法无法同时实现高推理速度和高精度； 2）RGB和深度数据的不同属性没有得到很好的利用，限制了预测道路的可靠性。本文基于证据理论，提出了一种不确定性感知对称网络（USNet），通过充分融合RGB和深度数据来实现速度和精度之间的权衡。首先，放弃了现有基于 RGB-D 的方法中必不可少的跨模态特征融合操作。相反，我们分别采用两个轻量级子网络来从 RGB 和深度输入中学习道路表示。轻量级结构保证了我们方法的实时推理。此外，多尺度证据收集（MEC）模块旨在为每种模态收集多个尺度的证据，这为像素类别的确定提供了足够的证据。最后，在不确定性感知融合（UAF）模块中，感知每种模态的不确定性以指导两个子网络的融合。实验结果表明，我们的方法达到了最先进的精度，实时推理速度达到 43+ FPS。源代码可在 https://github.com/morancyc/USNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于证据理论的不确定性感知对称网络（USNet），用于实现RGB-D数据的快速且高精度道路分割。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D道路分割方法在商业自动驾驶中应用较少，主要因无法兼顾推理速度与精度，且未充分利用RGB与深度数据的特性。
AI.method: 设计轻量级双子网络分别处理RGB和深度数据，引入多尺度证据收集模块（MEC）和不确定性感知融合模块（UAF），通过证据理论实现跨模态不确定性引导的融合。
AI.result: 在保持实时推理速度（43+ FPS）的同时达到最先进的分割精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: USNet通过分离处理与不确定性感知融合，在速度与精度间取得平衡，为自动驾驶提供可靠的道路分割方案。

authors_text: Lunjia Hu,Charlotte Peale,Omer Reingold
title: Metric Entropy Duality and the Sample Complexity of Outcome Indistinguishability
title_zh: 度量熵对偶性和结果不可区分性的样本复杂性
abstract: We give the first sample complexity characterizations for outcome indistinguishability, a theoretical framework of machine learning recently introduced by Dwork, Kim, Reingold, Rothblum, and Yona (STOC 2021). In outcome indistinguishability, the goal of the learner is to output a predictor that cannot be distinguished from the target predictor by a class $D$ of distinguishers examining the outcomes generated according to the predictors' predictions. In the distribution-specific and realizable setting where the learner is given the data distribution together with a predictor class $P$ containing the target predictor, we show that the sample complexity of outcome indistinguishability is characterized by the metric entropy of $P$ w.r.t. the dual Minkowski norm defined by $D$, and equivalently by the metric entropy of $D$ w.r.t. the dual Minkowski norm defined by $P$. This equivalence makes an intriguing connection to the long-standing metric entropy duality conjecture in convex geometry. Our sample complexity characterization implies a variant of metric entropy duality, which we show is nearly tight. In the distribution-free setting, we focus on the case considered by Dwork et al. where $P$ contains all possible predictors, hence the sample complexity only depends on $D$. In this setting, we show that the sample complexity of outcome indistinguishability is characterized by the fat-shattering dimension of $D$. We also show a strong sample complexity separation between realizable and agnostic outcome indistinguishability in both the distribution-free and the distribution-specific settings. This is in contrast to distribution-free (resp. distribution-specific) PAC learning where the sample complexity in both the realizable and the agnostic settings can be characterized by the VC dimension (resp. metric entropy).
summary: We give the first sample complexity characterizations for outcome indistinguishability, a theoretical framework of machine learning recently introduced by Dwork, Kim, Reingold, Rothblum, and Yona (STOC 2021). In outcome indistinguishability, the goal of the learner is to output a predictor that cannot be distinguished from the target predictor by a class $D$ of distinguishers examining the outcomes generated according to the predictors' predictions. In the distribution-specific and realizable setting where the learner is given the data distribution together with a predictor class $P$ containing the target predictor, we show that the sample complexity of outcome indistinguishability is characterized by the metric entropy of $P$ w.r.t. the dual Minkowski norm defined by $D$, and equivalently by the metric entropy of $D$ w.r.t. the dual Minkowski norm defined by $P$. This equivalence makes an intriguing connection to the long-standing metric entropy duality conjecture in convex geometry. Our sample complexity characterization implies a variant of metric entropy duality, which we show is nearly tight. In the distribution-free setting, we focus on the case considered by Dwork et al. where $P$ contains all possible predictors, hence the sample complexity only depends on $D$. In this setting, we show that the sample complexity of outcome indistinguishability is characterized by the fat-shattering dimension of $D$. We also show a strong sample complexity separation between realizable and agnostic outcome indistinguishability in both the distribution-free and the distribution-specific settings. This is in contrast to distribution-free (resp. distribution-specific) PAC learning where the sample complexity in both the realizable and the agnostic settings can be characterized by the VC dimension (resp. metric entropy).
abstract_zh: 我们给出了结果不可区分性的第一个样本复杂性特征，这是 Dwork、Kim、Reingold、Rothblum 和 Yona 最近提出的机器学习理论框架 (STOC 2021)。在结果不可区分性中，学习器的目标是输出一个预测器，该预测器无法通过检查根据预测器的预测生成的结果的 $D$ 类区分器来与目标预测器区分开。在特定于分布且可实现的设置中，向学习者提供数据分布以及包含目标预测变量的预测变量类 $P$，我们表明结果不可区分性的样本复杂性由 $P$ w.r.t. 的度量熵来表征。由 $D$ 定义的对偶闵可夫斯基范数，等效地由 $D$ w.r.t. 的度量熵定义。 $P$ 定义的对偶闵可夫斯基范数。这种等价性与凸几何中长期存在的度量熵对偶猜想建立了有趣的联系。我们的样本复杂性表征意味着度量熵对偶性的一种变体，我们证明它几乎是严格的。在无分发环境中，我们重点关注 Dwork 等人考虑的案例。其中 $P$ 包含所有可能的预测变量，因此样本复杂度仅取决于 $D$。在这种情况下，我们表明结果不可区分性的样本复杂性由 $D$ 的脂肪粉碎维度来表征。我们还展示了在无分布和特定分布设置中可实现结果和不可知结果之间的强大样本复杂性分离。这与无分布（或特定分布）PAC 学习形成对比，其中可实现和不可知设置中的样本复杂性都可以通过 VC 维度（或度量熵）来表征。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了结果不可区分性（outcome indistinguishability）的样本复杂度，并揭示了其与度量熵对偶性的联系。
AI.motivation: 结果不可区分性是机器学习领域的一个新理论框架，但其样本复杂度缺乏明确表征，且与凸几何中的度量熵对偶猜想存在潜在关联，需进一步探索。
AI.method: 通过分析分布特定与分布无关两种设置，结合度量熵和fat-shattering维数，推导样本复杂度的数学表征，并对比可实现与不可知学习场景的差异。
AI.result: 在分布特定设置中，样本复杂度由P与D的对偶度量熵表征；在分布无关设置中，由D的fat-shattering维数决定。同时证明了与PAC学习的样本复杂度差异。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了结果不可区分性样本复杂度的数学本质，验证了度量熵对偶性的变体，并突显了其与传统PAC学习在样本复杂度上的显著区别。

In this setting, we show that the sample complexity of outcome indistinguishability is characterized by the fat-shattering dimension of $D$. We also show a strong sample complexity separation between realizable and agnostic outcome indistinguishability in both the distribution-free and the distribution-specific settings. This is in contrast to distribution-free (resp. distribution-specific) PAC learning where the sample complexity in both the realizable and the agnostic settings can be characterized by the VC dimension (resp. metric entropy). 我们给出了结果不可区分性的第一个样本复杂性特征，这是 Dwork、Kim、Reingold、Rothblum 和 Yona 最近提出的机器学习理论框架 (STOC 2021)。在结果不可区分性中，学习器的目标是输出一个预测器，该预测器无法通过检查根据预测器的预测生成的结果的 $D$ 类区分器来与目标预测器区分开。在特定于分布且可实现的设置中，向学习者提供数据分布以及包含目标预测变量的预测变量类 $P$，我们表明结果不可区分性的样本复杂性由 $P$ w.r.t. 的度量熵来表征。由 $D$ 定义的对偶闵可夫斯基范数，等效地由 $D$ w.r.t. 的度量熵定义。 $P$ 定义的对偶闵可夫斯基范数。这种等价性与凸几何中长期存在的度量熵对偶猜想建立了有趣的联系。我们的样本复杂性表征意味着度量熵对偶性的一种变体，我们证明它几乎是严格的。在无分发环境中，我们重点关注 Dwork 等人考虑的案例。其中 $P$ 包含所有可能的预测变量，因此样本复杂度仅取决于 $D$。在这种情况下，我们表明结果不可区分性的样本复杂性由 $D$ 的脂肪粉碎维度来表征。我们还展示了在无分布和特定分布设置中可实现结果和不可知结果之间的强大样本复杂性分离。这与无分布（或特定分布）PAC 学习形成对比，其中可实现和不可知设置中的样本复杂性都可以通过 VC 维度（或度量熵）来表征。 本文研究了结果不可区分性（outcome indistinguishability）的样本复杂度，并揭示了其与度量熵对偶性的联系。 Lunjia Hu,Charlotte Peale,Omer Reingold cs.LG,cs.CC,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Cristiano Fanelli
title: Design of Detectors at the Electron Ion Collider with Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 人工智能电子离子对撞机探测器设计
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) for design is a relatively new but active area of research across many disciplines. Surprisingly when it comes to designing detectors with AI this is an area at its infancy. The Electron Ion Collider is the ultimate machine to study the strong force. The EIC is a large-scale experiment with an integrated detector that extends for about $\pm$35 meters to include the central, far-forward, and far-backward regions. The design of the central detector is made by multiple sub-detectors, each in principle characterized by a multidimensional design space and multiple design criteria also called objectives. Simulations with Geant4 are typically compute intensive, and the optimization of the detector design may include non-differentiable terms as well as noisy objectives. In this context, AI can offer state of the art solutions to solve complex combinatorial problems in an efficient way. In particular, one of the proto-collaborations, ECCE, has explored during the detector proposal the possibility of using multi-objective optimization to design the tracking system of the EIC detector. This document provides an overview of these techniques and recent progress made during the EIC detector proposal. Future high energy nuclear physics experiments can leverage AI-based strategies to design more efficient detectors by optimizing their performance driven by physics criteria and minimizing costs for their realization.

Surprisingly when it comes to designing detectors with AI this is an area at its infancy. The Electron Ion Collider is the ultimate machine to study the strong force. The EIC is a large-scale experiment with an integrated detector that extends for about $\pm$35 meters to include the central, far-forward, and far-backward regions. The design of the central detector is made by multiple sub-detectors, each in principle characterized by a multidimensional design space and multiple design criteria also called objectives. Simulations with Geant4 are typically compute intensive, and the optimization of the detector design may include non-differentiable terms as well as noisy objectives. In this context, AI can offer state of the art solutions to solve complex combinatorial problems in an efficient way. In particular, one of the proto-collaborations, ECCE, has explored during the detector proposal the possibility of using multi-objective optimization to design the tracking system of the EIC detector. This document provides an overview of these techniques and recent progress made during the EIC detector proposal. Future high energy nuclear physics experiments can leverage AI-based strategies to design more efficient detectors by optimizing their performance driven by physics criteria and minimizing costs for their realization.
abstract_zh: 用于设计的人工智能 (AI) 是一个相对较新但活跃的跨多个学科的研究领域。令人惊讶的是，当谈到使用人工智能设计探测器时，这个领域还处于起步阶段。电子离子对撞机是研究强力的终极机器。 EIC 是一项大型实验，采用集成探测器，延伸约 35 米，包括中央、最前方和最后方区域。中心探测器的设计由多个子探测器组成，每个子探测器原则上都具有多维设计空间和多个设计标准（也称为目标）的特征。 Geant4 的模拟通常是计算密集型的，探测器设计的优化可能包括不可微项以及噪声目标。在这种背景下，人工智能可以提供最先进的解决方案，以有效的方式解决复杂的组合问题。特别是，原始合作之一 ECCE 在探测器提案期间探索了使用多目标优化来设计 EIC 探测器跟踪系统的可能性。本文档概述了这些技术以及 EIC 探测器提案期间取得的最新进展。未来的高能核物理实验可以利用基于人工智能的策略，通过优化物理标准驱动的性能并最​​大限度地降低实现成本来设计更高效的探测器。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在电子离子对撞机（EIC）探测器设计中应用人工智能（AI）技术，以优化探测器性能并降低设计成本。
AI.motivation: 传统探测器设计依赖计算密集型模拟（如Geant4），且需处理多目标优化和非微分问题，效率低下且成本高昂。
AI.method: 采用多目标优化算法，结合AI技术探索EIC探测器跟踪系统的最优设计参数。
AI.result: 总结了ECCE合作组在探测器提案阶段使用AI方法的初步成果及技术进展。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的优化策略可为未来高能核物理实验提供更高效、低成本的探测器设计方案。
